1Samuel23:19 Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ amwe moimĩĩte Zifu, makĩambata Gibea gwĩ Saũlũ, makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Daudi ehithĩĩte kũũrĩa gwitũ ng'ongoinĩ cia Horeshu kĩrĩmainĩ kĩa Hakila kĩrĩa kĩrĩ mwena wa na kĩanda wa werũ wa Judea." 
1Samuel23:24 Nao makiumagara, magĩcooka Zifu, magĩkinya kuo mbere ya Saũlũ. Daudi na andũ aake maarĩ werũinĩ wa Maoni, gĩtuambainĩ gĩtaarĩ na kĩndũ, mwena wa na kĩanda wa werũ wa Judea." 
1Samuel26:1 Ningĩ hagĩũka andũ moimĩĩte Zifu he Saũlũ o kũu Gibea, makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Daudi ehithĩĩte kĩrĩmainĩ kĩa Hakila, kĩrĩa kĩrĩ mũthiainĩ wa werũ wa Judea.”" 
Matthew1:1 Rĩĩrĩ nĩrĩo ibuku rĩrĩa rĩandĩkĩĩtwo ũhoro wa ndĩra cia rũruka rwa Jesũ Kristũ, ũrĩa warĩ wa mbarĩ ya Daudi, ũrĩa warĩ wa mbarĩ ya Aburahamu." 
Matthew1:2 Ũyũ nĩguo mũtaratara wa ndĩra cia rũruka rwake: Aburahamu aarĩ ithe wa Isaaka, naake Isaaka aarĩ ithe wa Jakubu, naake Jakubu aarĩ ithe wa Juda na aariũ a ithe," 
Matthew1:3 naake Juda aarĩ ithe wa Perezu na Zera, na nyina wao aarĩ Tamaru, naake Perezu aarĩ ithe wa Hezironi, naake Hezironi aarĩ ithe wa Ramu," 
Matthew1:4 naake Ramu aarĩ ithe wa Aminadabu, naake Aminadabu aarĩ ithe wa Nahashoni, naake Nahashoni aarĩ ithe wa Salimoni," 
Matthew1:5 naake Salimoni aarĩ ithe wa Boazu, na nyina aarĩ Rahabu, naake Boazu aarĩ ithe wa Obedi, na nyina aarĩ Ruthu, naake Obedi aarĩ ithe wa Jesii," 
Matthew1:6 naake Jesii aarĩ ithe wa Daudi ũrĩa warĩ mũthamaki. Naake Daudi aarĩ ithe wa Solomoni na nyina aarĩ mũtumia ũrĩa warĩ wa Uria," 
Matthew1:7 naake Solomoni aarĩ ithe wa Rehoboamu, naake Rehoboamu aarĩ ithe wa Abija, naake Abija aarĩ ithe wa Asa," 
Matthew1:8 naake Asa aarĩ ithe wa Jehoshafatu, naake Jehoshafatu aarĩ ithe wa Joramu, naake Joramu aarĩ ithe wa Uzia," 
Matthew1:9 naake Uzia aarĩ ithe wa Jothamu, naake Jothamu aarĩ Ithe wa Ahazu, naake Ahazu aarĩ ithe wa Hezekia," 
Matthew1:10 naake Hezekia aarĩ ithe wa Manase, naake Manase aarĩ ithe wa Amoni, naake Amoni aarĩ ithe wa Josia, naake Josia aarĩ ithe wa Jehoiakini na aariũ a ithe." 
Matthew1:11 naake Josia aarĩ ithe wa Jekonia na aariũ a ithe hĩndĩ ya gũthaamĩrio Babiloni. 
Matthew1:12 Na thuutha wa gũthaamĩrio Babiloni, Jekonia aarĩ ithe wa Shealitieli, naake Shealitieli aarĩ ithe wa Zerubabeli," 
Matthew1:13 naake Zerubabeli aarĩ ithe wa Abihudu, naake Abihudu aarĩ ithe wa Eliakimu, naake Eliakimu aarĩ ithe wa Azoro," 
Matthew1:14 naake Azoro aarĩ ithe wa Zadoku, naake Zadoku aarĩ ithe wa Akimu, naake Akimu aarĩ ithe wa Eliudi," 
Matthew1:15 naake Eliudi aarĩ ithe wa Eleazaru, naake Eleazaru aarĩ ithe wa Mathani, naake Mathani aarĩ ithe wa Jakubu." 
Matthew1:16 naake Jakubu aarĩ ithe wa Josefu ũrĩa warĩ mũthuuri wa Mariamu, ũrĩa waciarire Jesũ ũrĩa wĩtagwo Mesia." 
Matthew1:17 Kwoguo kwarĩ na njiarwa ikũmi na inya kuuma Aburahamu kinyagia mũthamaki Daudi, ingĩ ikũmi na inya kuuma mũthamaki Daudi kinyagia hĩndĩ ya gũthaamĩrio bũrũri wa Babiloni, na ingĩ ikũmi na inya kuuma hĩndĩ ya gũthaamio kinyagia gũciarwo kwa Mesia." 
Matthew1:18 Gũciarwo kwa Jesũ Kristũ gwatariĩ ta ũũ: Nyina Mariamu nĩorĩĩtio nĩ Josefu, no mataanahikania nĩamenyekire atĩ aarĩ na nda ya Roho Mũtheru." 
Matthew1:19 Naake mũthuuriwe Josefu, tondũ aarĩ mũndũ mũthingu na ndeendaga gũconorithia mũirĩĩtu ũcio, agĩciiria atigane naake na hitho." 
Matthew1:20 No hĩndĩ ĩyo eeciiragia ũrĩa angĩmũtiga, mũraika wa Mwathani akĩmuumĩrĩra kĩrootoinĩ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Josefu mũrũ wa Daudi, tiga gwĩtigĩra kũhikia Mariamu atuĩke mũtumia waku, nĩ ũndũ nda ĩyo arĩ nayo nĩ ya Roho Mũtheru." 
Matthew1:21 Mariamu nĩagaaciara mwana wa kahĩĩ, na rĩĩtwa rĩrĩa ũkaamũhe nĩ Jesũ, nĩ ũndũ nĩ we ũkaahonokia andũ aake kuuma meehiainĩ maao.”" 
Matthew1:22 Maũndũ maya moothe meekĩkire nĩ geetha ciugo iria ciaririo nĩ Mwathani ahũthĩrĩĩte mũnabii ihinge, rĩrĩa oigire:" 
Matthew1:23 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ, mũirĩĩtu thingi nĩakaagĩa nda, na nĩagaaciara mwana wa kahĩĩ, naake mwana ũcio ageetwo Imanueli” (narĩo rĩĩtwa rĩu rĩgĩtaũrwo nĩkuuga, “Ngai hamwe na ithuĩ.”)" 
Matthew1:24 Rĩrĩa Josefu ookĩrire kuuma toro akĩhikia Mariamu kũringana na ũrĩa mũraika wa Mwathani aamwathĩĩte. 
Matthew1:25 No rĩĩrĩ, ndaigana kũmũmenya kĩĩmwĩrĩ kinya hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aaheirwo mwana. Naake Josefu agĩtua mwana ũcio Jesũ." 
Matthew2:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Jesũ aaciarĩirwo itũũra rĩa Bethilehemu thĩinĩ wa Judea, hĩndĩ ya mũthamaki wetagwo Herode, athuuri maarĩ na ũũgĩ wa njata moimĩĩte mwena wa na irathĩro magĩũka Jerusalemu makĩũria atĩrĩ," 
Matthew2:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Jesũ aaciarĩirwo itũũra rĩa Bethilehemu thĩinĩ wa Judea, hĩndĩ ya mũthamaki wetagwo Herode, athuuri maarĩ na ũũgĩ wa njata moimĩĩte mwena wa na irathĩro magĩũka Jerusalemu makĩũria atĩrĩ," 
Matthew2:2 “Ũrĩa ũciarĩĩtwo arĩ mũthamaki wa Ayahudi arĩ kũ? Nĩtuonire njata yake mwena wa na irathĩro, na nĩkĩo tũũkĩĩte tũmũthaathaiye.”" 
Matthew2:3 Rĩrĩa mũthamaki Herode aiguire ũhoro ũcio nĩatangĩkire ngoro mũno, o hamwe na andũ oothe a kũu Jerusalemu." 
Matthew2:4 Agĩgĩĩta athĩnjĩri Ngai oothe arĩa anene, o hamwe na arutani a Watho, akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Mesia agaaciarĩrwo kũ?”" 
Matthew2:5 Nao makĩmũcookeria makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Agaaciarĩrwo itũũrainĩ rĩa Bethilehemu, thĩinĩ wa Juda, kũringana na ũrĩa kwandĩkĩĩtwo nĩ Mũnabii atĩ:" 
Matthew2:6 ‘Nawe Bethilehemu, bũrũriinĩ wa Judea, ti we mũniini kũrĩ matũũra moothe ma Juda; tondũ thĩinĩ waku nĩkuo gũkoima mũtongoria ũrĩa ũgaatongoragia andũ aakwa a Isiraeli.’ ”" 
Matthew2:6 ‘Nawe Bethilehemu, bũrũriinĩ wa Judea, ti we mũniini kũrĩ matũũra moothe ma Juda; tondũ thĩinĩ waku nĩkuo gũkoima mũtongoria ũrĩa ũgaatongoragia andũ aakwa a Isiraeli.’ ”" 
Matthew2:7 Naake Herode aigua ũguo agĩĩta athuuri acio maarĩ na ũũgĩ wa njata moimĩĩte mwena wa na irathĩro na hitho, agĩtuĩria kuuma kũrĩ o hĩndĩ ĩrĩa njata ĩyo yoneetwo." 
Matthew2:8 Agĩcooka akĩmatũma Bethilehemu akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Thiĩi mũgatuĩrie wega harĩa kaana karĩ, na mwakoona mũũke mũmenyithie nĩ geetha o na niĩ thiĩ ngagathaathaiye.”" 
Matthew2:9 Nao maigua ũrĩa mũthamaki aameerire magĩgĩĩthiĩra. Nayo njata ĩrĩa mooneete mwena wa na irathĩro ĩkĩmatongoria kinya ĩgĩthiĩ ĩkĩrũũgama igũrũ rĩa harĩa kaana kaarĩ. 
Matthew2:10 Nao moona njata ĩyo magĩkena gĩkeno kĩnene mũno. 
Matthew2:11 Na rĩĩrĩ, matoonya nyũmba makĩona kaana na nyina Mariamu, magĩturia ndu magĩgathaathaiya. Magĩcooka makĩohora iheeo ciao cia goro: thahabu, ũbaani, na manemane magĩkahe." 
Matthew2:12 Na rĩĩrĩ, athuuri acio maarĩ na ũũgĩ wa njata magĩkaanio nĩ Ngai kĩrootoinĩ makĩĩrwo matigacookere kũrĩ Herode, nĩ ũndũ ũcio, makĩinũka bũrũri wao magereire njĩra ĩngĩ." 
Matthew2:13 Na rĩĩrĩ, athuuri acio maarĩ na ũũgĩ wa njata marĩĩkia kũinũka, mũraika wa Mwathani akiumĩrĩra Josefu kĩrootoinĩ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ũkĩra woe kaana na nyina mũũrĩre bũrũri wa Misiri, mũikare kuo kinya ngaakwĩra, nĩ ũndũ Herode nĩarenda gũcaria kaana nĩ geetha akoorage.”" 
Matthew2:14 Naake Josefu agĩũkĩra agĩkĩoya kaana na nyina o ũtukũ, agĩthiĩ bũrũri wa Misiri," 
Matthew2:15 kũrĩa maikarire kinya hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Herode aakuire. Maũndũ macio meekĩkire nĩ geetha ciugo iria ciaririo nĩ Mwathani ahũthĩrĩĩte mũnabii ihinge rĩrĩa oigire atĩrĩ, “Nĩndeetire Mũrũ wakwa oime bũrũri wa Misiri.”" 
Matthew2:16 Rĩrĩa Herode aamenyire atĩ nĩkũheenio aaheeneetio nĩ athuuri acio maarĩ na ũũgĩ wa njata, moimĩĩte mwena wa na irathĩro akĩng'ũrĩka mũno, agĩathana kũu Bethilehemu guothe o hamwe na matũũra marĩa maagũthiũrũrũkĩirie atĩ twana tuothe twa tũhĩĩ twa mĩaka ĩĩrĩ gũcooka na thĩ, tũũragwo. Eekire ũguo kũringana na hĩndĩ ĩrĩa eerĩĩtwo nĩ athuuri acio atĩ njata nĩyoneetwo." 
Matthew2:17 Na hĩndĩ ĩyo rĩĩrĩ ciugo iria ciarĩĩtio nĩ mũnabii Jeremia igĩgĩkinya rĩrĩa oigĩĩte atĩrĩ: 
Matthew2:18 “Mũgambo nĩwaiguirwo Rama, wa kĩrĩro na kũgirĩka kũnene. Rakeli akĩrĩrĩra ciana ciake; na ndangĩakirĩkire, tondũ nĩciakuĩte.”" 
Matthew2:19 No rĩĩrĩ, rĩrĩa Herode aakuire, mũraika wa Mwathani nĩoimĩrĩire Josefu kĩrootoinĩ arĩ kũu bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri" 
Matthew2:20 akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ũkĩra woe kaana na nyina mũcooke bũrũriinĩ wa Isiraeli, tondũ arĩa meendaga gũkooraga nĩmakuĩte.”" 
Matthew2:21 Naake Josefu agĩgĩũkĩra, akĩoya kaana na nyina magĩcooka bũrũriinĩ wa Isiraeli." 
Matthew2:22 No rĩĩrĩ, hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Josefu aiguire atĩ Arikelau nĩ we wathanaga Judea ithenya rĩa ithe Herode, agĩĩtigĩra gũcooka kuo. Naake akaanio nĩ Ngai na njĩra ya kĩrooto, agĩthiĩ Galili," 
Matthew2:22 No rĩĩrĩ, hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Josefu aiguire atĩ Arikelau nĩ we wathanaga Judea ithenya rĩa ithe Herode, agĩĩtigĩra gũcooka kuo. Naake akaanio nĩ Ngai na njĩra ya kĩrooto, agĩthiĩ Galili," 
Matthew2:23 itũũrainĩ rĩa Nazarethi, agĩtũũra kuo nĩ geetha ũrĩa anabii moigĩĩte ũhinge atĩ: “Nĩgageetagwo Mũnazari.”" 
Matthew3:1 Matukũinĩ o macio Johana Mũbatithania agĩũka werũinĩ wa kũu Judea akĩhunjagia akiugaga atĩrĩ," 
Matthew3:1 Matukũinĩ o macio Johana Mũbatithania agĩũka werũinĩ wa kũu Judea akĩhunjagia akiugaga atĩrĩ," 
Matthew3:2 “Mwĩrireei meehia maanyu tondũ Ũthamaki wa igũrũ ũrĩ hakuhĩ!” 
Matthew3:3 Johana ũyũ nĩ we mũnabii Isaia aarĩĩtie ũhoro wake hĩndĩ ĩrĩa oigire atĩrĩ: “Kwĩ mũgambo wa mũndũ ũranĩrĩra werũinĩ akoiga atĩrĩ, ‘Haarĩriai barabara ya Mwathani, na mũrũngarie njĩra ciake!’ ”" 
Matthew3:4 Johana eekĩraga nguo yathondekeetwo na guoya wa ngamĩĩra, na akeyohaga mũcibi wa rũũa njohero, nacio irio ciake ciakoragwo irĩ ngigĩ na ũũkĩ wa gĩthaka." 
Matthew3:5 Nao andũ magĩũka kũrĩ we moimĩĩte Jerusalemu na bũrũriinĩ wa Judea guothe o na kuuma bũrũri wothe ũrĩa wahakanĩĩte na rũũĩ rwa Jorodani. 
Matthew3:5 Nao andũ magĩũka kũrĩ we moimĩĩte Jerusalemu na bũrũriinĩ wa Judea guothe o na kuuma bũrũri wothe ũrĩa wahakanĩĩte na rũũĩ rwa Jorodani. 
Matthew3:6 Makiumbũra meehia maao, naake akimabatithĩria rũũĩinĩ rwa Jorodani." 
Matthew3:7 Na hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Johana oonire Afarisai aingĩ na Asadukai magĩũka kũrĩ we nĩ geetha amabatithie akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Inyuĩ ciana ici cia nduĩra, nũũ ũmwĩrĩĩte atĩ no mũhote kũũrĩra maraakara ma Ngai marĩa makirie gũũka?" 
Matthew3:8 Ĩkaai ciĩko njega cia kuonania atĩ nĩmwĩrirĩĩte meehia maanyu," 
Matthew3:9 na mũtikaae kwĩĩra na ngoro cianyu atĩrĩ, ‘Ithe witũ nĩ Aburahamu,’ nĩ gũkorwo ngũmwĩra atĩ Ngai no atũme mahiga maya matuĩke ciana cia Aburahamu." 
Matthew3:10 Ithanwa nĩrĩhaarĩrie rĩa gũtema mĩtĩ, mũtĩ o wothe ũtaciaraga maciaro meega nĩũgũtemwo ũikio mwakiinĩ." 
Matthew3:11 Niĩ ndĩmũbatithagia na maaĩ nĩ ũndũ nĩmwĩrirĩĩte meehia maanyu, no rĩĩrĩ, ũrĩa ũgũũka thuutha wakwa arĩmũbatithagia na Roho Mũtheru na mwaki. Ũcio e na hinya kũrĩ niĩ tondũ o na ndiagĩrĩire kũmũkuuĩra iraatũ ciake." 
Matthew3:12 Ningĩ e na gĩcungi gĩake gĩa kũhuuha ngano nĩ geetha atherie ngano, amĩige ikũmbĩ, namo mahuti amacine na mwaki ũtahoraga.”" 
Matthew3:13 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ akiuma Galili agĩthiĩ rũũĩinĩ rwa Jorodani akabatithio nĩ Johana. 
Matthew3:14 Naake Johana akĩenda kũmũgiria akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Kaĩ ũgũũka kũrĩ niĩ ngũbatithie na nĩ niĩ njagĩrĩirwo nĩgũũka kũrĩ we ũbatithie?”" 
Matthew3:15 Naake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Reke gũtuĩke ũguo, nĩ ũndũ wabatithia nĩtũgwĩka wendi wa Ngai.” Naake Johana agĩgĩĩtĩkĩra." 
Matthew3:16 Naake Jesũ arĩĩkia kũbatithio o ũguo, akiumĩra maaĩinĩ, narĩo igũrũ rĩkĩhingũka, akĩona Roho wa Ngai agĩikũrũka ahaana ta ndutuura akĩũmba igũrũ rĩake." 
Matthew3:17 Naguo mũgambo ũkiuma igũrũ ũkiuga atĩrĩ, “Ũyũ nĩ we Mũrũ wakwa ũrĩa nyenda, na nĩngenaga mũno nĩ we.”" 
Matthew4:1 Matukũinĩ o macio Roho agĩtongoria Jesũ akĩmũtwara werũinĩ nĩ geetha akagerio nĩ Mũcuukani. 
Matthew4:2 Naake aaniina mĩthenya na mootukũ mĩrongo ĩna ehingĩĩte kũrĩa na kũnyua akĩhũũta. 
Matthew4:3 Naake Mũcuukani agĩgĩũka kũrĩ we akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Angĩkorwo nĩ we Mũrũ wa Ngai-rĩ, atha mahiga maya matuĩke irio.”" 
Matthew4:4 Naake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Maandĩko moigĩĩte atĩrĩ, ‘To irio ciiki ingĩtũũria mũndũ muoyo, ĩndĩ no atũũrio nĩ kiugo o gĩothe kĩrĩa kiumaga kanua ka Ngai.’ ”" 
Matthew4:5 Naake Mũcuukani agĩcooka agĩtwara Jesũ Jerusalemu, itũũra rĩrĩa rĩtheru, akĩmũhaicia o gathũrũmũndũ ka Hekaarũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ," 
Matthew4:6 “Angĩkorwo nĩ we Mũrũ wa Ngai-rĩ, wĩgũithie thĩ nĩ ũndũ maandĩko moigĩĩte atĩrĩ, ‘Ngai nĩagaatha araika aake nĩ ũndũ waku, na nĩmagaakwanĩrĩria na mooko maao, nĩ geetha ndũkaagũthwo kũgũrũ nĩ ihiga.’ ”" 
Matthew4:7 Naake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “O rĩngĩ nĩkwandĩkĩĩtwo atĩrĩ, ‘Ndũkaanagerie Mwathani Ngai waku.’ ”" 
Matthew4:8 Ningĩ Mũcuukani ĩgĩtwara Jesũ igũrũ rĩa kĩrĩma kĩraaya mũno akĩmuonia moonene moothe ma thĩ o na riiri wamo," 
Matthew4:9 akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Maya moothe nĩngũkũhe ũngĩnyinamĩrĩra ũthaathaiye.”" 
Matthew4:10 Naake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Thiĩ Caitaani! Tondũ maandĩko moigĩĩte atĩrĩ, ‘Thaathayagia Mwathani Ngai waku na ũmũtungatagĩre o we wiki.’ ”" 
Matthew4:11 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Mũcuukani agĩtiga Jesũ, nao araika magĩũka makĩmũtungatĩra." 
Matthew4:12 Na hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Jesũ aiguire atĩ Johana nĩaikĩĩtio njeera agĩthiĩ Galili. 
Matthew4:13 Naake ndaigana gũikara Nazarethi, no aathiire gũikaraga Kaperinaumu, itũũra rĩrĩa rĩarĩ ndeereinĩ cia iria rĩa Galili bũrũriinĩ wa Zebuluni na Nafutali." 
Matthew4:14 Maũndũ maya meekĩkire nĩ geetha ciugo iria ciaririo nĩ mũnabii Isaia ihinge: 
Matthew4:15 “Bũrũri wa Zebuluni na bũrũri wa Nafutali kũrĩa kũng'ethanĩire na iria, mũrĩmo ũũrĩa ũngĩ wa rũũĩ rwa Jorodani, nĩkuo Galili kwa andũ a Ndũũrĩrĩ!" 
Matthew4:16 Andũ arĩa matũũraga ndumainĩ nĩmakoona ũtheri mũnene. Na arĩa matũũraga bũrũriinĩ wa nduma ya gĩkuũ, nĩmakaarĩrwo nĩ ũtheri.”" 
Matthew4:17 Kuuma hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ akĩambĩrĩria kũhunjia ũhoro akiugaga atĩrĩ, “Mwĩrireei meehia maanyu nĩ ũndũ Ũthamaki wa igũrũ ũrĩ hakuhĩ!”" 
Matthew4:18 Na rĩrĩa Jesũ aageragĩra hũgũrũrũinĩ cia iria rĩa Galili, akĩona aanake eerĩ a nyina ũmwe magĩtega thamaki na ngara, amu maarĩ ategi a thamaki. Ũmwe wao eetagwo Simoni (nĩ we Petero), na ũrĩa ũngĩ eetagwo Anderea." 
Matthew4:19 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Nũmĩrĩraai na nĩngũmũtua ategi a andũ.”" 
Matthew4:20 Nao magĩtiganĩria ngara ciao cia gũtega thamaki makĩmũrũmĩrĩra. 
Matthew4:21 Naake oima hau agĩkora aanake angĩ eerĩ a nyina ũmwe, nao nĩ Jakubu mũrũ wa Zebedi, na Johana mũrũ wa nyina. Eerĩ maarĩ gatarũinĩ me na ithe wao Zebedi magĩtuma ngara ciao. Jesũ akĩmeeta," 
Matthew4:22 na ihinda o rĩu magĩtiganĩria gatarũ o hamwe na ithe, makĩmũrũmĩrĩra." 
Matthew4:23 Thuutha ũcio Jesũ agĩthiũrũrũka Galili guothe akĩrutanaga thunagogiinĩ, akĩhunjagia Ũhoro Mwega wa Ũthamaki wa Ngai, akĩhonagia andũ arĩa maarũarĩĩte mĩrimũ ya mĩthemba yothe na ndwari ciothe." 
Matthew4:24 Kwoguo ngumo yake ĩkĩhunja bũrũri wothe wa Siria, nao andũ makĩmũreehere andũ oothe arĩa maarĩ arũaru, na arĩa maanyiitĩĩtwo nĩ mĩrimũ ya mĩthemba mĩingĩ: arĩa maarĩ na ruwo, ngoma, arĩa maarũarĩĩte mĩrimũ ya kũinaina, na gũkua ciĩga; naake Jesũ akĩmahonia oothe." 
Matthew4:25 Nao andũ aingĩ mũno magĩkĩmũrũmĩrĩra kuuma Galili, Dekapoli, Jerusalemu, Judea, na mũrĩmo ũũrĩa ũngĩ wa rũũĩ rwa Jorodani." 
Matthew4:25 Nao andũ aingĩ mũno magĩkĩmũrũmĩrĩra kuuma Galili, Dekapoli, Jerusalemu, Judea, na mũrĩmo ũũrĩa ũngĩ wa rũũĩ rwa Jorodani." 
Matthew5:1 Na rĩrĩa Jesũ oonire andũ aingĩ, akĩambata kĩrĩma igũrũ, na arĩĩkia gũikara thĩ arutwo aake magĩũka harĩ we." 
Matthew5:2 Naake akĩambĩrĩria kũmaruta akĩmeera atĩrĩ: 
Matthew5:3 “Kũraathimwo-rĩ, nĩ arĩa meriragĩria maũndũ ma kĩĩroho; nĩ ũndũ Ũthamaki wa igũrũ nĩ wao!" 
Matthew5:4 “Kũraathimwo-rĩ, nĩ arĩa maracakaya; nĩ ũndũ nĩmakoomĩrĩrio!" 
Matthew5:5 “Kũraathimwo-rĩ, nĩ arĩa ahooreri; nĩ ũndũ nĩmakaaheeo kĩrĩa meerĩirwo thĩ!" 
Matthew5:6 “Kũraathimwo-rĩ, nĩ arĩa mahũũtagĩra na makanyootera maũndũ ma ũthingu; nĩ ũndũ nĩmakaahũũnio!" 
Matthew5:7 “Kũraathimwo-rĩ, nĩ arĩa maiguanagĩra tha; nĩ ũndũ nĩmakaiguĩrwo tha!" 
Matthew5:8 “Kũraathimwo-rĩ, nĩ arĩa atheru ngoro; nĩ ũndũ nĩmakoona Ngai!" 
Matthew5:9 “Kũraathimwo-rĩ, nĩ arĩa macaragia thaayũ; nĩ ũndũ nĩmageetagwo ciana cia Ngai!" 
Matthew5:10 “Kũraathimwo-rĩ, nĩ arĩa manyariiragwo nĩ ũndũ wa maũndũ ma ũthingu; nĩ ũndũ Ũthamaki wa igũrũ nĩ wao!" 
Matthew5:11 “Kũraathimwo-rĩ, nĩ inyuĩ hĩndĩ ĩrĩa andũ mekũmũruma, makamũnyariira, na makamũigĩrĩra igeenyo cia mĩthemba yothe nĩ ũndũ wa rĩĩtwa rĩakwa." 
Matthew5:12 Kenagaai na mũcanjamũke, tondũ iheeo cianyu nĩ nene mũno igũrũ kwa Ngai. Ũguo noguo anabii arĩa maarĩ mbere yanyu maanyariiragwo." 
Matthew5:13 “Nĩ inyuĩ cumbĩ wa thĩ. Ĩndĩ cumbĩ ũngĩthira mũcamo, ũngĩgĩcooka gũcamithio ta cumbĩ atĩa? Ndũrĩ bata, nĩgũteeo ũteagwo ũkarangwo nĩ andũ." 
Matthew5:14 “Nĩ inyuĩ ũtheri wa thĩ. Itũũra rĩrĩa rĩakĩĩtwo kĩrĩma igũrũ rĩtingĩhithĩka. 
Matthew5:15 Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũgwatagia taawa akaũkunĩkĩra na irebe; taawa wagwatio ũigagĩrĩrwo handũ igũrũ ũmũrĩkĩre andũ oothe arĩa marĩ nyũmba. 
Matthew5:16 Ũguo noguo na inyuĩ ũtheri wanyu wagĩrĩirwo nĩgũtheragĩra andũ, nĩ geetha moonage ciĩko cianyu njega, na magoocage Ithe wanyu ũrĩa ũrĩ igũrũ." 
Matthew5:17 “Mũtigeciirie atĩ njũkĩĩte kũniina Watho wa Musa kana ũrutani wa anabii. Ndiũkĩĩte gũciniina, no njũkĩĩte gũcihingia." 
Matthew5:18 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma, kinyagia rĩrĩa thĩ na igũrũ igaathira, gũtirĩ kaũndũ o na kamwe ka Watho gakeeherio, kinya maũndũ moothe mahinge!" 
Matthew5:19 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũtaathĩkagĩra maathani, o na akorwo nĩ kaũndũ karĩa kaniini, na akaruta andũ arĩa angĩ gwĩkaga taake, agaakorwo arĩ wa thuutha biũ Ũthamakiinĩ wa igũrũ. No ũrĩa wathĩkagĩra Watho, na akaruta arĩa angĩ gwĩkaga taake, agaakorwo arĩ mũnene Ũthamakiinĩ wa igũrũ." 
Matthew5:20 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ, kĩrĩa gĩgaatũma mũingĩre Ũthamakiinĩ wa igũrũ no mũkorirwo mũrĩ athingu gũkĩra arutani a Watho na Afarisai." 
Matthew5:21 “Nĩmũiguĩte atĩ andũ a tene meerĩĩtwo atĩ, ‘Ndũkaanoragane, na ũrĩa ũkooragana nĩagaatuĩrwo.’" 
Matthew5:22 No rĩu niĩ ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ: mũndũ o wothe ũkaaraakarĩra mũrũ wa ithe, nĩagaaciirithio, na mũndũ ũrĩa ũkaaruma mũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩ nĩagaatwarwo mbere ya kĩama. Ningĩ ũrĩa ũgeeta mũrũ wa ithe ‘Kĩrimũ gĩĩkĩ,’ arĩ ũgwatiinĩ wa gũgaikio icuainĩ." 
Matthew5:23 Tondũ ũcio, ũngĩkorwo ũkĩrutĩra Ngai kĩheeo gĩaku kĩgongoonainĩ, na hĩndĩ ĩyo ũririkane atĩ nĩũraakarĩĩtie mũrũ wa thooguo," 
Matthew5:24 amba ũtige kĩheeo gĩaku o hau kĩgongoonainĩ ũthiĩ wambe ũkaiguithanie naake, na mwarĩĩkia kũiguithania ũcooke ũthiĩ ũkarutĩre Ngai igongoona." 
Matthew5:25 “Mũngĩhĩtania na mũndũ na agũtware igootiinĩ, geria kũiguithania naake mũthenya wa ciira ũtaanakinya, nĩ ũndũ mwathiĩ igootiinĩ agaakũneana kũrĩ mũciirithania, ũrĩa ũgaakũnengerana kũrĩ thigari ũikio njeera." 
Matthew5:26 Ngũkwĩra atĩrĩ na ma, gũtirĩ hĩndĩ ũkoima kũu njeera ũtarĩĩkĩĩtie kũrĩha gathendi ka mũico ka mbeeca iria ũtuĩrĩirwo." 
Matthew5:27 “Nĩmũiguĩte nĩkwĩrĩĩtwo atĩ: ‘Ndũkaanatharanie.’ 
Matthew5:28 No rĩu ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ: mũndũ o wothe ũroraga mũndũ wa nja na akamwĩrirĩria nĩarĩĩkĩĩtie gũtharia naake ngoroinĩ yake. 
Matthew5:29 Kwoguo riitho rĩaku rĩa ũrĩo rĩngĩtũma wĩhie, rĩkũũre ũrĩte. Nĩ kaba ũikare ũtarĩ na kĩĩga kĩmwe kĩa mwĩrĩ gũkĩra mwĩrĩ waku wothe ũikio icuainĩ." 
Matthew5:30 Nakuo guoko gwaku kwa ũrĩo kũngĩtũma wĩhie, gũtinie ũgũte. Nĩ kaba ũikare ũtarĩ na kĩĩga kĩmwe kĩa mwĩrĩ gũkĩra mwĩrĩ waku wothe ũikio icuainĩ." 
Matthew5:31 “Ningĩ nĩmũiguĩte nĩkwĩrĩĩtwo atĩ, ‘Mũndũ o wothe angĩtigana na mũtumia wake, no mũhaka amũhe marũa makuonania atĩ nĩmaatigana.’" 
Matthew5:32 No rĩu ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ, mũndũ wothe ũtiganaga na mũtumia wake, tiga nĩ ũndũ wa ũtharia, nĩatũmaga mũtumia ũcio atuĩke mũtharia angĩhika rĩngĩ, na mũndũ ũrĩa ũhikagia mũtumia ũtiganĩĩte na mũthuuriwe, o naake nĩgũtharia atharagia naake." 
Matthew5:33 “Ningĩ nĩmũiguĩte atĩ andũ a tene meerĩĩtwo atĩrĩ, ‘Ndũkaanehĩte tũhũ, na no mũhaka ũhingagie kĩrĩa wĩrĩire Mwathani.’" 
Matthew5:34 No niĩ ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ, mũtikaanehĩte o na atĩa; mũtikaanehĩte na igũrũ nĩ ũndũ nĩkuo gĩtĩ kĩa ũthamaki kĩa Ngai;" 
Matthew5:35 o na kana mwĩhĩte na thĩ nĩ ũndũ nĩkuo gaturwa ka makinya maake, o na kana na Jerusalemu, nĩ ũndũ nĩrĩo itũũra rĩa Mũthamaki ũrĩa mũnene." 
Matthew5:36 O na ndũkaanehĩte na mũtwe waku nĩ ũndũ ndũngĩhota gũtũma rũcuĩrĩ o na rũmwe rwaku rũire kana rũerũhe. 
Matthew5:37 Mũkiuga ũndũ, ugagaai ĩĩ kana aaca, nĩ ũndũ mĩĩhĩtwa ĩyo ĩngĩ yothe yumaga kũrĩ Ũrĩa Mũũru." 
Matthew5:38 “O na nĩmũiguĩte nĩkwĩrĩĩtwo atĩ, ‘Riitho rĩrĩhagwo na riitho, na igego rĩrĩhagwo na igego.’" 
Matthew5:39 No niĩ ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ, mũtikaanerĩhĩrie o na mwahĩtĩrio. Mũndũ akũgũtha rũthĩa rwa ũrĩo, reke akũgũthe o na rũu rũngĩ." 
Matthew5:40 Na mũndũ angĩgũthitanga agũtuunyithie igooti, o na kanjũ yaku reke akuue." 
Matthew5:41 Na mũndũ angĩgwatha mũthiĩ naake kiromita ĩmwe, thiĩi naake kiromita igĩrĩ." 
Matthew5:42 Ningĩ mũndũ angĩkũhooya kĩndũ mũhe, na angĩgũkomba kĩndũ mũkombithie." 
Matthew5:43 “Nĩmũiguĩte kwĩrĩĩtwo atĩ, ‘Endagaai araata aanyu, na mũthũũrage thũ cianyu.’" 
Matthew5:44 No niĩ ngũmwĩra mwendage thũ cianyu na mũhooyagĩre arĩa mamũnyariiraga," 
Matthew5:45 nĩ geetha mũtuĩke ciana cia Ithe wanyu ũrĩa ũrĩ igũrũ. Ithe wanyu ũrĩa ũrĩ igũrũ atũmaga riũa rĩake rĩarĩre andũ arĩa ooru o na arĩa eega, na akoiria mbura kũrĩ arĩa athingu o na kũrĩ arĩa matarĩ athingu." 
Matthew5:46 Ngai angĩkĩmũhe kĩheeo kĩrĩkũ angĩkorwo mwendeete o andũ arĩa mamwendeete inyuĩ? Githĩ o na arĩa meetagia mbeeca cia igooti matiĩkaga o ũguo? 
Matthew5:47 Angĩkorwo no araata aanyu mũgeithagia-rĩ, kũrĩ ũndũ mũgĩĩkaga ũteekagwo nĩ arĩa angĩ? Githĩ o na andũ arĩa mateetĩkĩĩtie ũhoro wa Ngai matiĩkaga o ũguo?" 
Matthew5:48 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio, no mũhaka mũkoragwo mũrĩ akinyanĩru o ta ũrĩa Ithe wanyu ũrĩa ũrĩ igũrũ arĩ mũkinyanĩru!" 
Matthew6:1 “Mwĩmenyerereei mũtikaae gwĩkaga ciĩko cianyu njega mbere ya mũingĩ atĩ nĩ geetha wone ũrĩa mũreeka. Mũngĩĩka ũguo gũtirĩ kĩheeo mũkaaheeo nĩ Ithe wanyu ũrĩa ũrĩ igũrũ. 
Matthew6:2 “Kwoguo hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mwaheana kĩndũ gĩgateithie athĩĩni, tigagaai gũthiĩ mũkĩanagĩrĩra ũrĩa mũreeka ta ũrĩa hinga ciĩkaga rĩrĩa irĩ thĩinĩ wa thunagogi o na irĩ njĩrainĩ, nĩ geetha iganwo nĩ andũ. Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ, nĩirĩĩkĩĩtie kũrĩhwo mũcaara wacio." 
Matthew6:3 No hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ũkũheana kĩndũ gĩa gũteithia athĩĩni, heanaga na hitho, na ndũkaarekage guoko gwaku kwa ũmotho kũmenyage ũrĩa guoko gwaku kwa ũrĩo kũreeka nĩguo ũndũ ũcio ũkoragwo ũrĩ wa hitho." 
Matthew6:4 Naake Ithe wanyu ũrĩa wonaga maũndũ ma hitho nĩagaakũhe kĩheeo. 
Matthew6:5 “Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũkũhooya tigagaai gwĩka ta hinga! Hinga ciendeete kũrũũgama thunagogiinĩ o na mĩkĩrainĩ ya njĩra rĩrĩa ikũhooya nĩ geetha andũ macione. Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ nĩirĩĩkĩĩtie kũrĩhwo mũcaara wacio. 
Matthew6:6 No hĩndĩ ĩrĩa wee ũkũhooya toonyaga nyũmba yaku na warĩĩkia kũhinga mĩrango, ũkahooya thooguo waku ũrĩa ũtoonekaga. Naake thooguo ũcio wonaga ũrĩa ũreeka na hitho nĩagaakũhe kĩheeo gĩaku." 
Matthew6:7 “Rĩrĩa mũkũhooya tigagaai kũhũhũũtĩka mũkiugaga maũndũ ma tũhũ ta ũrĩa andũ arĩa mateetĩkĩĩtie meekaga. Acio meciiragia atĩ ngai ciao nĩikũmaigua nĩ ũndũ wa kũraihia mahooya. 
Matthew6:8 Inyuĩ tigagaai gũtuĩka ta o, nĩ amu Ithe wanyu nĩoĩ kĩrĩa mũbataire o na mũtamũũrĩĩtie." 
Matthew6:9 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio, hooyagaai atĩrĩ, ‘Ithe witũ ũrĩ igũrũ; Rĩĩtwa rĩaku rĩtheru rĩrotĩĩo;" 
Matthew6:10 Ũthamaki waku nĩũũke; reke wendi waku wĩkagwo gũũkũ thĩ o ta ũrĩa wĩkagwo kũu igũrũ. 
Matthew6:11 Tũhe ũũmũũthĩ irio ciitũ cia gũtũigana," 
Matthew6:12 na ũtuohere mahĩtia maitũ, o ta ũrĩa ithuĩ tuohagĩra arĩa matũhĩtagĩria." 
Matthew6:13 Na ndũkaareke tũgũe magerioinĩ, no ũtũhonokagie kuuma ũũruinĩ.’" 
Matthew6:14 “Nĩ gũkorwo mũngĩrekagĩra arĩa mamũhĩtagĩria, o naake Ithe wanyu ũrĩa ũrĩ igũrũ nĩarĩmũrekagĩra." 
Matthew6:15 No mũngĩrega kũrekagĩra arĩa angĩ, o naake Ithe wanyu ndarĩmũrekagĩra mahĩtia maanyu." 
Matthew6:16 “Ningĩ hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mwĩhingĩĩte, tigagaai gũtukia ithiithi cianyu ta ũrĩa hinga ciĩkaga. Hinga itukagia ithiithi ciacio nĩ geetha mũndũ o wothe akoona atĩ nĩciĩhingĩĩte. Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ, nĩirĩĩkĩĩtie kũrĩhwo mũcaara wacio." 
Matthew6:17 No hĩndĩ ĩrĩa wĩhingĩĩte, wĩthambage ũthiũ waku na wĩhakage maguta mũtwe," 
Matthew6:18 nĩ geetha mũndũ o wothe ndakaamenyage atĩ nĩwĩhingĩĩte tiga o thooguo waku ũrĩa ũtoonekaga. Naake thooguo ũcio wonaga maũndũ ma hitho nĩagaakũhe iheeo ciaku. 
Matthew6:19 “Tigagaai kwĩigĩra mũthiithũ gũũkũ thĩ kũrĩa ũrĩagwo nĩ memenyi na ũkaguma, na kũrĩa aici mabunjaga makaiya." 
Matthew6:20 Mwĩigagĩreei mũthiithũ igũrũ kwa Ngai kũrĩa ũtangĩrĩĩo nĩ memenyi kana ũgume, na kũrĩa aici matangĩhota kũbunja maiye." 
Matthew6:21 Nĩ ũndũ kũrĩa mũthiithũ wanyu ũrĩ nĩkuo ngoro cianyu o nacio irĩkoragwo. 
Matthew6:22 “Maitho nĩ mo taawa wa mwĩrĩ. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio maitho maaku mangĩkorwo marĩ meega, mwĩrĩ waku wothe ũrĩkoragwo ũiyũire ũtheri;" 
Matthew6:23 no maitho maaku mangĩkorwo ti meega, mwĩrĩ waku ũrĩkoragwo ũiyũire nduma. Tondũ ũcio angĩkorwo ũtheri ũrĩa ũrĩ thĩinĩ waku no nduma-rĩ, kaĩ nduma ĩyo nĩrĩgĩkoragwo ĩrĩ ndumanu-ĩ!" 
Matthew6:24 “Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩhota gũtungatĩra aathani eerĩ; nĩ ũndũ no mũhaka amene ũmwe na eende ũrĩa ũngĩ; o na aathĩkagĩre ũmwe na anyarare ũrĩa ũngĩ. Mũtingĩhota gũtungatĩra Ngai na mũtungatĩre ũtonga. 
Matthew6:25 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio, ngũmwĩra atĩ mũtigetangage ngoro nĩ ũndũ wa kĩrĩa mũrĩrĩaga kana mũrĩnyuaga, kana nguo iria mũrĩhumbaga mĩĩrĩinĩ yanyu. Githĩ muoyo ndũkĩrĩĩte irio? Na mwĩrĩ githĩ ndũrĩ bata kũrĩ nguo?" 
Matthew6:26 Taroraai nyoni cia rĩerainĩ: itihandaga kana ikagetha o na kana ikaiga thitoo; no Ithe wanyu ũrĩa ũrĩ igũrũ nĩ we ũciheaga gĩa kũrĩa! Atĩrĩĩrĩ, githĩ mũtirĩ a bata mũno gũkĩra nyoni?" 
Matthew6:27 Ningĩ-rĩ, nĩkũrĩ mũndũ o na ũmwe wanyu ũngĩhota kwĩyongerera matukũ o na maniini nĩ ũndũ wa gwĩtanga?" 
Matthew6:28 “Mwĩtangaga nĩkĩ nĩ ũndũ wa nguo? Taroraai mahũa ma gĩthaka ũrĩa makũraga: matirutaga wĩra kana magetumĩra nguo; 
Matthew6:29 no ngũmwĩra atĩ o na gũtuĩka mũthamaki Solomoni aarĩ na ũtonga mũingĩ mũno, ndagemeete ta ihũa rĩmwe rĩa maya." 
Matthew6:30 Angĩkorwo Ngai nĩ we ũhumbaga nyeki ya gĩthaka, ĩrĩa ĩcaũkaga ũũmũũthĩ na rũũciũ ĩkooma ĩgaikio riiko-rĩ, githĩ ndarĩkĩmũhumbaga mũno makĩria? Kaĩ ti itherũ wĩtĩkio wanyu nĩ mũniini-ĩ!" 
Matthew6:31 “Kwoguo tigagaai gwĩtanga mũkĩũria atĩrĩ, ‘Tũkũruta kũ gĩa kũrĩa kana tũkũnyua kĩ o na kana tũkwĩhumba kĩ?’" 
Matthew6:32 (Macio nĩ mo maũndũ marĩa andũ arĩa mateetĩkĩĩtie metangaga namo.) Ithe wanyu ũrĩa ũrĩ igũrũ nĩoĩ atĩ nĩmũbatairio nĩ maũndũ macio moothe. 
Matthew6:33 No ambaai mũcarie Ũthamaki wa Ngai na ũthingu wake na maũndũ macio mangĩ moothe nĩarĩmũheaga. 
Matthew6:34 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio, mũtigetangage nĩ ũndũ wa rũũciũ; nĩ ũndũ rũũciũ nĩrũgetangĩkĩra ruo rwene. Rekeei o mũthenya ũiganagwo nĩ mathĩĩna maaguo." 
Matthew7:1 “Mũtigaatuanagĩre, nĩ geetha o na inyuĩ mũtikaanatuĩrwo nĩ Ngai," 
Matthew7:2 nĩ ũndũ akaamũtuĩra o ta ũrĩa mũtuagĩra andũ arĩa angĩ, ningĩ kĩgeri kĩrĩa mũrĩgeragĩra arĩa angĩ nakĩo nokĩo na inyuĩ mũkaagererwo nakĩo." 
Matthew7:3 Nĩ kĩĩ gĩgũtũma wone kĩhuti kĩrĩa kĩrĩ riitho rĩa mũrũ wa thooguo, no ndũngĩigua mũgogo ũrĩa wĩ riitho rĩaku?" 
Matthew7:4 Kana ũngĩhota atĩa kwĩra mũrũ wa thooguo atĩ ũmũrute kĩhuti kĩrĩa kĩrĩ riitho rĩake, o hĩndĩ ĩrĩa wee wĩ na mũgogo riitho rĩaku?" 
Matthew7:5 Wee hinga ĩno! Amba ũrute mũgogo ũcio ũrĩ riitho rĩaku na nĩũkuona wega ũkĩruta mũrũ wa thooguo kĩhuti kĩrĩa kĩrĩ riitho rĩake. 
Matthew7:6 “Tigagaai kũhe ngui kĩndũ kĩrĩa kĩamũre, nĩ ũndũ no icooke imũgarũrũke. Ningĩ tigagaai gũikĩria ngũrũe ruuru cianyu iria cia goro, nĩ ũndũ no gũciranga ingĩciranga na magũrũ." 
Matthew7:7 “Hooyai na nĩmũkũheeo; cariai na nĩmũkuona; ringaringaai mũrango na nĩmũkũhingũrĩrwo. 
Matthew7:8 Nĩ ũndũ mũndũ o wothe ũhooyaga nĩaheagwo, na ũrĩa ũcaragia nĩonaga, na ũrĩa ũringaringaga mũrango nĩahingũragĩrwo." 
Matthew7:9 Kana nĩ mũndũ ũrĩkũ wanyu ũngĩĩtio mũgate nĩ mwana wake, naake amũhe ihiga?" 
Matthew7:10 O na kana amwĩtie thamaki, naake amũhe nyoka?" 
Matthew7:11 Angĩkorwo inyuĩ o na mũrĩ ooru nĩmũmenyaga kũhe ciana cianyu iheeo njega-rĩ, nĩ maita maigana Ithe wanyu ũrĩa ũrĩ igũrũ angĩgĩkĩrĩrĩria kũheana iheeo njega kũrĩ arĩa mamwĩtagia!" 
Matthew7:12 “Kwoguo ĩkagaai andũ arĩa angĩ ũrĩa inyuĩ mũngĩenda mamwĩke, nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩguo Watho wa Musa o na Ũrutani wa Anabii." 
Matthew7:13 “Toonyeraai kĩhingo kĩrĩa gĩceke, nĩ ũndũ kĩhingo gĩa kũingĩra icuainĩ nĩ kĩariĩ, na njĩra ĩrĩa ĩthiaga kuo nĩ hũthũ, na andũ arĩa mamĩgeraga nĩ aingĩ." 
Matthew7:14 No kĩhingo gĩa kũingĩra muoyoinĩ nĩ gĩceke, na njĩra ya gũkinya kuo nĩ nditũ, nao andũ arĩa mamĩonaga nĩ aniini." 
Matthew7:15 “Mwĩmenyagĩrĩreei anabii a maheeni, arĩa mookaga kũrĩ inyuĩ mahaana ta ng'ondu, no na kũu thĩinĩ mahaana o njũũi." 
Matthew7:16 Andũ acio nĩmũrĩmamenyaga na ũndũ wa ciĩko ciao. Mĩtĩ ya mĩigua ndĩciaraga thabibũ, o naguo thabai ndũciaraga ngũyũ." 
Matthew7:17 Mũtĩ mwega ũciaraga matunda meega, naguo mũtĩ mũũru ũgaciara matunda mooru." 
Matthew7:18 Gũtirĩ hĩndĩ mũtĩ mwega ũngĩciara matunda mooru, na gũtirĩ hĩndĩ mũtĩ mũũru ũngĩciara matunda meega." 
Matthew7:19 Mũtĩ o wothe ũtaciaraga matunda meega nĩũtemagwo ũgaikio mwakiinĩ. 
Matthew7:20 Kwoguo nĩmũrĩmenyaga anabii a maheeni na ũndũ wa ciĩko ciao. 
Matthew7:21 “Ti mũndũ, wothe ũnjĩtaga ‘Mwathani, Mwathani,’ ũgaatoonya Ũthamakiinĩ wa igũrũ, tiga o arĩa meekaga ũrĩa Awa ũrĩa ũrĩ igũrũ eendaga." 
Matthew7:22 Mũthenya wa Ituĩro wakinya andũ aingĩ nĩmakaanjĩĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Mwathani! Mwathani! Githĩ tũtiarathaga moohoro thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩaku? O na thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩaku githĩ tũtiarutire andũ ngoma nyingĩ na tũkĩringa ciama nyingĩ?’" 
Matthew7:23 Na niĩ nĩngaameera atĩrĩ, ‘Gũtirĩ hĩndĩ niĩ ndamũũĩ. Eheraai harĩ niĩ, inyuĩ andũ aya aaganu!’" 
Matthew7:24 “Rĩu-rĩ, mũndũ ũrĩa ũiguaga ciugo ici ciakwa na agaciathĩkĩra ahaana ta mũndũ mũũgĩ ũrĩa wakire nyũmba yake na mũthingi wa ihiga." 
Matthew7:25 Rĩrĩa mbura yoirire, na njũũĩ ikĩiyũra, rũhuuho rũkĩhuruutana, nacio ikĩhũũra nyũmba ĩyo no ndĩagũire, nĩ ũndũ mũthingi wayo wakĩĩtwo na ihiga." 
Matthew7:26 “No mũndũ wothe ũiguaga ciugo ici ciakwa na ndaciathĩkĩre, ahaana ta mũndũ mũkĩĩgu ũrĩa wakire nyũmba yake mũthanga igũrũ." 
Matthew7:27 Na hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mbura yoirire, na njũũĩ ikĩiyũra, naruo rũhuuho rũkĩhuruutana nacio ikĩhũũra nyũmba ĩyo na hinya, nayo ĩkĩgwa. Nakuo kũgwa kwayo kaĩ kwarĩ kũnene-ĩ!”" 
Matthew7:28 Na rĩĩrĩ, Jesũ arĩĩkia kwaria maũndũ macio, andũ makĩgegeara nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa aarutanaga." 
Matthew7:29 Amu aarutanaga ta mũndũ warĩ na ũhoti, no ti ta arutani aao a Watho." 
Matthew8:1 Na hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Jesũ aikũrũkaga kuuma kĩrĩma igũrũ nĩarũmĩrĩirwo nĩ andũ aingĩ. 
Matthew8:2 Naake mũndũ warũarĩĩte mũrimũ mũũru wa ngoothi nĩokire harĩ we, agĩturia ndu mbere yake akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Mwathani, ũngĩenda no ũhote gũũtheria. ”" 
Matthew8:3 Naake Jesũ agĩtambũrũkia guoko akĩmũhuutia akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Nĩngwenda, thera!” Na ihinda o rĩu mũndũ ũcio agĩtherio mũrimũ ũcio mũũru wa ngoothi." 
Matthew8:4 Naake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ndũkaae kwĩra mũndũ o na ũmwe, no thiĩ ũkeyonanie kwĩ mũthĩnjĩri Ngai, na ũrute igongoona rĩrĩa Musa aathanire nĩ geetha andũ oothe mamenye atĩ nĩwathera.”" 
Matthew8:5 Na rĩĩrĩ hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Jesũ aakinyire Kaperinaumu, Mũroma ũmwe warĩ mũnene wa thigari igana nĩokire harĩ we akĩmũthaitha akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ," 
Matthew8:6 “Mwathani, ndungata yakwa nĩ ndũaru mũrimũ wa gũkua ciĩga, na ĩ gĩtandainĩ mũciĩ ĩhĩirwo mũno, ndĩrahota kwĩgarũra na ĩ na ruwo rũingĩ mũno.”" 
Matthew8:7 Naake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Nĩngũũka kũmĩhonia.”" 
Matthew8:8 No Mũroma ũcio mũnene wa thigari, akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Mwathani, ndiagĩrĩirwo nĩũũke gwakwa nyũmba. No athana na ndungata yakwa nĩkũhona." 
Matthew8:9 Niĩ-rĩ, ndĩ mũndũ wathagwo, na ndĩ na thigari njathaga, na ndeera ũmwe ‘Thiĩ,’ nĩathiaga, na ndeera ũngĩ ‘Ũka,’ nĩokaga. Nayo ndungata yakwa ndamĩĩra ‘Ĩka ũndũ ũyũ,’ nĩĩkaga.”" 
Matthew8:10 Na rĩĩrĩ, hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Jesũ aiguire ũguo, nĩagegire, akĩĩra andũ arĩa maamũrũmĩrĩire atĩrĩ, “Ti itherũ ndirĩ ndoona mũndũ thĩinĩ wa Isiraeli wĩ na wĩtĩkio ta ũyũ." 
Matthew8:11 Ngũmwĩra na ma andũ aingĩ nĩmagooka moimĩĩte na mĩena ya na irathĩro na ya na ithũĩro maikare thĩ marĩanĩre na Aburahamu, Isaaka, na Jakubu Ũthamakiinĩ wa igũrũ." 
Matthew8:12 No arĩa maagĩrĩirwo nĩ gũkorwo marĩ Ũthamakiinĩ nĩkũrutũrũrwo makaarutũrũrwo maikio ndumainĩ kũrĩa makaarĩra na mahagaranie magego.” 
Matthew8:13 Thuutha ũcio Jesũ agĩcooka akĩĩra mũnene ũcio wa thigari igana atĩrĩ, “Inũka, ũndũ ũrĩa wĩtĩkĩĩtie nĩũkũhingĩrio.” Nayo ndungata ya mũnene ũcio ĩkĩhonio o ihinda rĩu." 
Matthew8:14 Na rĩĩrĩ, Jesũ aathiĩ mũciĩ kwa Petero, agĩkora nyina wa mũtumia wa Petero arĩ gĩtandainĩ arũarĩĩte mũrimũ wa kũhiũha mwĩrĩ." 
Matthew8:15 Agĩkĩmũhuutia guoko, agĩtiga kũhiũha mwĩrĩ, agĩũkĩra akĩambĩrĩria kũmũtungata." 
Matthew8:16 Na rĩĩrĩ, hwaĩinĩ ũcio andũ makĩmũreehera andũ aingĩ maarĩ na ngoma, naake agĩcingata na kiugo gĩake na akĩhonia arĩa oothe maarĩ arũaru." 
Matthew8:17 Eekire ũguo nĩ geetha ũrĩa kwarathĩĩtwo nĩ mũnabii Isaia kũhinge atĩ: “Wee mwene nĩoire wonje witũ, na akĩeheria mĩrimũ iitũ.”" 
Matthew8:18 Ningĩ Jesũ oona kĩrĩndĩ kĩrĩa kĩamũthiũrũrũkĩirie, akĩĩra arutwo aake maringe mũrĩmo ũũrĩa ũngĩ wa iria." 
Matthew8:19 Naake mũrutani ũmwe wa Watho agĩũka harĩ we akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Mũrutani, nĩngũkũrũmĩrĩra o kũrĩa guothe ũgũthiĩ.”" 
Matthew8:20 Naake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Mbwe nĩ irĩ marima, na nyoni nĩ irĩ itara, no Mũrũ wa Mũndũ ndarĩ o na handũ ha kũhuurũka.”" 
Matthew8:21 Ningĩ mũndũ ũngĩ warĩ mũrutwo wake akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Mwathani, njĩtĩkĩria nyambe thiĩ ngathike baaba.”" 
Matthew8:22 Naake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Nũmĩrĩra; reke andũ arĩa akuũ mathike akuũ aao.”" 
Matthew8:23 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ akĩingĩra gatarũinĩ o hamwe na arutwo aake. 
Matthew8:24 Na o rĩmwe gũkĩgĩa na kĩhuuhũkanio kĩnene kũu iriainĩ, nako gatarũ gakĩenda kũũrĩra nĩ ũndũ wa makũmbĩ ma maaĩ. Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ aarĩ toro." 
Matthew8:25 Nao arutwo aake magĩthiĩ harĩ we makĩmũũkĩria makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Mwathani, tũhonokie nĩtũroorĩra.”" 
Matthew8:26 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Nĩ kĩĩ kĩmũmakĩĩtie ũguo? Kaĩ wĩtĩkio wanyu nĩ mũniini-ĩ!” Agĩcooka agĩũkĩra agĩatha rũhuuho na iria ihoorere, nacio ikĩhoorera gũgĩkira ki." 
Matthew8:27 Nao andũ makĩgega, makĩũrania atĩrĩ, “Kaĩ mũndũ ũyũ arĩ wa mũthemba ũrĩkũ tondũ o na rũhuuho na iria nĩiramwathĩkĩra?”" 
Matthew8:28 Na rĩĩrĩ, Jesũ arĩĩkia gũkinya bũrũri wa Agadara, mũrĩmo ũũrĩa ũngĩ wa iria, nĩacemanirie na andũ eerĩ maarĩ na ngoma makiuma na mbĩĩrĩrainĩ. Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩetĩkĩrire kũgera njĩra ĩyo maarĩ, nĩ ũndũ maarĩ ooru mũno." 
Matthew8:29 Nao rĩmwe makĩanĩrĩra makiuga atĩrĩ, “Nĩ kĩĩ ũkwenda na ithuĩ, wee Mũrũ wa Ngai? Ũũkĩĩte gũtũherithia ihinda rĩrĩa rĩagĩrĩire rĩtakinyĩĩte?”" 
Matthew8:30 Na hau hakuhĩ nĩhaarĩ na rũũru rũnene rwa ngũrũe rwarĩaga ho. 
Matthew8:31 Nacio ngoma icio ikĩmũthaitha ikĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Angĩkorwo nĩũgũtũingata kuuma kũrĩ andũ aya-rĩ, twagũthaitha ũreke tũtoonye rũũruinĩ rũũrĩa rwa ngũrũe.”" 
Matthew8:32 Naake Jesũ agĩciĩra atĩrĩ, “Thiĩi!” Nacio ikiuma igĩthiĩ thĩinĩ wa ngũrũe. Naruo rũũru rũu ruothe rũkĩharũrũka kĩharũrũkainĩ rũkĩĩikia iriainĩ rũkĩũrĩra." 
Matthew8:33 Nao andũ arĩa maarĩithagia ngũrũe icio makĩũra magĩthiĩ itũũrainĩ, makĩĩra andũ ũrĩa gwekĩkĩĩte kũrĩ andũ acio maarĩ na ngoma." 
Matthew8:34 Nao andũ oothe a itũũra rĩu magĩthiĩ gũtũnga Jesũ; hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maamuonire makĩmũthaitha oime kũu kwao. 
Matthew9:1 Naake Jesũ agĩcooka gatarũinĩ, akĩringa iria agĩcooka itũũra rĩao." 
Matthew9:2 Nao andũ makĩmũreehere mũndũ warĩ na mũrimũ wa gũkua ciĩga akuuĩĩtwo na gĩtanda. Naake Jesũ oona ũrĩa andũ acio meetĩkĩĩtie akĩĩra mũndũ ũcio warĩ mũrũaru atĩrĩ, “Mũũriũ, wĩyũmĩrĩrie! Nĩwoherwo meehia maaku.”" 
Matthew9:3 Nao arutani amwe a Watho makĩĩĩra na ngoro atĩrĩ, “Mũndũ ũyũ nĩaruma Ngai!”" 
Matthew9:4 Naake Jesũ aamenya ũrĩa meeciiragia, akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Nĩkĩ gĩgũtũma mwĩciirie ũũru ngoroinĩ cianyu?" 
Matthew9:5 Kuuga ‘Nĩwoherwo meehia maaku’ kana ‘Ũkĩra wĩtware-rĩ’, nĩ ũrĩkũ mũhũthũ?" 
Matthew9:6 Nĩngũmuonia atĩ Mũrũ wa Mũndũ arĩ na ũhoti thĩinĩ wa thĩ wa kuohanĩra meehia.” Naake arĩĩkia kũmeera ũguo, akĩĩra mũndũ ũcio warĩ mũrũaru atĩrĩ, “Ũkĩra woe gĩtanda gĩaku ũinũke!”" 
Matthew9:7 Naake mũndũ ũcio warĩ mũrũaru agĩũkĩra akĩinũka. 
Matthew9:8 Nao andũ moona ũguo, magĩĩtigĩra, makĩgaatha Ngai nĩ ũndũ wa kũhe andũ ũhoti ta ũcio." 
Matthew9:9 Naake Jesũ oima hau, aathianga nĩonire mũndũ warĩ mwĩtia wa mbeeca cia igooti wetagwo Mathayo aikarĩĩte wabiciinĩ ya kũrutĩrwo igooti. Naake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Nũmĩrĩra.” Naake Mathayo agĩũkĩra akĩmũrũmĩrĩra." 
Matthew9:10 Na rĩĩrĩ, hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Jesũ aarĩ kwa Mathayo akĩrĩa irio, eetia a mbeeca cia igooti aingĩ na andũ aingĩ eehia nĩmookire makĩrĩanĩra na Jesũ na arutwo aake." 
Matthew9:11 Nao Afarisai amwe hĩndĩ ĩrĩa moonire ũguo makĩũria arutwo aake atĩrĩ, “Nĩkĩ gĩgũtũma mũrutani wanyu arĩanĩre na eetia a mbeeca cia igooti na eehia?”" 
Matthew9:12 Naake Jesũ aigua ũguo akĩmacookeria akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Andũ arĩa makoragwo na bata wa ndagĩtaarĩ nĩ arĩa arũaru, no ti arĩa matarĩ arũaru." 
Matthew9:13 Thiĩi mwĩrute bata wa ciugo ici cia Maandĩko: ‘Nĩ tha ngwenda no ti magongoona.’ Niĩ ndiokire gwĩta andũ arĩa athingu, ndookire nĩ ũndũ wa arĩa eehia.”" 
Matthew9:14 Hĩndĩ ĩyo arutwo a Johana Mũbatithania magĩũka kũrĩ Jesũ makĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Nĩ kĩĩ gĩtũmaga ithuĩ na Afarisai twĩhingage kaingĩ no arutwo aaku matirĩ hingo mehingaga?”" 
Matthew9:15 Naake Jesũ akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Mũgwĩciiria atĩ andũ arĩa meetĩĩtwo ũhikiinĩ no maigue kĩeha hĩndĩ ĩrĩa marĩ hamwe na mũhikania? Aaca! No mũthenya nĩũgaakinya hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũhikania akeeherio gatagatĩinĩ kaao, na hĩndĩ ĩyo nao nĩmakeehinga." 
Matthew9:16 “Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũtumagĩrĩra nguo ngũrũ kĩraka kĩa nguo njerũ nĩ ũndũ kĩraka kĩu kĩerũ no kĩhiũke kĩguucie nguo ĩyo, gĩgĩtũme ĩgĩtarũke makĩria." 
Matthew9:17 Ningĩ ndibei ya mũhihano ndĩĩkĩragwo mondoinĩ ya rũũa ngũrũ, nĩ ũndũ ĩngĩĩkĩrwo no ĩtarũre mondo ĩitĩke, nayo mondo ĩgĩthũũke. Ndibei ya mũhihano ĩĩkĩragwo mondoinĩ ya rũũa ĩtarĩ ngũrũ nĩ geetha ndibei hamwe na mondo ciigĩke wega.”" 
Matthew9:18 Na rĩĩrĩ, hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Jesũ aaragia maũndũ macio, Mũyahudi ũmwe wa anene arĩa maathanaga agĩũka harĩ we, agĩturia ndu mbere yake akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Mũirĩĩtu wakwa no hĩndĩ akua, no ũka ũmũigĩrĩre mooko na nĩekũriũka.”" 
Matthew9:19 Naake Jesũ agĩũkĩra akĩmũrũmĩrĩra e na arutwo aake. 
Matthew9:20 Na rĩĩrĩ, mũtumia watũire oiraga thakame mĩaka ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ agĩũka na thuutha wa Jesũ, akĩhuutia gĩcũrĩ kĩa nguo yake." 
Matthew9:21 Eekire ũguo tondũ eeĩraga atĩrĩ, “Ingĩhuutia o nguo yake nĩngũhona.”" 
Matthew9:22 Naake Jesũ akĩĩhũgũra akĩmuona akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Mwarĩ ũyũ, wĩyũmĩrĩrie! Wĩtĩkio waku nĩguo watũma ũhone.” Na ihinda o rĩu mũtumia ũcio akĩhona." 
Matthew9:23 Rĩrĩa Jesũ aakinyire nyũmba kwa mũtongoria ũcio, akĩona aini a nyĩmbo cia mathiko na ũrĩa andũ aingĩ maacakayaga," 
Matthew9:24 akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Umaai inyuothe, mũirĩĩtu ndakuĩte nĩ toro arĩ!” Nao magĩkĩmũthekerera." 
Matthew9:25 No hĩndĩ ĩrĩa andũ oothe moimirio nja, Jesũ agĩthiĩ harĩa mũirĩĩtu ũcio aarĩ akĩmũnyiita guoko agĩũkĩra." 
Matthew9:26 Naguo ũhoro ũcio ũkĩmenyekana bũrũri ũcio wothe. 
Matthew9:27 Na rĩĩrĩ, Jesũ oima hau aathianga nĩarũmĩrĩirwo nĩ atumuumu eerĩ, nao makĩmwanĩrĩra makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Tũiguĩre tha, Mũrũ wa Daudi!”" 
Matthew9:28 Naake arĩĩkia gũtoonya nyũmba, atumuumu acio magĩũka harĩ we, naake akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Nĩmwĩtĩkĩĩtie atĩ no hote kũmũhonia?” Nao makĩmũcookeria makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ĩĩ, Mwathani.”" 
Matthew9:29 Naake Jesũ akĩmahuutia maitho akiuga atĩrĩ, “Rekeei gũtuĩke ũguo mwĩtĩkĩĩtie!”" 
Matthew9:30 Nao makĩambĩrĩria kuona. Naake Jesũ agĩcooka akĩmakaania akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Mũtikeere mũndũ o na ũmwe ũhoro ũcio.”" 
Matthew9:31 No moima hau magĩthiĩ makĩheana ũhoro wa Jesũ bũrũri ũcio wothe. 
Matthew9:32 Rĩrĩa andũ acio moimagaraga, Jesũ akĩreeherwo mũndũ ũtaaragia nĩ ũndũ aarĩ na ngoma." 
Matthew9:33 No hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ngoma ĩyo yaingatirwo, mũndũ ũcio akĩambĩrĩria kwaria. Nao andũ oothe makĩgega makiuga atĩrĩ, “Tũtirĩ tuona ũndũ ta ũyũ thĩinĩ wa Isiraeli!”" 
Matthew9:34 No Afarisai makiuga atĩrĩ, “Aheagwo hinya wa kũingata ngoma nĩ mũnene wa ngoma.”" 
Matthew9:35 Naake Jesũ agĩthiĩ agĩthiũrũrũka thĩinĩ wa matũũra moothe o hamwe na icagi, akĩrutanaga thĩinĩ wa thunagogi ciakuo na akĩhunjagia Ũhoro Mwega wa Ũthamaki wa Ngai, o na akĩhonagia arĩa maarũarĩĩte mĩrimũ ya mĩthemba yothe o na wonje wothe." 
Matthew9:36 Na rĩrĩa aarorire andũ, akĩmaiguĩra tha nĩ ũndũ moonekaga mahurunjũkĩĩte na matarĩ na mũndũ wa kũmateithia, o ta ng'ondu itarĩ na mũrĩithi." 
Matthew9:37 Agĩkĩĩra arutwo aake atĩrĩ, “Magetha nĩ maingĩ no aruti wĩra nĩ aniini." 
Matthew9:38 Gĩthaitheei Mwathani mwene magetha, atũme aruti wĩra magethainĩ maake.”" 
Matthew10:1 Naake Jesũ agĩĩta arutwo aake ikũmi na eerĩ hakuhĩ naake, akĩmahe ũhoti wa kũingata ngoma na wa kũhonia mĩrimũ ya mĩthemba yothe o na wonje wothe." 
Matthew10:2 Marĩĩtwa ma atũmwo acio ikũmi na eerĩ nĩ mo maya: wa mbere nĩ Simoni (ũrĩa wetagwo Petero), na mũrũ wa nyina Anderea; aariũ a Zebedi: Jakubu na mũrũ wa nyina Johana;" 
Matthew10:3 Filipu na Baritholomayo; Toma na Mathayo ũrĩa warĩ mwĩtia wa mbeeca cia igooti; Jakubu mũrũ wa Alufayo, o na Thadayo;" 
Matthew10:4 Simoni ũrĩa Mũzelote, na Judasi Mũisikariota, ũrĩa wakunyanĩire Jesũ." 
Matthew10:5 Atũmwo acio ikũmi na eerĩ nĩ o Jesũ aatũmire, akĩmaatha akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Mũtikaingĩre bũrũri wa andũ a Ndũũrĩrĩ, o na mũtikaingĩre itũũra o na rĩmwe rĩa Asamaria." 
Matthew10:6 No thiĩi kũrĩ ng'ondu iria ciũrĩĩte, na nĩcio andũ a Isiraeli." 
Matthew10:7 Mwathiĩ mũmahunjĩrie mũkĩmeeraga atĩrĩ, ‘Ũthamaki wa igũrũ ũrĩ hakuhĩ!’" 
Matthew10:8 Ningĩ mũhonie arĩa arũaru, mũriũkie arĩa akuũ, mũtherie arĩa marĩ na mĩrimũ mĩũru ya ngoothi, na mũingate ngoma. Mũheetwo tũhũ, heanaai tũhũ." 
Matthew10:9 Mũtigakuue thahabu kana betha, o na kana mbeeca o ciothe mĩhukoinĩ yanyu." 
Matthew10:10 Ningĩ mũtigakuue mondo ya rũgendo, kana nguo ingĩ, kana iraatũ ingĩ tiga o iria irĩ mwĩrĩ, o na kana mũtirima ũngĩ. Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ, mũruti wa wĩra no mũhaka aheeo kĩrĩa abataire." 
Matthew10:11 “Na rĩrĩa mwatoonya itũũra kana gĩcagi, mũgacaria mũndũ mwagĩrĩru, na mũgaikara gwake o kinya mũkoima kuo." 
Matthew10:12 Mwaingĩra mũciĩ-rĩ, mũkamba kũgeithia eene guo," 
Matthew10:13 nao eene mũciĩ maamũkĩria, mũkamaraathima, no maaga kwamũkĩra,, mũtikaũraathimage." 
Matthew10:14 Mũndũ aaga kũmũnyiita ũgeni kana kũmũthikĩrĩria, mũkiuma mũciĩ ũcio kana itũũra rĩu mũkeribariba rũkũngũ magũrũ." 
Matthew10:15 Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ, Mũthenya wa Ituĩro Ngai nĩakaiguĩra andũ a Sodomu na Gomora tha gũkĩra andũ a itũũra rĩu!" 
Matthew10:16 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ, ndamũtũma ta ng'ondu gatagatĩinĩ ka njũũi. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio, gĩai na ũũgĩ ta nyoka, na mũkorwo mũrĩ ahooreri ta ndutuura." 
Matthew10:17 Mwĩmenyerereei nĩ ũndũ andũ nĩmakaamũneana Kĩamainĩ na mamũhũũrĩre thunagogiinĩ ciao. 
Matthew10:18 Ningĩ nĩ ũndũ wa rĩĩtwa rĩakwa nĩmũgaaciirithio mbere ya aathani na athamaki, nĩguo mũhunjie Ũhoro ũrĩa Mwega, kũrĩ andũ a Ndũũrĩrĩ." 
Matthew10:19 Mwatwarwo igootiinĩ mũtikaanetange na ũrĩa mũkoiga kana ũrĩa mũkaaria, nĩ ũndũ ihindainĩ rĩu nĩmũkeerwo ũrĩa mũkoiga." 
Matthew10:20 Ciugo iria mũkoiga itigaakorwo irĩ cianyu, igaakorwo irĩ cia Roho wa Ithe wanyu akĩaria arĩ thĩinĩ wanyu." 
Matthew10:21 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ, mũndũ nĩakaaneana mũrũ wa nyina ooragwo, naake mũciari aneane mwana wake. Nacio ciana nĩigookĩrĩra aciari na imoorage." 
Matthew10:22 Andũ oothe nĩmakaamũthũũra nĩ ũndũ wakwa. No ũrĩa ũgaakirĩrĩria kinya hĩndĩ ya mũthia nĩakaahonokio. 
Matthew10:23 Mwanyariirwo itũũrainĩ rĩmwe, ũragĩraai itũũra rĩrĩa rĩngĩ. Amu ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ, mũtikaarĩĩkia wĩra wanyu matũũrainĩ moothe ma Isiraeli Mũrũ wa Mũndũ atacookeete." 
Matthew10:24 “Gũtirĩ mũrutwo mũnene kũrĩ mũrutani wake, o na gũtirĩ ngombo nene kũrĩ mũmĩathi." 
Matthew10:25 Kwoguo mũrutwo nĩagĩrĩirwo nĩkũiganĩra angĩhaana ta mũrutani wake, nayo ngombo ta mũmĩathi. Angĩkorwo andũ nĩmeetĩĩte mũnene wa mũciĩ Beelizebuli-rĩ, githĩ andũ acio angĩ a mũciĩ matigeetagwo marĩĩtwa mooru gũkĩra rĩu!" 
Matthew10:26 “Kwoguo mũtikaae gwĩtigĩra andũ nĩ ũndũ gũtirĩ ũndũ mũhumbĩre ũtakoimbũrio kana ũndũ mũhithe ũtakaamenyeka. 
Matthew10:27 Ũrĩa ngũmwĩrĩra ndumainĩ uugĩreei ũtheriinĩ, na maũndũ marĩa mwaigua na kĩheehũ, maanĩrĩreei mũhaicĩĩte nyũmba igũrũ." 
Matthew10:28 Tigaai gwĩtigĩra arĩa mooragaga mwĩrĩ no matingĩhota kũũraga muoyo, mwĩtigĩreei Ngai nĩ ũndũ no ahote kũniina mwĩrĩ na muoyo aciikie icuainĩ." 
Matthew10:29 Githĩ tũnyoni twĩrĩ tũtiendagio thendi ĩmwe? No gũtirĩ kanyoni o na kamwe kangĩgũa thĩ Ithe wanyu ũrĩa ũrĩ igũrũ ateetĩkĩrĩĩte. 
Matthew10:30 Ningĩ o na njuĩrĩ cianyu cia mũtwe nĩndare. 
Matthew10:31 Tondũ ũcio tigaai gwĩtigĩra; inyuĩ mũrĩ a goro gũkĩra tũnyoni tũingĩ! 
Matthew10:32 “Mũndũ angiumbũra mbere ya andũ oige atĩ nĩ wakwa, na niĩ nĩngaamuumbũra mbere wa Awa ũrĩa ũrĩ igũrũ njuge atĩ nĩ wakwa." 
Matthew10:33 No mũndũ angĩngaana mbere ya andũ, na niĩ nĩngaamũkaana mbere ya Awa ũrĩa ũrĩ igũrũ." 
Matthew10:34 “Mũtigeciirie atĩ njũkĩĩte kũreehe thaayũ thĩ. Niĩ ndiũkĩĩte kũreehe thaayũ njũkĩĩte kũreehe haaro. 
Matthew10:35 Njũkĩĩte gũtũma mwanake ookĩrĩre ithe, na mũirĩĩtu ookĩrĩre nyina, na mũirĩĩtu ahika ookĩrĩre nyaciarawe," 
Matthew10:36 nacio thũ cia mũndũ iria njũru mũno igaakorwo irĩ o andũ a gwake mũciĩ. 
Matthew10:37 “Mũndũ wendeete ithe kana nyina gũkĩra ũrĩa anyendeete ti mwagĩrĩru gũtuĩka mũrutwo wakwa. Na ũrĩa wendeete mũũriũ kana mwarĩ kũrĩ ũrĩa anyendeete ti mwagĩrĩru gũtuĩka mũrutwo wakwa. 
Matthew10:38 Mũndũ ũrĩa wothe ũtekuoya mũtharaba wake anũmĩrĩre ti mwagĩrĩru gũtuĩka mũrutwo wakwa. 
Matthew10:39 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũkũgeria kũmenyerera muoyo wake nĩakoorwo nĩguo, no ũrĩa ũkũũrwo nĩ muoyo wake nĩ ũndũ wakwa nĩakaawona." 
Matthew10:40 “Mũndũ wothe ũmwamũkagĩra inyuĩ nĩ niĩ aamũkagĩra, na ũrĩa ũnyamũkagĩra nĩ ũrĩa wandũmire aamũkagĩra." 
Matthew10:41 Mũndũ wothe wamũkagĩra mũnabii nĩ ũndũ nĩ mũnabii, nĩakaaheeo kĩheeo kĩrĩa kĩheagwo mũnabii, na mũndũ wothe wamũkagĩra mũndũ mũthingu nĩ ũndũ nĩ mũthingu, nĩakaaheeo kĩheeo kĩrĩa kĩheagwo mũndũ mũthingu." 
Matthew10:42 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma, ũrĩa ũkaahe ũmwe wa arutwo aya aakwa anyiinyi o na gĩkombe kĩa maaĩ mahehu ma kũnyua nĩ ũndũ nĩ mũrutwo wakwa, ndakaaga kũheeo kĩheeo gĩake.”" 
Matthew11:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, Jesũ arĩĩkia gũtaarĩria arutwo acio aake ikũmi na eerĩ maũndũ macio, akiuma kũu agĩthiĩ kũrutana na kũhunjia matũũrainĩ marĩa maarĩ gũkuhĩ na kũu." 
Matthew11:2 Na rĩĩrĩ, Johana Mũbatithania arĩ njeera nĩaiguire maũndũ marĩa Kristũ eekaga, naake akĩmũtũmĩra arutwo aake mathiĩ makamũũrie atĩrĩ," 
Matthew11:3 “Wee nĩ we ũrooka kana tweterere ũngĩ?” 
Matthew11:4 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Thiĩi mwĩre Johana maũndũ marĩa mũraigua na mũkoona;" 
Matthew11:5 atumuumu nĩmarona, ithua nĩiretwara, arĩa marũarĩĩte mĩrimũ mĩũru ya ngoothi nĩmaratherio, arĩa mataiguaga nĩmaraigua, arĩa akuũ nĩmarariũkio, na athĩĩni makahunjĩrio Ũhoro ũrĩa Mwega." 
Matthew11:6 Kũraathimwo-rĩ, nĩ arĩa matarĩ na nganja ũhoroinĩ wakwa!”" 
Matthew11:7 Na rĩĩrĩ, rĩrĩa arutwo a Johana moimaga hau, Jesũ akĩambĩrĩria kwarĩria andũ ũhoro wa Johana, akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mwathiĩte werũinĩ kwĩ Johana-rĩ, nĩ kĩĩ mwathiĩte kuona? Nĩ kamũtĩ ga ithanjĩ gakĩinainio nĩ rũhuuho?" 
Matthew11:8 Mwagĩthiĩte kuona ũ? Mwathiĩte kuona mũndũ wekĩrĩĩte nguo irĩ na riiri? Arĩa meekĩraga nguo irĩ riiri makoragwo mĩciĩ gwa athamaki. 
Matthew11:9 Mwagĩthiĩte kuona ũ? Mwathiĩte kuona mũnabii? Ĩĩ, nĩ ma, no nĩmuonire mũndũ ũkĩrĩĩte mũnabii." 
Matthew11:10 Johana nĩ we maandĩko maandĩkĩĩte ũhoro wake makoiga atĩrĩ, ‘Ngai oigire, nĩngũtũma mũrekio wakwa mbere yaku agũthondekere njĩra.’" 
Matthew11:11 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma, Johana Mũbatithania nĩ mũnene gũkĩra andũ oothe arĩa maanaciarwo. No ũrĩa mũnyiinyi biũ Ũthamakiinĩ wa igũrũ nĩ mũnene kũmũkĩra." 
Matthew11:12 Kuuma hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Johana Mũbatithania aambĩrĩirie kũhunjia kinyagia ũũmũũthĩ, Ũthamaki wa igũrũ nĩũkoreetwo ũgĩthĩĩnio mũno, na andũ ooru nĩmageragia kũũhuria na hinya." 
Matthew11:13 O na anabii oothe o hamwe na Watho wa Musa nĩmaatũire marathaga ũhoro wa Ũthamaki ũcio nginyagia hĩndĩ ya Johana. 
Matthew11:14 Angĩkorwo nĩmũgwĩtĩkia ũhoro wao-rĩ, Johana nĩ we Elija ũrĩa gũũka gwake kweranĩirwo." 
Matthew11:15 Ũrĩa ũrĩ na matũ nĩakĩigue. 
Matthew11:16 “Rĩu-rĩ, ingĩkĩgerekania rũciaro rũũrũ na kĩ? Rũhaana o ta ciana ciikarĩĩte ndũũnyũinĩ igĩĩta ciana iria ingĩ igaciĩra atĩrĩ:" 
Matthew11:17 ‘Twamũinĩire nyĩmbo cia ũhiki, no mũtiarũũgarũũgire. Tũgĩcooka tũkĩmũinĩra nyĩmbo cia macakaya, no mũtiacakaire.’" 
Matthew11:18 Amu Johana Mũbatithania ookire ehingĩĩte kũrĩa, o na ndanyuaga ndibei, nao andũ makiuga atĩ ‘E na ngoma.’" 
Matthew11:19 Mũrũ wa Mũndũ ooka akĩrĩaga na akĩnyuaga moigire atĩrĩ, ‘Oneei mũndũ mũkoroku na mũrĩĩu, na mũraata wa eetia mbeeca cia igooti na eehia!’ No rĩĩrĩ, ũũgĩ wa Ngai nĩwonanagio atĩ nĩ wa ma nĩ maciaro maaguo.”" 
Matthew11:20 Na hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ akĩambĩrĩria gũteta nĩ ũndũ wa andũ a matũũra kũrĩa aaringĩĩte ciama nyingĩ, no makarega kwĩrira meehia maao, akiuga atĩrĩ," 
Matthew11:21 “Kaĩ inyuĩ andũ a matũũra ma Korazini na Bethisaida mũrĩ thĩĩnainĩ-ĩ! Nĩ amu ciama iria iringĩĩtwo thĩinĩ wa matũũra maanyu korwo ciaringĩirwo Turo na Sidoni, andũ aakuo mangĩehumbire nguo cia makũnia tene na mehurĩrie mũhu nĩ geetha moonanie atĩ nĩmeerirĩĩte meehia maao." 
Matthew11:22 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma, Mũthenya wa Ituĩro Ngai, nĩakaiguĩra andũ a Turo na Sidoni tha kũmũkĩra." 
Matthew11:23 Inyuĩ andũ a Kaperinaumu-rĩ, mwendaga gwĩtũũgĩria kinya igũrũ? Mũgaikũrũkio nginya kwa arĩa akuũ! Nĩ amu korwo ciama iria mũringĩirwo ciaringĩĩtwo Sodomu, itũũra rĩu nĩrĩngĩtũire kinyagia ũũmũũthĩ." 
Matthew11:24 Ikaragaai mũũĩ na ma atĩ Mũthenya wa Ituĩro, Ngai nĩakaiguĩra andũ a Sodomu tha kũmũkĩra.”" 
Matthew11:25 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ akiuga atĩrĩ, “Awa, wee Mwathani wa igũrũ na thĩ, nĩndagũcookeria ngaatho nĩ ũndũ nĩũhithĩĩte andũ arĩa oogĩ na me na ũmenyo maũndũ maya no ũkamaguũrĩria andũ arĩa matarĩ oogĩ." 
Matthew11:26 Ĩĩ Awa, wĩkĩĩte ũguo na kwenda gwaku." 
Matthew11:27 “Awa nĩanengereete maũndũ moothe, na gũtirĩ mũndũ ũũĩ Mũũriũ tiga Ithe, na gũtirĩ mũndũ ũũĩ Ithe tiga Mũũriũ na andũ arĩa Mũũriũ eendaga kũguũrĩria." 
Matthew11:28 “Ũkaai kũrĩ niĩ inyuothe mũnogeetio nĩgũkuua mĩrigo mĩritũ na nĩngũmũhuurũkia. 
Matthew11:29 Oyai icooki rĩakwa mwĩigĩrĩre na mwĩrute na niĩ nĩ ũndũ ndĩ mũhooreri na mwĩnyiihia ngoroinĩ na nĩmũkuona ũhuurũko; 
Matthew11:30 tondũ icooki rĩakwa nĩ ihũthũ na mũrigo wakwa ti mũritũ.” 
Matthew12:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ nĩagereire mĩgũndainĩ ya ngano Mũthenya wa Thabatũ. Na tondũ arutwo aake maarĩ ahũũtu, magĩkĩambĩrĩria gũtua ngira cia ngano, magacirigitha makarĩa ngano." 
Matthew12:2 Rĩrĩa Afarisai moonire ũguo makĩĩra Jesũ atĩrĩ, “Tarora, arutwo aaku nĩmareeka ũrĩa Watho witũ ũteetĩkĩrĩĩtie gwĩkwo mũthenya wa Thabatũ.”" 
Matthew12:3 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Kaĩ mũtarĩ mwathooma ũrĩa Daudi eekire hĩndĩ ĩrĩa we o hamwe na andũ arĩa maarĩ naake maarĩ ahũũtu?" 
Matthew12:4 Aatoonyire nyũmba ya Ngai hamwe na andũ arĩa maarĩ naake, makĩrĩa mĩgate mĩtheru ĩrĩa yarutĩirwo Ngai, o na gũtuĩka atĩ Watho wa Musa ndwameetĩkĩrĩĩtie mamĩrĩe, tondũ yagĩrĩirwo kũrĩĩo no athĩnjĩri Ngai oiki." 
Matthew12:5 Ningĩ kaĩ mũtarĩ mwathooma Wathoinĩ wa Musa atĩ thĩinĩ wa Hekaarũ gũtirĩ mũthenya wa Thabatũ athĩnjĩri Ngai matoinaga Watho o na gũtuĩka matiĩragwo nĩmeehĩĩtie? 
Matthew12:6 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ, haaha nĩharĩ na ũndũ mũnene gũkĩra Hekaarũ." 
Matthew12:7 Maandĩko moigaga atĩrĩ, ‘Nĩ tha ngwenda no ti magongoona.’ Korwo nĩmũũĩ ũguo nĩkuuga atĩa, mũtingĩtuagĩra andũ mateehĩĩtie." 
Matthew12:8 Nĩ ũndũ Mũrũ wa Mũndũ nĩ Mwathani o na wa mũthenya wa Thabatũ.” 
Matthew12:9 Na rĩĩrĩ, Jesũ oima kũu nĩathiire agĩtoonya thunagogi yao," 
Matthew12:10 nakuo kũu thunagogi nĩkwarĩ na mũndũ wonjeete guoko. Tondũ nĩmaacaragia ũndũ wa gũthitanga Jesũ naguo, makĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Watho witũ nĩwĩtĩkĩrĩĩtie kũhonania mũthenya wa Thabatũ?”" 
Matthew12:11 Naake Jesũ akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Nũũ wanyu ũngĩkorwo na ng'ondu ĩmwe, nayo ĩgwe irima mũthenya wa Thabatũ ũtangĩmĩnyiita amĩrute?" 
Matthew12:12 Mũndũ arĩ bata mũno gũkĩra ng'ondu, nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩtwĩtĩkĩrĩĩtio nĩ Watho witũ gwĩka wega Mũthenya wa Thabatũ.”" 
Matthew12:13 Hĩndĩ ĩyo agĩcooka akĩĩra mũndũ ũcio wonjeete guoko atĩrĩ, “Tambũrũkia guoko gwaku.” Naake agĩgũtambũrũkia gũkĩagĩra, gũkĩgĩa hinya o ta kũu kũngĩ." 
Matthew12:14 Nao Afarisai moima nja magĩcookania ndundu mamenye ũrĩa mangĩũragithia Jesũ. 
Matthew12:15 Naake Jesũ aamenya ũguo akiuma kũu, nao andũ aingĩ makĩmũrũmĩrĩra. Naake akĩhonia arĩa oothe maarĩ arũaru," 
Matthew12:16 agĩcooka akĩmakaania atĩ matikaae gũtũma amenyeke. 
Matthew12:17 Eekire ũguo nĩ geetha ciugo iria ciaririo nĩ Ngai, ahũthĩrĩĩte mũnabii Isaia ihinge atĩ:" 
Matthew12:18 “Ĩno nĩ yo ndungata yakwa ĩrĩa ndĩthuurĩire, nĩ yo nyenda na nĩ yo ĩkenagia ngoro yakwa. Nĩngũikũrũkia Roho wakwa kũrĩ yo, nayo nĩkaamenyithia andũ a ndũũrĩrĩ ciothe ituĩro rĩakwa." 
Matthew12:19 Ndĩgaakararania na andũ kana ĩmagũũthũkĩre, ningĩ ndĩgathiĩ ikĩmaheaga ũhoro yanĩrĩire njĩrainĩ." 
Matthew12:20 Nĩgaakorwo ĩrĩ hooreri mbere ya arĩa matarĩ hinya, na ĩiguĩre tha arĩa matahotaga gwĩteithia. Ndĩgaakua ngoro kinya kĩhooto kĩhootane thĩ," 
Matthew12:21 nao andũ oothe a ndũũrĩrĩ nĩmakaiga mwĩhoko wao thĩinĩ wayo.” 
Matthew12:22 Na rĩĩrĩ, hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ akĩreeherwo mũndũ warĩ mũtumuumu na ũtangĩahotire kwaria tondũ aarĩ na ngoma. Naake Jesũ akĩmũhonia akĩhota kwaria na kuona." 
Matthew12:23 Nao andũ oothe makĩgega makĩũrania atĩrĩ, “Ũyũ no akorwo arĩ we mũrũ wa Daudi?”" 
Matthew12:24 No hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Afarisai maiguire ũguo makiuga atĩrĩ, “Mũndũ ũyũ aingataga ngoma na hinya wa Beelizebuli, mũnene wa ngoma.”" 
Matthew12:25 Naake Jesũ aamenya ũrĩa meeciiragia akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Ũthamaki o wothe ũngĩatũkana na andũ aaguo mookanĩrĩre o eene nĩũharaganaga. Narĩo itũũra kana nyũmba o yothe ĩngĩatũkana nao eene mookanĩrĩre ndĩngĩĩhanda." 
Matthew12:26 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio, angĩkorwo Caitaani nĩ we ũraingata Caitaani thĩinĩ wa andũ-rĩ, nyũmba yake nĩyũkanĩrĩire, naguo ũnene wake ũngĩkĩhanda atĩa?" 
Matthew12:27 Angĩgĩkorwo nyingataga ngoma na hinya wa Beelizebuli-rĩ, arũmĩrĩri aanyu macingataga na hinya wa ũ? Kwoguo acio nĩ o makaamũtuĩra." 
Matthew12:28 No rĩĩrĩ, angĩkorwo nyingataga ngoma na hinya wa Roho wa Ngai-rĩ Ũthamaki wa Ngai nĩũũkĩĩte kũrĩ inyuĩ." 
Matthew12:29 “Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩhota kũingĩra nyũmba ya mũndũ njamba akuue indo ciake ataambĩĩte kuoha mũndũ ũcio njamba. No aambire amuohe agĩcooka gũtaha indo ciake. 
Matthew12:30 “Mũndũ ũrĩa ũtarĩ hamwe na niĩ nĩ thũ yakwa, na mũndũ ũrĩa ũtacookanagĩrĩria hamwe na niĩ nĩahurunjaga." 
Matthew12:31 Tondũ ũcio ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ, andũ no mooherwo meehia o moothe o na irumi o ciothe; no mũndũ ũrĩa ũrumaga Roho Mũtheru ndakooherwo." 
Matthew12:32 Mũndũ o wothe waragia kiugo gĩa gũcambia Mũrũ wa Mũndũ nĩakooherwo; no mũndũ o wothe ũcambagia Roho Mũtheru ndakooherwo, mahindainĩ maya kana marĩa magooka." 
Matthew12:33 “Nĩ geetha mũtĩ ũciare matunda meega no mũhaka ũkorwo ũrĩ mwega. Angĩkorwo mũtĩ nĩ mũũru matunda maaguo marĩkoragwo marĩ mooru. Mũtĩ ũmenyekanaga nĩ ũndũ wa matunda maaguo. 
Matthew12:34 Inyuĩ ciana cia nduĩra! Mũngĩhota atĩa kwaria maũndũ meega na mũrĩ ooru? Kanua kaaragia maũndũ marĩa marĩ ngoro. 
Matthew12:35 Mũndũ mwega aaragia maũndũ meega kuuma mũthiithũinĩ wa wega wake, na mũndũ mũũru aaragia maũndũ mooru kuuma mũthiithũinĩ wa ũũru wake." 
Matthew12:36 “Ikaragaai mũũĩ na ma atĩ Mũthenya wa Ituĩro andũ nĩmakaaheana gĩtũmi gĩa ciugo ciothe cia tũhũ iria cianoima tũnuainĩ twao. 
Matthew12:37 Ciugo ciaku nĩcio igaatũma ũtuĩke ndũrĩ na mahĩtia, na nocio igaatũma ũtuĩrwo.”" 
Matthew12:38 Na rĩĩrĩ, arutani amwe a Watho o hamwe na Afarisai amwe nĩmeerire Jesũ atĩrĩ, “Mũrutani, nĩtũkwenda kuona ũkĩringa kĩama.”" 
Matthew12:39 No Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Kaĩ andũ a rũciaro rũũrũ nĩmaaganĩĩte na makarega gwĩtĩkia Ngai-ĩ! Marooria maringĩrwo kĩama, no gũtirĩ kĩama mekũringĩrwo tiga o kĩa mũnabii Jona." 
Matthew12:40 O ta ũrĩa Jona aikarire mĩthenya ĩtatũ na mootukũ matatũ thĩinĩ wa thamaki ĩrĩa nene iriainĩ-rĩ, ũguo noguo Mũrũ wa Mũndũ agaikara mĩthenya ĩtatũ na mootukũ matatũ tĩĩriinĩ." 
Matthew12:41 Mũthenya wa Ituĩro andũ a Nineve nĩmagookĩra na igũrũ mathitange andũ a rũciaro rũũrũ nĩ ũndũ o nĩmeeririre hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Jona aamahunjĩirie; ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ, haaha nĩharĩ ũndũ mũnene gũkĩra Jona!" 
Matthew12:42 Mũthenya wa Ituĩro kwini wa Sheba nĩakaarũũgama na igũrũ athitange andũ a rũciaro rũũrũ, nĩ ũndũ nĩathiire rũgendo rũnene kuuma bũrũri wake nĩ geetha akaigue ũũgĩ wa Solomoni; ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ, haaha nĩharĩ ũndũ mũnene gũkĩra Solomoni!" 
Matthew12:43 “Na rĩĩrĩ, hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ngoma yoima thĩinĩ wa mũndũ, ĩgeragĩra kũndũ kũũmũ ĩgĩcaria ũhuurũko, no ndĩwonaga." 
Matthew12:44 Yawaga ĩkeĩĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Nĩngũcooka nyũmba yakwa kũrĩa ndĩroimire.’ Nayo yacooka ĩgagĩkora nyũmba ĩrĩ ũtheri, ĩrĩ haate, na ĩgathondekwo." 
Matthew12:45 Hĩndĩ ĩyo ngoma ĩyo ĩgathiĩ ĩkagĩĩra ngoma ingĩ mũgwanja njũru kũrĩ yo, nacio igooka igaatũũra kũu. Naake mũndũ ũcio agakĩĩhĩrwo gũkĩra ũrĩa aarĩ mbere. Ũguo nĩguo gũkaahaana kũrĩ andũ a rũciaro rũũrũ rwaganu.”" 
Matthew12:46 O hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ aaragĩria andũ, nyina na aariũ a nyina magĩũka magĩikara nja makĩenda kũmwarĩria. [" 
Matthew12:47 Naake mũndũ ũmwe warĩ ho akĩĩra Jesũ atĩrĩ, “Maitũguo na aariũ a maitũguo, marũũgamĩĩte nja na nĩmarenda gũkwarĩria.”]" 
Matthew12:48 Naake Jesũ akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Maitũ nũũ, na aariũ a maitũ nĩ a?”" 
Matthew12:49 Agĩcooka akĩoroota arutwo aake akiuga atĩrĩ, “Taroraai, aya nĩ o a maitũ na aariũ a maitũ." 
Matthew12:50 Amu mũndũ o wothe wĩkaga ũrĩa Awa ũrĩa ũrĩ igũrũ eendaga ũcio nĩ we maitũ, mwarĩ wa maitũ na mũrũ wa maitũ.”" 
Matthew13:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, o ro mũthenya ũcio Jesũ akiuma nyũmba agĩthiĩ agĩikara rũteereinĩ rwa iria." 
Matthew13:2 Nao andũ aingĩ mũno makĩmũthiũrũrũkĩria, tondũ ũcio akĩingĩra gatarũ agĩikara thĩ ho, nao andũ acio makĩrũũgama hũgũrũrũinĩ cia iria." 
Matthew13:3 Naake Jesũ akĩmaruta maũndũ maingĩ na ngerekano, akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Hĩndĩ ĩmwe mũhuri nĩoimagarire agĩthiĩ kũhura mbegũ." 
Matthew13:4 Na rĩĩrĩ, hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aahuraga, imwe ikĩgũa njĩrainĩ, nacio nyoni igĩũka igĩcirĩa." 
Matthew13:5 Ingĩ ikĩgũa rũnyanjarainĩ kũrĩa gũtaarĩ na tĩĩri mũingĩ, igĩkĩmera o narua nĩ ũndũ tĩĩri ndwarĩ mũriku." 
Matthew13:6 Ĩndĩ hĩndĩ ĩrĩa riũa rĩarire, rĩgĩcicina, nacio ikĩũma o narua tondũ itiarĩ na mĩri." 
Matthew13:7 Ingĩ nacio ikĩgũa mĩiguainĩ, nayo mĩigua ĩgĩkũra ĩgĩcithararia." 
Matthew13:8 Iria ingĩ nacio ikĩgũa tĩĩriinĩ ũrĩa mũnoru, igĩciara wega, imwe ciacio igĩciara maita igana rĩmwe, ingĩ maita mĩrongo ĩtandatũ, na iria ingĩ maita mĩrongo ĩtatũ.”" 
Matthew13:9 Jesũ arĩĩkia ngerekano ĩyo akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Ũrĩa ũrĩ na matũ nĩakĩigue.”" 
Matthew13:10 Nao arutwo magĩũka harĩ Jesũ makĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Nĩkĩ gĩtũmaga warĩrie andũ na ngerekano?”" 
Matthew13:11 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Inyuĩ nĩmũheetwo ũũgĩ wa kũmenya hitho cia Ũthamaki wa igũrũ, no o matiheetwo." 
Matthew13:12 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ, mũndũ ũrĩa ũrĩ na indo nyingĩ nĩakongererwo ciingĩhe makĩria, no ũrĩa ũtarĩ nĩagaatuunywo o na kĩrĩa arĩ nakĩo." 
Matthew13:13 Ndĩmaaragĩria na ngerekano nĩ ũndũ maroraga na mationaga, na magathikĩrĩria na matiiguaga, o na kana magataũkĩrwo nĩ ũndũ." 
Matthew13:14 Acio nĩ o mũnabii Isaia aaragia ũhoro wao hĩndĩ ĩrĩa oigire atĩrĩ: ‘Andũ aya magaathikagĩrĩria na matikaigua; makaaroraga na matione. 
Matthew13:15 Nĩ ũndũ nĩmoomĩĩtie ngoro, makahinga matũ, na makahinga maitho. Tiga nĩ ũguo, no moone na maitho, na maigue na matũ maao, na ngoro ciao itaũkĩrwo, nao makĩnjookerere na niĩ ndĩmahonie.’" 
Matthew13:16 “Kaĩ inyuĩ mũrĩ araathime-ĩ! Amu maitho maanyu nĩmoonaga na matũ maanyu makaigua. 
Matthew13:17 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma, anabii aingĩ o na andũ aingĩ athingu nĩmangĩendire mũno kuona maũndũ marĩa mũrona, no matiamoonire; kũigua maũndũ marĩa mũraigua, no matiamaiguire." 
Matthew13:18 “Kwoguo tagĩthikĩrĩriei mũigue ngĩtaarĩria ngerekano ĩyo ya mũhuri. 
Matthew13:19 Arĩa maiguaga ũhoro wa Ũthamaki na ndũmataũkĩre, mahaana ta mbegũ iria ciagũire njĩrainĩ. Ũrĩa mũũru ookaga akamatuunya kĩrĩa kĩhandĩĩtwo ngoroinĩ ciao." 
Matthew13:20 Nacio mbegũ iria ciagũire mahigainĩ ihaana ta andũ arĩa maiguaga ũhoro na o rĩmwe makawamũkĩra na gĩkeno. 
Matthew13:21 No matiũnyiitaga hĩndĩ ndaaya nĩ ũndũ ndũkoragwo ũrũmĩĩte thĩinĩ wao. Na ũndũ ũcio hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maathĩĩnio kana maanyariirwo nĩ ũndũ wa ũhoro ũcio, maũtirikaga o narua." 
Matthew13:22 Nacio mbegũ iria ciagũire mĩiguainĩ, nĩ andũ arĩa maiguaga ũhoro, no mathĩĩna ma gũũkũ thĩ na kwenda ũtonga, igathararia ũhoro, makaaga kũgĩa na maciaro." 
Matthew13:23 Nacio mbegũ iria ciagũire tĩĩriinĩ ũrĩa mũnoru nĩ andũ arĩa maiguaga ũhoro na magataũkĩrwo nĩguo, amwe magaciara maita igana, angĩ maita mĩrongo ĩtandatũ na arĩa angĩ maita mĩrongo ĩtatũ.”" 
Matthew13:24 Ningĩ Jesũ akĩmahe ngerekano ĩngĩ akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Ũthamaki wa Igũrũ ũhaana ta mũndũ wahandire mbegũ njega mũgũndainĩ wake," 
Matthew13:25 no ũtukũ ũmwe andũ me toro, thũ yake ĩgĩũka ĩkĩhandĩrĩra itindiĩ nganoinĩ, ĩgĩcooka ĩgĩĩthiĩra." 
Matthew13:26 Na hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ngano yamerire na ĩgĩkũra ĩkĩambĩrĩria gũciara, o nacio itindiĩ igĩkũũrĩkana." 
Matthew13:27 Nacio ndungata cia mũndũ ũcio igĩgĩthiĩ kũrĩ we ikĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Mũnene, githĩ ndwahandire mbegũ njega mũgũndainĩ waku? Itindiĩ ciakiumire na kũ?’" 
Matthew13:28 Naake agĩcicookeria agĩciĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Thũ nĩ yo yekire ũguo.’ Nacio ndungata ikĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Nĩũkwenda tũgacimunye?’" 
Matthew13:29 Naake agĩcicookeria agĩciĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Aaca, nĩ tondũ mũkĩmunya itindiĩ mwahota gũcimunyanĩria na ngano." 
Matthew13:30 Rekeei ikũranĩre kinya hĩndĩ ya magetha. Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩngeera agethi maambe mamunye itindiĩ maciohe itĩĩa macicine, macooke macookanĩrĩrie ngano mamĩige ikũmbĩ rĩakwa.’ ”" 
Matthew13:31 Ningĩ Jesũ akĩmahe ngerekano ĩngĩ akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Ũthamaki wa igũrũ ũngĩhaananio na mbegũ ya mũtĩ wa karatarĩ ĩrĩa mũndũ oire akĩmĩhanda mũgũnda gwake." 
Matthew13:32 Mbegũ ya karatarĩ nĩ yo niini kũrĩ mbegũ ciothe, no yakũra ĩnenehaga gũkĩra mĩmera ĩrĩa ĩngĩ yothe, ĩrĩ mũgũnda, nacio nyoni cigagĩũkaga gwaka itara hongeinĩ ciaguo.”" 
Matthew13:33 Ningĩ Jesũ akĩmahe ngerekano ĩngĩ akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Ũthamaki wa igũrũ ũngĩhaananio na ndaawa ya kũimbia mĩgate ĩrĩa mũtumia ooire agĩtukania na mũtu wa ngano kiro mĩrongo ĩna, naguo wothe ũkĩimba.”" 
Matthew13:34 Jesũ aatũmagĩra ngerekano akĩĩra andũ maũndũ macio moothe; ndarĩ ũndũ aameeraga ategũtũmĩra ngerekano. 
Matthew13:35 Eekaga ũguo nĩ geetha ciugo iria ciarathĩĩtwo nĩ mũnabii ihinge: “Ngaatũmĩra ngerekano ngĩmaarĩria, na ngĩmeera maũndũ marĩa maatũire mahithĩĩtwo kuuma hĩndĩ ĩrĩa thĩ yombirwo.”" 
Matthew13:36 Na rĩĩrĩ, hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Jesũ aatigire andũ akĩingĩra nyũmba, arutwo aake magĩthiĩ harĩ we makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ta tũtaarĩrie ngerekano ya itindiĩ.”" 
Matthew13:37 Naake Jesũ agĩkĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Mũndũ ũcio wahandire mbegũ njega, nĩ Mũrũ wa Mũndũ." 
Matthew13:38 Mũgũnda naguo nĩ thĩ ĩno, mbegũ iria njega nĩ andũ a Ũthamaki, itindiĩ nacio nĩ andũ a Ũrĩa Mũũru." 
Matthew13:39 Thũ ĩyo yahandire itindiĩ nĩ Ngoma. Nayo hĩndĩ ya magetha nĩ ithirĩro rĩa thĩ, na agethi nĩ araika." 
Matthew13:40 O ta ũrĩa itindiĩ ciũnganagio na igacinwo na mwaki, ũguo noguo gũkaahaana ithirĩroinĩ:" 
Matthew13:41 Mũrũ wa Mũndũ nĩagaatũma araika aake magacookanĩrĩrie arĩa oothe mahĩtithagia andũ, na arĩa oothe aaganu moime Ũthamakiinĩ wake." 
Matthew13:42 Macooke mamaikie icuainĩ rĩa mwaki kũrĩa makaarĩra na mahagaranie magego. 
Matthew13:43 Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ arĩa athingu nao makaahenia ta riũa Ũthamakiinĩ wa Ithe wao. Ũrĩa wĩ na matũ, nĩakĩigue!" 
Matthew13:44 “Ũthamaki wa igũrũ ũhaana ta mũthiithũ ũhithĩĩtwo mũgũndainĩ, ũgacooka ũkoonwo nĩ mũndũ, agakena mũno agakĩũhumbĩra. Mũndũ ũcio, agacooka agathiĩ akeendia indo ciake ciothe akagũra mũgũnda ũcio." 
Matthew13:45 “Ningĩ Ũthamaki wa igũrũ ũhaana ta mũhũũri mbiacara wethaga ruuru," 
Matthew13:46 na arĩĩkia kuona ruuru ĩmwe ya goro, agathiĩ akeendia indo ciake ciothe akagũra ruuru ĩyo." 
Matthew13:47 “Ningĩ Ũthamaki wa igũrũ ũhaana ta rũgara rũrĩa rwaikirio iriainĩ rũkĩgwatia thamaki cia mĩthemba yothe. 
Matthew13:48 Naruo rwaĩyũra andũ makĩrũguucia hũgũrũrũinĩ, magĩikara thĩ makĩambĩrĩria gũthuurania thamaki; iria njega magĩciĩkĩra ikabũinĩ, na iria njũru magĩcite." 
Matthew13:49 Ũguo noguo gũgaakorwo kũhaana ithirĩro rĩa thĩ: araika nĩmagooka kwamũrania andũ arĩa aaganu kuuma kũrĩ arĩa athingu. 
Matthew13:50 Arĩa aaganu makaamaikia icuainĩ rĩa mwaki, kũrĩa makaarĩra na mahagaranie magego.”" 
Matthew13:51 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ agĩkĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Nĩmũrataũkĩrwo nĩ maũndũ maya moothe?” Nao makĩmũcookeeria makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ĩĩ.”" 
Matthew13:52 Naake agĩkĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Ũguo nĩkuonania atĩ mũrutani wothe wa Watho ũtuĩkaga mũrũmĩrĩri wa Ũthamaki wa igũrũ ahaana ta mwene mũciĩ ũrĩa ũrutaga mũthiithũinĩ wake indo njerũ na ngũrũ.”" 
Matthew13:53 Naake Jesũ arĩĩkia kũheana ngerekano icio akiuma kũu. 
Matthew13:54 Akinya itũũrainĩ rĩao akĩrutana thunagogiinĩ yakuo, nao arĩa maamũiguire makĩgega makĩũrania atĩrĩ, “Mũndũ ũyũ aarutire ũũgĩ ũyũ na ciĩko ici kũ?" 
Matthew13:55 Githĩ ũyũ ti mũrũ wa bundi ũrĩa wa mbaaũ? Na githĩ nyina ndeetagwo Mariamu? Ningĩ githĩ ti mũrũ wa nyina na Jakubu, na Josefu, na Simoni, na Judasi?" 
Matthew13:56 Nao aarĩ a nyina githĩ matirĩ gũũkũ na ithuĩ? Nĩ kũ aakĩrutire maũndũ maya moothe?” 
Matthew13:57 Nao magĩkĩregana naake. Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Mũnabii nĩarĩ ngumo kũndũ guothe tiga o itũũrainĩ rĩake na gwake mũciĩ.”" 
Matthew13:58 Naake ndaringire ciama nyingĩ kũu nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa maagĩĩte wĩtĩkio. 
Matthew14:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, hĩndĩ ĩyo Herode ũrĩa wathanaga Galili nĩaiguire ngumo ya Jesũ." 
Matthew14:2 Naake agĩkĩĩra ndungata ciake atĩrĩ, “Ũyũ nĩ Johana Mũbatithania ũriũkĩĩte, nĩkĩo e na hinya wa kũringa ciama.”" 
Matthew14:3 Amu Herode nĩanyiitithĩĩtie Johana akamuohithia na akamũikithia njeera nĩ ũndũ wa Herodia ũrĩa warĩ mũtumia wa mũrũ wa nyina na Filipu," 
Matthew14:4 Johana nĩerĩĩte Herode atĩ ndaagĩrĩirwo nĩkũmũhikia. 
Matthew14:5 Na rĩĩrĩ, o na gũtuĩka Herode nĩendaga kũũragithia Johana, nĩetigagĩra Ayahudi tondũ nĩmeetĩkĩĩtie atĩ Johana aarĩ mũnabii." 
Matthew14:6 Na rĩĩrĩ mũthenya wa gũkũngũĩra gũciarwo kwa Herode wakinya-rĩ, mwarĩ wa Herodia nĩainire mbere ya andũ oothe." 
Matthew14:7 Naake agĩgĩkenia Herode mũno o kinya akĩmwĩrĩra mwĩhĩtwa atĩ nĩekũmũhe o kĩrĩa gĩothe aangĩetirie. 
Matthew14:8 Naake mũirĩĩtu ũcio agĩtaarwo nĩ nyina akĩĩrwo atĩrĩ, “Mwĩre o rĩu akũhe mũtwe wa Johana Mũbatithania wĩkĩrĩĩtwo kiugainĩ.”" 
Matthew14:9 Na rĩĩrĩ, mũthamaki nĩaiguire kĩeha, no nĩ ũndũ wa kĩĩranĩro gĩake o na ageni aake, agĩathana atĩ mũirĩĩtu ũcio anengerwo mũtwe wa Johana." 
Matthew14:10 Kwoguo agĩgĩtũmana njeera, Johana agĩtinio mũtwe." 
Matthew14:11 Naguo mũtwe ũgĩkĩreehwo na kiuga ũkĩnengerwo mũirĩĩtu ũcio, naake akĩũtwarĩra nyina." 
Matthew14:12 Nao arutwo a Johana magĩũka, magĩkuua kĩimba gĩake magĩgĩthika, na magĩthiĩ makĩĩra Jesũ." 
Matthew14:13 Rĩrĩa Jesũ aiguire ũhoro wa Johana akĩingĩra gatarũ agĩthiĩ arĩ o wiki handũ hataarĩ na andũ. Rĩrĩa nao andũ maiguire ũguo makĩmũrũmĩrĩra na magũrũ kuuma matũũrainĩ maao. 
Matthew14:14 Na rĩĩrĩ, hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Jesũ aakinyire hũgũrũrũinĩ cia iria akĩona andũ aingĩ, akĩmaiguĩra tha na akĩhonia arĩa maarĩ arũaru." 
Matthew14:15 Gwakinya hwaĩinĩ, arutwo aake magĩthiĩ harĩ we makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Rĩu nĩkũratuka, na gũũkũ gũtirĩ na mĩciĩ; ĩra andũ mainũke nĩ geetha mathiĩ makeegũrĩre irio icagiinĩ.”" 
Matthew14:16 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Matiagĩrĩirwo nĩgũthiĩ; maheei gĩa kũrĩa arĩ inyuĩ!”" 
Matthew14:17 Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Tũrĩ o na mĩgate ĩtaano na thamaki igĩrĩ.”" 
Matthew14:18 Naake akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Ndeehereei ciothe haaha.”" 
Matthew14:19 Agĩcooka agĩatha andũ maikare thĩ nyekiinĩ; oya mĩgate ĩyo ĩtaano na thamaki icio igĩrĩ, akĩrora igũrũ, agĩciraathima. Agĩcooka agĩcienyũranga, akĩnengera arutwo, nao makĩhe andũ." 
Matthew14:20 Nao oothe makĩrĩa makĩhũũna. Nao arutwo magĩcooka makĩũngania cienyũ iria ciatigarĩĩte makĩiyũria ciondo ikũmi na igĩrĩ. 
Matthew14:21 Andũ arĩa maarĩire maarĩ arũme ta ngiri ithaano, andũ a nja na ciana matatarĩĩtwo." 
Matthew14:22 Na rĩĩrĩ, hĩndĩ o ĩyo Jesũ akĩringĩrĩria arutwo aake maingĩre gatarũ mathiage mũrĩmo ũũrĩa ũngĩ wa iria kamũira ka arĩĩkie kuugĩra andũ ũhoro." 
Matthew14:23 Arĩĩkia kuugĩra andũ ũhoro, agĩthiĩ kĩrĩmainĩ kũhooya arĩ o wiki. Hwaĩinĩ ũgĩkinya aarĩ kĩrĩmainĩ arĩ o wiki," 
Matthew14:24 nako gatarũ kaarĩ iria gatagatĩ gakĩhũũrana na makũmbĩ ma maaĩ nĩ ũndũ keerekeire mwena ũrĩa rũhuuho rwoimaga. 
Matthew14:25 Na kũrĩ ũtukũ ta rĩrĩa ngũkũ igambaga, Jesũ agĩthiĩ na magũrũ, kũrĩ arutwo aake agereire maaĩ igũrũ." 
Matthew14:26 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maamuonire agereire maaĩ igũrũ na magũrũ, makĩinaina mũno makiuga atĩrĩ, “Nĩ ngoma!” Magĩgĩkayũrũrũka nĩ guoya." 
Matthew14:27 Naake Jesũ o rĩmwe akĩmaarĩria akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Ũmĩrĩriai! Nĩ niĩ! Tigaai gwĩtigĩra!”" 
Matthew14:28 Hĩndĩ o ĩyo Petero akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Mwathani, angĩkorwo nĩ we, reke njũke kũrĩ we na magũrũ ngereire maaĩ igũrũ.”" 
Matthew14:29 Naake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ũka!” Naake Petero agĩkiuma gatarũinĩ, akĩambĩrĩria kũgerera maaĩ igũrũ aroreete na kwĩ Jesũ." 
Matthew14:30 No hĩndĩ ĩrĩa oonire rũhuuho rũnene agĩĩtigĩra, naake aambĩrĩria gũtoonyerera maaĩinĩ, agĩkaya akiuga atĩrĩ, “Mwathani, honokia!”" 
Matthew14:31 O rĩmwe Jesũ agĩtambũrũkia guoko akĩmũnyiita, akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Kaĩ wĩtĩkio waku nĩ mũniini-ĩ! Nĩkĩ gĩgũtũma ũgĩe na mathangania?”" 
Matthew14:32 Na rĩĩrĩ, rĩrĩa eerĩ maatoonyire gatarũinĩ, rũhuuho rũgĩtiga kũhuruutana." 
Matthew14:33 Nao arĩa maarĩ gatarũinĩ makĩmũthaathaiya makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Nĩ ma wee wĩ Mũrũ wa Ngai!”" 
Matthew14:34 Nao maaringa iria magĩkinya bũrũri wa Genesareti. 
Matthew14:35 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa andũ a kũu maamũmenyire magĩtũmanĩra arĩa maarĩ arũaru kũu guothe, makĩreehwo kũrĩ Jesũ." 
Matthew14:36 Magĩkĩmũthaitha eetĩkĩrie acio maarĩ arũaru mahuutie o na akorwo no gĩcũrĩ kĩa nguo yake. Nao arĩa oothe maahuutirie makĩhonio. 
Matthew15:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, Afarisai amwe na arutani a Watho amwe nĩmookire kũrĩ Jesũ moimĩĩte Jerusalemu makĩmũũria atĩrĩ," 
Matthew15:2 “Nĩkĩ gĩtũmaga arutwo aaku maage kũhingia maũndũ marĩa twatigĩirwo nĩ maithe maitũ ma tene? Matiĩthambaga mooko ta ũrĩa kwagĩrĩire mbere ya kũrĩa!” 
Matthew15:3 Naake akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Na inyuĩ nĩkĩ gĩtũmaga muune watho wa Ngai mũkarũmagĩrĩra ũrutani wanyu?" 
Matthew15:4 Nĩ ũndũ Ngai aathanire atĩrĩ, ‘Tĩĩa thooguo na maitũguo,’ na ‘Mũndũ wa kũruma ithe kana nyina, arokua.’" 
Matthew15:5 No inyuĩ muugaga atĩ mũndũ angĩĩra ithe kana nyina atĩrĩ, ‘Kĩrĩa ingĩagũteithia nakĩo nĩkĩheane kũrĩ Ngai,’" 
Matthew15:6 ndarĩ na bata wa gũtĩĩa ithe. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũgakĩagĩra watho wa Ngai bata nĩ geetha mũrũmĩrĩre kĩrĩra kĩu kĩanyu. 
Matthew15:7 Inyuĩ hinga ici! Isaia nĩamenyeete wega hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aarathire ũhoro wanyu akiuga atĩrĩ," 
Matthew15:8 ‘Andũ aya maaheaga gĩtĩĩo na mĩromo, ĩndĩ ngoro ciao irĩ kũraaya na niĩ." 
Matthew15:9 Gũtirĩ bata wao gũũthaathaiya, nĩ ũndũ marutanaga mawatho marĩa matuĩtwo nĩ andũ ta arĩ mo maathani maakwa!’ ”" 
Matthew15:10 Thuutha ũcio Jesũ agĩĩta andũ harĩ we akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Thikĩrĩriai na mũtaũkĩrwo!" 
Matthew15:11 Kĩndũ kĩrĩa gĩtoonyaga kanua ka mũndũ ti kĩo kĩmũthaahagia, no kĩrĩa kiumaga kanua nĩkĩo kĩmũthaahagia.”" 
Matthew15:12 Hĩndĩ ĩyo arutwo magĩũka kũrĩ we makĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Nĩũũĩ atĩ Afarisai nĩmaraakaririo nĩ ũrĩa uugire?”" 
Matthew15:13 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Mũmera o wothe ũrĩa ũtahandĩĩtwo nĩ Awa ũrĩa ũrĩ igũrũ nĩũkaamunywo." 
Matthew15:14 Tiganaai nao! Nĩ itumuumu igĩtongoria itumuumu, na gĩtumuumu kĩngĩtongoria gĩtumuumu kĩrĩa kĩngĩ, cierĩ no kũgũa ingĩgũa irima.”" 
Matthew15:15 Naake Petero akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ta tũtaarĩrie ngerekano ĩyo.”" 
Matthew15:16 Naake Jesũ akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “O na inyuĩ mũtirĩ mũrataũkĩrwo?" 
Matthew15:17 Mũtiramenya atĩ kĩrĩa gĩothe gĩtoonyagĩra kanua gĩthiaga nda gĩgacooka gĩkoima? 
Matthew15:18 No kĩrĩa kiumaga na kanua kiumaga ngoroinĩ, na nĩkĩo gĩthaahagia mũndũ." 
Matthew15:19 Amu nĩ thĩinĩ wa ngoro ya mũndũ kuumaga meciiria mooru, ũũragani, ũtharia, ũmaraaya, ũici, ũira wa maheeni, na gũcambania." 
Matthew15:20 Maũndũ macio nĩ mo mathaahagia mũndũ, no kũrĩa irio na mooko matarĩ mathambie gũtingĩtũma mũndũ agĩe na thaahu.”" 
Matthew15:21 Ningĩ Jesũ akiuma kũu agĩthiĩ ndeereinĩ cia matũũra ma Turo na Sidoni. 
Matthew15:22 Na rĩĩrĩ, mũtumia Mũkanaani woimĩĩte o kũu agĩũka kũrĩ we akĩmũkaĩra akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Njiguĩra tha Mwathani, Mũrũ wa Daudi. Mũirĩĩtu wakwa nĩarathĩĩnio mũno nĩ ngoma.”" 
Matthew15:23 No Jesũ ndarĩ ũndũ aamũcookeirie. Nao arutwo aake magĩthiĩ harĩ we, makĩmũthaitha makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Mwĩre athiĩ nĩ ũndũ nĩarakayũrũrũka mũno atũrũmĩrĩire!”" 
Matthew15:24 Naake Jesũ agĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Ndatũmirwo o kũrĩ ng'ondu iria ciũrĩĩte na nĩcio andũ a Isiraeli.”" 
Matthew15:25 No mũtumia ũcio agĩũka agĩturia maru mbere yake akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Mwathani, ndeithia.”" 
Matthew15:26 Naake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Ti wega kuoya irio cia ciana na gũcikĩria ngui. ”" 
Matthew15:27 Naake mũtumia akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Noguo Mwathani, ĩndĩ o na ngui nĩirĩaga matigari marĩa magũaga kuuma meethainĩ ya mwene cio.”" 
Matthew15:28 Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Mũtumia ũyũ, kaĩ wĩtĩkio waku nĩ mũnene-ĩ! Ũroĩkĩrwo ũrĩa ũrenda.” Naake mwarĩ akĩhonio o ro ihinda o rĩu." 
Matthew15:29 Ningĩ Jesũ oima kũu agĩthiĩ agereire hũgũrũrũinĩ cia iria rĩa Galili, akĩambata kĩrĩmainĩ agĩikara thĩ." 
Matthew15:30 Nao andũ aingĩ magĩthiĩ kũrĩ we makĩmũtwarĩra ithua, itumuumu, cionje, arĩa mataaragia, na angĩ aingĩ arĩa maarĩ arũaru. Magĩkĩmaiga magũrũinĩ maake, naake akĩmahonia." 
Matthew15:31 Nao andũ makĩgega mũno hĩndĩ ĩrĩa moonire andũ arĩa mataaragia makĩaria, cionje ikĩĩrũũgamia, ithua igĩĩtwara, na itumuumu ikĩona. Nao makĩgooca Ngai wa Isiraeli." 
Matthew15:32 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ agĩĩta arutwo aake harĩ we akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Nĩndĩraiguĩra andũ aya tha tondũ makoreetwo na niĩ mĩthenya ĩtatũ na matirĩ na kĩndũ gĩa kũrĩa. Ndikwenda kũmeera mainũke marĩ ahũũtu tondũ mahota kũringĩkĩra njĩra.”" 
Matthew15:33 Nao arutwo makĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Nĩ kũ tũngĩruta mĩgate ya kũhũũnia andũ aingĩ ũũ gũũkũ werũinĩ?”" 
Matthew15:34 Naake Jesũ akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Mwĩ na mĩgate ĩigana?” Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Twĩ na mĩgate mũgwanja na tũthamaki tũtarĩ tũingĩ.”" 
Matthew15:35 Naake Jesũ agĩatha andũ maikare thĩ. 
Matthew15:36 Agĩcooka akĩoya mĩgate ĩyo mũgwanja na tũthamaki tũu, agĩcookeria Ngai ngaatho, akĩenyũranga, akĩnengera arutwo, nao arutwo makĩhe andũ." 
Matthew15:37 Nao andũ oothe makĩrĩa makĩhũũna. Nao arutwo magĩcooka makĩũngania cienyũ iria ciatigarĩĩte makĩiyũria ciondo mũgwanja. 
Matthew15:38 Andũ arĩa maarĩire maarĩ arũme ngiri inya, andũ a nja na ciana matatarĩĩtwo." 
Matthew15:39 Na rĩĩrĩ, Jesũ arĩĩkia kuugĩra andũ ũhoro, agĩcooka akĩingĩra gatarũ, agĩthiĩ mwena wa Magadani." 
Matthew16:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, Afarisai na Asadukai magĩũka kwĩ Jesũ, na tondũ nĩmeendaga kũmũgeria, makĩmwĩra atĩ amaringĩre kĩama nĩguo oonanie atĩ hinya wake uumĩĩte kwĩ Ngai." 
Matthew16:2 No Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Rĩrĩa riũa rĩgũthũa, muugaga atĩrĩ, ‘Mũthenya wa rũũciũ nĩũgaakorwo wĩ mwega tondũ igũrũ nĩ gũtuune.’" 
Matthew16:3 Ningĩ rũũciinĩ rũgĩkinya mũkoiga atĩrĩ, ‘Ũũmũũthĩ nĩgũkuura nĩ ũndũ matu nĩ mairũ na nĩ mathimbu.’ Inyuĩ mwarora igũrũ nĩmũũĩ gũtaũra ũrĩa mũthenya ũrĩkorwo ũhaana no mũtihotaga gũtaũra imenyithia cia mahinda maya." 
Matthew16:4 Kaĩ andũ a rũciaro rũũrũ nĩ ooru na nĩmaregeete gwĩtĩkia Ngai-ĩ! Mũranjĩĩra ndĩmũringĩre kĩama? Gũtirĩ kĩama mũkũringĩrwo tiga o kĩama kĩa Jona.” Naake agĩkĩmatiga agĩĩthiĩra. 
Matthew16:5 Na rĩĩrĩ, hĩndĩ ĩrĩa arutwo maaringaga mathiĩ mũrĩmo ũũrĩa ũngĩ wa iria, nĩmaariganĩirwo nĩgũkuua mĩgate." 
Matthew16:6 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Mwĩmenyerereei na mwĩhũũgage ndaawa ya kũimbia mĩgate ya Afarisai na Asadukai.”" 
Matthew16:7 Nao arutwo makĩambĩrĩria kwĩrana atĩrĩ, “Aroiga ũguo nĩ ũndũ tũtinakuua mĩgate.”" 
Matthew16:8 Naake Jesũ aamenya ũrĩa meeranaga akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Nĩ kĩĩ kĩratũma mwĩrane atĩ mũtinakuua mĩgate? Kaĩ wĩtĩkio wanyu nĩ mũniini-ĩ!" 
Matthew16:9 O na rĩu mũtirĩ mũrataũkĩrwo? Mũtiraririkana rĩrĩa ndahũũnirie andũ ngiri ithaano na mĩgate ĩrĩa ĩtaano? Nĩ ciondo ciigana muonganirie? 
Matthew16:10 Ningĩ hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ndahũũnirie andũ ngiri inya na mĩgate mũgwanja-rĩ, nĩ ciondo ciigana muonganirie?" 
Matthew16:11 Nĩkĩ gĩgũtũma mwage kũmenya atĩ ti ũhoro wa mĩgate ngũmwaragĩria? Mwĩhũũgageei ndaawa ya Afarisai na Asadukai ya kũimbia mĩgate.” 
Matthew16:12 Hĩndĩ ĩyo arutwo makĩmenya atĩ ndameeraga mehũũgage ndaawa ya kũimbia mĩgate; no aameeraga mehũũgage ũrutani wa Afarisai na Asadukai. 
Matthew16:13 Na rĩĩrĩ, rĩrĩa Jesũ na arutwo aake maakinyire rũgongo rũrĩa rũrĩ hakuhĩ na itũũra rĩrĩa rĩetagwo Kaisarea Filipi, akĩũria arutwo aake atĩrĩ, “Andũ moigaga Mũrũ wa Mũndũ nũũ?”" 
Matthew16:14 Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Amwe moigaga atĩ we nĩ we Johana Mũbatithania; angĩ makoiga nĩ we Elija, nao angĩ makoiga nĩ we Jeremia kana ũmwe wa anabii.”" 
Matthew16:15 Agĩcooka akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Ĩ inyuĩ muugaga niĩ ndĩ ũ?”" 
Matthew16:16 Naake Simoni Petero akĩmũcookeria akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Wee nĩ we Mesia, Mũrũ wa Ngai ũrĩa ũrĩ muoyo.”" 
Matthew16:17 Naake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Kũraathimwo nĩ we Simoni mũrũ wa Jona! Ti mũndũ ũkũguũrĩirie ũguo, nĩ Awa ũrĩa ũrĩ igũrũ ũkũheete ũmenyo ũcio." 
Matthew16:18 Ngũkwĩra atĩrĩ Petero, Wee wĩ ihiga, na igũrũ rĩa mũthingi ũyũ wa ihiga nĩ ho ngaaka kanitha wakwa, na o na gĩkuũ gĩtikaũtooria." 
Matthew16:19 Nĩngaakũnengera macabi ma Ũthamaki wa igũrũ, na o gĩothe ũkooha thĩ nĩgĩkoohwo igũrũ; na kĩrĩa o gĩothe ũkoohora gũũkũ thĩ nĩgĩkoohorwo igũrũ.”" 
Matthew16:20 Naake Jesũ agĩcooka agĩkaania arutwo aake na hinya mũno akĩmeera matikeere mũndũ o na ũmwe atĩ nĩ we Mesia. 
Matthew16:21 Kuuma hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ akĩambĩrĩria kwĩra arutwo aake atekũhithĩrĩra atĩrĩ, “No mũhaka thiĩ Jerusalemu, nyamaario mũno nĩ athuuri na athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene na arutani a Watho, o na njũragwo, no mũthenya wa ĩtatũ nĩngaariũkio.”" 
Matthew16:22 Naake Petero akĩoya Jesũ akĩmũtwara ndundu akĩmũkaania akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Mwathani, Ngai arogiria ũndũ ta ũcio gũgaagũkora.”" 
Matthew16:23 Naake Jesũ akĩhũgũkĩra Petero akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Cooka thuutha wakwa Caitaani! Wee ũrĩ mũhĩnga harĩ niĩ nĩ ũndũ meciiria macio maaku matiumĩĩte kũrĩ Ngai, no moimĩĩte kũrĩ andũ.”" 
Matthew16:24 Jesũ agĩcooka akĩĩra arutwo aake atĩrĩ, “Angĩkorwo mũndũ o wothe nĩekwenda kũũnũmĩrĩra, nĩambe eerege we mwene, acooke akuue mũtharaba wake anũmĩrĩre." 
Matthew16:25 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ, mũndũ o wothe ũngĩenda kũhonokia muoyo wake nĩakoorwo nĩguo; no ũrĩa wothe ũũragwo nĩ muoyo wake nĩ ũndũ wakwa nĩakaawona." 
Matthew16:26 Nĩ amu mũndũ angĩĩguna nakĩ o na angĩgaya thĩ yothe no oorwo nĩ muoyo wake? Gũtirĩ kĩndũ angĩheana nĩ geetha acookerio muoyo wake. 
Matthew16:27 Mũrũ wa Mũndũ e hakuhĩ gũũka e na riiri wa Ithe o na araika aake, na nĩakaarĩha mũndũ o wothe kũringana na ciĩko ciake." 
Matthew16:28 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma, nĩkũrĩ amwe a aya marĩ haaha matagaakua matooneete Mũrũ wa Mũndũ agĩũka e Mũthamaki.”" 
Matthew17:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, thuutha wa mĩthenya ĩtandatũ, Jesũ akĩoya Petero na Jakubu na mũrũ wa nyina Johana, akĩmatwara kĩrĩma igũrũ kĩraaya handũ hataarĩ na andũ." 
Matthew17:2 Naake Jesũ akĩgarũrũka ũrĩa aatariĩ mamwĩroreire; ũthiũ wake ũkĩhenia ta riũa, nacio nguo ciake igĩtuĩka njerũ cua." 
Matthew17:3 Na rĩĩrĩ, arutwo acio atatũ makĩona Musa na Elija makĩaria na Jesũ." 
Matthew17:4 Naake Petero akĩĩra Jesũ atĩrĩ, “Mwathani, kaĩ nĩ wega tondũ twĩ haaha-ĩ! Ũngĩenda no njake ithũnũ ithatũ haaha, kĩmwe gĩaku na kĩmwe kĩa Musa, na kĩrĩa kĩngĩ kĩa Elija.”" 
Matthew17:5 Na rĩĩrĩ, o hĩndĩ ĩyo Petero aaragia, itu rĩahenagia rĩgĩũka rĩkĩmahumbĩra, naguo mũgambo ũkiuma ituinĩ rĩu ũkiuga atĩrĩ, “Ũyũ nĩ we Mũrũ wakwa ũrĩa nyendeete, na nĩngenaga mũno nĩ ũndũ wake. Mũiguageei!”" 
Matthew17:6 Na rĩĩrĩ, arutwo maigua ũguo makĩmaka mũno kinya makĩgũa thĩ." 
Matthew17:7 No Jesũ agĩũka akĩmahuutia akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Ũkĩraai na mũtige gwĩtigĩra!”" 
Matthew17:8 Nao matiira maitho gũtirĩ mũndũ moonire tiga o Jesũ wiki. 
Matthew17:9 Rĩrĩa maikũrũkaga kuuma kĩrĩmainĩ, Jesũ akĩmaatha akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Mũtikaae kwĩra mũndũ o na ũmwe ũguo muona kinyagia rĩrĩa Mũrũ wa Mũndũ akaariũkio oime kũrĩ arĩa akuũ.”" 
Matthew17:10 Nao arutwo makĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Arutani a Watho moigaga atĩ Elija no mũhaka aambe ooke nĩkĩ?”" 
Matthew17:11 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Elija nĩegũũka ahaarĩrie maũndũ moothe." 
Matthew17:12 No ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ, Elija nĩarĩĩkĩĩtie gũũka, no andũ matiigana kũmũmenya, maamwĩkire o ũrĩa meendaga. Ũguo noguo o naake Mũrũ wa Mũndũ eerekeire kũnyariirwo nĩ o.”" 
Matthew17:13 Hĩndĩ ĩyo arutwo magĩkĩmenya atĩ Jesũ aamaheaga ũhoro wa Johana Mũbatithania. 
Matthew17:14 Nao maakinya harĩ andũ, mũndũ ũmwe agĩũka harĩ Jesũ akĩmũturĩria ndu"
