Mark3:26 Naake Caitaani angĩĩyũkĩrĩra we mwene na agayũkane, ndangĩtũũra no gũthira angĩthira." 
Mark3:27 “Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩhota kũingĩra nyũmba ya mũndũ njamba akuue indo ciake ataambĩĩte kuoha mũndũ ũcio, no aambire amuohe agĩcooka gũtaha indo ciake." 
Mark3:28 “Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩrĩ, andũ nĩmakooherwo meehia maao, o na irumi ciothe iria marumaga Ngai." 
Mark3:29 No mũndũ o wothe ũkaaruma Roho Mũtheru ndarĩ hingo akooherwo, amu nĩehĩĩtie rĩĩhia rĩa gũtũũra tene na tene.”" 
Mark3:30 (Jesũ aameerire ũguo tondũ moigaga aarĩ na ngoma.) 
Mark3:31 Na rĩĩrĩ, nyina wa Jesũ na aariũ a nyina magĩũka, makĩrũũgama hau nja, makĩmũtũmanĩra." 
Mark3:32 Nao andũ aingĩ arĩa maikaire thĩ mamũthiũrũrũkĩirie makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Maitũguo na aariũ a maitũguo marũngiĩ nja magĩkũũria.”" 
Mark3:33 Naake Jesũ akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Maitũ na aariũ a maitũ nĩ a?”" 
Mark3:34 Akĩroranga andũ arĩa maikarĩĩte thĩ agĩcooka akiuga atĩrĩ, “Maitũ na aariũ a maitũ nĩ aya:" 
Mark3:35 Mũndũ o wothe wĩkaga maũndũ marĩa Ngai eendaga, ũcio nĩ we mũrũ wa maitũ na mwarĩ wa maitũ!”" 
Mark4:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, o rĩngĩ Jesũ akĩambĩrĩria kũruta andũ ũhoro e hũgũrũrũinĩ cia iria rĩa Galili. Nao andũ arĩa maamũthiũrũrũkĩirie maarĩ aingĩ mũno, tondũ ũcio akĩingĩra gatarũinĩ agĩgaikarĩra. Gatarũ kau kaarĩ maaĩinĩ, nao andũ magĩikara hũgũrũrũinĩ cia iria." 
Mark4:2 Agĩkĩmaruta maũndũ maingĩ na ngerekano akiuga atĩrĩ: 
Mark4:3 “Tathikĩrĩriai! Hĩndĩ ĩmwe mũhuri nĩoimagarire agĩthiĩ kũhura mbegũ. 
Mark4:4 Na rĩrĩa aahuraga mbegũ, imwe ikĩgũa njĩrainĩ nacio nyoni igĩcirĩa." 
Mark4:5 Ingĩ ikĩgũa rũnyanjarainĩ kũrĩa gũtaarĩ na tĩĩri mũingĩ, nacio ikĩmera o narua nĩ ũndũ tĩĩri ndwarĩ mũriku." 
Mark4:6 Rĩrĩa riũa rĩarire rĩgĩcicina, ikĩũma o narua tondũ itiarĩ na mĩri mĩrũmu." 
Mark4:7 Ingĩ ikĩgũa mĩiguainĩ, nayo mĩigua ĩgĩkũra ĩgĩcithararia, ikĩaga gũciara." 
Mark4:8 Ingĩ nacio ikĩgũa tĩĩriinĩ ũrĩa mũnoru, igĩkũra ikĩneneha na igĩciara wega: imwe ikiumia maita mĩrongo ĩtatũ, ingĩ maita mĩrongo ĩtandatũ, na ingĩ maita igana.”" 
Mark4:9 Jesũ agĩcooka akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Ũrĩa wĩ na matũ makũigua nĩakĩigue!”" 
Mark4:10 Rĩrĩa Jesũ aikarĩĩte arĩ wiki, andũ amwe arĩa mamũiguĩte akĩaria magĩũka harĩ we marĩ na arutwo arĩa ikũmi na eerĩ, makĩmũũria amataũrĩre ũhoro wa ngerekano ĩyo." 
Mark4:11 Naake akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Inyuĩ nĩmũheetwo hitho cia Ũthamaki wa Ngai, no arĩa matarĩ a thiritũ yanyu maheagwo ũhoro na ngerekano nĩ geetha," 
Mark4:12 ‘Marorage na matione; mathikagĩrĩrie na matitaũkĩrwo. Nĩ amu mangĩmenya maacookerera Ngai, naake no amarekere meehia maao.’ ”" 
Mark4:13 Jesũ agĩcooka akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Kaĩ mũtaanataũkĩrwo nĩ ngerekano ĩyo? Angĩkorwo mũtiinataũkĩrwo-rĩ, mũngĩmenya atĩa ngerekano iria ingĩ?" 
Mark4:14 Mũhuri ahuraga ũhoro wa Ngai. 
Mark4:15 Andũ amwe nao mahaana mbegũ iria ciagũire njĩrainĩ. Acio maiguaga ũhoro, no marĩĩkia kũũigua Caitaani agooka akeeheria ũhoro ũcio." 
Mark4:16 Angĩ nao mahaana mbegũ iria ciagũire rũnyanjarainĩ. Rĩrĩa maigua ũhoro, nĩmawamũkagĩra na gĩkeno;" 
Mark4:17 ĩndĩ ũkaaga kũrũma thĩinĩ wao, magakĩaga kwĩhanda wega. Rĩrĩa maambĩrĩria gũthĩĩnio na kũnyamaario nĩ ũndũ wa ũhoro wa Ngai, makaũtirika o narua." 
Mark4:18 Angĩ nao mahaana ta mbegũ iria ciagũire mĩiguainĩ. Acio nao nĩ arĩa maiguaga ũhoro makaũnyiita," 
Mark4:19 no mathĩĩna ma gũũkũ thĩ, na kwenda ũtonga, o na merirĩria ma mĩthemba yothe magathararia ũhoro ũcio, magakĩaga maciaro." 
Mark4:20 Nĩkũrĩ andũ angĩ nao mahaana ta mbegũ iria ciagũire tĩĩriinĩ ũrĩa mũnoru. Acio maigua ũhoro mawamũkagĩra na magaciara maciaro: amwe maita mĩrongo ĩtatũ, angĩ maita mĩrongo ĩtandatũ, na arĩa angĩ maita igana.”" 
Mark4:21 Jesũ agĩthiĩ na mbere akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “No anga kũrĩ mũndũ wakagia taawa akaũkunĩkĩra na irebe kana akaũiga rungu rwa ũrĩrĩ? Githĩ ndũigagwo handũ igũrũ?" 
Mark4:22 Kĩrĩa gĩothe kĩhithe nĩgĩkoonanio ũtheriinĩ, na kĩrĩa gĩothe kĩhumbĩre nĩgĩkaahumbũrio." 
Mark4:23 Akorwo mwĩ na matũ makũigua kĩiguei!” 
Mark4:24 Ningĩ akĩmeera rĩngĩ atĩrĩ, “Menyagĩrĩraai ũrĩa mũiguaga! Nĩ ũndũ kĩgeri kĩrĩa mũgeranagĩra nakĩo nokĩo o na inyuĩ mũkaagererwo nakĩo nĩ Ngai na mũkĩrĩrĩrio." 
Mark4:25 Mũndũ ũrĩa wĩ na indo nĩakaaheeo ingĩ, no ũrĩa ũtarĩ, o na kĩrĩa e nakĩo nĩagaatuunywo.”" 
Mark4:26 Naake Jesũ agĩthiĩ na mbere akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Ũthamaki wa Ngai ũhaana ta mũndũ ũrĩa ũhandaga mbegũ tĩĩriinĩ." 
Mark4:27 Ahandaga, agacooka agakomaga ũtukũ na agookagĩra mũthenya, na ihinda rĩu rĩothe mbegũ ikamera na igakũra we atooĩ ũrĩa ikũraga." 
Mark4:28 Tĩĩri nĩguo ũtũmaga irio ikũre na iciare; ciambaga kũruta nguha, igacooka ikaruta mathangũ, na thuuthainĩ ikaruta kĩro." 
Mark4:29 Ciarĩĩkia gũkũra, mũrĩmi agacitema na rũhiũ rwa kũgetha nĩ tondũ nĩikinyĩĩte hĩndĩ ya kũgethwo.”" 
Mark4:30 Jesũ agĩcooka akiuga atĩrĩ, “Tũngĩhaanania ũthamaki wa Ngai na kĩĩ? Kana nĩ ngerekano ĩrĩkũ tũngĩheana ũhoro waguo nayo?" 
Mark4:31 Ũtariĩ ta ũũ: Mũndũ ooyaga mbegũ ya mũtĩ wa karatarĩ, na nĩ yo niini mũno gũkĩra mbegũ ciothe irĩ thĩ, akamĩhanda." 
Mark4:32 Thuutha wa ihinda rĩna, mbegũ ĩyo ĩkamera na ĩgakũra, ĩkaruta honge nene ĩgatuĩka mũtĩ mũnene gũkĩra ĩrĩa ĩngĩ yothe ĩ mũgũnda. Nacio nyoni igagĩũkaga gwaka itara mũtĩinĩ ũcio harĩa he na kĩĩruru.”" 
Mark4:33 Jesũ nĩaheire andũ ũhoro na ngerekano ingĩ nyingĩ ta icio kũringana na ũrĩa maahotaga kũigua. 
Mark4:34 Ndarĩ hingo aamaaragĩria ategũtũmĩra ngerekano. No rĩrĩa e na arutwo aake oiki nĩamataũragĩra maũndũ moothe. 
Mark4:35 Na rĩĩrĩ, hwaĩinĩ wa mũthenya o ũcio, Jesũ akĩĩra arutwo aake atĩrĩ, “Nĩtũringeei mũrĩmo ũũrĩa ũngĩ.”" 
Mark4:36 Magĩgĩtiga andũ, makĩingĩra gatarũinĩ harĩa Jesũ aikarĩĩte thĩ nĩguo maringe iria hamwe. Nĩkwarĩ tũtarũ tũngĩ maatwaranire natuo." 
Mark4:37 Na rĩĩrĩ, kũu iriainĩ gũkĩgĩa kĩhuuhũkanio kĩnene mũno, o kinya makũmbĩ ma maaĩ makĩambĩrĩria kũhũũra gatarũ, nako gakĩenda kũũrĩra maaĩinĩ." 
Mark4:38 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ aarĩ gatarũ thĩinĩ o thuutha akomeete na ageetiirania na kamuuto. Nao arutwo aake makĩmũũkĩria makĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Mũrutani, kaĩ, wee ũtaramaka tũgĩthira?”" 
Mark4:39 Naake Jesũ agĩũkĩra agĩkũũma rũhuuho na akĩĩra iria rĩhoorere. Naruo rũhuuho rũgĩtiga kũhuruutana, gũkĩhoorera biũ." 
Mark4:40 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ akĩũria arutwo aake atĩrĩ, “Mũmakĩĩte nĩkĩ? Kaĩ mũtarĩ na wĩtĩkio?”" 
Mark4:41 Nao magĩĩtigĩra mũno, makĩũrania atĩrĩ, “Kaĩ mũndũ ũyũ akĩrĩ ũ kuona atĩ o na rũhuuho na iria nĩiramwathĩkĩra?”" 
Mark5:1 Naake Jesũ na arutwo aake magĩkinya mũrĩmo ũrĩa ũngĩ wa iria rĩa Galili bũrũriinĩ wa Gerasa. 
Mark5:2 Naake oima gatarũinĩ agĩtũngwo nĩ mũndũ woimĩĩte mbĩĩrĩrainĩ. Naake mũndũ ũcio aarĩ na ngoma," 
Mark5:3 na aatũũraga kũu mbĩĩrĩrainĩ. Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩahotire kũmuoha na kĩndũ o na mĩnyororo," 
Mark5:4 amu o na oohwo mooko na magũrũ na mĩnyororo na mabĩngũ maita maingĩ, nĩacituangaga. Gũtiakĩrĩ mũndũ ũngĩahotire kũmũhooreria." 
Mark5:5 Aatũire oorũũraga mbĩĩrĩrainĩ na irĩmainĩ mũthenya na ũtukũ, akoigagĩrĩria na ageetemangaga na mahiga." 
Mark5:6 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũndũ ũcio oonire Jesũ arĩ haraaya, agĩteng'era agĩũka harĩ we, akĩĩgũithia magũrũinĩ maake." 
Mark5:7 Akĩanĩrĩra akiuga atĩrĩ, “Jesũ Mũrũ wa Ngai Ũrĩa Ũrĩ Igũrũ mũno! Tũrĩ na ũhoro ũrĩkũ nawe? Ndagũthaitha na Ngai ndũkaherithie!”" 
Mark5:8 (Oigire ũguo tondũ Jesũ nĩoigĩĩte atĩrĩ, “Ngoma ĩno uma thĩinĩ wa mũndũ ũyũ!”)" 
Mark5:9 Naake Jesũ agĩkĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Wĩtagwo atĩa?” Naake akiuga atĩrĩ, “Njĩtagwo ‘Mbũtũ’ tondũ tũrĩ aingĩ!”" 
Mark5:10 Agĩgĩthaitha Jesũ mũno atĩ ndakaingate ngoma icio kuuma bũrũriinĩ ũcio. 
Mark5:11 Na rĩĩrĩ, kũu kĩharũrũkainĩ kwarĩ rũũru rwa ngũrũe rwarĩaga kuo." 
Mark5:12 Nacio ngoma igĩthaitha Jesũ ikĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Twĩtĩkĩrie tũthiĩ tũtoonye thĩinĩ wa ngũrũe iiria.”" 
Mark5:13 Naake agĩciĩtĩkĩria. Nacio ngoma ikiuma igĩthiĩ igĩtoonya thĩinĩ wa ngũrũe. Naruo rũũru rũu ruothe, rũrĩa rwarĩ ta ngũrũe ngiri igĩrĩ, rũkĩharũrũka kĩharũrũkainĩ na ihenya rũgĩtoonya iria thĩinĩ, rũkĩũrĩra." 
Mark5:14 Nao arĩithi a ngũrũe icio makĩũra magĩthiĩ makĩheana ũhoro itũũrainĩ o na mĩgũndainĩ. Nao andũ maigua ũguo magĩũka kuona ũrĩa gwekĩkĩĩte. 
Mark5:15 Mooka he Jesũ makĩona mũndũ ũrĩa wakoragwo na mbũtũ ya ngoma arĩ harĩ Jesũ aikarĩĩte thĩ, ehumbĩĩte nguo, na atarĩ na ũũru; nao magĩĩtigĩra." 
Mark5:16 Na rĩĩrĩ, arĩa meyoneire makĩĩra arĩa angĩ maũndũ marĩa meekĩkĩĩte kũrĩ mũndũ ũcio warĩ na ngoma o na kũrĩ ngũrũe." 
Mark5:17 Nao andũ acio makĩambĩrĩria gũthaitha Jesũ oime kũu kwao. 
Mark5:18 Rĩrĩa Jesũ aingĩraga gatarũ, mũndũ ũcio warutĩĩtwo ngoma akĩmũthaitha mathiĩ naake." 
Mark5:19 No Jesũ akĩmũgiria akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Inũka kũrĩ andũ aanyu ũmeere ũrĩa Mwathani agwĩkĩire, o na ũrĩa akũiguĩrĩire tha.”" 
Mark5:20 Naake mũndũ ũcio agĩthiĩ akĩambĩrĩria kũheana ũhoro kũu Dekapoli guothe, akiugaga ũrĩa Jesũ aamwĩkĩĩte. Nao andũ oothe makĩgega." 
Mark5:21 Naake Jesũ arĩĩkia kũringa mũrĩmo ũũrĩa ũngĩ wa iria, arĩ hau rũteereinĩ andũ aingĩ magĩũka makĩmũthiũrũrũkĩria." 
Mark5:22 Gũgĩcooka gũgĩũka mũnene ũmwe wa thunagogi wetagwo Jairũ, naake oona Jesũ akĩmũturĩria ndu." 
Mark5:23 Akĩmũthaitha akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Kairĩĩtu gaakwa ke hakuhĩ gũkua, ndagũthaitha ũka ũgakaigĩrĩre mooko nĩguo kahone gatũũre muoyo!”" 
Mark5:24 Jesũ agĩgĩthiĩ naake, na andũ aingĩ makĩmuuma thuutha mamũthiũrũrũkĩirie mĩena yothe." 
Mark5:25 Na rĩĩrĩ, nĩhaarĩ mũtumia watũire oiraga thakame mĩaka ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ," 
Mark5:26 na nĩathĩĩnĩkĩĩte mũno, o na akaahũthĩra mbeeca nyingĩ akĩgeria gũthondekwo nĩ mandagĩtaarĩ aingĩ. Ĩndĩ ndahonaga no gũkĩrĩrĩria aakĩragĩrĩria kwĩhĩrwo." 
Mark5:27 Tondũ nĩaiguĩte ũhoro wa Jesũ, akĩmuuma na thuutha e andũinĩ akĩhuutia nguo yake;" 
Mark5:28 eekire ũguo tondũ eĩraga atĩrĩ, “Ingĩhuutia o na akorwo no nguo ciake, no hone.”" 
Mark5:29 Na ihinda o rĩu thakame ĩgĩtiga kuura, akĩigua aahonio." 
Mark5:30 Naake Jesũ akĩigua o rĩmwe oimwo nĩ hinya, akĩĩhũgũra akĩũria atĩrĩ, “Nũũ ũcio wahuutia nguo ciakwa?”" 
Mark5:31 Nao arutwo aake makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ũroria nũũ wakũhuutia ũkĩonaga ũrĩa andũ aya mahatĩkanĩte harĩ we?”" 
Mark5:32 Naake Jesũ akĩĩhũgũranga arore ũrĩa wamũhuutĩĩtie. 
Mark5:33 No mũtumia ũcio tondũ nĩamenyaga ũrĩa eekĩĩtwo, agĩũka arĩ na guoya akĩinainaga, akĩĩgũithia magũrũinĩ maake akĩmũhe ũhoro wothe." 
Mark5:34 Naake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Wĩtĩkio waku nĩguo watũma ũhone. Thiĩ na thaayũ na ũhone mũrimũ waku.”" 
Mark5:35 O hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ oigaga ũguo-rĩ, hagĩũka andũ matũmĩĩtwo kuuma kwa Jairũ makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Tiga gũthĩĩnia Mũrutani rĩngĩ, mwarĩguo nĩakua.”" 
Mark5:36 Naake Jesũ akĩaga gũthikĩrĩria ũrĩa moigaga, akĩĩra Jairũ atĩrĩ, ‘Wee ĩtĩkia na ũtige gwĩtigĩra.’ ”" 
Mark5:37 Magĩgĩthiĩ, no ndarĩ mũndũ eetĩkĩririe amuume thuutha, o tiga Petero, Jakubu, na Johana mũrũ wa nyina." 
Mark5:38 Rĩrĩa maakinyire kwa Jairũ magĩkora andũ magagaĩte makĩgirĩkaga na makĩrĩraga maanĩrĩire. 
Mark5:39 Naake Jesũ arĩĩkia kũingĩra nyũmba akĩũria atĩrĩ, “Mũgagaĩĩtio na mũkagirĩkio nĩ kĩĩ? Mwana ti mũkuũ nĩ toro arĩ!”" 
Mark5:40 Magĩkĩmũthekerera, no we akĩmarutũrũra na nja. Akĩoya aciari a mwana, na arutwo acio aake atatũ magĩthiĩ harĩa mwana aarĩ." 
Mark5:41 Agĩkĩnyiita kairĩĩtu guoko agĩkeera atĩrĩ, “Talitha kumi.” Naguo ũguo ũgĩtaũrwo nĩ ta kuuga atĩrĩ, “Kairĩĩtu gaaka, ndakwĩra ũũkĩre!”" 
Mark5:42 Nako kairĩĩtu kau gagĩũkĩra o rĩmwe gagĩĩtwara. (Kaarĩ ka mĩaka ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ.) Nao andũ moona ũguo makĩgega mũno. 
Mark5:43 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera makahe gĩa kũrĩa. Agĩcooka akĩmakaania matikeere mũndũ o na ũmwe ũhoro ũcio. 
Mark6:1 Thuutha ũcio Jesũ akiuma kũu agĩcooka itũũrainĩ rĩao, nao arutwo aake makĩmũrũmĩrĩra." 
Mark6:2 Mũthenya wa Thabatũ wakinya akĩambĩrĩria kũrutana thunagogiinĩ. Na kũu thunagogi nĩkwarĩ andũ aingĩ mũno. Rĩrĩa maamũiguire makĩgega, makĩũrania atĩrĩ, “Mũndũ ũyũ aarutire maũndũ maya moothe kũ? Kaĩ aheetwo ũũgĩ mũingĩ atĩa wa gwĩka maũndũ ma magegania ũũ?" 
Mark6:3 Githĩ ũyũ ti we bundi wa mbaaũ, mũrũ wa Mariamu, na mũrũ wa nyina na Jakubu, Josefu, Judasi, na Simoni? Githĩ aarĩ a nyina matirĩ gũũkũ na ithuĩ?” Nao magĩkĩregana naake." 
Mark6:4 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Mũnabii kũndũ ataheagwo gĩtĩĩo no itũũrainĩ rĩake, gwake mũciĩ, o na gatagatĩ ka andũ aao.”" 
Mark6:5 Naake Jesũ ndahotire kũringa ciama kũu itũũrainĩ rĩao o tiga nĩaigĩrĩire o andũ matarĩ aingĩ mooko arĩa maarĩ arũaru nao makĩhona. 
Mark6:6 Naake akĩgega nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa maagĩĩte wĩtĩkio. Thuutha ũcio Jesũ agĩthiĩ gũceera kũu matũũrainĩ, akĩrutaga andũ ũhoro." 
Mark6:7 Agĩcooka agĩĩta arutwo arĩa ikũmi na eerĩ akĩmatũma eerĩ eerĩ, na akĩmahe ũhoti wa kũruta andũ ngoma." 
Mark6:8 Ningĩ akĩmaatha matigekuuĩre kĩndũ o na kĩ rũgendoinĩ tiga o mũtirima akĩmeera matigakuue irio, mondo, kana mbeeca" 
Mark6:9 no mathiĩ meekĩrĩĩte iraatũ, na matigekuuĩre nguo ingĩ tiga iria irĩ mwĩrĩ." 
Mark6:10 Agĩcooka akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “O nyũmba ĩrĩa mũrĩtoonya-rĩ, ikaraai kuo kinya mũkoima itũũra rĩu." 
Mark6:11 No kũrĩa andũ matakaamũnyiita ũgeni, na marege kũmũthikĩrĩria, mũkiuma kuo mũkeribariba rũkũngũ magũrũ. Naguo ũndũ ũcio ũtuĩke kĩonereria kũrĩ o atĩ mũtiinakena!”" 
Mark6:12 Nao magĩgĩthiĩ makĩhunjĩria andũ atĩ merire meehia maao. 
Mark6:13 Ningĩ makĩingata ngoma nyingĩ, na makĩhaka andũ aingĩ arĩa maarĩ arũaru maguta, makĩmahonia." 
Mark6:14 Na rĩĩrĩ, mũthamaki Herode akĩigua maũndũ macio moothe, tondũ Jesũ nĩagĩĩte na igweta kũndũ guothe. Tondũ andũ amwe moigaga atĩrĩ, “Johana Mũbatithania nĩariũkĩĩte! Nĩkĩo e na hinya mũnene ũũ wa kũringa ciama.”" 
Mark6:15 Nao arĩa angĩ makoiga atĩrĩ, “Aaca, ũyũ nĩ Elija.” Arĩa angĩ nao makoiga, “Ũyũ nĩ mũnabii ta ũmwe wa arĩa a tene.”" 
Mark6:16 No Herode aigua ũhoro ũcio akiuga atĩrĩ, “Johana ũrĩa ndatinithirie mũtwe nĩ we ũcio ũriũkĩĩte!”" 
Mark6:17 Herode nĩathanĩĩte atĩ Johana anyiitwo na aikio njeera. Herode eekĩĩte ũguo nĩ ũndũ wa Herodia ũrĩa aahikĩĩtie o na gũtuĩka aarĩ mũtumia wa mũrũ wa nyina Filipu. 
Mark6:18 Johana nĩerĩĩte Herode atĩrĩ, “Ndwagĩrĩirwo nĩkũhikia mũtumia wa mũrũ maitũguo.”" 
Mark6:19 Kwoguo Herodia agĩgĩtuma Johana ũthũ na akĩenda kũmũũraga. No ndahotire," 
Mark6:20 nĩ amu Herode nĩetigĩrĩĩte Johana nĩ ũndũ wa kũmenya atĩ aarĩ mũndũ mwega na mũthingu, tondũ ũcio agĩkĩmũmenyerera wega. Herode nĩendaga gũthikĩrĩria Johana o na gũtuĩka nĩathĩĩnĩkaga mũno ngoro aamũthikĩrĩria." 
Mark6:21 Na rĩĩrĩ, mũthenya ũmwe Herodia akĩgĩa na mweke. Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Herode aarugire iruga rĩa gũkũngũĩra gũciarwo gwake, nĩetire njaama ciake, atongoria a mbũtũ cia ita, na athuuri arĩa maarĩ igweta kũu Galili." 
Mark6:22 Rĩrĩa mwarĩ wa Herodia ookire akĩina, nĩakenirie Herode na ageni aake mũno. Naake mũthamaki akĩĩra mũirĩĩtu ũcio atĩrĩ, “Njũũria o kĩrĩa gĩothe ũkwenda, na nĩngũkũhe.”" 
Mark6:23 Mũthamaki agĩkĩĩhĩta akiuga atĩrĩ, “O kĩrĩa ũkũnjĩtia nĩngũkũhe, o na angĩkorwo nĩ nuthu ya bũrũri wakwa!”" 
Mark6:24 Naake mũirĩĩtu ũcio akiuma nja akĩũria nyina atĩrĩ, “Nĩ kĩĩ ngwĩtia?” Naake akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Ĩtia mũtwe wa Johana Mũbatithania.”" 
Mark6:25 Naake agĩtoonya o narua kwĩ mũthamaki akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ngwenda o rĩu ũhe mũtwe wa Johana Mũbatithania wĩkĩrĩĩtwo kiugainĩ.”" 
Mark6:26 Ũndũ ũcio ũgĩtũma mũthamaki aigue kĩeha mũno, no akĩremwo nĩkũrega nĩ ũndũ nĩarĩĩkĩĩtie kwĩhĩta, o na nĩ ũndũ wa ageni arĩa maamũceereire." 
Mark6:27 Agĩgĩtũma mũrangĩri ũmwe wa arĩa maamũrangagĩra, agĩathana atĩ mũtwe wa Johana ũreehwo. Naake agĩthiĩ kũu njeera akĩmũtinia mũtwe," 
Mark6:28 akĩũreehe wĩkĩrĩĩtwo kiugainĩ akĩũnengera mũirĩĩtu ũcio, naake akĩũnengera nyina." 
Mark6:29 Nao arutwo a Johana maigua ũhoro ũcio magĩthiĩ makĩoya kĩimba gĩake, magĩgĩthika." 
Mark6:30 Thuutha ũcio atũmwo a Jesũ magĩcooka magĩũka kũrĩ we makĩmwĩra maũndũ moothe marĩa meekĩĩte, o na marĩa maarutanĩĩte." 
Mark6:31 Na tondũ nĩkwarĩ na andũ aingĩ mookaga magĩthiaga, o nginya Jesũ na arutwo aake makaaga hĩndĩ ya kũhuurũka kana kũrĩa, agĩkĩĩra arutwo aake atĩrĩ, “Ũkaai tũthiĩ handũ hatarĩ andũ mũkahuurũke haniini.”" 
Mark6:32 Magĩkĩingĩra gatarũ marĩ oiki, magĩthiĩ handũ hataarĩ andũ." 
Mark6:33 Nao andũ aingĩ makĩmoona magĩthiĩ, makĩmamenya; magĩgĩũka kuuma matũũrainĩ moothe, magĩthiĩ na magũrũ mateng'ereete, o nginya magĩkinya mbere ya arutwo handũ hau maathiaga." 
Mark6:34 Naake Jesũ oima gatarũinĩ, akĩona ũrĩa andũ acio maingĩhĩĩte, akĩmaiguĩra tha tondũ maahaanaga ta ng'ondu itarĩ na mũrĩithi; agĩkĩambĩrĩria kũmaruta maũndũ maingĩ." 
Mark6:35 Nakuo gwatua gũtuka arutwo aake magĩũka harĩ we makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Gũũkũ nĩ werũinĩ na rĩu gũkirie gũtuka," 
Mark6:36 ĩra andũ mathiĩ nĩguo makinye mĩgũndainĩ, o na icagiinĩ nĩguo makagũre kĩndũ mangĩrĩa.”" 
Mark6:37 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Maheei kĩndũ gĩa kũrĩa arĩ inyuĩ.” Nao makĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Tũthiĩ tũkagũre mĩgate ya dinari magana meerĩ tũmahe marĩe?”" 
Mark6:38 Naake Jesũ akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Mũrĩ na mĩgate ĩigana? Tathiĩi mũrore.” Nao maarora makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Nĩ mĩgate ĩtaano na thamaki igĩrĩ.”" 
Mark6:39 Naake Jesũ agĩathana atĩ andũ oothe maikare thĩ ikundi ikundi kũu nyekiinĩ. 
Mark6:40 Magĩgĩikara thĩ ikundi: imwe cia andũ igana, na ingĩ cia mĩrongo ĩtaano." 
Mark6:41 Naake akĩoya mĩgate ĩyo ĩtaano na thamaki icio igĩrĩ, akĩrora igũrũ, agĩciraathima. Agĩcooka akĩenyũranga mĩgate akĩnengera arutwo mahe andũ, na thamaki nacio akĩmagayania oothe." 
Mark6:42 Nao oothe makĩrĩa, makĩhũũna." 
Mark6:43 Nao arutwo magĩcooka makĩũngania cienyũ cia mĩgate o na cia thamaki iria ciatigarĩĩte, ikĩiyũra ciondo ikũmi na igĩrĩ." 
Mark6:44 Andũ arĩa maahũũnirio maarĩ arũme ngiri ithaano (5,000)." 
Mark6:45 Na hĩndĩ o ĩyo Jesũ akĩĩra arutwo aake maingĩre gatarũ mathiage mũrĩmo ũrĩa ũngĩ wa iria meerekeire Bethisaida. Naake agĩtigwo akiugĩra andũ ũhoro. 
Mark6:46 Arĩĩkia kũmoigĩra ũhoro agĩthiĩ kĩrĩmainĩ kũhooya. 
Mark6:47 Gũgĩkinya hwaĩinĩ, gatarũ kaarĩ iriainĩ gatagatĩ, naake Jesũ aarĩ wiki thĩ nyũmũ." 
Mark6:48 Hĩndĩ ĩyo akĩona arutwo aake makĩĩgũmĩra gũtwara gatarũ tondũ meerekeire na kũrĩa rũhuuho rwoimaga. Na kũrĩ o ũtukũ ta rĩrĩa ngũkũ igambaga agĩthiĩ kũrĩ o agereire maaĩ igũrũ, akĩenda kũmahĩtũka." 
Mark6:49 Nao mamuona agereire maaĩ igũrũ, magĩciiria nĩ ngoma moonaga magĩgĩkaya." 
Mark6:50 Oothe magĩĩtigĩra mũno. Naake Jesũ akĩmaarĩria o rĩmwe akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Ũmĩrĩriai! Nĩ niĩ. Tigaai gwĩtigĩra!”" 
Mark6:51 Naake agĩtoonya gatarũinĩ, naruo rũhuuho rũkĩhoorera. Nao arutwo aake makĩgega mũno," 
Mark6:52 nĩ ũndũ o na ũhoro wa mĩgate ĩrĩa maarĩĩte ndwamaguũkĩire wega, tondũ ngoro ciao ciarĩ nyũmũ." 
Mark6:53 Naake Jesũ na arutwo aake makĩringa iria magĩkinya kũrĩa gwĩtagwo Genesareti, makĩoha gatarũ rũteereinĩ." 
Mark6:54 Nao moima gatarũinĩ, andũ makĩmenya Jesũ o rĩmwe." 
Mark6:55 Magĩteng'era matũũrainĩ, makamũreehere arĩa oothe maarĩ arũaru. O harĩa maigua nĩ ho arĩ, makamũtwarĩra andũ mamakuuĩĩte na mĩgeka." 
Mark6:56 Kũrĩa guothe Jesũ aatoonyaga: icagiinĩ, matũũrainĩ, kana mĩgũndainĩ, maigaga arĩa arũaru ndũũnyũinĩ makamũthaitha ameetĩkĩrie mahuutie o na akorwo no gĩcũrĩ kĩa nguo yake. Nao arĩa oothe maakĩhuutagia makahonio." 
Mark7:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, Afarisai amwe o na arutani a Watho arĩa moimĩĩte Jerusalemu makĩũngana harĩ Jesũ." 
Mark7:2 Nao makĩona arutwo amwe aake makĩrĩa irio na mooko me na thaahu, ũguo nĩkuuga, matarĩ mathambie." 
Mark7:3 (Amu Afarisai o na Ayahudi oothe, matingĩarĩire irio matethambĩĩte mooko kũringana na ũrutani wa maithe maao ma tene." 
Mark7:4 Moima ndũũnyũ matingĩarĩire kĩndũ mataambĩĩte gũgĩthambia. Nĩkwarĩ na mĩtugo ĩngĩ mĩingĩ maarũmagĩrĩra, ta gũthambia ikombe, nyũngũ, na indo cia gĩcango.)" 
Mark7:5 Nao Afarisai na arutani a Watho makĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Nĩkĩ gĩtũmaga arutwo aaku maage kũrũmĩrĩra ũrutani wa maithe maitũ ma tene, makarĩaga irio na mooko me na thaahu?”" 
Mark7:6 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Isaia nĩarathire ũhoro wanyu wega inyuĩ hinga ici! O ta ũrĩa kwandĩkĩĩtwo atĩ: ‘Andũ aya maaheaga gĩtĩĩo na mĩromo, no ngoro ciao ikoragwo irĩ kũraaya na niĩ." 
Mark7:7 Gũtirĩ bata wao wa gũũthaathaiya, nĩ ũndũ marutanaga mawatho ma andũ ta arĩ mo maathani maakwa!’" 
Mark7:8 “Mũtiganaga na watho wa Ngai mũkarũmĩrĩra kĩrĩra kĩa andũ.” 
Mark7:9 Jesũ agĩgĩthiĩ na mbere akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Ti itherũ mwĩ na njĩra ya wara ya kũrega watho wa Ngai, nĩguo mũrũmĩrĩre kĩrĩra kĩanyu!" 
Mark7:10 Amu Musa nĩoigire atĩrĩ, ‘Tĩĩa thooguo na maitũguo,’ o na akiuga hangĩ atĩrĩ, ‘Mũndũ wa kũnyarara ithe kana nyina, arokua!’" 
Mark7:11 No inyuĩ muugaga atĩ mũndũ angĩĩra ithe kana nyina atĩrĩ, ‘Kĩrĩa ũngĩeguna nakĩo kuuma harĩ niĩ nĩ Korubani,’ (naguo nĩ ta kuuga atĩ kĩndũ kĩu nĩkĩamũrĩre Ngai)," 
Mark7:12 hingo ĩyo ndangĩcooka kũhooywo ũteithio nĩ ithe kana nyina. 
Mark7:13 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũgakĩagithia ũhoro wa Ngai bata na kĩrĩra kĩanyu kĩrĩa mũtiganagĩra. Ningĩ nĩmwĩkaga maũndũ mangĩ maingĩ matariĩ ta macio.” 
Mark7:14 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ agĩcooka agĩĩta andũ harĩ we o rĩngĩ akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Tathikĩrĩriai inyuothe, mũigue ũrĩa ndĩroiga." 
Mark7:15 Gũtirĩ kĩndũ o na kĩ gĩtoonyaga thĩinĩ wa mũndũ kuuma na nja kĩngĩmũthaahia, ĩndĩ kĩrĩa kiumaga na thĩinĩ nĩkĩo gĩthaahagia mũndũ. [" 
Mark7:16 Kĩiguei akorwo mwĩ na matũ!”] 
Mark7:17 Naake atigana na andũ agĩtoonya nyũmba, nao arutwo aake makĩmũũria amataũrĩre ngerekano ĩyo." 
Mark7:18 Naake Jesũ akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Githĩ o na inyuĩ mũtirĩ mũrakuuũka? Mũtikũmenya atĩ kĩndũ o gĩothe gĩtoonyaga thĩinĩ wa mũndũ kuuma na nja gĩtingĩmũthaahia?" 
Mark7:19 Nĩ gũkorwo gĩtithiaga ngoro, gĩthiaga nda gĩgacooka gĩkoima.” (Jesũ akiuga ũguo nĩgũtua aatuaga irio ciothe theru.)" 
Mark7:20 Agĩcooka akiuga atĩrĩ, “Kĩrĩa kiumaga thĩinĩ wa mũndũ nĩkĩo kĩmũthaahagia." 
Mark7:21 Nĩ gũkorwo nĩ thĩinĩ wa ngoro ya mũndũ kuumaga meciiria mooru ma ũmaraaya, ũici, ũũragani," 
Mark7:22 ũtharia, gũcuumĩkĩra, waganu, kũheenania, ũũra thoni, ũiru, kũrumana, mwĩtĩĩo, na ũrimũ," 
Mark7:23 maũũru macio moothe moimaga na thĩinĩ magathaahia mũndũ.” 
Mark7:24 Kuuma hau Jesũ agĩũkĩra agĩthiĩ matũũrainĩ ma Turo na Sidoni. Agĩtoonya mũciĩ ũmwe, na ndeendaga mũndũ o na ũmwe amenye kũrĩa arĩ, no ndangĩaikarire ehithĩĩte." 
Mark7:25 Na rĩĩrĩ, o rĩmwe mũtumia warĩ na mwarĩ wanyiitĩĩtwo nĩ ngoma akĩigua ũhoro wa Jesũ. Naake agĩũka akĩĩgũithia magũrũinĩ maake." 
Mark7:26 Mũtumia ũcio aarĩ Mũrũũrĩrĩ wa kuuma mwena wa Foenicia, kũrĩa kũrĩ thĩinĩ wa Siria. Agĩgĩthaitha Jesũ aathe ngoma yume mwarĩ." 
Mark7:27 Naake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Reke ciana ciambe ihũũne, amu ti wega kuoya irio cia ciana na gũciikĩria ngui.”" 
Mark7:28 Naake mũtumia ũcio akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Noguo Mwathani; ĩndĩ o na ngui irĩ rungu rwa meetha nĩirĩaga rũitĩki kuuma harĩ irio cia ciana!”" 
Mark7:29 Naake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Tondũ wa ũguo woiga-rĩ, wĩinũkĩre, ngoma nĩrĩĩkĩĩtie kuuma mwarĩguo!”" 
Mark7:30 Naake agĩkĩinũka agĩkora mwarĩ akomeete ũrĩrĩ, nayo ngoma ĩrĩĩkĩĩtie kũmũtiga." 
Mark7:31 Naake Jesũ akĩhũndũka kuuma Turo, akĩgerera Sidoni, agĩkinya iriainĩ rĩa Galili, atuĩkanĩirie kũu Dekapoli." 
Mark7:32 Nao andũ makĩmũreehere mũndũ ũtaiguaga na warogoyaga, makĩmũthaitha atĩ amũhonie." 
Mark7:33 Naake Jesũ akĩmweheria harĩ andũ, akĩmũtwara handũ mwanya, agĩikia ciara ciake matũinĩ maake, agĩtua mata, akĩmũhuutia rũrĩmĩ namo," 
Mark7:34 agĩcooka akĩrora igũrũ, akĩhũũmũka akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Efatha!” Ũguo nĩkuuga, “Hingũka!”" 
Mark7:35 Namo Matũ ma mũndũ ũcio magĩkĩhingũka, naruo rũrĩmĩ rwake rũkĩregera akĩhota kwaria wega." 
Mark7:36 Naake Jesũ akĩmakaania matikeere mũndũ, no o ũrĩa akĩragĩrĩria kũmakaania, noguo maathiaga na mbere kwaria." 
Mark7:37 Nao makĩgega mũno, magĩkiuga atĩrĩ, “Nĩekĩĩte maũndũ moothe wega! Nĩatũmaga arĩa mataiguaga maigue, na arĩa mataaragia maarie!”" 
Mark8:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, matukũinĩ o macio andũ aingĩ magĩkorwo magomanĩĩte rĩngĩ no matiarĩ na gĩa kũrĩa. Naake Jesũ agĩĩta arutwo aake harĩ we akĩmeera atĩrĩ," 
Mark8:2 “Nĩndĩraiguĩra andũ aya tha, tondũ makoreetwo na niĩ rĩu mĩthenya ĩtatũ, na matirĩ na kĩndũ gĩa kũrĩa." 
Mark8:3 Ingĩmeera mainũke mahũũtiĩ mahota kũringĩkĩra njĩra, amu andũ amwe aao moimĩĩte kũraaya.”" 
Mark8:4 Nao arutwo makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Mũndũ angĩkĩruta irio kũ gũũkũ werũinĩ cia kũhũũnia andũ ta aya?”" 
Mark8:5 Naake Jesũ akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Mwĩ na mĩgate ĩigana?” Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Twĩ na mĩgate mũgwanja.”" 
Mark8:6 Naake agĩgĩatha andũ acio maikare thĩ, agĩcooka akĩoya mĩgate ĩyo mũgwanja, na arĩĩkia gũcookeria Ngai ngaatho akĩmĩenyũranga, akĩmĩnengera arutwo aake mahe andũ, nao arutwo makĩmatwarĩra." 
Mark8:7 Ningĩ nĩmaarĩ na tũthamaki tũniini tũtaarĩ tũingĩ; naake Jesũ arĩĩkia gũtũraathima akĩĩra arutwo matũhe andũ o na tuo. 
Mark8:8 Nao andũ makĩrĩa, makĩhũũna. Nao arutwo magĩcooka makĩũngania cienyũ iria ciatigarĩĩte, ikĩiyũra ciondo mũgwanja. Na rĩĩrĩ, maarĩ andũ ta ngiri inya (4,000). Jesũ agĩcooka akĩmeera mainũke." 
Mark8:9  
Mark8:10 Naake ihinda o rĩu akĩingĩra gatarũinĩ o hamwe na arutwo aake, magĩthiĩ rũgongo rwa Dalumanutha." 
Mark8:11 Nao Afarisai magĩũka, makĩambĩrĩria gũkararania na Jesũ makĩmwĩraga atĩ amaringĩre kĩama kuuma igũrũ, no nĩkũmũgeria maamũgeragia." 
Mark8:12 No Jesũ akĩhũũmũka ihũũmũka inene kuuma o ngoro thĩinĩ, akĩũria atĩrĩ, “Andũ a matukũ maya mekuuga maringĩrwo kĩama nĩkĩ? Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ, gũtirĩ kĩama mekũringĩrwo!”" 
Mark8:13 Naake akĩmatiga, akĩingĩra gatarũ rĩngĩ, akĩringa mũrĩmo ũrĩa ũngĩ wa iria." 
Mark8:14 Na rĩĩrĩ, arutwo nĩmaariganĩirwo nĩgũkuua mĩgate no nĩmaarĩ na mũgate ũmwe gatarũinĩ." 
Mark8:15 Naake Jesũ akĩmataara akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Mwĩmenyagĩrĩreei ndaawa ya kũimbia mĩgate ya Afarisai o na ya Herode.”" 
Mark8:16 Nao makĩĩrana atĩrĩ, “Aratwĩra ũguo, nĩ ũndũ tũtirĩ na mĩgate.”" 
Mark8:17 Naake Jesũ tondũ nĩamenyire ũrĩa moigaga akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Mũkwĩrana nĩ ũndũ mũtarĩ na mĩgate nĩkĩ? Kaĩ mũtarĩ mũramenya ũhoro o na kana mũgakuuũka? Mũtirĩ mũratiga kũũmia ngoro?" 
Mark8:18 Kaĩ mũtoonaga na mũrĩ na maitho. Kaĩ mũtaiguaga na mũrĩ na matũ? Nĩmũkũririkana 
Mark8:19 rĩrĩa ndaheire andũ arĩa ngiri ithaano (5,000) mĩgate ĩrĩa ĩtaano? Nĩ ciondo ciigana mwacookire gũkuua ciyũire cienyũ?” Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Nĩ ikũmi na igĩrĩ.”" 
Mark8:20 “Ningĩ rĩ, rĩrĩa ndaheire andũ arĩa ngiri inya (4,000) mĩgate ĩrĩa mũgwanja, nĩ ciondo ciigana muonganirie ciyũrĩĩte cienyũ?” Nao magĩcookia makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Nĩ mũgwanja.”" 
Mark8:21 Agĩkĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Na mũtirĩ mũrataũkĩrwo nĩ ũhoro o na rĩu?”" 
Mark8:22 Na rĩĩrĩ, maakinya Bethisaida, andũ makĩreehere Jesũ mũndũ warĩ mũtumuumu, makĩmũthaitha atĩ amũhuutie." 
Mark8:23 Naake akĩnyiita mũndũ ũcio guoko akĩmuumagaria nja ya gĩcagi. Thuutha wa kũmũtuĩra mata maitho, na kũmũigĩrĩra mooko, akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Wĩ kĩndũ ũrona?”" 
Mark8:24 Naake mũndũ ũcio agĩtiira maitho akiuga atĩrĩ, “Nĩndĩrona andũ, no rĩĩrĩ, ndĩrona mahaana ta mĩtĩ ĩgĩthiĩ.”" 
Mark8:25 Jesũ agĩcooka akĩmũigĩrĩra mooko maitho rĩngĩ; naake mũndũ ũcio agĩkũũra maitho mũno, akĩhota kuona indo ciothe wega." 
Mark8:26 Naake Jesũ akĩmwatha ainũke, na ndagaacooke gĩcagiinĩ kĩu." 
Mark8:27 Naake Jesũ akiuma kũu na arutwo aake magĩthiĩ kinya icagi iria irĩ hakuhĩ na Kaisarea Filipi. Me njĩra akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Andũ moigaga niĩ ndĩ ũ?”" 
Mark8:28 Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Kũrĩ moigaga wee nĩ we Johana Mũbatithania, angĩ Elija, nao angĩ ũmwe wa anabii.”" 
Mark8:29 Agĩcooka akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Ĩ inyuĩ na inyuĩ muugaga niĩ ndĩ ũ?” Naake Petero akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Wee nĩ we Mesia.”" 
Mark8:30 Naake Jesũ akĩmakaania matikeere mũndũ o na ũmwe ũhoro wake. 
Mark8:31 Na rĩĩrĩ, Jesũ akĩambĩrĩria kũmaruta atĩ Mũrũ wa Mũndũ no mũhaka oone mathĩĩna maingĩ, na aregwo nĩ athuuri na athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene, na arutani a Watho. Na rĩĩrĩ, nĩakooragwo na thuutha wa mĩthenya ĩtatũ acooke ariũke." 
Mark8:32 Agĩkĩmeera ũhoro ũcio atekũhithĩrĩra. Naake Petero akĩmũtwara ndundu, agĩitĩka kũmũkaania." 
Mark8:33 No Jesũ akĩĩhũgũra akĩrora arutwo aake agĩkaania Petero, akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Cooka thuutha wakwa Caitaani! Nĩ ũndũ meciiria macio maaku matiumĩĩte kũrĩ Ngai, moimĩĩte kũrĩ andũ!”" 
Mark8:34 Agĩcooka agĩĩta andũ oothe na arutwo aake hamwe akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Mũndũ o wothe ũngĩenda kũũnũmĩrĩra no aambire eerege we mwene, ooe mũtharaba wake anũmĩrĩre." 
Mark8:35 Tondũ-rĩ, mũndũ o wothe wendaga kũhonokia muoyo wake, ũcio nĩakoorwo nĩguo, no ũrĩa ũũragwo nĩ muoyo wake nĩ ũndũ wakwa, o na nĩ ũndũ wa Ũhoro ũrĩa Mwega, nĩakaũhonokia." 
Mark8:36 Nĩ amu-rĩ, mũndũ angĩĩguna na kĩ o na angĩgaya thĩ yothe na oorwo nĩ muoyo wake?" 
Mark8:37 Ningĩ nĩ kĩĩ mũndũ angĩkũũrania muoyo wake nakĩo? 
Mark8:38 Amu mũndũ ũrĩa ũconokaga nĩ ũndũ wakwa na nĩ ũndũ wa ciugo ciakwa thĩinĩ wa rũciaro rũũrũ rũteetĩkĩĩtie na rwa meehia, Mũrũ wa Mũndũ o naake nĩakaamũconokera rĩrĩa agooka na riiri wa Ithe arĩ na araika arĩa atheru.”" 
Mark9:1 Naake agĩthiĩ na mbere kwaria akiuga atĩrĩ, “Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ, haaha nĩharĩ andũ amwe matagaakua matooneete Ũthamaki wa Ngai ũgĩũka wĩ na hinya.”" 
Mark9:2 Na rĩĩrĩ, thuutha wa mĩthenya ĩtandatũ yathira Jesũ akĩoya Petero, Jakubu na Johana akĩmatwara handũ kĩrĩma igũrũ marĩ oiki. Naake Jesũ akĩgarũrũka ũrĩa aatariĩ mamwĩroreire." 
Mark9:3 Nguo ciake ikĩerũha cua; gũtirĩ mũndũ o na ũmwe gũũkũ thĩ ũngĩahotire gũcierũhia ũguo. 
Mark9:4 Hĩndĩ ĩyo arutwo acio atatũ makĩona Elija na Musa makĩaria na Jesũ. 
Mark9:5 Naake Petero akĩĩra Jesũ atĩrĩ, “Mũrutani, nĩ wega tondũ twĩ haaha! Reke twake ithũnũ ithatũ, kĩmwe gĩaku, kĩrĩa kĩngĩ kĩa Musa, na kĩrĩa kĩngĩ kĩa Elija.”" 
Mark9:6 Petero oigire ũguo nĩ ũndũ we na arutwo acio angĩ nĩmaamakĩĩte mũno, o kinya makarigwo nĩ wa kuuga." 
Mark9:7 O hĩndĩ ĩyo gũgĩũka itu rĩkĩmahumbĩra, naguo mũgambo ũkiuma ituinĩ ũkiuga atĩrĩ, “Ũyũ nĩ we Mũrũ wakwa ũrĩa nyendeete; mũiguageei!”" 
Mark9:8 Nao magĩcooka kwĩhũgũra na ihenya mationire mũndũ o na ũ, tiga Jesũ we wiki." 
Mark9:9 Rĩrĩa maikũrũkaga kuuma kĩrĩmainĩ, Jesũ akĩmaatha matikeere mũndũ o na ũ maũndũ marĩa mooneete, kinya rĩrĩa Mũrũ wa Mũndũ akaariũka oime kũrĩ arĩa akuũ." 
Mark9:10 Nao magĩgĩĩka o ta ũguo aameerire, ĩndĩ magakĩũranagia gatagatĩinĩ kaao atĩrĩ, “Kũriũka kuuma kũrĩ arĩa akuũ-rĩ, nĩkuuga atĩa?”" 
Mark9:11 Magĩkĩũria Jesũ atĩrĩ, “Arutani a Watho moigaga atĩ no mũhaka Elija aambe ooke nĩkĩ?”" 
Mark9:12 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Noguo, Elija nĩakaamba gũũka mbere nĩ geetha ahaarĩrĩrie maũndũ moothe. No nĩkĩ gĩtũmaga Maandĩko moige atĩ Mũrũ wa Mũndũ nĩagaathĩĩnio mũno na aregwo nĩ andũ?" 
Mark9:13 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ, Elija nĩarĩĩkĩĩtie gũũka, na andũ makamwĩka ũrĩa meendaga kũmwĩka kũringana na ũrĩa ũhoro wake wandĩkĩĩtwo Maandĩkoinĩ.”" 
Mark9:14 Na rĩĩrĩ, maakinya harĩ arutwo arĩa angĩ, makĩona andũ aingĩ mamathiũrũrũkĩirie, na arutani amwe a Watho arĩa maarĩ ho magĩkararania nao." 
Mark9:15 Rĩrĩa andũ moonire Jesũ, makĩgega mũno, magĩteng'era harĩ we makĩmũgeithia." 
Mark9:16 Naake Jesũ akĩũria arutwo atĩrĩ, “Nĩ kĩĩ mũgũkararanagĩria nao?”" 
Mark9:17 Naake mũndũ ũmwe warĩ hau andũinĩ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Mũrutani, ngũkũreeheire mũrũ wakwa ũkoragwo arĩ na ngoma na ndaaragia." 
Mark9:18 Rĩrĩa yamũnyiitũkia, ĩmũrũndaga thĩ, naake akaambĩrĩria kũruta mũhũũyũ, akahagarania magego, na akoomagara mwĩrĩ wothe. Nĩnjũũririe arutwo aaku maingate ngoma ĩyo, no matinahota.”" 
Mark9:19 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Kaĩ andũ aya nĩmwagĩĩte wĩtĩkio-ĩ! Ngũikara na inyuĩ kinya rĩ, na ngũmũkirĩrĩria kinya rĩ? Ndeehereei kamwana kau!”" 
Mark9:20 Nao magĩgatwarĩra Jesũ. Nayo ngoma ĩyo yona Jesũ ĩgĩkanyiitũkia ĩgĩgathiora, ĩgĩgaikia thĩ, nako gakĩgaragara gagĩitaga mũhũũyũ na kanua." 
Mark9:21 Naake Jesũ akĩũria ithe atĩrĩ, “Gatũire ũũ kuuma rĩ?” Naake ithe akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Kuuma o gaaciarwo." 
Mark9:22 Mahinda maingĩ ngoma ĩno yanageria gũkooraga na njĩra ya gũgaikia mwakiinĩ, o na maaĩinĩ. Akorwo wahota-rĩ, tũiguĩre tha ũtũteithie!”" 
Mark9:23 Naake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Atĩ akorwo ndahota! Maũndũ moothe nĩmahotekaga kũrĩ mũndũ ũrĩa wĩtĩkĩĩtie.”" 
Mark9:24 Naake ithe wa kamwana kau agĩcookia o rĩmwe akiuga atĩrĩ, “Nĩnjĩtĩkĩĩtie, no ndeithĩrĩria harĩa ndigĩĩtie gwĩtĩkia!”" 
Mark9:25 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ oona atĩ andũ aingĩ no maamũthiũrũrũkagĩria, agĩkũũma ngoma ĩyo akĩmĩĩra atĩrĩ, “Wee ngoma ĩno ĩtaiguaga na ĩtaaragia, ndagwatha uume thĩinĩ wa kamwana gaaka na ndũkaanagatoonye rĩngĩ!”" 
Mark9:26 Nayo ngoma ĩyo yarĩĩkia gũkaya na gũkoomagaria ĩkiuma thĩinĩ wako. Nako kamwana kau gakĩhaana ta kaarĩ gakuũ, o kinya andũ aingĩ makiuga atĩ nĩ gakuũ." 
Mark9:27 No Jesũ agĩkanyiita guoko agĩgookĩria, nako gakĩrũũgama na igũrũ." 
Mark9:28 Thuutha ũcio Jesũ aingĩra nyũmba arutwo aake makĩmũũria marĩ oiki atĩrĩ, “Nĩkĩ gĩtũmire tũremwo nĩkũingata ngoma ĩyo?”" 
Mark9:29 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Ngoma ya mũthemba ta ũcio ndĩngĩrutĩka na njĩra ĩngĩ tiga o mahooya. ”" 
Mark9:30 Thuutha ũcio Jesũ na arutwo aake makiuma kũu magĩtuĩkanĩria Galili. Naake Jesũ ndeendaga mũndũ o na ũmwe amenye kũrĩa aarĩ," 
Mark9:31 amu nĩarutaga arutwo aake akameera atĩrĩ, “Mũrũ wa Mũndũ nĩakaaneanwo kũrĩ andũ, nao nĩmakaamũũraga, no thuutha wa mĩthenya ĩtatũ nĩakaariũka.”" 
Mark9:32 Ĩndĩ arutwo matiigana gũtaũkĩrwo nĩ ũhoro ũcio, no magĩĩtigĩra kũmũũria amataũrĩre." 
Mark9:33 Nao magĩgĩkinya Kaperinaumu, na matoonya nyũmba thĩinĩ, Jesũ akĩũria arutwo aake atĩrĩ, “Mũgũkararanagĩria kĩ rĩrĩa tuuma njĩrainĩ?”" 
Mark9:34 Nao magĩkira ki nĩ ũndũ rĩrĩa maarĩ njĩrainĩ nĩmaakararanagia gatagatĩinĩ kaao makĩũranagia nũũ mũnene makĩria. 
Mark9:35 Naake Jesũ agĩikara thĩ agĩĩta arutwo acio ikũmi na eerĩ akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Ũrĩa wothe wendaga gũtuĩka wa mbere no aatuĩkire wa mũthia harĩ arĩa angĩ oothe, na atuĩke ndungata yao oothe.”" 
Mark9:36 Agĩcooka akĩoya kaana agĩkarũũgamia gatagatĩinĩ kaao, agĩkahĩmbĩria akĩmeera atĩrĩ," 
Mark9:37 “Ũrĩa wothe wamũkagĩra kaana ta gaaka thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩakwa, nĩ niĩ aamũkagĩra; ũrĩa wothe ũnyamũkagĩra, ti niĩ aamũkagĩra, no aamũkagĩra ũrĩa wandũmire.”" 
Mark9:38 Naake Johana agĩcooka akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Mũrutani, nĩtuonire mũndũ ũkũingataga ngoma thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩaku, twamũkaania nĩ ũndũ ti mũraata witũ.”" 
Mark9:39 No Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Tigaai kũmũkaania, amu mũndũ o wothe ũkũringa ciama thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩakwa ndangĩcooka arĩthaahie," 
Mark9:40 tondũ mũndũ o wothe ũtarĩ thũ iitũ nĩ mũraata witũ. 
Mark9:41 Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ, mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa ũkaamũhe maaĩ ma kũnyua tondũ mũrĩ aakwa nĩakaaheeo igai rĩake." 
Mark9:42 “Mũndũ o na ũmwe angĩkĩhĩtithia kamwe ga tũũtũ tũnjĩtĩkĩĩtie atũme keehie, wega nĩ mũndũ ũcio oohererwo ihiga rĩa gĩthĩi ngingo aikio iriainĩ." 
Mark9:43 Angĩkorwo nĩ guoko gwaku gũgũtũma wĩhie, gũtinie! Nĩ kaba kũingĩra muoyoinĩ ũtarĩ na guoko kũmwe, gũkĩra gũthiĩ icuainĩ wĩ na mooko meerĩ, kũrĩa kũrĩ mwaki ũtahorekaga. [" 
Mark9:44 Kũu ‘igunyũ iria imarĩaga itikuaga, kana mwaki ũrĩa ũmacinaga ũkahora.’]" 
Mark9:45 Angĩkorwo nĩ kũgũrũ gwaku gũgũtũma wĩhie, gũtinie! Nĩ kaba kũingĩra muoyoinĩ wĩ gĩthua gũkĩra gũikio icuainĩ wĩ na magũrũ meerĩ. [" 
Mark9:46 Kũu ‘igunyũ iria imarĩaga itikuaga, kana mwaki ũrĩa ũmacinaga ũkahora.’]" 
Mark9:47 Angĩkorwo nĩ riitho rĩaku rĩgũtũma wĩhie, rĩkũũre! Nĩ kaba kũingĩra Ũthamakiinĩ wa Ngai wĩ na riitho rĩmwe handũ ha gũikio icuainĩ wĩ na maitho meerĩ;" 
Mark9:48 kũu ‘igunyũ iria imarĩaga itikuaga kana mwaki ũrĩa ũmacinaga ũkahora.’ 
Mark9:49 “Mũndũ o wothe nĩagaatherio na mwaki o ta ũrĩa nyama cia igongoona itheragio na cumbĩ. 
Mark9:50 “Cumbĩ nĩ mwega, no ũngĩthira mũcamo, ũngĩcooka gũcamithio ta cumbĩ nĩ kĩĩ? “Tuĩkaai ta cumbĩ, na mũikarage mũiguaine inyuothe.”" 
Mark10:1 Thuutha ũcio Jesũ akiuma Kaperinaumu agĩthiĩ mwena wa Judea, mũrĩmo ũũrĩa ũngĩ wa Rũũĩ rwa Jorodani. Nao andũ aingĩ makĩmũthiũrũrũkĩria rĩngĩ, naake akĩmaruta o ta ũrĩa aamenyereete." 
Mark10:1 Thuutha ũcio Jesũ akiuma Kaperinaumu agĩthiĩ mwena wa Judea, mũrĩmo ũũrĩa ũngĩ wa Rũũĩ rwa Jorodani. Nao andũ aingĩ makĩmũthiũrũrũkĩria rĩngĩ, naake akĩmaruta o ta ũrĩa aamenyereete." 
Mark10:2 Nao Afarisai amwe magĩũka kũrĩ we makĩenda kũmũgeria makĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Watho witũ nĩwĩtĩkĩrĩĩtie mũndũ mũrũme atigane na mũtumia wake?”" 
Mark10:3 Naake Jesũ akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Musa aamwathire atĩa?”" 
Mark10:4 Nao makĩmũcookeria makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Musa nĩaheanire rũũtha mũndũ aandĩkĩre mũtumia wake marũa ma kũmũtiga, agĩtigane naake.”" 
Mark10:5 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Musa aamũheire Watho ũcio nĩ ũndũ wanyu kũũmia ngoro." 
Mark10:6 Ĩndĩ o ta ũrĩa maandĩko moigĩĩte, kuuma o kĩambĩrĩria, ‘Ngai oombire mũndũ mũrũme na mũndũ mũka," 
Mark10:7 na nĩ ũndũ wa gĩtũmi kĩu mũndũ mũrũme nĩarĩtigaga ithe na nyina akanyiitithanio na mũtumia wake," 
Mark10:8 nao eerĩ magatuĩka mwĩrĩ ũmwe.’ Matingĩgĩcooka gũtuĩka eerĩ nĩ ũndũ nĩ mwĩrĩ ũmwe. 
Mark10:9 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũndũ ndakaanatigithanie arĩa Ngai anyiitithanĩĩtie.” 
Mark10:10 Na rĩrĩa maingĩrire nyũmba, arutwo makĩũria Jesũ ũhoro ũcio o rĩngĩ." 
Mark10:11 Naake akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Mũndũ mũrũme angĩtiga mũtumia wake ahikie mũtumia ũngĩ nĩatharĩĩtie." 
Mark10:12 O na mũtumia angĩtiga mũthuuriwe, ahikĩre mũndũ ũngĩ o naake nĩatharĩĩtie.”" 
Mark10:13 Nao andũ makĩreehere Jesũ ciana atĩ nĩ geetha aciigĩrĩre mooko, no arutwo aake makĩmagiria." 
Mark10:14 Rĩrĩa Jesũ oonire ũguo akĩraakara, akĩĩra arutwo atĩrĩ, “Rekeei ciana ciũke kũrĩ niĩ, tigaai gũcigiria, tondũ Ũthamaki wa Ngai nĩ wa arĩa mahaana ta cio." 
Mark10:15 Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ, mũndũ o wothe ũtaamũkagĩra Ũthamaki wa Ngai ta kaana ndakaũtoonya.”" 
Mark10:16 Agĩcooka akĩhĩmbĩria ciana icio, agĩciigĩrĩra mooko, agĩciraathima." 
Mark10:17 Na rĩĩrĩ, hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Jesũ aambĩrĩirie gũthiĩ, mũndũ ũmwe agĩteng'era harĩ we akĩmũturĩria ndu akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Mũrutani mwega, nĩ atĩa ingĩĩka nĩ geetha ngaagaya muoyo wa tene na tene?”" 
Mark10:18 Naake Jesũ akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Ũkũnjĩta mwega nĩkĩ? Gũtirĩ mũndũ mwega tiga o Ngai wiki." 
Mark10:19 Wee nĩũũĩ maathani: ‘Ndũkaanooragane; ndũkaanatharanie; ndũkaanaiye; ndũkaanaigĩrĩre mũndũ kĩgeenyo; ndũkaanaheenanie, na tĩĩa thooguo na maitũguo.’ ”" 
Mark10:20 Naake mũndũ ũcio akĩĩra Jesũ atĩrĩ, “Mũrutani, maathani macio moothe ndũire ndĩmarũmagĩrĩra kuuma ndĩ o mũnyiinyi.”" 
Mark10:21 Naake Jesũ aamũrora akĩmwenda, akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Nĩharĩ ũndũ ũmwe ũtigĩĩtie. Thiĩ wendie indo ciaku ciothe ũhe athĩĩni mbeeca icio, na nĩũkũgĩa na mũthiithũ mũnene igũrũ; weka ũguo ũcooke ũũke ũũnũmĩrĩre.”" 
Mark10:22 Rĩrĩa mũndũ ũcio aiguire ũguo agĩtuka gĩthiithi, agĩthiĩ e na kĩeha amu aarĩ mũtongu mũno." 
Mark10:23 Naake Jesũ akĩĩhũgũra na kũrĩ arutwo aake akiuga atĩrĩ, “Kaĩ nĩ hinya andũ arĩa atongu gũtoonya Ũthamakiinĩ wa Ngai-ĩ!”" 
Mark10:24 Nao arutwo makĩgega nĩ ũndũ wa ciugo icio ciake. No Jesũ agĩthiĩ na mbere kwaria akiuga atĩrĩ, “Ciana ciakwa, kaĩ nĩ ũndũ wĩ hinya gũtoonya Ũthamakiinĩ wa Ngai-ĩ!" 
Mark10:25 Nĩ ũhũthũ ngamĩĩra gũtoonyera irimainĩ rĩa cindano gũkĩra mũndũ mũtongu gũtoonya Ũthamakiinĩ wa Ngai.” 
Mark10:26 Oiga ũguo arutwo makĩmaka mũno, makĩũrania atĩrĩ, “Nũũ ũngĩhota kũhonokio?”" 
Mark10:27 Naake Jesũ akĩmakũũrĩra maitho akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Ũndũ ũyũ ndũngĩhoteka nĩ andũ tiga o Ngai, tondũ maũndũ moothe nĩmahotekaga nĩ Ngai.”" 
Mark10:28 Naake Petero akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Mwathani, ithuĩ tũtigĩĩte indo ciothe tũgakũrũmĩrĩra.”" 
Mark10:29 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũtigĩĩte nyũmba yake kana aariũ, kana aarĩ a nyina, kana ithe, kana nyina, kana ciana, kana mĩgũnda nĩ ũndũ wakwa na nĩ ũndũ wa Ũhoro ũrĩa Mwega," 
Mark10:30 ũtakaaheeo ũtonga mũingĩ matukũ maya tũrĩ, na aheeo maita igana ma nyũmba, na ma aariũ na aarĩ a nyina, na maanyina, na ciana, na mĩgũnda, o hamwe na mĩnyamaaro, na thuutha wa ũtũũro ũyũ aheeo muoyo wa tene na tene." 
Mark10:31 No rĩĩrĩ, andũ aingĩ arĩa marĩ a mbere rĩu, magaatuĩka a thuutha, nao arĩa me thuutha matuĩke a mbere.”" 
Mark10:32 Na rĩĩrĩ, marĩ njĩrainĩ meerekeire Jerusalemu Jesũ amatongoreetie, arutwo aake makĩiyũrwo nĩ kĩmako, nao andũ arĩa maamarũmĩrĩire nĩmeetigagĩra. O hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ agĩcookia arutwo arĩa ikũmi na eerĩ ndundu akĩmeera o rĩngĩ maũndũ marĩa maakirie kũmũkora." 
Mark10:33 Agĩkĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Twerekeire kwambata Jerusalemu kũrĩa Mũrũ wa Mũndũ arĩneanwo kũrĩ athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene na arutani a Watho. Nao nĩmarĩmũtuĩra kũũragwo, na mamũneane kũrĩ andũ a Ndũũrĩrĩ" 
Mark10:34 nao mamũnyũrũrie, mamũtuĩre mata, mamũhũũre na kĩboko, na mamũũrage. No rĩĩrĩ, thuutha wa mĩthenya ĩtatũ nĩakaariũka.”" 
Mark10:35 Nao Jakubu na Johana, aariũ a Zebedi magĩũka kwĩ Jesũ makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Mũrutani, nĩharĩ ũndũ tũkwenda ũtwĩkĩre.”" 
Mark10:36 Naake Jesũ akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Nĩ atĩa mũkwenda?”" 
Mark10:37 Nao makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Rĩrĩa ũgaikarĩra gĩtĩ kĩa ũnene Ũthamakiinĩ waku ũrĩa wĩ riiri-rĩ, ũgaatwĩtĩkĩria ũmwe aikare mwena waku wa ũrĩo, na ũrĩa ũngĩ wa ũmotho.”" 
Mark10:38 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Inyuĩ mũtiũĩ kĩrĩa mũrahooya. Mwahota kũnyuĩra gĩkombe kĩa mĩnyamaaro kĩrĩa ngũnyuĩra? Mwahota kũbatithio kĩbatithio kĩrĩa ngũbatithio nakĩo?”" 
Mark10:39 Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Ĩĩ no tũhote.” Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Nĩguo nĩmũkũnyuĩra gĩkombe kĩrĩa ngũnyuĩra, o na mũbatithio na kĩbatithio kĩrĩa ngũbatithio nakĩo." 
Mark10:40 Ĩndĩ niĩ ndirĩ na kĩhooto gĩa gũtua nũũ ũgaikara mwena wakwa wa ũrĩo kana wa ũmotho. Ngai we mwene nĩ we ũkaaheana itĩ icio kũrĩ arĩa acithondekeire.” 
Mark10:41 Na rĩĩrĩ, rĩrĩa arutwo arĩa angĩ ikũmi maamenyire ũhoro ũcio, makĩiguĩra Jakubu na Johana ũũru." 
Mark10:42 Naake Jesũ akĩmeeta oothe hamwe akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Nĩmũũĩ atĩ atongoria a ndũũrĩrĩ nĩmakoragwo na ũhoti mũnene igũrũ rĩacio na nĩmaciathaga." 
Mark10:43 No ũndũ ũcio ndũkaanooneeke gatagatĩinĩ kaanyu. Ũrĩa ũkwenda gũtuĩka mũnene gatagatĩinĩ kaanyu nĩatuĩke ndungata ya arĩa angĩ. 
Mark10:44 Na ũrĩa wothe ũkwenda gũtuĩka wa mbere nĩatuĩke ngombo ya arĩa angĩ oothe. 
Mark10:45 Amu o naake Mũrũ wa Mũndũ ndookire gũtungatĩrwo, ookire gũtungata na kũheana muoyo wake ũtuĩke wa gũkũũra andũ aingĩ.”" 
Mark10:46 Nao magĩgĩkinya Jeriko, na rĩrĩa Jesũ oimaga kuo arĩ na arutwo aake o hamwe na andũ aingĩ, Baritimayo mũrũ wa Timayo agĩkorwo aikaire mũkĩrainĩ wa njĩra. Baritimayo aarĩ mũtumuumu watũire ahooyaga ũteithio." 
Mark10:47 Naake aigua atĩ nĩ Jesũ wa Nazarethi, akĩambĩrĩria kwanĩrĩra na mũgambo mũnene akiuga atĩrĩ, “Jesũ Mũrũ wa Daudi! Njiguĩra tha!”" 
Mark10:48 Nao andũ aingĩ maamũigua makĩmũkũũma, makĩmwĩra akire. Nowe agĩkĩrĩrĩria kwanĩrĩra, “Mũrũ wa Daudi! Njiguĩra tha!”" 
Mark10:49 Naake Jesũ akĩrũũgama akĩĩra andũ mamwĩte. Nao makĩmwĩta makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ũmĩrĩria na ũũkĩre nĩaragwĩta.”" 
Mark10:50 Naake agĩteania nguo yake ya igũrũ agĩteng'era harĩ Jesũ. 
Mark10:51 Naake Jesũ akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Ũkwenda ngwĩkĩre atĩa?” Naake akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Mũrutani, ngwenda o njooke kuona.”" 
Mark10:52 Naake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Wĩthiĩre, gwĩtĩkia gwaku nĩkuo gwatũma ũhone.” Ihinda o rĩu akĩambĩrĩria kuona, akĩrũmĩrĩra Jesũ." 
Mark11:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, Jesũ na arutwo aake magĩkinya kĩrĩmainĩ kĩa Mĩtamaiyũ gũkuhĩ na matũũra ma Bethifage na Bethania, hakuhĩ na Jerusalemu. Naake Jesũ agĩtũma arutwo aake eerĩ mbere," 
Mark11:2 akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Thiĩi gĩcagi gĩĩkĩ mũng'ethanĩire nakĩo, na mwatoonya o ũguo nĩmũkuona njaũ ya ndigiri yoheetwo ĩtarĩ yakuua mũndũ. Mĩohoreei mũmĩreehe." 
Mark11:3 Mũngĩũrio nĩ mũndũ mũgwĩka ũguo nĩkĩ-rĩ, mwĩreei atĩ Mwathani nĩabatairio nĩ yo na nĩekũmĩcookia o narua.”" 
Mark11:4 Nao magĩthiĩ magĩkora njaũ ya ndigiri kũu barabarainĩ, yoheetwo. Rĩrĩa maamĩohoraga," 
Mark11:5 andũ arĩa maarũngiĩ ho makĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Mũroohora njaũ ĩyo nĩkĩ?”" 
Mark11:6 Nao makĩmacookeria o ta ũrĩa Jesũ aameerĩĩte, nao andũ acio magĩkĩmeetĩkĩria mathiĩ nayo." 
Mark11:7 Magĩkĩreehe njaũ ĩyo harĩ Jesũ, makĩmĩigĩrĩra nguo ciao, naake Jesũ akĩmĩikarĩra." 
Mark11:8 Nao andũ aingĩ makĩara nguo ciao barabarainĩ, nao arĩa angĩ makĩara mathĩgĩ marĩa maatuĩte mĩgũndainĩ." 
Mark11:9 Nao arĩa maamũtongoreetie o na arĩa maamuumĩĩte thuutha makĩanĩrĩra makiugaga atĩrĩ, “Ngai arokumio? Ngai aroraathima ũrĩa ũgũũka na rĩĩtwa rĩa Mwathani!" 
Mark11:10 Ngai aroorathima Ũthamaki ũrĩa ũgũũka wa ithe witũ Daudi! Ngai arokumio igũrũ o igũrũ!” 
Mark11:11 Naake Jesũ akinya Jerusalemu akĩingĩra Hekaarũ. Arĩĩkia kwĩrorangĩra akiuma, agĩthiĩ Bethania arĩ hamwe na arutwo arĩa ikũmi na eerĩ, nĩ tondũ kwarĩ hwaĩinĩ." 
Mark11:12 Na rĩrĩ, mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ rĩrĩa Jesũ na arutwo aake moimaga Bethania, Jesũ akĩigua ahũtiĩ." 
Mark11:13 Agĩkĩona mũkũyũ ũrĩ haraaya ũrurĩĩte wega, agĩthiĩ harĩ guo ehokeete atĩ nĩekuona ngũyũ. No akinya harĩ guo ndarĩ kĩndũ oonire, tiga mathangũ matheri, amu gũtiarĩ hĩndĩ ya mĩkũyũ gũciara." 
Mark11:14 Jesũ agĩkĩwĩra atĩrĩ, “Andũ maroaga gũkaarĩa matunda maaku tene na tene!” Nao arutwo aake makĩigua ũguo oigire." 
Mark11:15 Na rĩĩrĩ, maakinya Jerusalemu Jesũ agĩthiĩ Hekaarũinĩ, akĩambĩrĩria kũrutũrũra arĩa meendanagĩria na arĩa maagũragĩra kuo, na akĩng'aũrania meetha cia arĩa maakũũranagia mbeeca o na itĩ cia arĩa meendagia ndutuura." 
Mark11:16 Gũtirĩ mũndũ aangĩetĩkĩririe ahĩtũkĩrie kĩndũ kũu nja ya Hekaarũ. 
Mark11:17 Agĩcooka akĩruta andũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Ngai oigĩĩte Maandĩkoinĩ atĩrĩ, ‘Hekaarũ yakwa ĩgeetagwo nyũmba ya kũhooyagĩrwo nĩ andũ a ndũũrĩrĩ ciothe.’ No inyuĩ mũmĩtuĩte kũndũ gwa kwĩhithwo nĩ atuunyani!”" 
Mark11:18 Rĩrĩa athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene o na arutani a Watho maiguire ũhoro ũcio, makĩambĩrĩria gũcaria ũrĩa mangĩmũũraga. No nĩmamwĩtigagĩra nĩ amu andũ oothe nĩmaagegeete nĩ ũndũ wa ũrutani wake." 
Mark11:19 Gwakinya hwaĩinĩ, Jesũ na arutwo aake makiuma Jerusalemu." 
Mark11:20 Na rĩĩrĩ, mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ rũũciinĩ, Jesũ na arutwo aake maakinya harĩa mũkũyũ warĩ, makĩona ũũmĩĩte wothe kinya mĩri." 
Mark11:21 Naake Petero aririkana ũhoro wa mũkũyũ ũcio akĩĩra Jesũ atĩrĩ, “Mũrutani, tarora! Mũkũyũ ũrĩa ũrarumire nĩũũmĩĩte!”" 
Mark11:22 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Ĩtĩkiai Ngai." 
Mark11:23 Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ mũndũ o wothe ũngĩĩra kĩrĩma gĩĩkĩ atĩrĩ, ‘Kũũrũka wĩikie iriainĩ,’ na akorwo atarĩ na nganja ngoroinĩ yake, na akorwo eetĩkĩĩtie atĩ ũguo ekuuga nĩũkũhinga, no eekĩrwo ũndũ ũcio." 
Mark11:24 Tondũ ũcio ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ, ũndũ o wothe mũrĩũragia mũkĩhooya, ĩtĩkagiai atĩ nĩmũrĩĩkĩĩtie kũheeo, na nĩmũrĩgĩaga naguo." 
Mark11:25 Rĩrĩa mũrũngiĩ mũkĩhooya-rĩ, ohagĩraai arĩa mamũhĩtĩirie, nĩguo Ithe wanyu ũrĩa wĩ igũrũ o naake amuohagĩre meehia maanyu. [" 
Mark11:26 No mũngĩrega kuohera arĩa angĩ, meehia maao, o naake Ithe wanyu ũrĩa wĩ igũrũ ndangĩmuohera meehia marĩa mwĩhĩĩtie.”]" 
Mark11:27 Naake Jesũ na arutwo aake magĩgĩkinya Jerusalemu rĩngĩ. Na rĩrĩa Jesũ aaceeraga kũu Hekaarũinĩ, athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene, na arutani a Watho na athuuri magĩũka kũrĩ we." 
Mark11:28 Magĩkĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Ũreeka maũndũ maya na ũhoti ũrĩkũ, na nũũ wakũheire ũhoti ũcio?”" 
Mark11:29 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Nĩngũmũũria kĩũria na mwanjookeria nĩngũmwĩra kũrĩa ndutĩĩte ũhoti ũrĩa ndĩreeka maũndũ maya naguo." 
Mark11:30 Tanjĩĩraai atĩrĩ, Johana, aarutĩĩte ũhoti wa kũbatithania kũ, kũrĩ Ngai kana kũrĩ andũ? Tanjookeriai!”" 
Mark11:31 Nao makĩambĩrĩria gũkararania makĩũranagia atĩrĩ, “Tũkuuga atĩa? Wona twoiga woimĩĩte kwĩ Ngai, egũtũũria atĩrĩ, ‘Mwakĩregire kũmwĩtĩkia nĩkĩ?’" 
Mark11:32 Na twoiga ‘Woimĩĩte kũrĩ andũ...’ ” (Nĩmeetigagĩra andũ, amu andũ oothe nĩmeetĩkĩĩtie atĩ Johana aarĩ mũnabii.)" 
Mark11:33 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio magĩkĩĩra Jesũ atĩrĩ, “Tũtiũĩ.” Naake akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “O na niĩ ndigũkĩmwĩra njĩkaga maũndũ maya na ũhoti ũrĩkũ.”" 
Mark12:1 Thuutha ũcio Jesũ akĩmaarĩria na ngerekano akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Hĩndĩ ĩmwe nĩkwarĩ mũndũ wahandire Thabibũ mũgũndainĩ wake. Agĩcooka akĩũirigĩra, akĩenja irima rĩa kũhihĩra, agĩcooka agĩaka nyũmba ya arangĩri. Naake akĩũkomborithia, agĩthiĩ bũrũri ũngĩ." 
Mark12:2 Hĩndĩ ya kũgetha thabibũ yakinya, agĩtũmĩra arĩa maakomboreete ngombo ĩkaneeo igai rĩake rĩa magetha." 
Mark12:3 Nao akombori acio makĩnyiita ngombo ĩyo, makĩmĩhũũra, magĩcooka makĩmĩingata mooko matheri." 
Mark12:4 Mwene mũgũnda agĩcooka agĩtũma ngombo ĩngĩ, nao akombori acio makĩmĩhũũra, makĩmĩtiihangia mũtwe, na makĩmĩĩka maũndũ maingĩ mooru." 
Mark12:5 Agĩcooka agĩtũma ĩngĩ o rĩngĩ, nayo ĩyo makĩmĩnyiita makĩmĩũraga. Ningĩ akĩmarekeria ngombo ingĩ nyingĩ o magĩciĩkaga maũndũ ta macio, imwe makahũũra, iria ingĩ nacio makooraga." 
Mark12:6 Kwoguo mũndũ ũcio ndaarĩ na ũngĩ wa gũtũma tiga o mũrũ wake ũrĩa eendeete mũno. Marigĩrĩrioinĩ agĩkĩmũtũma akiugaga atĩrĩ, ‘Ndĩ na ma nĩmekũhe mũrũ wakwa gĩtĩĩo.’" 
Mark12:7 No akombori acio makĩĩrana atĩrĩ, ‘Ũyũ nĩ we ũkaagaya mũgũnda ũyũ; nĩtũmũũrageei na nĩtũkũrigia na igai rĩake!’" 
Mark12:8 Magĩkĩmũnyiita makĩmũũraga na magĩikia mwĩrĩ wake na kũu nja ya mũgũnda ũcio.” 
Mark12:9 Naake Jesũ agĩthiĩ na mbere kwaria akĩũria atĩrĩ, “Mwene mũgũnda ageeka atĩa? Agooka amoorage, akomborithie mũgũnda ũcio wake wa mĩthabibũ andũ angĩ." 
Mark12:10 Gũtirĩ nganja nĩmũthoomeete maandĩko harĩa hoigaga atĩrĩ, ‘Ihiga rĩrĩa aaki maaregire nĩrĩo rĩtuĩkĩĩte rĩa bata mũthingiinĩ." 
Mark12:11 Nĩ Mwathani wekire ũguo, na ũndũ ũcio nĩ wa magegania tũkĩwona!’ ”" 
Mark12:12 Nao anene a Ayahudi makĩgeria kũmũnyiita tondũ nĩmaamenyire atĩ nĩ o aaragia ũhoro wao na ngerekano ĩyo. No magĩĩtigĩra andũ, magĩkĩmũtiga magĩĩthiĩra." 
Mark12:13 Nao Afarisai amwe, o hamwe na andũ amwe a kĩama kĩa Aherodia, magĩtũmwo kũrĩ Jesũ nĩguo mamũtege na mĩario yake." 
Mark12:14 Magĩgĩũka makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Mũrutani, nĩtũũĩ atĩ wĩ wa ma, na ndũrĩ mũndũ wĩtigagĩra, amu ndũroraga ũrĩa andũ matariĩ, no ũrutanaga na ma ũhoro wa Ngai. Rĩu-rĩ, Watho witũ nĩwĩtĩkĩrĩĩtie tũrutagĩre mũthamaki wa Roma igooti? Tũrutage kana tũtikaarutage?”" 
Mark12:15 No we Jesũ aamenya ũhinga wao agĩkĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Mũrangeria nĩkĩ? Tareeheei mbeeca ndĩmĩone.”" 
Mark12:16 Nao magĩkĩmũreehere mbeeca, naake akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Mbica ĩno na rĩĩtwa rĩĩrĩ nĩ cia ũ?” Nao makĩmwĩra atĩ nĩ cia mũthamaki wa Roma." 
Mark12:17 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Rutagĩraai mũthamaki wa Roma kĩrĩa gĩ gĩake, na Ngai kĩrĩa gĩ gĩake.” Nao andũ acio makĩgega mũno nĩ ũndũ wa ũguo aameerire." 
Mark12:18 Thuutha ũcio Asadukai, arĩa moigaga atĩ andũ arĩa akuũ matikaariũka, magĩũka kwĩ Jesũ makĩmũũria atĩrĩ," 
Mark12:19 “Mũrutani, Musa nĩatwandĩkĩire atĩrĩ, ‘Mũndũ angĩkua atige mũtumia wake atarĩ aagĩa mwana, mũrũ wa nyina no mũhaka ahikie mũtumia ũcio nĩ geetha acookerie mũrũ wa nyina mbeũ.’" 
Mark12:20 Rĩu-rĩ, nĩkwarĩ na aariũ mũgwanja a nyina ũmwe,na ũrĩa mũkũrũ wao akĩhikania, agĩcooka agĩkua na ndatige ciana." 
Mark12:21 Naake wa keerĩ agĩcooka akĩhikia mũtumia ũcio, no o naake agĩcooka agĩkua na ndatige ciana. O na wa gatatũ o naake agĩkua na acio angĩ o taguo." 
Mark12:22 Na rĩĩrĩ oothe mũgwanja magĩkĩmũhikia, magĩkua matarĩ ciana. Thuutha wao oothe mũtumia ũcio o naake agĩkua." 
Mark12:23 Rĩu-rĩ, rĩrĩa arĩa akuũ magaakĩriũka-rĩ, mũtumia ũcio agaagĩtuĩka wa ũ, nĩ ũndũ oothe mũgwanja nĩmaamũhikĩĩtie?”" 
Mark12:24 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Nĩmũhĩtĩĩtie nĩ ũndũ mũtiũĩ Maandĩko kana hinya wa Ngai." 
Mark12:25 Amu rĩrĩa akuũ makaariũka magaakorwo mahaana ta araika arĩa me igũrũ, matikaahikanagia kana makahika." 
Mark12:26 Naguo ũhoro wa kũriũkio kwa arĩa akuũ-rĩ, kaĩ mũtarĩ mwathooma Wathoinĩ wa Musa, ũhoro wa kĩhinga gĩkĩhĩa? Watho ũcio wonanĩĩtie ũrĩa Ngai aarĩirie Musa akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Nĩ niĩ Ngai wa Aburahamu, Isaaka, na Jakubu.’" 
Mark12:27 We nĩ Ngai wa arĩa me muoyo, ti Ngai wa arĩa akuũ. Inyuĩ mũhĩtĩĩtie mũno!”" 
Mark12:28 Na rĩĩrĩ, nĩhaarĩ mũrutani ũmwe wa Watho wathikagĩrĩria mĩario ĩyo, naake aigua atĩ Jesũ nĩacookeria Asadukai wega akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Nĩ rĩathani rĩrĩkũ rĩĩrĩ bata gũkĩra marĩa mangĩ moothe?”" 
Mark12:29 Naake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Rĩathani rĩrĩa rĩ bata mũno makĩria nĩ rĩĩrĩ, ‘Taigua wee Isiraeli! Mwathani Ngai witũ no we wiki Mwathani." 
Mark12:30 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio, enda Mwathani Ngai waku na ngoro yaku yothe, o na muoyo waku wothe, o na meciiria maaku moothe, o na hinya waku wothe.’" 
Mark12:31 Narĩo rĩa keerĩ no ta rĩu, ‘Enda mũndũ ũrĩa mũrigainie naake o ta ũrĩa wĩyendeete wee mwene.’ Gũtirĩ rĩathani rĩngĩ rĩrĩ bata gũkĩra macio meerĩ.”" 
Mark12:32 Naake mũrutani ũcio wa Watho akĩĩra Jesũ atĩrĩ, “Nĩwoiga ma mũrutani, atĩ Mwathani Ngai no we wiki, na atĩ gũtirĩ ũngĩ tiga we." 
Mark12:33 Na atĩ no mũhaka mũndũ amwende na ngoro yake yothe, na meciiria maake moothe, o na hinya wake wothe; na ende mũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩ o ta ũrĩa eyendeete we mwene. Kũhingia maathani maya meerĩ kũrĩ na bata gũkĩra magongoona moothe ma njino, o na ma mĩthemba ĩrĩa ĩngĩ yothe.”" 
Mark12:34 Naake Jesũ aigua mũndũ ũcio nĩacookia wega akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Wee ndũrĩ haraihu na Ũthamaki wa Ngai.” Na thuutha ũcio gũtirĩ mũndũ wacookire kũũmĩrĩria kũmũũria kĩũria." 
Mark12:35 Rĩrĩa Jesũ aarutanaga Hekaarũinĩ akĩũria atĩrĩ, “Arutani a Watho moigaga atĩ Kristũ nĩ wa Daudi atĩa?" 
Mark12:36 Githĩ Daudi we mwene ahotithĩĩtio nĩ Roho Mũtheru ndoigire atĩrĩ: ‘Mwathani eerire Mwathani wakwa atĩrĩ, Ikara thĩ mwena wakwa wa ũrĩo kinya rĩrĩa ngaatũma ũrangĩrĩrie thũ ciaku.’" 
Mark12:37 Angĩkorwo Daudi we mwene nĩamwĩtire Mwathani-rĩ, Kristũ angĩgĩkorwo arĩ Mũrũ wa Daudi atĩa?” Na nĩhaarĩ na andũ aingĩ maathikagĩrĩria Jesũ, magakena nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa oigaga." 
Mark12:38 Naake akĩmaruta akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Mwĩmenyerereei arutani a Watho arĩa meendeete gũthiĩ meekĩrĩĩte nguo ndaaya, o na kũgeithagĩrio ndũũnyũinĩ." 
Mark12:39 Ningĩ makeenda kũheagwo itĩ cia mbere thunagogiinĩ o na handũ ha gĩtĩĩo marugainĩ. 
Mark12:40 Acio no o matoonyagĩrĩra atumia a ndigwa na makaiya indo kuuma mĩciĩ yao, na nĩ ũndũ wa kwenda kwĩyonania nĩmaraihagia mahooya. Iherithia rĩao rĩgaakorwo rĩ inene.”" 
Mark12:41 Na rĩrĩa Jesũ aikaire thĩ kũu Hekaarũinĩ hakuhĩ na harĩa andũ maahothagĩra, nĩeroragĩra andũ makĩhotha. Nacio itonga nyingĩ igĩikia mbeeca nyingĩ hau haahothagĩrwo." 
Mark12:42 No hagĩũka mũtumia mũthĩĩni wa ndigwa agĩikia tũthendi twĩrĩ, na mũigana watuo nĩ ta kĩng'ootore kĩmwe." 
Mark12:43 Naake Jesũ agĩĩta arutwo aake akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma atĩ, mũtumia ũyũ mũthĩĩni wa ndigwa nĩaikia mbeeca nyingĩ gathandũkũinĩ ka mũhothi gũkĩra arĩa angĩ oothe mahotha." 
Mark12:44 Amu arĩa angĩ mahotha matigari ma ũtonga wao, no we arĩ mũthĩĩni ũguo wothe ahotha iria ciothe oima nacio, na aheana mũthiithũ wake wothe.”" 
Mark13:1 Na rĩrĩa Jesũ oimaga Hekaarũinĩ, mũrutwo ũmwe wake akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Mũrutani tarora! Kaĩ mahiga maya na mĩako ĩno nĩ mĩthaka-ĩ!”" 
Mark13:2 Naake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Nĩũkuona mĩako ĩno mĩnene ũũ? Haaha hatirĩ ihiga rĩgaatigwo igũrũ wa rĩrĩa rĩngĩ; moothe nĩmakaamomorwo.”" 
Mark13:3 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Jesũ aikarĩĩte thĩ kĩrĩmainĩ kĩa Mĩtamaiyũ ang'etheire Hekaarũ, Petero, Jakubu, Johana o hamwe na Anderea magĩũka kũrĩ we marĩ oiki" 
Mark13:4 makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Tatwĩre maũndũ macio mageekĩka rĩ, na tũkaamenya na kĩ atĩ nĩmakuhĩrĩirie?”" 
Mark13:5 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Mwĩmenyagĩrĩreei mũtikaahĩtithio nĩ mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ." 
Mark13:6 Amu andũ aingĩ nĩmagooka makiugaga atĩ maraaria handũinĩ haakwa makiugaga atĩrĩ, ‘Nĩ niĩ Kristũ!’ Nao nĩmakaahĩtithia andũ aingĩ." 
Mark13:7 Na rĩrĩa mũkaigua ũhoro wa mbaara mũtikaanetigĩre. Maũndũ ta macio no mũhaka mooneke no ti atĩ ũcio nĩguo mũthia wa thĩ. 
Mark13:8 Mabũrũri o na moothamaki nĩmagookanĩrĩra na nĩgũkaagĩa na ithingithia kũndũ kũingĩ, na kũgĩe ng'aragu. Maũndũ macio nĩ mo kĩambĩrĩria kĩa ruwo ta rwa mũtumia akĩheeo mwana." 
Mark13:9 “No inyuĩ mwĩmenyerereei tondũ nĩmũkaanyiitwo mũtwarwo kĩamainĩ. Ningĩ nĩmũkaahũũrĩrwo thunagogiinĩ, na mũrũũgamio mbere ya anene na athamaki. Na inyuĩ nĩmũkaamahunjĩria Ũhoro ũrĩa Mwega." 
Mark13:10 No ithirĩro rĩtaanakinya no mũhaka Ũhoro ũrĩa Mwega ũkaahunjĩrio andũ oothe. 
Mark13:11 Rĩrĩa mũkaanyiitwo mũtwarwo igootiinĩ mũtikaanetange mũgĩciiria ũrĩa mũkoiga. Hĩndĩ ĩyo yakinya-rĩ, mũkoiga ũrĩa mũkaahotithio, nĩ ũndũ Roho Mũtheru nĩ we ũkaaria e thĩinĩ wanyu." 
Mark13:12 Mũndũ nĩakaanengerana mũrũ wa nyina akooragwo, na mũthuuri anengerane mwana wake, na ciana ciũkĩrĩre aciari imooragithie." 
Mark13:13 Nao andũ nĩmakaamũmena nĩ ũndũ wakwa. No ũrĩa ũgaakirĩrĩria kinya ithirĩro, ũcio nĩakaahonokio." 
Mark13:14 “Nĩmũkoona ‘Kĩndũ gĩ thaahu na magigi’ kĩrĩ harĩa gĩtaagĩrĩire gũkorwo!” (Ũrĩa ũrathooma nĩamenye na ma ũrĩa gũkwĩrwo!) “Hĩndĩ ĩyo arĩa me Judea nĩmakoorĩra irĩmainĩ. 
Mark13:14 “Nĩmũkoona ‘Kĩndũ gĩ thaahu na magigi’ kĩrĩ harĩa gĩtaagĩrĩire gũkorwo!” (Ũrĩa ũrathooma nĩamenye na ma ũrĩa gũkwĩrwo!) “Hĩndĩ ĩyo arĩa me Judea nĩmakoorĩra irĩmainĩ. 
Mark13:15 Naake mũndũ ũrĩa ũgaakorwo nyũmba igũrũ, ndakaaharũrũke kana atoonye nyũmba kũgĩĩra kĩndũ," 
Mark13:16 kana ũrĩa wĩ mũgũnda acookere nguo ciake mũciĩ. 
Mark13:17 Kaĩ atumia arĩa magaakorwo marĩ na nda hĩndĩ ĩyo, o na arĩa magaakorwo makĩongithia nĩmakoona ruwo rũnene-ĩ!" 
Mark13:18 Hooyai Ngai atĩ maũndũ macio matikaanakinye hĩndĩ ya heho! 
Mark13:19 Amu hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩgũkooneka mathĩĩna makĩrĩĩte marĩa moothe maanoonwo kuuma rĩrĩa Ngai oombire thĩ kinyagia rĩu, na gũtirĩ hĩndĩ gũkooneka ta macio rĩngĩ." 
Mark13:20 No Mwathani nĩanyiihanyiihĩĩtie matukũ ma mathĩĩna macio nĩ ũndũ wa arĩa aake athuure. Tiga nĩ ũguo gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩgaatigara. 
Mark13:21 “Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũndũ angĩkaamwĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Kristũ arĩ haaha!’ kana ‘Nĩwe ũũrĩa!’ mũtikaaneetĩkie." 
Mark13:22 Andũ mekwĩĩta Kristũ na anabii a maheeni nĩmakooneka, na moonanie moorirũ na ciama makĩenda kũhĩtithia o na arĩa athuure a Ngai korwo no kũhoteke." 
Mark13:23 No inyuĩ mwĩmenyagĩrĩreei, amu nĩndamwĩra ũhoro wothe ihinda rĩtaanakinya." 
Mark13:24 “Na rĩĩrĩ, thuutha wa hĩndĩ ĩyo ya mathĩĩna riũa nĩrĩgaatuĩka nduma, mweri ũtige gũcooka kwara," 
Mark13:25 nacio njata ciume igũrũ igwe thĩ, namo maahinya ma igũrũ meenyenyio." 
Mark13:26 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Mũrũ wa Mũndũ nĩakooneka agĩũka arĩ thĩinĩ wa matu, e na hinya mũingĩ na riiri." 
Mark13:27 Naake nĩagaatũma araika makoonganie arĩa oothe athuure kuuma mĩena ĩrĩa ĩna yumaga rũhuuho, o na kuuma ituri ciothe cia thĩ na cia igũrũ." 
Mark13:28 “Mwĩruteei na mũkũyũ; honge ciaguo ciambĩrĩria kũruta mathangũ nĩmũmenyaga atĩ hĩndĩ ya ũrugarĩ ĩ hakuhĩ. 
Mark13:29 Ũguo no taguo rĩrĩa mũkoona maũndũ macio magĩĩkĩka mũkaamenya atĩ Mũrũ wa Mũndũ e hakuhĩ o ta mũrangoinĩ. 
Mark13:30 Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ, rũciaro rũũrũ rũtigaathira maũndũ macio moothe matahingĩĩte." 
Mark13:31 Igũrũ na thĩ nĩigaathira, no ciugo ciakwa itigaathira." 
Mark13:32 “Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũũĩ rĩrĩa mũthenya ũcio ũgaakinya kana thaa, o na araika arĩa me igũrũ, kana Mũũriũ tiga o Ithe wiki." 
Mark13:33 Ikaragaai mwĩmenyereire na mwĩhũũgĩĩte tondũ mũtiũĩ rĩrĩa ihinda rĩu rĩgaakinya. 
Mark13:34 Gũkaahaana ta mũndũ athiĩte rũgendo agatiga agaĩra ndungata ciake mawĩra maacio, na akaiga mũikaria wa mũciĩ kĩhingoinĩ." 
Mark13:35 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mwĩhũũgageei, tondũ mũtiũĩ rĩrĩa mwene mũciĩ agacooka. Ahota gũgaacooka hwaĩinĩ kana ũtukũ gatagatĩ kana ngũkũ ĩkĩgamba, o na kana ruoro rũgĩtema." 
Mark13:36 Kĩĩhũgeei ndakaanooke o rĩmwe nĩguo amũkore mũkomeete. 
Mark13:37 Ũguo ngũmwĩra noguo ngwĩra andũ oothe: Mwĩhũũgageei!” 
Mark14:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, gũtigairie mĩthenya ĩĩrĩ Thigũkũ ya Bathaka o hamwe na Thigũkũ ya mĩgate ĩtarĩ mĩĩkĩre ndaawa ya kũimbia ikinye-rĩ, athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene, o na arutani a Watho makĩambĩrĩria gũtuĩria ũrĩa mangĩnyiita Jesũ na hitho nĩguo mamũũrage." 
Mark14:2 No makĩĩrana atĩrĩ, “Tũtigwĩka ũguo hĩndĩ ya thigũkũ andũ matigaatũũkĩrĩre.”" 
Mark14:3 Na rĩĩrĩ, hĩndĩ ĩmwe Jesũ aarĩ Bethania mũciĩ gwa Simoni ũrĩa warũarĩĩte mũrimũ wa ngoothi. Naake Jesũ rĩrĩa aarĩaga hagĩũka mũtumia warĩ na cuuba yaiyũire maguta ma goro manungi wega. Akĩmĩkunũra, agĩitĩrĩria Jesũ maguta macio mũtwe." 
Mark14:4 Nao andũ amwe arĩa maarĩ ho makĩraakara makĩũrania atĩrĩ, “Maguta macio maitangwo ũguo nĩkĩ?" 
Mark14:5 Nĩmangĩendio makĩria dinari magana matatũ iheeo athĩĩni.” Magĩgĩtetia mũtumia ũcio mũno. 
Mark14:6 No Jesũ akiuga atĩrĩ, “Tiganaai naake! Mũramũthĩĩnia nĩkĩ? We nĩanjĩka ũndũ mwega." 
Mark14:7 Andũ arĩa athĩĩni-rĩ, mũrĩkoragwo nao hĩndĩ ciothe, na rĩrĩa rĩothe mũngĩenda kũmateithia no mũmateithie. No niĩ mũtirĩkoragwo na niĩ hĩndĩ ciothe." 
Mark14:8 We nĩanjĩka ũrĩa ahota; aitĩrĩria mwĩrĩ wakwa maguta nĩ ũndũ wa kũũhaarĩrĩria gũthikwo. 
Mark14:9 Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ kũrĩa guothe Ũhoro Ũrĩa Mwega ũkaahunjio thĩinĩ wa thĩ yothe, ũndũ ũcio anjĩka nĩũkaaganagwo nĩ geetha aririkanagwo.”" 
Mark14:10 Thuutha ũcio Judasi Mũisikariota, ũmwe wa arutwo arĩa ikũmi na eerĩ, akiuma agĩthiĩ kũrĩ athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene nĩguo agakunyanĩre Jesũ kũrĩ o." 
Mark14:11 Nao magĩkena rĩrĩa Judasi aamaheire ũhoro ũcio, makĩmwĩra atĩ nĩmekũmũhe mbeeca. Naake Judasi akĩambĩrĩria gũcaria mweke wa kũneana Jesũ kũrĩ o." 
Mark14:12 Mũthenya wa mbere wa Thigũkũ ya mĩgate ĩtarĩ mĩĩkĩre ndaawa ya kũimbia, ũrĩa tũtũrũme twa kũrĩĩo Bathaka tũthĩnjagwo-rĩ, arutwo a Jesũ makĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Ũkwenda tũgakũhaarĩrĩrie irio cia Bathaka kũ?”" 
Mark14:13 Naake Jesũ agĩgĩtũma arutwo aake eerĩ akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Thiĩi itũũrainĩ, na nĩmũgũcemania na mũndũ ũkuuĩĩte mũtũngi wa maaĩ. Mũrũmĩrĩreei," 
Mark14:14 mũingĩre nyũmba ĩrĩa arĩtoonya, mwĩre mwene nyũmba ĩyo atĩrĩ, ‘Mũrutani ekũũria atĩrĩ, ĩ ha nyũmba ya ageni harĩa ngũrĩĩra irio cia Bathaka hamwe na arutwo aakwa?’" 
Mark14:15 Naake nĩekũmuonia nyũmba ya igũrũ, ĩrĩ haarĩrie. Amuonia mũtũthondekere irio cia Bathaka kuo.”" 
Mark14:16 Nao arutwo acio magĩgĩthiĩ itũũrainĩ, magĩkora maũndũ moothe o ta ũrĩa Jesũ aameerĩĩte, magĩkĩhaarĩria Bathaka." 
Mark14:17 Gwakinya hwaĩinĩ Jesũ agĩũka na arutwo arĩa ikũmi na eerĩ. 
Mark14:18 Na rĩrĩa maikarĩĩte meethainĩ makĩrĩa akiuga atĩrĩ, “Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ ũmwe wanyu ũrĩa ũrarĩanĩra na niĩ nĩekũngunyanĩra.”" 
Mark14:19 Nao arutwo makĩambĩrĩria kũnyiitwo nĩ kĩeha, magĩkĩmũũria ũmwe kwa ũmwe atĩrĩ, “Hiihi nĩ niĩ?”" 
Mark14:20 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Nĩ ũmwe wanyu ikũmi na eerĩ, ũrĩa ndĩratobokanĩria mũgate mbakũriinĩ ĩmwe naake." 
Mark14:21 Mũrũ wa Mũndũ nĩegũkua o ta ũrĩa kwandĩkĩĩtwo. Ĩndĩ kaĩ mũndũ ũrĩa ũkũmũkunyanĩra e thĩĩna-ĩ! Kaba mũndũ ũcio atangĩaciarirwo!” 
Mark14:22 Na rĩĩrĩ, rĩrĩa maarĩaga, Jesũ akĩoya mũgate, akĩũraathima, agĩcooka akĩwenyũra, akĩũnengera arutwo aake, akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Keei, ũyũ nĩ mwĩrĩ wakwa.”" 
Mark14:23 Agĩcooka akĩoya gĩkombe, na arĩĩkia gũcookeria Ngai ngaatho, akĩmanengera, nao oothe makĩnyuanĩra." 
Mark14:24 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Ĩno nĩ yo thakame yakwa ya kĩrĩĩkanĩro ĩrĩa ĩgũitwo nĩ ũndũ wa andũ aingĩ." 
Mark14:25 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma, ndigaacooka kũnyua ndibei rĩngĩ kinya rĩrĩa ngaamĩnyua yerũhĩĩtio Ũthamakiinĩ wa Ngai.”" 
Mark14:26 Nao marĩĩkia kũina rwĩmbo makiuma magĩthiĩ kĩrĩmainĩ kĩa mĩtamaiyũ. 
Mark14:27 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Inyuothe nĩmũrĩndirika. Amu nĩkwandĩkĩĩtwo atĩrĩ, ‘Ngai nĩakooraga mũrĩithi, nacio ng'ondu ihurunjũke.’" 
Mark14:28 No ndariũka nĩngaamũtongoria gũthiĩ Galili.” 
Mark14:29 Naake Petero akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “O na arĩa angĩ oothe mangĩgũtirika, niĩ ndingĩgũtirika!”" 
Mark14:30 Naake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ngũkwĩra na ma atĩ, ũtukũ wa ũũmũũthĩ ngũkũ ĩtaanakũga keerĩ nĩũrĩngaana gatatũ.”" 
Mark14:31 Naake Petero akĩrega na hinya mũno akiuga atĩrĩ, “O na angĩkorwo nĩgũkuanĩra nawe niĩ ndirĩgũtirika!” Nao arutwo acio angĩ oothe makiuga o ro ũguo." 
Mark14:32 Thuutha ũcio magĩthiĩ magĩkinya handũ heetagwo Gethisemane. Marĩ hau Jesũ akĩĩra arutwo aake atĩrĩ, “Ikaragaai haaha thiĩ ngahooe.”" 
Mark14:33 Akĩoya Petero, Jakubu, na Johana agĩthiĩ nao. Naake akĩambĩrĩria kũigua kĩeha mũno na gũthĩĩnĩka ngoro," 
Mark14:34 akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Nĩndĩraigua kĩeha mũno ngoro o ta ngirie gũkua. Ikaragaai haaha na mwĩhũũge.”" 
Mark14:35 Agĩgĩthiĩ kabere haniini, agĩturumithia ũthiũ thĩ akĩhooya atĩ kũngĩhoteka thĩĩna ũcio ũmũthengere." 
Mark14:36 Akiuga atĩrĩ, “Awa, o wee Baaba, maũndũ moothe nĩmahotekaga nĩ we; gĩĩthengerie gĩkombe gĩĩkĩ kĩa mĩnyamaaro, no ti ũrĩa niĩ ngwenda, nĩ ũrĩa wee ũkwenda.”" 
Mark14:37 Agĩcooka harĩa arutwo maarĩ, agĩkora makomeete akĩũria Petero atĩrĩ, “Simoni, nĩgũkoma ũkomeete? Ndũnahota gũikara o na ithaa rĩmwe wĩhũgĩĩte?”" 
Mark14:38 Agĩkĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Mwĩhũũgeei, na mũhooe mũtigatoonye magerioinĩ. Ngoro nĩkwenda, no mwĩrĩ ndũrĩ na hinya.”" 
Mark14:39 Akĩmatiga rĩngĩ, agĩthiĩ akĩhooya o ta ũrĩa aahoeete rĩa mbere." 
Mark14:40 Naake acooka harĩa arutwo maarĩ agĩkora makomeete, tondũ nĩmaathĩĩnagio nĩ toro. Nao makĩrigwo nĩ ũrĩa mangĩmwĩra." 
Mark14:41 Agĩũka ihinda rĩa gatatũ, agĩkora o makomeete akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “No gũkoma mũkomeete mũkahuurũka? Kinyiai hau. Ihinda nĩikinyu! Mũrũ wa Mũndũ nĩekũneanwo mookoinĩ ma andũ eehia." 
Mark14:42 Ũkĩraai tũthiĩ. Oneei ũrĩa ũkũngunyanĩra nĩakinya!” 
Mark14:43 Na Jesũ o akĩaragia, Judasi, ũmwe wa arutwo arĩa ikũmi na eerĩ agĩgĩkinya. Naake agĩũka na andũ gĩkundi me na hiũ cia njora na njũgũma, matũmĩĩtwo nĩ athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene, na arutani a Watho o na athuuri." 
Mark14:44 Naake Judasi ũrĩa wamũkunyanagĩra nĩamaheete kĩmenyithia akameera atĩrĩ, “Ũrĩa ndĩmumunya, ũcio nĩ we. Mũmũnyiite, mũmũtware mũmũrangĩire.”" 
Mark14:45 Rĩrĩa Judasi aakinyire agĩgĩthiĩ eerekeire o harĩ Jesũ o rĩmwe akiuga atĩrĩ, “Mũrutani!” na akĩmũmumunya." 
Mark14:46 Nao magĩũka makĩnyiita Jesũ makĩmũrũmia biũ. 
Mark14:47 Naake ũmwe wa arĩa maarũngiĩ hau agĩcomora rũhiũ rwa njora, agĩtema ngombo ya Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai Ũrĩa Mũnene gũtũ." 
Mark14:48 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Kaĩ mũũkĩĩte na hiũ na njũgũma ta arĩ gĩtoi mũũkĩĩte kũnyiita?" 
Mark14:49 Ndĩratũũraga na inyuĩ Hekaarũinĩ, ngĩmũruta mũthenya o mũthenya na mũtingĩnyiita. Ĩndĩ no mũhaka Maandĩko matheru mahingio.”" 
Mark14:50 Na arĩĩkia kũnyiitwo, arutwo aake oothe makĩmũtirĩka makĩũra." 
Mark14:51 Naake mwanake ũmwe akĩrũmĩrĩra Jesũ erigiicĩirie cuka. Na rĩrĩa andũ acio maatuire kũmũnyiita," 
Mark14:52 akĩmatigĩra nguo, akĩũra e njaga." 
Mark14:53 Na rĩĩrĩ, thuutha wa kũnyiitwo, Jesũ agĩtwarwo kwa Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai Ũrĩa Mũnene, kũrĩa athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa angĩ anene maagomanĩĩte, o hamwe na athuuri na arutani a Watho." 
Mark14:54 Naake Petero agĩthiĩ amũrũmĩrĩire arĩ o haraaya, o nginya nja kwa Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai ũcio Mũnene. Agĩgĩikara thĩ hau nja hamwe na arangĩri, agĩotagĩra mwaki ho." 
Mark14:55 Nao athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene o na kĩama gĩothe magĩcaria ũira ũrĩa mangĩrutire nĩguo mooragithie Jesũ no makĩaga. 
Mark14:56 No nĩkwarĩ andũ aingĩ maarutire ũira wa maheeni, no maũira maao makĩaga kũiguana." 
Mark14:57 Nao andũ amwe magĩkĩrũũgama makĩruta ũira wa maheeni, makiuga atĩrĩ," 
Mark14:58 “Nĩtwamũiguire akiuga atĩrĩ, ‘Nĩngũtharia Hekaarũ ĩno yakĩĩtwo na mooko ma andũ, na mĩthenya ĩtatũ ĩtaanathira njake ĩngĩ ĩtaakĩĩtwo na mooko.’ ”" 
Mark14:59 Ĩndĩ o na moiga ũguo maũira maao makĩregana. 
Mark14:60 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai Ũrĩa Mũnene akĩrũũgama hau mbere yao akĩũria Jesũ atĩrĩ, “Kaĩ wee ũtarĩ ũndũ ũngĩcookia igũrũ rĩa maũndũ maya moothe ũrathitangwo namo?”" 
Mark14:61 No Jesũ agĩkira ki na ndamũtumũke. Naake mũthĩnjĩri Ngai ũcio Mũnene agĩkĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Wee nĩ we Kristũ Mũrũ wa Ngai Ũrĩa Mũraathime?”" 
Mark14:62 Naake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Ĩĩ nĩ niĩ. Na nĩmũkoona Mũrũ wa Mũndũ aikarĩire gĩtĩ mwena wa ũrĩo wa Ũrĩa Mwene Hinya Wothe, o na muone agĩũka na matu ma igũrũ!”" 
Mark14:63 Naake Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai ũcio Mũnene agĩtembũranga nguo yake nĩ ũndũ wa kũraakara akiuga atĩrĩ, “Kaĩ tũgũkĩenda aira angĩ?" 
Mark14:64 Githĩ mũtiakĩiguĩra ũrĩa aruma Ngai? Mũgũtua atĩa?” Nao oothe makiuga magwatĩirie atĩ aagĩrĩire nĩkũũragwo. 
Mark14:65 Nao amwe aao makĩambĩrĩria gũtuĩra Jesũ mata, na kũmũhumba maitho, makĩmũhũũra na hĩ makĩmwĩraga atĩrĩ, “Ragũra uuge nũũ wakũgũtha!” O nao arangĩri makĩmũhũũra." 
Mark14:66 Na rĩĩrĩ, hĩndĩ ĩyo Petero aikarĩĩte thĩ nja, hagĩũka ndungata ĩmwe ya mũirĩĩtu ya kũu kwa Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai Ũrĩa Mũnene." 
Mark14:67 Nayo yakinya hau Petero ootagĩra mwaki ĩkĩmũkũũrĩra maitho ĩkiuga atĩrĩ, “O nawe uuma hamwe na Jesũ wa Nazarethi.”" 
Mark14:68 Naake agĩkaana akiuga atĩrĩ, “Niĩ ũguo ndiũĩ o na ndiramenya nĩ atĩa ũroiga.” Oiga ũguo akiuma hau agĩthiĩ na thoome na hĩndĩ ĩyo ngũkũ ĩgĩkũga." 
Mark14:69 Naake mũirĩĩtu ũcio oona Petero rĩngĩ akĩambĩrĩria kwĩra arĩa marũũgamĩĩte ho atĩrĩ, “Mũndũ ũyũ nĩ ũmwe wao!”" 
Mark14:70 No Petero agĩkaana rĩngĩ. Thuutha haniini arĩa marũũgamĩĩte hau makĩambĩrĩria kwĩra Petero atĩrĩ, “Wee no mũhaka ũkorwo ũrĩ ũmwe wao, amu wĩ Mũgalili.”" 
Mark14:71 No Petero akĩambĩrĩria kwĩhĩta akiugaga atĩrĩ, “Ndĩraaria ma na Ngai nĩ mũira atĩ niĩ ndiramenya mũndũ ũcio mũraaria ũhoro wake!”" 
Mark14:72 Ihinda o rĩu ngũkũ ĩgĩkũga rĩa keerĩ. Naake Petero akĩririkana ũrĩa Jesũ aamwĩrĩĩte, “Mbere ya ngũkũ gũkũga keerĩ nĩũrĩngaana gatatũ.” Naake akĩambĩrĩria kũrĩra." 
Mark15:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, rũũciinĩ tene athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene magĩcemania hamwe na athuuri, arutani a Watho, na kĩama gĩothe, makĩrĩĩkanĩra ũrĩa megwĩka. Makĩoha Jesũ, makĩmuumagaria makĩmũneana kwĩ Pilato." 
Mark15:2 Naake Pilato akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Wee nĩ we mũthamaki wa Ayahudi?” Naake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Nĩ we woiga ũguo.”" 
Mark15:3 Nao athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene magĩthitanga Jesũ na maũndũ maingĩ. 
Mark15:4 Naake Pilato agĩcooka akĩmũũria rĩngĩ atĩrĩ, “Kaĩ ũtarĩ na ũndũ ũngĩcookia igũrũ rĩa maũndũ macio moothe maragũthitanga namo?”" 
Mark15:5 No Jesũ akĩaga kwaria rĩngĩ, naake Pilato akĩgega." 
Mark15:6 Na rĩĩrĩ, o Thigũkũ ya Bathaka yakinya, Pilato nĩohoragĩra andũ mũohwo ũmwe o ũrĩa mangĩetirie." 
Mark15:7 Thĩinĩ wa itoi iria ciarĩ njeera, iria cioraganĩĩte hĩndĩ kwarĩ na ngũĩ, nĩkwarĩ gĩtoi gĩetagwo Baraba." 
Mark15:8 Nao andũ makĩũngana makĩũria Pilato eeke o ũrĩa aamenyereete gwĩka. 
Mark15:9 Naake akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Nĩmũkwenda ndĩmuohorere mũthamaki wa Ayahudi?”" 
Mark15:10 Nĩ ũndũ nĩamenyaga atĩ athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene maamũneanĩĩte kũrĩ we nĩ ũndũ wa ũiru. 
Mark15:11 Na rĩĩrĩ, athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene makĩringĩrĩria andũ meere Pilato amoohorere Baraba." 
Mark15:12 Naake Pilato agĩcooka akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Mũgũkĩenda njĩke atĩa na ũyũ mwĩtaga mũthamaki wa Ayahudi?”" 
Mark15:13 Nao makĩanĩrĩra magĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Mwambe!”" 
Mark15:14 Naake Pilato akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Nĩkĩ? Nĩ ũũru ũrĩkũ eekĩĩte?” Nao magĩkĩrĩrĩria kwanĩrĩra makiugaga atĩrĩ, “Mwambe!”" 
Mark15:15 Na tondũ Pilato nĩendaga gũkenia andũ agĩkĩmoohorera Baraba. Agĩcooka akĩhũũrithia Jesũ na kĩboko, akĩmũneana akaambwo." 
Mark15:16 Nacio thigari igĩtwara Jesũ nyũmbainĩ ya mĩcemanio kũu thĩinĩ kwa barũũthi, na igĩĩta iria ingĩ cia mbũtũ yacio." 
Mark15:17 Igĩcooka ikĩmũhumba nguo ya rangi wa babũ, na igĩthondeka thũmbĩ ya mĩigua ikĩmwĩkĩra mũtwe." 
Mark15:18 Igĩkĩambĩrĩria kũmũnyũrũria ikiugaga atĩrĩ, “Ũrĩ mwega mũthamaki wa Ayahudi!”" 
Mark15:19 Igakĩmũgũtha mũtwe na karũthanju o na ikamũtuĩra mata, igacooka ikeegũithia thĩ mbere yake ta ikũmũhooya." 
Mark15:20 Ciarĩĩkia kũmũnyũrũria ikĩmũruta nguo ĩyo ya rangi wa babũ, ikĩmwĩkĩra nguo ciake. Ikĩmuumagaria ikamwambe." 
Mark15:21 Nacio irĩ njĩra igĩcemania na mũndũ wetagwo Simoni wa kuuma Kurene, ithe wa Alekisanda na Rufasi, akiuma mĩgũndainĩ. Ikĩmwatha akuue mũtharaba wa Jesũ." 
Mark15:22 Igĩgĩtwara Jesũ, ikĩmũkinyia handũ heetagwo Gologotha, na ũguo nĩ ta kuuga, “Handũ ha ihĩndĩ rĩa mũtwe.”" 
Mark15:23 Na irĩ hau ikĩgeria kũmũhe ndibei yatukanĩĩtio na manemane, no akĩrega kũmĩnyua." 
Mark15:24 Igĩkĩmwamba, igĩcooka igĩcuukĩra nguo ciake mĩtĩ, igĩcigayana." 
Mark15:25 Hĩndĩ ĩyo ciamwambire kwarĩ thaa ithatũ cia rũũciinĩ. 
Mark15:26 Naho igũrũ wake hakĩandĩkwo ũndũ ũrĩa aathitangĩirwo atĩrĩ, “Ũyũ nĩ we Mũthamaki wa Ayahudi.”" 
Mark15:27 Igĩcooka ikĩamba atuunyani eerĩ o hau ciambire Jesũ, ũmwe mwena wake wa ũrĩo na ũrĩa ũngĩ mwena wa ũmotho. [" 
Mark15:28 Namo maandĩko marĩa moigaga atĩ, “Nĩatuĩrĩirwo ciira hamwe na aici,” magĩkĩhingio.]" 
Mark15:29 Nao andũ arĩa maahĩtũkagĩra hau moona Jesũ makĩmũnyũrũria makĩinagia mĩtwe makiugaga atĩrĩ, “Wee ũngĩratharirie Hekaarũ na ũcooke ũmĩake na mĩthenya ĩtatũ-rĩ," 
Mark15:30 kĩĩhonokie uume mũtĩ igũrũ!” 
Mark15:31 O nao athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene na arutani a Watho makĩmũnyũrũria makiugaga atĩrĩ, “Nĩarahonokagia arĩa angĩ, no ndangĩhota kwĩhonokia we mwene!" 
Mark15:32 Kristũ, mũthamaki wa Isiraeli, ta kiume mũtharabainĩ nĩ geetha tuone twĩtĩkie!” O nao acio maambanĩirio naake makĩmũnyũrũria." 
Mark15:33 Na rĩĩrĩ, thaa thita cia mũthenya ciakinya, bũrũri wothe ũkĩgĩa nduma kinya thaa kenda." 
Mark15:34 Nacio thaa kenda ciakinya Jesũ akĩgũũthũka na mũgambo mũnene akiuga atĩrĩ, “Eloi, Eloi, lema sabakithani?” Na ũguo nĩ ta kuuga atĩrĩ, “Ngai wakwa, Ngai wakwa ũndiganĩirie nĩkĩ?”" 
Mark15:35 Nao andũ amwe arĩa marũũgamĩĩte hau makiuga atĩrĩ, “Taiguai, agĩĩta Elija!”" 
Mark15:36 Naake ũmwe wao agĩteng'era agĩtobokia thibonji ndibeiinĩ ngagatu, akĩmĩtheecerera kamũrangiinĩ akĩmũkundithia, akiuga atĩrĩ, “Tarekeei tuone kana Elija nĩegũũka kũmũcuurũria!”" 
Mark15:37 Naake Jesũ akĩanĩrĩra na mũgambo mũnene, agĩcooka akĩhũũmũka na hinya mũno, agĩtuĩkana." 
Mark15:38 Hĩndĩ ĩyo gĩtambaya kĩa Hekaarũ gĩgĩatũkana maita meerĩ, kuuma igũrũ kinya thĩ." 
Mark15:39 Naake Mũroma mũnene wa thigari igana ũrĩa warũũgamĩĩte hau oona ũrĩa atuĩkana akiuga atĩrĩ, “Ti itherũ ũyũ oima Mũrũ wa Ngai!”" 
Mark15:40 Naho hau nĩhaarĩ atumia meeroragĩra marĩ o haraaya, amwe aao maarĩ Mariamu Mũmagidali, Mariamu nyina wa Jose na Jakubu ũrĩa warĩ mũnyiinyi, na Salome." 
Mark15:41 Atumia acio maakoragwo na Jesũ Galili na nĩmaamũtungatagĩra. Ningĩ nĩhaarĩ na atumia angĩ aingĩ arĩa mookĩĩte naake Jerusalemu. 
Mark15:42 Na tondũ warĩ mũthenya wa Jumaa, gwakinya hwaĩinĩ," 
Mark15:43 Josefu ũrĩa womĩĩte Arimathea agĩthiĩ kwa Pilato akĩmũũria amwĩtĩkĩrie akuue mwĩrĩ wa Jesũ. Josefu aarĩ mũndũ watĩĩtwo nĩ andũ oothe a kĩama, na aatũire eetereire gũũka kwa Ũthamaki wa Ngai." 
Mark15:44 No Pilato akĩgĩa na nganja kana Jesũ nĩarĩĩkĩĩtie gũkua. Agĩgĩtũmanĩra Mũroma mũnene wa thigari igana akĩmũũria kana Jesũ nĩaniinĩĩte ihinda iraaya kuuma akua. 
Mark15:45 Rĩrĩa eerirwo atĩ nĩakuĩte, agĩĩtĩkĩria Josefu akuue mwĩrĩ." 
Mark15:46 Naake agĩthiĩ akĩgũra cuka wa gataani, agĩcuurũria mwĩrĩ, akĩwoha, akĩũiga thĩinĩ wa mbĩĩrĩra yenjeetwo thĩinĩ wa ihiga. Agĩcooka akĩgaragaria ihiga akĩhinga mbĩĩrĩra ĩyo." 
Mark15:47 Naake Mariamu Mũmagidali, na Mariamu nyina wa Josefu makĩona harĩa mwĩrĩ waigirwo." 
Mark16:1 Nayo Thabatũ yathira, Mariamu Mũmagidali, Mariamu nyina wa Jakubu, na Salome makĩgũra indo nungi wega nĩ geetha makahake mwĩrĩ wa Jesũ." 
Mark16:2 Mũthenya wa kiumia rũũciinĩ tene, riũa rĩaratha, magĩthiĩ mbĩĩrĩrainĩ." 
Mark16:3 Nao marĩ njĩrainĩ makooranagia atĩrĩ, “Nũũ ũgũthiĩ gũtũgaragarĩria ihiga arĩthengie mbĩĩrĩrainĩ?”" 
Mark16:4 No rĩĩrĩ, maacũũthĩrĩria makĩona ihiga rĩrĩ igaragarie rĩgathengio. (Rĩarĩ ihiga inene mũno)." 
Mark16:5 Nao magĩthiĩ makĩingĩra mbĩĩrĩra, makĩona mwanake wekĩrĩĩte nguo njerũ aikarĩĩte thĩ mwena wa ũrĩo, nao magĩĩtigĩra mũno." 
Mark16:6 Naake akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Tigaai gwĩtigĩra, nĩnjũũĩ mũracaria Jesũ wa Nazarethi, ũrĩa ũrambirwo mũtĩ igũrũ. Ĩndĩ ndarĩ haaha nĩariũkĩĩte! Oneei harĩa maramũigĩĩte." 
Mark16:7 Rĩu gĩthiĩi mũkeere arutwo aake, o hamwe na Petero atĩ, ‘Nĩegũthiĩ Galili mbere yanyu; kũu nĩkuo mũrĩmuona o ta ũrĩa aamwĩrire.’ ”" 
Mark16:8 Nao makiuma mbĩĩrĩrainĩ mateng'ereete nĩ ũndũ wa gwĩtigĩra na kũnyiitwo nĩ kĩeha. Matirĩ ũndũ meerire mũndũ nĩ ũndũ wa kũmaka. [ 
Mark16:9 Na rĩĩrĩ, rũũciinĩ tene, mũthenya wa Kiumia Jesũ aariũka, aambire kuumĩrĩra Mariamu Mũmagidali, ũrĩa aarutĩĩte ngoma mũgwanja. Nao atumia acio magĩthiĩ kwĩ Petero na araata aake, makĩmahe ũhoro ũrĩa meerĩĩtwo na njĩra nguhĩ." 
Mark16:10 Naake Mariamu ũcio agĩthiĩ kũrĩ arutwo a Jesũ agĩkora makĩrĩra me na kĩeha. Thuutha ũcio Jesũ we mwene agĩtũma arutwo mwena wa irathĩro o na wa ithũĩro makaheane Ũhoro ũrĩa Mũtheru wa ũhonokio wa tene na tene.] 
Mark16:11 Akĩmeera atĩ Jesũ nĩariũkĩĩte, na atĩ we nĩamuoneete, no o makĩrega kũmwĩtĩkia." 
Mark16:12 Thuutha ũcio Jesũ akiumĩrĩra arutwo aake eerĩ hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maathiaga mĩgũndainĩ, no ndahaanaga ũrĩa aahaanaga rĩa mbere." 
Mark16:13 Nao makĩhũndũka makĩĩra arĩa angĩ atĩ nĩmoona Jesũ, no o makĩrega kũmeetĩkia." 
Mark16:14 Thuuthainĩ Jesũ akiumĩrĩra arutwo arĩa ikũmi na ũmwe, maikarĩĩte meethainĩ makĩrĩa. Naake akĩmakũũma nĩ ũndũ wa kũũmia ngoro na kwaga gwĩtĩkia arĩa maamuoneete ariũkĩĩte." 
Mark16:15 Naake akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Thiĩi thĩ yothe mũkahunjĩrie andũ Ũhoro Ũrĩa Mwega." 
Mark16:16 Na mũndũ o wothe ũgeetĩkia na abatithio nĩakaahonokio, no ũrĩa ũtageetĩkia nĩagaatuĩrwo." 
Mark16:17 Nao arĩa mageetĩkia nĩmakaaheeo hinya wa kũringa ciama: nĩmakaingata ngoma kuuma kũrĩ andũ thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩakwa; nĩmakaaria na thiomi ng'eni; 
Mark16:18 mangĩkaanyiita nyamũ cia thĩ kana manyue thumu matirĩ ũũru makoona, ningĩ nĩmakaigagĩrĩra arũaru mooko nao makahona.”" 
Mark16:19 Na rĩĩrĩ, Mwathani Jesũ arĩĩkia kũmahe ũhoro, agĩtwarwo igũrũ, agĩikara guokoinĩ kwa ũrĩo kwa Ngai." 
Mark16:20 Nao arutwo magĩthiĩ makĩhunjia Ũhoro kũndũ guothe, naake Mwathani nĩakoragwo hamwe nao, ageekagĩra ũhoro wao hinya na ciama iria maaringaga. Ameni.] [" 
Luke1:1 Kũrĩ mũgaathe Theofilo: Andũ aingĩ nĩmarĩĩkĩĩtie kwandĩka ũhoro wa maũndũ marĩa marĩĩkĩĩtie kuoneka gatagatĩinĩ gaitũ. 
Luke1:2 Maandĩkire kũringana na ũrĩa twaheetwo ũhoro nĩ andũ arĩa meyoneire maũndũ macio kuuma o kĩambĩrĩria, o na arĩa maahunjagia ũhoro." 
Luke1:3 Na rĩu mũgaathe Theofilo, nĩ ũndũ nĩnduĩrĩĩtie maũndũ macio wega kuuma o kĩambĩrĩria, nĩngwĩciiria atĩ nĩ wega ngwandĩkĩre maũndũ macio na njĩra ya mũtaratara wa ũrĩa meekĩkire." 
Luke1:4 Ngũkwandĩkĩra nĩ geetha ũmenye ũũma wa maũndũ marĩa ũrutĩĩtwo. 
Luke1:5 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Herode aarĩ mũthamaki wa Judea, nĩkwarĩ mũthĩnjĩri Ngai wetagwo Zakaria, na aarĩ wa gĩkundi kĩa athĩnjĩri Ngai a Abija. Mũtumia wake eetagwo Elizabethi na aarĩ wa mũhĩrĩga wa Harũni." 
Luke1:5 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Herode aarĩ mũthamaki wa Judea, nĩkwarĩ mũthĩnjĩri Ngai wetagwo Zakaria, na aarĩ wa gĩkundi kĩa athĩnjĩri Ngai a Abija. Mũtumia wake eetagwo Elizabethi na aarĩ wa mũhĩrĩga wa Harũni." 
Luke1:6 Eerĩ maatũire marĩ athingu mbere ya Ngai, na nĩmaathĩkagĩra mawatho ma Mwathani o hamwe na maathani maake." 
Luke1:7 Matiarĩ na mwana nĩ ũndũ Elizabethi aarĩ thaata, na eerĩ maarĩ akũrũ mũno." 
Luke1:8 Na rĩĩrĩ, mũthenya ũmwe Zakaria aarĩ Hekaarũ thĩinĩ akĩruta wĩra wake wa ũthĩnjĩri Ngai, tondũ rĩarĩ ihinda rĩa gĩkundi kĩrĩa aarĩ wakĩo gũtungata kũu Hekaarũinĩ." 
Luke1:9 Rĩrĩa mĩtĩ yacuukirwo, kũringana na mũtugo wa athĩnjĩri Ngai, Zakaria nĩathuurirwo agacinĩre Ngai ũbaani thĩinĩ wa Hekaarũ." 
Luke1:10 Na rĩĩrĩ, andũ oothe nĩkũhooya maahooyaga na kũu nja hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ũbaani wacinagwo." 
Luke1:11 Naake arĩ kũu thĩinĩ, mũraika wa Mwathani akĩmuumĩrĩra, akĩrũũgama mwena wa ũrĩo wa kĩgongoona gĩa gũcinĩrwo ũbaani." 
Luke1:12 Rĩrĩa Zakaria aamuonire, akĩmaka na agĩĩtigĩra." 
Luke1:13 No mũraika ũcio akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Zakaria, tiga gwĩtigĩra! Ngai nĩaiguĩte mahooya maaku, na mũtumia waku Elizabethi nĩegũgũciarĩra kahĩĩ, na ũgaagatua Johana." 
Luke1:14 Wee nĩũgaakena, na ũcanjamũke, na andũ angĩ aingĩ nĩmagaakena rĩrĩa gagaaciarwo!" 
Luke1:15 Nĩ tondũ gagaakorwo karĩ mũndũ mũnene mbere ya Mwathani. Gatikaanyuaga ndibei kana njoohi, ningĩ gagaakorwo kaiyũrĩĩtwo nĩ Roho Mũtheru o na karĩ ndainĩ ya nyina," 
Luke1:16 nako nĩgagacookia andũ aingĩ a Isiraeli kũrĩ Mwathani Ngai wao. 
Luke1:17 Ningĩ nĩgagaathiĩ mbere ya Mwathani na roho na hinya o ta wa Elija ũrĩa warĩ mũnabii. Nĩgagaatũma maithe meendane na ciana, kagarũre andũ arĩa aaganu maambĩrĩrie gwĩciiria maũndũ ma ũthingu na nĩgakaahaarĩria andũ nĩguo meeterere Mwathani.”" 
Luke1:18 Naake Zakaria akĩũria mũraika atĩrĩ, “Ngaakĩmenya maũndũ macio atĩa na niĩ ndĩ mũkũrũ na mũtumia wakwa o naake no mũkũrũ?”" 
Luke1:19 Naake mũraika akĩmũcookeria akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Nĩ niĩ Gaburieli, ũrĩa ũrũũgamaga mbere ya Ngai, ũrĩa ũndũmĩĩte njũke ngũhe ũhoro ũyũ mwega." 
Luke1:20 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, tondũ nĩwarega gwĩtĩkia ũhoro ũcio ndakwĩra, ũgũtuĩka buubu; ndũgũcooka kwaria kinya mũthenya ũrĩa ũndũ ũcio ndakwĩra ũkaahinga, mahinda maaguo marĩa maagĩrĩire makinya.”" 
Luke1:21 Na rĩĩrĩ, hĩndĩ ĩyo yothe andũ no gweterera meetereire Zakaria oime, na nĩmaarigagwo nĩ kĩrĩa gĩatũmĩĩte aikare ũguo thĩinĩ wa Hekaarũ." 
Luke1:22 Rĩrĩa oimire, ndahotaga kũmaarĩria, na nĩ ũndũ ũcio magĩkĩmenya atĩ nĩoneete kĩoneki e kũu Hekaarũ thĩinĩ. Naake agĩkĩambĩrĩria kũmahe ũhoro na mooko, na kuuma hĩndĩ ĩyo agĩikara arĩ o buubu." 
Luke1:23 Rĩrĩa matukũ maake ma gũtungata thĩinĩ wa Hekaarũ maathirire, akĩinũka gwake mũciĩ." 
Luke1:24 Na rĩĩrĩ, matukũ manyiinyi mathira, mũtumia wake Elizabethi akĩgĩa nda. Naake Elizabethi agĩgĩtũũra ehithĩĩte ihinda rĩa mĩeri ĩtaano akiugaga atĩrĩ," 
Luke1:25 “Rĩu Mwathani nĩandeithĩĩtie nĩguo eeherie gĩconoko gĩakwa gatagatĩinĩ ka andũ!” 
Luke1:26 Na rĩĩrĩ, mweriinĩ wa ĩtandatũ wa Elizabethi gũkorwo e na nda-rĩ, Ngai nĩatũmire mũraika Gaburieli itũũrainĩ rĩa Galili rĩrĩa rĩĩtagwo Nazarethi." 
Luke1:27 Aamũtũmire kũrĩ mũirĩĩtu thingi worĩĩtio nĩ mũndũ wetagwo Josefu warĩ wa rũciaro rwa mũthamaki Daudi. Mũirĩĩtu ũcio eetagwo Mariamu. 
Luke1:28 Mũraika ũcio agĩgĩthiĩ kũrĩ Mariamu akĩmũgeithia atĩrĩ, “Wĩ mwega? Wee wĩ mũraathime mũno! Mwathani arĩ hamwe nawe!”" 
Luke1:29 Naake Mariamu agĩgĩtangĩka ngoro mũno nĩ ũndũ wa ngeithi icio cia mũraika, na akĩrigwo nĩ ũrĩa ciugo icio ciendaga kuuga." 
Luke1:30 Naake mũraika akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Mariamu, tiga gwĩtigĩra nĩ gũkorwo Ngai nĩagũtaanahĩire." 
Luke1:31 Nĩũkũgĩa nda, ũciare kahĩĩ, na ũgaagatua Jesũ."
