Luke12:28 Angĩkorwo Ngai nĩ we ũhumbaga nyeki ya gĩthaka ĩrĩa ĩrakũra ũũmũũthĩ na rũũciũ ĩkooma ĩgaikio riiko-rĩ, githĩ ndangĩkĩmũhumba mũno makĩria, andũ aya a wĩtĩkio mũniini." 
Luke12:29 “Kwoguo tigagaai gwĩtanga nĩ ũndũ wa kĩrĩa mũrĩrĩaga kana kĩrĩa mũrĩnyuaga, na mũtigaatuĩke andũ a gũtangĩka meciiria," 
Luke12:30 nĩ tondũ o na andũ oothe a thĩ ĩno arĩa mateetĩkĩĩtie metangaga na maũndũ o macio. Ithe wanyu nĩoĩ atĩ nĩmũbataragio nĩ maũndũ macio. 
Luke12:31 Handũ ha gwĩkaga ũguo-rĩ, caragiai Ũthamaki wake, na nĩarĩmũheaga maũndũ macio mangĩ moothe o namo." 
Luke12:32 “Tigaai gwĩtigĩra, inyuĩ rũũru rũniini, nĩ ũndũ Ithe wanyu e na gĩkeno gĩa kũmũhe Ũthamaki." 
Luke12:33 Endiai indo cianyu ciothe, mũcooke mũhe athĩĩni mbeeca icio. Mwĩthondekereei ibeeti cia mbeeca iria itakũraga. Mwĩigĩreei mũthiithũ wanyu kwa Ngai, kũrĩa ũtangĩnyiiha, nĩ tondũ gũtirĩ mũici ũngĩũtoonyerera, na gũtirĩ memenyi ingĩũthũũkia." 
Luke12:34 Nĩ ũndũ kũrĩa mĩthiithũ yanyu ĩrĩ, nokuo ngoro cianyu o nacio irĩkoragwo irĩ." 
Luke12:35 “Na rĩĩrĩ, koragwoi hingo ciothe mwĩhaarĩirie, mwĩhotoreete njohero, na mataawa maanyu magĩakanaga," 
Luke12:36 mũhaana ta ndungata iria ikoragwo cietereire mwathi wacio oime irugainĩ rĩa ũhiki, nĩguo o rĩrĩa angĩũka aringaringe mũrango imũhingũrĩre o rĩmwe." 
Luke12:37 Kũraathimwo-rĩ, nĩ ndungata iria ikoragwo itakomeete na ciĩhaarĩirie rĩrĩa mwathi wacio acooka! Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ mwathi wacio arutaga igooti agaciĩra ciikare meethainĩ agacihe irio arĩ we." 
Luke12:38 Kũraathimwo nĩ ndungata iria ikoragwo imwetereire akinye o na akorwo no kinya ũtukũ gatagatĩ kana thaa kenda cia ũtukũ! 
Luke12:39 No rĩĩrĩ, menyaai na ma atĩ korwo mwene nyũmba nĩakoragwo ooĩ rĩrĩa mũici arooka, ndangĩmũreka abunje nyũmba yake." 
Luke12:40 O na inyuĩ koragwoi mwĩhaarĩirie nĩ ũndũ Mũrũ wa Mũndũ agooka ithaa rĩrĩa mũtamwĩrĩgĩrĩire.” 
Luke12:41 Naake Petero agĩkĩũria Jesũ atĩrĩ, “Mwathani, ngerekano ĩyo nĩ ithuĩ ithuiki wera kana wera andũ oothe?”" 
Luke12:42 Naake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ndungata ĩrĩa njĩhokeku na njũgĩ-rĩ, nĩ ĩrĩkũ? Nĩ ĩrĩa mwathi wayo eeraga ĩrore ndungata iria ingĩ na ĩcihe irio ciacio mathaa marĩa maagĩrĩire." 
Luke12:43 Kũraathimwo-rĩ, nĩ ndungata ĩyo ĩngĩkorererwo nĩ mwathi wayo ĩgĩĩka ũguo!" 
Luke12:44 Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ mwathi wayo ehokagĩra ndungata ĩyo indo ciake ciothe. 
Luke12:45 No rĩĩrĩ, ndungata ĩyo ĩngĩĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Mwathi wakwa nĩacereirwo nĩgũcooka,’ yambĩrĩrie kũhũũra ndungata iria irĩ kũu cia arũme na cia andũ a nja, ĩkĩrĩaga na ĩkĩnyuaga ndibei kinya ĩkarĩĩo," 
Luke12:46 mwathi wayo agacooka mũthenya ũrĩa ndungata ĩyo ĩtamwĩrĩgĩrĩire na ithaa rĩrĩa ĩtooĩ, amĩherithie, acooke amĩingate ĩgaikarage hamwe na arĩa matarĩ ehokeku." 
Luke12:47 “Ndungata ĩrĩa ĩkoragwo ĩkĩmenya ũrĩa mwathani wayo ekwenda ĩĩke na ndĩrũmbũyagia gwĩka guo nĩkaahũũrwo mũno. 
Luke12:48 No rĩĩrĩ, ndungata ĩrĩa ĩtakoragwo ĩkĩmenya ũrĩa mwathi wayo ekwenda, na ĩgeeka ũndũ wa gũtũma ĩhũũrwo, ndĩkaahũũrwo mũno. Mũndũ ũrĩa ũnengereetwo indo nyingĩ nĩageetio indo nyingĩ, naake ũrĩa ũnengereetwo nyingĩ makĩria ageetio o nyingĩ makĩria." 
Luke12:49 “Njũkĩĩte gũcina thĩ, naarĩ korwo nĩyambĩrĩirie kũhĩa!" 
Luke12:50 Na rĩĩrĩ, ndĩ na ũbatithio ndĩrĩbatithio naguo; ũndũ ũcio ũgaatiga gũũthĩĩnia o rĩrĩa ũgeekĩka!" 
Luke12:51 Mwĩciiragia atĩ njũkĩĩte kũreehe thaayũ thĩ? Aaca; niĩ njũkĩĩte kũreehe nyamũkano. 
Luke12:52 Kuuma rĩu andũ ataano a mũciĩ ũmwe marĩkoragwo magayũkanĩĩte; atatũ marĩkoragwo mameneete eerĩ, nao eerĩ makamena atatũ." 
Luke12:53 Maithe marĩkoragwo mamenanĩĩte na aariũ aao, nao aariũ mamenanĩĩte na maithe maao; maanyina marĩkoragwo mamenanĩĩte na ciana ciao cia airĩĩtu, nacio ciana icio cia airĩĩtu irĩkoragwo imenanĩĩte na maanyina; mũirĩĩtu ahika arĩmenaga nyaciarawe, naake nyaciarawe akamũmena.”" 
Luke12:54 Jesũ agĩcooka akĩĩra andũ atĩrĩ, “Rĩrĩa muona matu maacookanĩrĩra moimĩĩte na ithũĩro, muugaga atĩ nĩgũkuura na gũkoira." 
Luke12:55 Rĩrĩa ningĩ mwaigua rũhuuho rũkĩhuruutana ruumĩĩte na mwena wa na kĩanda, muugaga atĩ nĩgũkũgĩa ũrugarĩ mũingĩ, na gũkagĩa." 
Luke12:56 Inyuĩ hinga ici! Nĩmũũĩ gũtaũra ũrĩa gũkũhaana mwarora igũrũ kana thĩ; mũkĩremeetwo nĩgũkũũrana mahinda maya nĩkĩ? 
Luke12:57 “Mũregaga gwĩtuĩra inyuĩ eene ũrĩa mwagĩrĩirwo nĩgwĩka nĩkĩ? 
Luke12:58 Mũndũ angĩgũtwara igootiinĩ agũthitange, geria o ro ũrĩa ũngĩhota kũiguithania naake mũtaanakinya igootiinĩ. Ũngĩaga gwĩka ũguo-rĩ, egũgũtwara kwĩ mũciirithania, naake mũciirithania akũnengerane kũrĩ thigari igũikie njeera." 
Luke12:59 Ngũkwĩra atĩ, gũtirĩ hĩndĩ ũkoima kũu njeera kinya hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ũkaarĩĩkia kũrĩha gathendi ka mũthia ka mbeeca iria ũgaatuĩrwo.”" 
Luke13:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩhaarĩ na andũ amwe ho arĩa meerire Jesũ ũhoro wa andũ a Galili arĩa mooragĩĩtwo nĩ Pilato aakora makĩrutĩra Ngai igongoona." 
Luke13:2 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Mũgwĩciiria andũ acio mooragirwo a kuuma Galili mooragirwo ũguo nĩ tondũ maarĩ eehia makĩria ma andũ arĩa angĩ oothe a Galili?" 
Luke13:3 Aaca tiguo! Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ o na inyuĩ mwaga kwĩrira meehia maanyu, mũgaakua o ta o." 
Luke13:4 Ĩ nao andũ arĩa ikũmi na anaana maagwĩrĩirwo nĩ nyũmba ĩrĩa yarĩ ndaaya thĩinĩ wa itũũra rĩa Siloamu magĩkua, mũgwĩciiria atĩ ũguo nĩkuonania atĩ maarĩ ooru gũkĩra andũ arĩa angĩ oothe maatũũraga Jerusalemu?" 
Luke13:5 Aaca tiguo! Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ o na inyuĩ mwaga kwĩrira meehia maanyu, mũgaakua o ta o.”" 
Luke13:6 Naake Jesũ agĩkĩmahe ngerekano ĩno, akiuga atĩrĩ, “Hĩndĩ ĩmwe nĩkwarĩ na mũndũ wahandire mũkũyũ mũgũndainĩ wake wa mĩthabibũ, naake nĩagĩthiaga harĩ guo gũcaria ngũyũ no ndoonaga o na ĩmwe." 
Luke13:7 Agĩkĩĩra mũruti wĩra wa mũgũnda ũcio wake atĩrĩ, ‘Mĩaka ĩyo ĩtatũ mĩthiru, ndũũraga njũkaga haaha harĩ mũkũyũ ũyũ gũcaria ngũyũ, na ndirĩ ndoona o na ĩmwe. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ũteme; ndwagĩrĩirwo nĩgũte mũgũnda wakwa tũhũ.’" 
Luke13:8 No mũruti ũcio wa wĩra akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Mũnene, reke tũtige kũũtema rĩu; nĩtũreke ũikare mwaka ũngĩ ũmwe tu ndĩũrĩmĩre na ndĩwĩkĩre thumu." 
Luke13:9 Wakorwo ũciarĩĩte-rĩ, nĩ wega, no wakorwo ũtaciarĩĩte, hĩndĩ ĩyo ũkaũtema.’ ”" 
Luke13:10 Na rĩĩrĩ, mũthenya ũmwe wa Thabatũ Jesũ nĩkũrutana aarutanaga thunagogiinĩ." 
Luke13:11 Kũu thĩinĩ nĩkwarĩ na mũtumia warĩ na ngoma yatũmĩĩte atũũre e kĩonje mĩaka ikũmi na ĩnaana; aatũũraga ainamĩrĩire, ndangĩahotire kwĩhanda." 
Luke13:12 Rĩrĩa Jesũ aamuonire akĩmwĩta akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Wee mũtumia ũyũ, nĩwehererio wonje waku!”" 
Luke13:13 Jesũ agĩkĩigĩrĩra mũtumia ũcio mooko, naake o hĩndĩ ĩyo akĩĩhanda, akĩgooca Ngai." 
Luke13:14 No rĩĩrĩ, mũnene wa thunagogi nĩaraakarire nĩ ũndũ wa Jesũ kũhonania mũthenya wa Thabatũ. Kwoguo agĩkĩĩra andũ atĩrĩ, “Twĩ na mĩthenya ĩtandatũ ĩrĩa twagĩrĩirwo nĩkũruta wĩra; ũkagaai kũhonio mĩthenya ĩyo no ti mũthenya wa Thabatũ!”" 
Luke13:15 Naake Mwathani agĩcookeria mũnene ũcio wa thunagogi atĩrĩ, “Inyuĩ hinga ici! Githĩ mũtihingũragĩra o mũndũ ng'ombe yake kana ndigiri yake ĩthiĩ ĩkanyue maaĩ mũthenya wa Thabatũ?" 
Luke13:16 Hakĩrĩ ũguo-rĩ, mũtumia ũyũ wa rũciaro rwa Aburahamu ũtũire e muohe nĩ Caitaani mĩaka ikũmi na ĩnaana, ndaagĩrĩirwo nĩkuohorwo mũthenya wa Thabatũ?”" 
Luke13:17 Oiga ũguo, thũ ciake ciothe igĩconoka, nao andũ arĩa angĩ oothe magĩkena nĩ ũndũ wa ciĩko ciothe iria eekĩĩte cia magegania." 
Luke13:18 Naake, Jesũ akĩũria atĩrĩ, “Ũthamaki wa Ngai-rĩ, ũngĩhaananio na kĩ? Ingĩũringithania na kĩĩ?" 
Luke13:19 Ũthamaki wa Ngai ũhaana ta mbegũ ya mũtĩ wa karatarĩ, ĩrĩa mũndũ oire akĩhanda mũgũnda wake, nayo ĩgĩkũra ĩgĩtuĩka mũtĩ, nacio nyoni igĩaka itara ciacio hongeinĩ ciaguo.”" 
Luke13:20 Ningĩ Jesũ agĩcooka akiuga atĩrĩ, “Ũthamaki wa Ngai ingĩũringithania na kĩ?" 
Luke13:21 Ingĩũhaanania na ndaawa ya kũimbia mĩgate ĩrĩa mũtumia oire, agĩtukania na kiro mĩrongo ĩna cia mũtu wa ngano, naguo wothe ũkĩimba.”" 
Luke13:22 Naake Jesũ agĩthiĩ eerekeire Jerusalemu agereire icagiinĩ na matũũrainĩ akĩrutanaga. 
Luke13:23 Naake mũndũ ũmwe akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Mwathani, anga no andũ aniini makaahonokio?” Naake Jesũ agĩcookia akiuga atĩrĩ," 
Luke13:24 “Mwĩrutanagĩriei gũtoonyera mũromo ũrĩa mũceke, nĩ ũndũ ti itherũ andũ aingĩ nĩmakaageria gũtoonya no matikaahota." 
Luke13:25 Hĩndĩ iria mwene nyũmba agookĩra ahinge mũrango-rĩ, inyuĩ mũkaambĩrĩria kũringaringa mũrango mũrũũgamĩĩte nja mũkiugaga atĩrĩ, ‘Mwathani, tũhingũrĩre.’ Naake nĩakaamũcookeria atĩrĩ, ‘Niĩ ndiũĩ kũrĩa muumĩĩte!’" 
Luke13:26 Na inyuĩ nĩmũkaamũcookeria atĩrĩ, ‘Twarĩaga na tũkanyuanĩra nawe na nĩwarutanagĩra njĩrainĩ cia matũũra maitũ.’" 
Luke13:27 Naake nĩakaamũcookeria rĩngĩ atĩrĩ, ‘Ndĩramwĩra niĩ ndiũĩ kũrĩa muumĩĩte. Umaai harĩ niĩ inyuĩ andũ aya aaganu!’" 
Luke13:28 Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩmũkaarĩra na mũhagaranie magego, rĩrĩa mũkoona Aburahamu, Isaaka, Jakubu, na anabii oothe Ũthamakiinĩ wa Ngai, o rĩrĩa na inyuĩ mũgaakorwo mũikĩĩtio nja!" 
Luke13:29 Na rĩĩrĩ, andũ nĩmagooka moimĩĩte mwena na irathĩro o na wa na rũgongo na wa na kĩanda, irugainĩ rĩrĩa rĩgaakorwo Ũthamakiinĩ wa Ngai." 
Luke13:30 Hĩndĩ ĩyo-rĩ, andũ arĩa rĩu me thuutha magaatuĩka a mbere, na arĩa rĩu me mbere magaatuĩka a thuutha.”" 
Luke13:31 O hĩndĩ ĩyo Afarisai amwe magĩũka kũrĩ Jesũ makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Uma gũũkũ nĩ ũndũ Herode nĩarenda gũkũũraga.”" 
Luke13:32 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Thiĩi mũkeere mbwe ĩyo atĩrĩĩrĩ, ‘Ũũmũũthĩ na rũũciũ ngũkorwo ngĩingata ngoma kuuma kũrĩ andũ ngĩmahonagia mĩrimũ yao, naguo mũthenya wa gatatũ ndĩĩkie wĩra wakwa.’" 
Luke13:33 O na kũrĩ ũguo-rĩ, ũũmũũthĩ, rũũciũ, na ooke, no mũhaka ngorwo ndĩ rũgendoinĩ rwakwa tondũ gũtiagĩrĩire mũnabii ooragĩrwo kũndũ kũngĩ tiga o Jerusalemu." 
Luke13:34 “Jerusalemu, Jerusalemu! Wee ũũragaga anabii na ũkahũũra na mahiga andũ arĩa Ngai agũtũmagĩra! Nĩ maita maigana ndaneenda gũcookanĩrĩria andũ aaku hamwe, o ta ũrĩa ngũkũ ĩcookanagĩrĩria tũcui twayo rungu rwa mathagu maayo, no ndũnjĩtĩkagĩria!" 
Luke13:35 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, Hekaarũ yaku nĩgũtiganĩrio. Ngũkwĩra na ma atĩ ndũkaanyona kinya rĩrĩa ũkoiga atĩrĩ, ‘Kũraathimwo-rĩ, nĩ ũrĩa ũgũũka thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩa Mwathani!’ ”" 
Luke14:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, mũthenya ũmwe wa Thabatũ Jesũ nĩathiire kũrĩa irio kwa mũnene ũmwe wa Afarisai, na e kũu andũ nĩmaamũroraga mũno." 
Luke14:2 Na rĩĩrĩ, hau mbere yake nĩhaarĩ mũndũ warĩ mũrũaru mũrimũ wa kũimba magũrũ na mooko." 
Luke14:3 Naake Jesũ akĩũria arutani a Watho o na Afarisai atĩrĩ, “Watho witũ nĩwĩtĩkĩrĩĩtie kana ndwĩtĩkĩrĩĩtie kũhonanagio mũthenya wa Thabatũ?”" 
Luke14:4 Nao magĩkira ki. Naake Jesũ akĩoya mũndũ ũcio warĩ mũrũaru, akĩmũhonia na akĩmwĩtĩkĩria athiĩ." 
Luke14:5 Agĩcooka akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Nũũ gatagatĩinĩ kaanyu ũtangĩruta mwana wake, kana ndeegwa yake ĩgũĩte irima rĩa maaĩ mũthenya wa Thabatũ?”" 
Luke14:6 Nao makĩremwo nĩkũmũcookeria. 
Luke14:7 Rĩrĩa Jesũ oonire ũrĩa ageni arĩa meetĩĩtwo meendaga gũikarĩra itĩ iria ciaigĩirwo ageni a gĩtĩĩo, akĩmahe ngerekano ĩno akiuga atĩrĩ," 
Luke14:8 “Rĩrĩa mũndũ agwĩtĩra iruga rĩa ũhiki-rĩ, tigaga gũikaragĩra itĩ iria ciigĩirwo ageni a gĩtĩĩo, nĩ ũndũ ahota gũkorwo eetĩĩte mũgeni wa gĩtĩĩo gũgũkĩra," 
Luke14:9 naake mũndũ ũcio ũmwĩtĩĩte inyuerĩ ooke akwĩre atĩrĩ, ‘Reke mũndũ ũyũ aikarĩre hau wee ũikarĩire.’ Hĩndĩ ĩyo wee ũgĩũkĩre ũconokeete, ũgĩthiĩ ũikarĩre itĩ iria irĩ na thuutha." 
Luke14:10 Rĩrĩa wetĩrwo iruga-rĩ, thiaga ũgaikarĩra itĩ cia thuutha nĩguo mũndũ ũrĩa ũgwĩtĩĩte ooka akwĩre atĩrĩ, ‘Mũraata wakwa, ũkĩra ũthiĩ ũgaikarĩre gĩtĩ kĩĩrĩa kĩ haarĩa mbere.’ Hĩndĩ ĩyo ũkĩheeo gĩtĩĩo mbere ya andũ oothe arĩa meetĩirwo iruga." 
Luke14:11 Nĩ ũndũ mũndũ o wothe wĩnenehagia nĩakaanyiihio, na ũrĩa wĩnyiihagia nĩakaanenehio.”" 
Luke14:12 Jesũ agĩcooka agĩĩta mũndũ ũrĩa wamwĩtĩĩte irugainĩ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Waruga iruga-rĩ, tigaga gwĩtĩra o araata aaku oiki, kana aariũ a maitũguo oiki, kana andũ a nyũmba yanyu iiki, kana itonga iria mũrigainie nacio ciiki, atĩ nĩ tondũ o nao nĩmarĩgwĩtĩra maruga maao, makĩenda gũkũrĩha nĩ ũndũ wa kũmeetĩra iruga rĩaku." 
Luke14:13 Wagĩa na iruga-rĩ, rĩĩtagĩre athĩĩni, cionje, ithua, na itumuumu," 
Luke14:14 na nĩũrĩraathimagwo nĩ tondũ acio matingĩhota gũkũrĩha. Ngai nĩ we ũgaakũrĩha rĩrĩa andũ arĩa athingu makaariũka.” 
Luke14:15 Na rĩĩrĩ, rĩrĩa mũndũ ũmwe waikarĩĩte hau meethainĩ hamwe na Jesũ aiguire ũguo, akĩĩra Jesũ atĩrĩ, “Kaĩ arĩa makaarĩa irio Ũthamakiinĩ wa Ngai nĩmakaaraathimwo-ĩ!”" 
Luke14:16 Naake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Hĩndĩ ĩmwe mũndũ ũmwe nĩahaarĩirie iruga inene, akĩrĩĩtĩra andũ aingĩ." 
Luke14:17 Rĩrĩa thaa cia kũrĩa ciakinyire agĩtũma ndungata yake ĩthiĩ ĩkeere arĩa meetĩirwo iruga rĩu atĩrĩ, ‘Ũkaai nĩ ũndũ indo ciothe nĩhaarĩrie!’" 
Luke14:18 Nao oothe o mũndũ akĩambĩrĩria kũheana gĩtũmi gĩa kũgiria athiĩ irugainĩ rĩu, o mũndũ akaheana gĩtũmi gĩake. Wa mbere akiuga atĩrĩ, ‘Nĩndĩragũrire mũgũnda, na no mũhaka thiĩ ngawone; kwoguo thiĩ ũmwĩre andekere.’" 
Luke14:19 Naake ũngĩ akiuga atĩrĩ, ‘Nĩndĩragũrire ndeegwa ikũmi cia kũrĩma na nĩndĩrathiĩ gũcigeria; kwoguo thiĩ ũmwĩre andekere.’" 
Luke14:20 Naake ũrĩa ũngĩ akiuga atĩrĩ, ‘No hĩndĩ ndĩrahikanirie, nĩ ũndũ ũcio ndingĩhota gũũka.’" 
Luke14:21 “Ndungata ĩyo ĩgĩgĩcooka mũciĩ ĩkĩĩra mwathi wayo maũndũ macio moothe. Naake mwathi wayo aamaigua akĩng'ũrĩka mũno, akĩĩra ndungata yake atĩrĩ, ‘Thiĩ na ihenya kũũrĩa barabarainĩ cia itũũra o na tũcĩrainĩ ũreehe athĩĩni, cionje, itumuumu, na ithua.’" 
Luke14:22 Thuutha wa ihinda iniini, ndungata ĩyo ĩgĩcooka mũciĩ ĩkĩĩra mwathi wayo atĩrĩ, ‘Nĩndeeka ũrĩa wanjĩĩra, no andũ matinaiyũra.’" 
Luke14:23 Naake mwathi wayo akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Thiĩ barabarainĩ iria nene o na tũrĩa tũniini ũhatĩrĩrie andũ mooke gũũkũ gwakwa nĩ geetha nyũmba ĩiyũre." 
Luke14:24 Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ gũtirĩ mũndũ o na ũmwe wa arĩa megwĩtĩĩtwo ũgũcama irio iria ngũmarugithĩirie!’ ” 
Luke14:25 Na rĩĩrĩ, hĩndĩ ĩmwe rĩrĩa andũ gĩkundi kĩnene maatwaranĩĩte na Jesũ-rĩ, nĩamarĩirie akĩmeera atĩrĩ," 
Luke14:26 “Mũndũ ũrĩa ũgũũka kũrĩ niĩ no mũhaka aanyende gũkĩra ũrĩa eendeete ithe, nyina, mũtumia wake na ciana ciake, aariũ a nyina, na aarĩ a nyina na eemene we mwene, nĩguo atuĩke mũrutwo wakwa." 
Luke14:27 Mũndũ ũrĩa wothe ũtegũkuua mũtharaba wake anũmĩrĩre ndangĩhota gũtuĩka mũrutwo wakwa. 
Luke14:28 “Mũndũ angĩkorwo arenda gwaka mũnaara-rĩ, aambaga agaikara thĩ agatara mbeeca iria ũkũhũthĩra, nĩguo oone kana e na mbeeca cingĩigana kũũrĩĩkia." 
Luke14:29 Angĩaga gwĩka ũguo, no aremwo nĩkũrĩĩkia thuutha wa gwaka mũthingi, nao andũ oothe arĩa marĩwonaga nĩmarĩmũnyũrũragia," 
Luke14:30 makoiga atĩrĩ, ‘Mũndũ ũyũ aambĩrĩirie mwako, akĩremwo nĩkũũrĩĩkia!’" 
Luke14:31 “Mũthamaki angĩkorwo agĩthiĩ kũrũa na mũthamaki ũngĩ-rĩ, aambaga gũikara thĩ ageciiria kana e na thigari ngiri ikũmi no ahote gũtooria mũthamaki ũcio ũngĩ wĩ na thigari ngiri mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ." 
Luke14:32 Angĩona atĩ ndangĩhota kũmũtooria, atũmanagĩra mũthamaki ũcio ũngĩ arĩ o kũraaya, akamwĩra kũgĩe na thaayũ." 
Luke14:33 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio, mũndũ ũrĩa ũtegũtiga kĩrĩa gĩothe e nakĩo ndangĩhota gũtuĩka mũrutwo wakwa." 
Luke14:34 “Cumbĩ nĩ mwega, no ũngĩthira mũcamo-rĩ, ũngĩcooka gũcamithio ta cumbĩ atĩa?" 
Luke14:35 Cumbĩ ũcio ndũrĩ bata tĩĩriinĩ o na kana thumuinĩ; nĩgũteeo ũteagwo. Ũrĩa ũrĩ na matũ ma kũigua nĩakĩigue.” 
Luke15:1 Mũthenya ũmwe eetia a mbeeca cia igooti na eehia nĩmookire gũthikĩrĩria Jesũ akĩrutana. 
Luke15:2 Nao Afarisai na arutani a Watho makĩambĩrĩria kũng'ong'oora makiugaga atĩrĩ, “Mũndũ ũyũ aamũkagĩra eehia na akarĩanĩra nao!”" 
Luke15:3 Tondũ ũcio Jesũ akĩmahe ngerekano ĩno akĩmeera atĩrĩ," 
Luke15:4 “Mũndũ ũmwe wanyu angĩkorwo e na ng'ondu, na ĩmwe yacio yũre-rĩ, eekaga atĩa? Githĩ ndatigaga icio ingĩ mĩrongo kenda na kenda werũinĩ agathiĩ gũcaria ĩyo yũrĩĩte kinya rĩrĩa arĩmĩona?" 
Luke15:5 Amĩona-rĩ, amĩoyaga akamĩkuua na ciande akeneete." 
Luke15:6 Akinya mũciĩ eetaga araata aake na andũ arĩa arigainie nao akameera atĩrĩ, ‘Ũkaai tũkenanĩre nĩ ũndũ nĩnyoneete ng'ondu yakwa ĩrĩa ĩroorĩĩte!’" 
Luke15:7 Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ, ũguo noguo gũkenagwo mũno igũrũ rĩrĩa mwĩhia ũmwe eerira gũkĩra ũrĩa gũkenagwo nĩ ũndũ wa andũ mĩrongo kenda na kenda arĩa matabatairio nĩkwĩrira." 
Luke15:8 “Kana rĩĩrĩ, mũtumia angĩkorwo na ciringi ikũmi, ĩmwe yacio yũre-rĩ, eekaga atĩa? Githĩ ndagwatagia taawa, akahaata nyũmba kahora akĩroraga kinya rĩrĩa arĩmĩona?" 
Luke15:9 Amĩona-rĩ, eetaga araata aake na andũ arĩa arigainie nao akameera atĩrĩ, ‘Ũkaai tũkenanĩre nĩ ũndũ nĩnyoneete ciringi yakwa ĩrĩa ĩrorĩĩte!’" 
Luke15:10 Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ ũguo noguo araika makenaga rĩrĩa mwĩhia ũmwe eerira meehia maake.” 
Luke15:11 Na rĩĩrĩ, Jesũ agĩthiĩ na mbere akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Hĩndĩ ĩmwe nĩkwarĩ na mũndũ warĩ na aariũ eerĩ." 
Luke15:12 Ũrĩa warĩ mũnyiinyi akĩĩra ithe atĩrĩ, ‘Baaba, ngaĩra igai rĩakwa.’ Naake ithe agĩkĩgayania aariũ acio aake eerĩ indo ciake." 
Luke15:13 Matukũ maniini mathira, mũũriũ ũcio mũniini akĩũngania indo ciake ciothe agĩthiĩ bũrũri wa kũraaya, agĩitangĩra indo icio ciake ciothe kuo na mĩtũũrĩre ya ũmaramari." 
Luke15:14 Rĩrĩa aarĩĩkirie kũhũthĩra indo icio ciake ciothe, bũrũriinĩ ũcio aarĩ nĩkwagĩire na ng'aragu nene, o kinya akĩambĩrĩria gũthĩĩnĩka." 
Luke15:15 Kwoguo, agĩthiĩ akĩũria wĩra kwa mũndũ ũmwe wa kũu, naake akĩmũtwara gĩthakainĩ, akarĩithagie ngũrũe." 
Luke15:16 Na rĩĩrĩ, nĩ ũndũ wa kũhũũta-rĩ, nĩaiguaga erirĩirie kũrĩa makoro marĩa maarĩagwo nĩ ngũrũe icio, nĩ ũndũ gũtirĩ mũndũ wa mũheaga gĩa kũrĩa." 
Luke15:17 Naake agĩĩcookera akiuga atĩrĩ, ‘Baaba arĩ na aruti wĩra aingĩ, nao nĩmarĩaga makahũũna na magatigia, na niĩ gũũkũ nĩgũkua ndĩrakua nĩ ng'aragu!" 
Luke15:18 Ngũũkĩra thiĩ kũrĩ Baaba ndĩmwĩre atĩrĩ, Baaba, nĩhĩtĩirie Ngai o na ngakũhĩtĩria." 
Luke15:19 Ndiagĩrĩirwo nĩgũcooka gwĩtagwo mũũrũguo, ndua ta mũruti ũmwe waku wa wĩra.’" 
Luke15:20 Naake agĩgĩũkĩra akĩambĩrĩria gũcooka kũrĩ ithe. “Na rĩĩrĩ, arĩ o kũraaya, ithe akĩmuona akĩmũiguĩra tha, agĩteng'era akĩmũhĩmbĩria na akĩmũmumunya." 
Luke15:21 Naake mũũriũ ũcio akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Baaba, nĩhĩtĩirie Ngai o na ngakũhĩtĩria; ndiagĩrĩirwo nĩgũcooka gwĩtagwo mũũrũguo.’" 
Luke15:22 No ithe agĩĩta ndungata ciake agĩciĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Thiĩi narua mũreehe nguo ĩrĩa njega biũ mũmũhumbe, na mũmwĩkĩre gĩcũhĩ kĩara, na iraatũ magũrũ." 
Luke15:23 Mũcooke mũthiĩ mũthĩnje gateegwa karĩa kanoru biũ, tũrĩe na tũkene," 
Luke15:24 nĩ ũndũ mwana ũyũ wakwa araarĩ mũkuũ na rĩu nĩariũkĩĩte; nĩaroorĩĩte na rĩu nĩonekeete.’ Nĩ ũndũ ũcio, magĩkĩambĩrĩria gũkũngũiya." 
Luke15:25 “Maũndũ macio moothe magĩĩkĩka-rĩ, mũũriũ wake ũrĩa mũkũrũ aarĩ mũgũnda. Na rĩĩrĩ, rĩrĩa aarĩ njĩrainĩ akĩinũka, e hakuhĩ mũciĩ-rĩ, akĩigua mĩtũũrirũ ĩkĩhuuhwo, gũkĩinagwo nyĩmbo." 
Luke15:26 Agĩgĩĩta ndungata ĩmwe akĩmĩũria atĩrĩ, ‘Nĩ atĩa kũrekĩka?’" 
Luke15:27 Nayo ndungata ĩyo ĩkĩmũcookeria ĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Nĩ mũrũ wa maitũguo ũcookire mũciĩ, naake thooguo athĩnja gateegwa karĩa kanoru tondũ nĩacooka mũciĩ arĩ mũgima.’" 
Luke15:28 “Naake mũrũ wa nyina ũcio mũkũrũ agĩkĩraakara mũno, na akĩrega gũtoonya nyũmba. Kwoguo ithe akiuma nja akĩmũthaitha atoonye thĩinĩ." 
Luke15:29 No we agĩcookeria ithe atĩrĩ, ‘Baaba, tathikĩrĩria ngwĩre, niĩ ndũũraga ngũtungatagĩra mĩaka ĩyo yothe na ndirĩ ndakũhĩtĩria, no ndũrĩ wahe o na kabũri kamwe tũrĩanĩre na araata aakwa!" 
Luke15:30 No rĩĩrĩ, rĩrĩa mũũrũguo ũyũ waku ooka arĩĩkĩĩtie gũitanga indo ciaku na maraaya, wamũthĩnjĩra gateegwa karĩa kanoru!’" 
Luke15:31 Naake ithe akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, ‘Mũũriũ, tũkoragwo hamwe hingo ciothe, na indo ciakwa ciothe nĩ ciaku." 
Luke15:32 Nĩtwagĩrĩirwo nĩgũkũngũiya na gũkena nĩ tondũ mũrũ wa maitũguo nĩarakuĩte, no rĩu nĩariũkĩĩte; nĩaroorĩĩte, no rĩu nĩonekeete.’ ”" 
Luke16:1 Jesũ agĩcooka akĩĩra arutwo aake atĩrĩ, “Gĩtonga kĩmwe nĩkĩarĩ na mũndũ wa kũrora indo ciakĩo. Na rĩĩrĩ, hĩndĩ ĩmwe gĩtonga kĩu nĩkĩerirwo atĩ mũndũ ũcio nĩaitangaga indo ciake." 
Luke16:2 Nakĩo gĩtonga kĩu gĩkĩmwĩta gĩkĩmũũria atĩrĩ, ‘Ũhoro ũcio ndĩraigua waku nĩ ũrĩkũ? Nyandĩkĩra ribooti ya indo ciakwa iria ndakwĩrire ũndoragĩre nĩ ũndũ ndũgũcooka gũcirora rĩngĩ.’" 
Luke16:3 Naake mũndũ ũcio akiuga na ngoro atĩrĩ, ‘Ĩ rĩu ngwĩka atĩa tondũ ngirie kũbuutwo wĩra! Ndirĩ na hinya wa gũciimba, na ndihota kũhooya nĩgũconoka." 
Luke16:4 Rĩu nĩndamenya ũrĩa ngwĩka, nĩ geetha andũ marĩnyamũkagĩra mĩciĩinĩ yao ndarĩĩkia kũbuutwo wĩra.’" 
Luke16:5 “Kwoguo agĩgĩĩta andũ arĩa oothe maarĩ na thiirĩ wa mwathi wake; akĩũria wa mbere atĩrĩ, ‘Wee-rĩ, wĩ na thiirĩ wa mwathi wakwa ũigana atĩa?’" 
Luke16:6 Naake akĩmũcookeria akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Ndĩ na thiirĩ wa marebe igana ma maguta.’ Mũrori ũcio akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Oya marithiiti maya maaku, ũikare thĩ wandĩke atĩ wĩ na thiirĩ wa marebe mĩrongo ĩtaano.’" 
Luke16:7 Mũrori ũcio agĩcooka akĩũria mũndũ ũngĩ atĩrĩ, ‘Wee nawe wĩ na thiirĩ ũigana atĩa?’ Naake agĩcookia atĩrĩ, ‘Ndĩ na thiirĩ wa makũnia igana ma ngano.’ Naake akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Oya marithiiti maya maaku wandĩke atĩ wĩ na thiirĩ wa makũnia mĩrongo ĩnaana.’" 
Luke16:8 “Tondũ ũcio, mwathi wa mũrori ũcio ũtaarĩ mwĩhokeku nĩamũganire nĩ tondũ wa ũguo eekire na ũũgĩ; nĩ ũndũ andũ a thĩ nĩmarĩ ũũgĩ wa gwĩka maũndũ maao, gũkĩra andũ arĩa marĩ a ũtheri.”" 
Luke16:9 Jesũ agĩthiĩ na mbere akiuga atĩrĩ, “Hũthagĩraai ũtonga wa gũũkũ thĩ gũthondeka ũraata na andũ, nĩ geetha rĩrĩa ũtonga ũcio ũgaathira, mũkaamũkĩrwo mũciĩ wa tene na tene." 
Luke16:10 Mũndũ o wothe ũkoragwo e mwĩhokeku na tũindo tũniini, nĩakoragwo e mwĩhokeku o na indo nyingĩ, no mũndũ ũrĩa ũtakoragwo e mwĩhokeku na tũindo tũniini, o na indo nyingĩ ndakoragwo e mwĩhokeku nacio." 
Luke16:11 Kwoguo angĩkorwo ndũrĩ mwĩhokeku na ũtonga wa gũũkũ thĩ-rĩ, nũũ ũngĩkwĩhokera ũtonga ũrĩa wa ma?" 
Luke16:12 Ningĩ angĩkorwo gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩkwĩhokera kĩndũ gĩake-rĩ, nũũ ũngĩkũnengera kĩrĩa gĩ gĩaku?" 
Luke16:13 “Gũtirĩ ndungata ĩngĩhota gũtungatĩra aathani eerĩ, nĩ ũndũ no yendire ũmwe na ĩmene ũcio ũngĩ, kana yathĩkĩre ũmwe na ĩnyarare ũcio ũngĩ. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio, mũtingĩhota gũtungatĩra Ngai na mũtungatĩre ũtonga.”" 
Luke16:14 Na rĩĩrĩ, rĩrĩa Afarisai maiguire maũndũ macio moothe, makĩambĩrĩria kũnyiira Jesũ, tondũ nĩmeendeete mbeeca mũno." 
Luke16:15 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Inyuĩ mwĩtuaga aagĩrĩru maithoinĩ ma andũ, no Ngai nĩoĩ ngoro cianyu, nĩ gũkorwo ũndũ ũrĩa wonekaga ũrĩ wa bata maithoinĩ ma andũ ndũrĩ bata maithoinĩ ma Ngai." 
Luke16:16 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ, Watho wa Musa na ũrutani wa anabii ciatũũraga irũmagĩrĩrwo kinya hĩndĩ ya Johana Mũbatithania; thuutha ũcio, Ũhoro ũrĩa Mwega wa Ũthamaki wa Ngai nĩguo ũhunjagio, na mũndũ o wothe nĩahĩkĩkaga atoonye thĩinĩ waguo." 
Luke16:17 No rĩĩrĩ, nĩ ũhũthũ thĩ na igũrũ gũthira, gũkĩra gaturumo o na kamwe ka Watho kweherio." 
Luke16:18 “Mũndũ mũrũme o wothe angĩtigana na mũtumia wake ahikie mũtumia ũngĩ nĩatharĩĩtie, naake mũndũ mũrũme o wothe angĩhikia mũtumia ũtiganĩĩte na mũthuuriwe nĩatharĩĩtie." 
Luke16:19 “Hĩndĩ ĩmwe nĩkwarĩ mũndũ warĩ gĩtonga, wehumbaga nguo cia goro na watũũraga na mĩikarĩre ya goro mũno o mũthenya." 
Luke16:20 Na rĩĩrĩ, nĩkwarĩ na mũndũ ũngĩ warĩ mũthĩĩni wetagwo Lazaro, waiyũrĩĩtwo nĩ ironda mwĩrĩ, wareehagwo mũromoinĩ wa gĩtonga kĩu," 
Luke16:21 e na mwĩhoko wa kũrĩa irio iria ingĩagũire thĩ gĩtonga kĩu gĩkĩrĩa. O na ngui nĩciokaga kũmũcũna ironda. 
Luke16:22 “Na rĩĩrĩ, mũthĩĩni ũcio nĩakuire, agĩkuuo nĩ araika agĩtwarwo agaikaranagie na Aburahamu irugainĩ rĩa igũrũ. O nakĩo gĩtonga nĩgĩakuire, gĩgĩthikwo." 
Luke16:23 Na rĩĩrĩ, rĩrĩa kĩarĩ kwa aarĩa akuũ, kũrĩa kĩarĩ na ruwo rũingĩ, nĩkĩainamũkire gĩkĩona Aburahamu e kũraaya, arĩ hamwe na Lazaro." 
Luke16:24 Nakĩo gĩgĩĩta Aburahamu gĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Baaba Aburahamu! Njiguĩra tha, ũtũme Lazaro atobokie mũthia wa kĩara gĩake maaĩinĩ ooke andaatĩrie rũrĩmĩ rwakwa rũhorahore nĩ ũndũ ndĩ na ruwo rũingĩ gũũkũ mwakiinĩ ũyũ!’" 
Luke16:25 “No Aburahamu agĩcookeria gĩtonga kĩu atĩrĩ, ‘Mũũriũ, ririkana rĩrĩa ũraarĩ muoyo ũrakoragwo na maũndũ moothe meega, naake Lazaro arakoragwo na maũndũ moothe mooru, no rĩu arĩ gĩkenoinĩ, nawe wĩ ruwoinĩ." 
Luke16:26 Hamwe na ũguo-rĩ, gatagatĩinĩ gaitũ nawe he na mũkuru mũriku ũguo atĩ andũ arĩa mangĩenda kuuma gũũkũ mooke kũu, kana moime kũu mooke gũũkũ, matingĩhota kũũringa.’" 
Luke16:27 Nakĩo gĩtonga kĩu gĩkĩĩra Aburahamu atĩrĩ, ‘Baaba, ndagũthaitha ũtũme Lazaro kũrĩ andũ a nyũmba iitũ, nĩ ũndũ" 
Luke16:28 ndĩ na aariũ a maitũ ataano, athiĩ akamakaanie, nĩguo matikaanooke kũndũ gũũkũ kwa ruwo.’" 
Luke16:29 “No Aburahamu akĩĩra gĩtonga kĩu atĩrĩ, ‘Aariũ a maitũguo nĩmegũkaanio nĩ Musa na anabii; acio nĩ o maagĩrĩirwo nĩgũthikĩrĩria.’" 
Luke16:30 Nakĩo gĩtonga gĩgĩcookia atĩrĩ, ‘Baaba Aburahamu, acio ti aiganu! Korwo mũndũ ũriũkĩĩte kuuma kũrĩ arĩa akuũ no athiĩ kũrĩ o-rĩ, no meerire meehia maao.’" 
Luke16:31 Naake Aburahamu agĩcookia atĩrĩ, ‘Angĩkorwo matingĩigua Musa na anabii-rĩ, o na mũndũ angĩriũka kuuma kũrĩ arĩa akuũ matingĩmũigua.’ ”" 
Luke17:1 Naake Jesũ akĩĩra arutwo aake atĩrĩ, “Maũndũ ma kũhĩnga andũ no mũhaka mooneke; no rĩĩrĩ, kaĩ ũrĩa ũtũmaga mooneke arĩ thĩĩnainĩ-ĩ!" 
Luke17:2 Mũndũ ũcio nĩ kaba oohererwo ihiga rĩa gĩthĩi ngingo aikio iriainĩ, handũ ha gũtũma kamwe ga twana tũũtũ keehie." 
Luke17:3 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio kĩĩmenyagĩrĩreei ciĩkoinĩ cianyu. “Mũrũ kana mwarĩ wa thooguo angĩĩhia, mũkaanie, na angĩhera, muohere." 
Luke17:4 Angĩkwĩhĩria mũthenya ũmwe maita mũgwanja, na o akũhĩtĩria agooka agakwĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Nĩndahera,’ no mũhaka ũmuohere.”" 
Luke17:5 Nao atũmwo makĩĩra Mwathani atĩrĩ, “Tuongerere wĩtĩkio!”" 
Luke17:6 Naake Mwathani akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Korwo mwĩ na wĩtĩkio ũigana kabegũ ga karatarĩ, no mwĩre mũtĩ ũyũ wa mũkũyũ atĩrĩ, ‘Kũũrũka haaha ũkeehande iriainĩ!’ naguo no ũmwathĩkĩre." 
Luke17:7 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ, mũndũ o wothe wanyu angĩkorwo na ndungata ya kũrĩma kana ya kũrĩithia-rĩ, no amĩĩre rĩrĩa yoimĩra wĩra, ‘Ũka ũikare thĩ ũrĩe?’" 
Luke17:8 Githĩ to amĩĩrire, ‘Wĩhaarĩrie ũhe irio ndĩe na nyue, ndahũũna woe ciaku ũrĩe?’" 
Luke17:9 Ningĩ-rĩ, no acookerie ndungata ĩyo ngaatho nĩ ũndũ wa gwĩka ũrĩa amĩathĩĩte?" 
Luke17:10 Ũguo noguo o na inyuĩ mũhaana; rĩrĩa mweka ũrĩa wothe mwathĩĩtwo mwĩke-rĩ, ugagaai atĩrĩ, ‘Ithuĩ twĩ o ndungata; tweka o ũrĩa twagĩrĩirwo nĩgwĩka.’ ”" 
Luke17:11 Na rĩĩrĩ, Jesũ arĩ rũgendoinĩ rwa gũthiĩ Jerusalemu nĩagereire mũhakainĩ wa Samaria na Galili." 
Luke17:12 Rĩrĩa aatoonyaga gĩcagiinĩ kĩmwe nĩatũngirwo nĩ andũ ikũmi maarũarĩĩte mũrimũ mũũru wa ngoothi. Nao andũ acio makĩrũũgama haraaya," 
Luke17:13 makĩanĩrĩra makiuga atĩrĩ, “Mwathi Jesũ! Tũiguĩre tha!”" 
Luke17:14 Rĩrĩa Jesũ aamoonire akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Thiĩi mũkarorwo nĩ athĩnjĩri Ngai.” Na rĩĩrĩ, marĩ njĩrainĩ magĩthiĩ gwĩka ũguo aameerire, magĩtherio." 
Luke17:15 Rĩrĩa ũmwe wao oonire atĩ nĩahonio-rĩ, akĩhũndũka akĩgoocaga Ngai na mũgambo mũnene," 
Luke17:16 akĩĩgũithia magũrũinĩ ma Jesũ, akĩmũcookeria ngaatho. Mũndũ ũcio aarĩ Mũsamaria." 
Luke17:17 Naake Jesũ agĩkĩanĩrĩra akĩũria atĩrĩ, “Ĩ githĩ ti andũ ikũmi matherio? Acio angĩ kenda-rĩ, me kũ?" 
Luke17:18 Mũndũ ũyũ mũgeni no we wahũndũka ooke acookerie Ngai ngaatho?” 
Luke17:19 Jesũ agĩcooka akĩĩra mũndũ ũcio atĩrĩ, “Ũkĩra wĩthiĩre; wĩtĩkio waku nĩguo wakũhonia.”" 
Luke17:20 Na rĩĩrĩ, Afarisai amwe nĩmooririe Jesũ rĩrĩa Ũthamaki wa Ngai ũgooka, naake akĩmacookeria akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Ũthamaki wa Ngai ndũgooka na imenyithia ikuoneka." 
Luke17:21 Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũkaamwĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Taroraai, ĩ ũyũ haaha!’ kana ‘Ũũrĩa haarĩa!’ Nĩ tondũ Ũthamaki wa Ngai wĩ gatagatĩinĩ kaanyu.”" 
Luke17:22 Agĩcooka akĩĩra arutwo atĩrĩ, “Kwĩ ihinda rĩgaakinya mwĩrirĩrie kuona mũthenya ũmwe wa Mũrũ wa Mũndũ, no mũtikaawona." 
Luke17:23 Nĩkũrĩ andũ makaamwĩraga atĩrĩ, ‘Taroraai haarĩa!’ kana, ‘Taroraai haaha!’ Mũtikaanathiĩ kũrĩ o, na mũtikaanamarũmĩrĩre." 
Luke17:24 Nĩ gũkorwo o ta ũrĩa rũheni rũhenũkaga rũkamũrĩka matu kuuma mwena ũmwe kinya ũrĩa ũngĩ, ũguo noguo Mũrũ wa Mũndũ agaakorwo ahaana mũthenya ũcio wake." 
Luke17:25 No rĩĩrĩ, no mũhaka aambe athĩĩnĩke mũno na aregwo nĩ andũ a rũciaro rũũrũ." 
Luke17:26 O ta ũrĩa kwahaanaga matukũinĩ ma Noa, noguo gũkaahaana matukũinĩ ma Mũrũ wa Mũndũ." 
Luke17:27 Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ maarĩaga na makanyua, na arũme makahikanagia, nao atumia makahĩkaga, nginyagia mũthenya ũrĩa Noa aatoonyire thabina, naguo mũiyũro wa maaĩ ũgĩũka ũkĩmaniina oothe." 
Luke17:28 O na hĩndĩ ya Loti noguo kwahaanaga; andũ maatũũraga marĩaga na maanyuaga, magũraga indo makĩendagia, mahandaga, na maakaga." 
Luke17:29 No rĩĩrĩ, mũthenya ũrĩa Loti oimire Sodomu, mwaki na ũbiriiti ũkiura kuo ta mbura uumĩĩte igũrũ ũkĩmaniina oothe." 
Luke17:30 Ũguo noguo gũkaahaana rĩrĩa Mũrũ wa Mũndũ akoonanio. 
Luke17:31 “Mũthenya ũcio-rĩ, mũndũ ũrĩa ũgaakorwo nyũmba igũrũ, ndakaanaharũrũke akarute indo ciake iria i nyũmba, o naake mũndũ ũrĩa ũgaakorwo mũgũnda ndakaanacooke na mũciĩ." 
Luke17:32 Taririkanaai mũtumia wa Loti! 
Luke17:33 Mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa ũgeragia kũhonokia muoyo wake, nĩakaaũtee, no ũrĩa ũteaga muoyo wake, nĩakaũhonokia." 
Luke17:34 Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ, ũtukũ ũcio andũ eerĩ magaakorwo makomeete ũrĩrĩ ũmwe, ũmwe wao aakuo, naake ũrĩa ũngĩ atigwo." 
Luke17:35 Nao atumia eerĩ magaakorwo magĩthĩa hamwe, ũmwe wao aakuo, naake ũrĩa ũngĩ atigwo. [" 
Luke17:36 Andũ eerĩ magaakorwo makĩruta wĩra mũgũndainĩ hamwe, ũmwe wao akuuo, naake ũrĩa ũngĩ atigwo.”]" 
Luke17:37 Nao makĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Mwathani, nĩ nakũ?” Naake akĩmacookeria akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Harĩa he kĩimba nĩ ho nderi ikonganaga.”" 
Luke18:1 Jesũ agĩcooka akĩhe arutwo aake ngerekano ya kũmaruta atĩ no mũhaka mahooyage hingo ciothe mategũkua ngoro. 
Luke18:2 Agĩkĩmera atĩrĩ, “Itũũrainĩ rĩmwe nĩkwarĩ mũciirithania ũtaatĩĩĩte Ngai o na kana agatĩĩa andũ." 
Luke18:3 Itũũrainĩ o rĩu nĩkwarĩ na mũtumia wa ndigwa watũũraga athiaga kũrĩ mũciirithania ũcio akamwĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Ndeithĩrĩria harĩ thũ ciakwa.’" 
Luke18:4 Mũciirithania ũcio nĩaikarire matukũ maingĩ aregeete kũmũteithia, no mũthenya ũmwe nĩeĩrire na ngoro atĩrĩ, ‘O na gũtuĩka ndĩtĩĩĩte Ngai kana andũ-rĩ," 
Luke18:5 nĩngũteithia mũtumia ũyũ nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa athĩĩnĩĩtie. Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ, wona ndaaga kũmũteithia egũtũũra ookaga gũũthĩĩnia.’ ”" 
Luke18:6 Mwathani agĩkiuga atĩrĩ, “Nĩmwaigua ũrĩa mũciirithania ũcio ũtaarĩ mũthingu oigire?" 
Luke18:7 Githĩ o naake Ngai ndangĩgĩteithĩrĩria andũ aake arĩa mamũkayagĩra ũtukũ na mũthenya? No aage kũmateithĩrĩria na ihenya? 
Luke18:8 Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ no amateithĩrĩrie na ihenya mũno. No rĩĩrĩ, rĩrĩa Mũrũ wa Mũndũ agooka-rĩ, nĩagaakora andũ meetĩkĩĩtie gũũkũ thĩ?”" 
Luke18:9 Ningĩ Jesũ akĩĩra andũ arĩa meetuaga atĩ nĩ o athingu, na makamenereria andũ arĩa angĩ oothe ngerekano ĩno" 
Luke18:10 “Hĩndĩ ĩmwe andũ eerĩ nĩmaambatire Hekaarũinĩ kũhooya; ũmwe aarĩ Mũfarisai, na ũrĩa ũngĩ aarĩ mwĩtia wa mbeeca cia igooti." 
Luke18:11 “Naake Mũfarisai ũcio akĩrũũgama handũ e wiki akĩhooya atĩrĩ: ‘Ngai nĩndagũcookeria ngaatho nĩ ũndũ ndirĩ mũkoroku, ndiheenanagia, na nditharagia ta ũrĩa andũ arĩa angĩ oothe meekaga. Nĩndagũcookeria ngaatho o rĩngĩ nĩ ũndũ ndihaana ta mwĩtia wa mbeeca cia igooti ũũrĩa wĩ haarĩa." 
Luke18:12 Ndĩhingaga maita meerĩ o kiumia, na nĩndutaga gĩcunjĩ gĩa ikũmi gĩa kĩrĩa gĩothe ndathũkũma.’" 
Luke18:13 “No mwĩtia wa mbeeca cia igooti aarũũgamĩĩte o haraaya, na ndangĩahotire o na kũroria maitho maake na igũrũ, no kũinamĩrĩra ainamĩrĩire akĩhooya atĩrĩ, ‘Ngai njiguĩra tha niĩ mũndũ mwĩhia!’" 
Luke18:14 Ngũmwĩra atĩ, mwĩtia ũcio wa mbeeca cia igooti nĩainũkire mũciĩ aiguithanĩĩtio na Ngai gũkĩra Mũfarisai. Nĩ ũndũ mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa wĩnenehagia nĩakaanyiihio, naake ũrĩa wĩnyiihagia nĩakaanenehio.”" 
Luke18:15 Na rĩĩrĩ, andũ amwe nĩmaareeheire Jesũ twana twao nĩguo atũigĩrĩre mooko, nao arutwo moona magĩĩka ũguo makĩmakaania." 
Luke18:16 No Jesũ agĩĩta twana tũu akiuga atĩrĩ, “Rekeei twana tũũke kũrĩ niĩ. Tigaai gũtũgiria, nĩ ũndũ Ũthamaki wa Ngai nĩ wa arĩa matariĩ ta tuo." 
Luke18:17 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma, mũndũ o wothe ũtaamũkagĩra Ũthamaki wa Ngai ta kaana, ndakaũtoonya.”" 
Luke18:18 Naake mũtongoria ũmwe wa Ayahudi akĩũria Jesũ atĩrĩ, “Mũrutani mwega, ingĩĩka atĩa nĩ geetha ngae muoyo wa tene na tene?”" 
Luke18:19 Naake Jesũ akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Ũkũnjĩta mwega nĩkĩ? Gũtirĩ mũndũ mwega tiga o Ngai." 
Luke18:20 Wee nĩũũĩ ũrĩa maathani moigĩĩte atĩ; ‘Ndũkaanatharanie; ndũkaanoragane, ndũkaanaiye, ndũkaanaigĩrĩre mũndũ kĩgeenyo, na tĩĩa thooguo na maitũguo.’ ”" 
Luke18:21 Naake Mũyahudi ũcio akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Niĩ ndũũraga nũmagĩrĩra maathani macio kuuma ndĩ o mũnyiinyi.”" 
Luke18:22 Rĩrĩa Jesũ aiguire ũguo akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Nĩharĩ ũndũ ũmwe ũtigarĩĩtie; thiĩ wendie indo ciaku ciothe ũhe athĩĩni mbeeca icio, na nĩũkũgĩa na mũthiithũ igũrũ, ũcooke ũũke ũũnũmĩrĩre.”" 
Luke18:23 Rĩrĩa Mũyahudi ũcio aiguire ũguo, akĩigua kĩeha mũno tondũ aarĩ mũtongu mũno." 
Luke18:24 Naake Jesũ oona ũrĩa aarĩ na kĩeha, akiuga atĩrĩ, “Kaĩ nĩ hinya andũ arĩa atongu gũtoonya Ũthamakiinĩ wa Ngai-ĩ!" 
Luke18:25 Nĩ ũndũ nĩ ũhũthũ ngamĩĩra gũtoonyera irima rĩa cindano, gũkĩra mũndũ mũtongu gũtoonya Ũthamakiinĩ wa Ngai.”" 
Luke18:26 Nao andũ arĩa maiguire ũguo makĩũria atĩrĩ, “Nũũ ũngĩkĩhota kũhonokio?”" 
Luke18:27 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Maũndũ marĩa matangĩhoteka nĩ andũ nĩmahotagwo nĩ Ngai.”" 
Luke18:28 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Petero akiuga atĩrĩ, “Ithuĩ tũtigĩĩte mĩciĩ iitũ tũgakũrũmĩrĩra.”" 
Luke18:29 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ, gũtirĩ mũndũ ũtigĩĩte nyũmba yake kana mũtumia, kana aariũ a nyina, aciari, kana ciana, nĩ ũndũ wa Ũthamaki wa Ngai," 
Luke18:30 ũtakaagĩa na ũtonga mũingĩ matukũ maya tũrĩ, na muoyo wa tene na tene matukũ marĩa magooka.”" 
Luke18:31 Na rĩĩrĩ, Jesũ agĩcooka agĩtwara arutwo aake arĩa ikũmi na eerĩ ndundu akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Twerekeire kwambata Jerusalemu, na maũndũ moothe marĩa maandĩkirwo nĩ anabii megiĩ Mũrũ wa Mũndũ no mũhaka mahingio." 
Luke18:32 Nĩ ũndũ nĩarĩnengeranwo kũrĩ andũ a ndũũrĩrĩ mamũnyũrũrie, mamwĩke maũndũ ma thoni, na mamũtuĩre mata." 
Luke18:33 Ningĩ nĩmarĩcooka mamũhũũre na kĩboko na mamũũrage; no rĩĩrĩ, mũthenya wa gatatũ nĩakaariũka.”" 
Luke18:34 No arutwo matiamenyire ũndũ o na ũmwe wa macio; nĩmaahithĩĩtwo ũrĩa Jesũ eendaga kuuga, kwoguo matianyiitire ũrĩa oigaga." 
Luke18:35 Na rĩĩrĩ, Jesũ akuhĩrĩria Jeriko, mũndũ warĩ mũtumuumu agĩkorwo aikarĩĩte mũkĩrainĩ wa njĩra akĩhooya ũteithio." 
Luke18:36 Rĩrĩa mũndũ ũcio aiguire andũ aingĩ makĩhĩtũka akĩũria atĩrĩ, “Nĩ atĩa kũrekĩka?”" 
Luke18:37 Nao andũ makĩmwĩra atĩ nĩ Jesũ wa Nazarethi wahĩtũkagĩra hau. 
Luke18:38 Naake akĩanĩrĩra akiuga atĩrĩ, “Jesũ Mũrũ wa Daudi! Njiguĩra tha!”" 
Luke18:39 Nao andũ arĩa maarĩ mbere magĩkũũma mũtumuumu ũcio makĩmwĩra akire. No we akĩanĩrĩra mũno makĩria akiuga atĩrĩ, “Mũrũ wa Daudi! Njiguĩra tha!”" 
Luke18:40 Naake Jesũ akĩrũũgama agĩathana mũndũ ũcio areehwo harĩ we. Akuhĩrĩria akĩmũũria atĩrĩ," 
Luke18:41 “Ũkwenda ngwĩkĩre atĩa?” Naake mũndũ ũcio akĩmũcookeria akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Mwathani, ngwenda njooke kuona.”" 
Luke18:42 Naake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Gĩcooke kuona! Gwĩtĩkia gwaku nĩkuo gwatũma ũhone.”" 
Luke18:43 Ihinda o rĩu mũndũ ũcio akĩhota kuona, akĩrũmĩrĩra Jesũ akĩgoocaga Ngai. Rĩrĩa andũ moonire ũguo, magĩkumia Ngai." 
Luke19:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, Jesũ agĩtoonya Jeriko, akĩhĩtũkĩra kuo." 
Luke19:2 Kũu Jeriko nĩkwarĩ mũnene ũmwe wa eetia a mbeeca cia igooti wetagwo Zakayo, na aarĩ mũtongu." 
Luke19:3 Mũndũ ũcio nĩageragia kuona Jesũ aarĩ ũ, no ndangĩahotire nĩ ũndũ aarĩ mũkuhĩ, na andũ maarĩ aingĩ mũno." 
Luke19:4 Kwoguo agĩgĩteng'era mbere ya andũ, akĩhaica mũkũyũ nĩguo ahote kuona Jesũ, tondũ nĩahĩtũkagĩra njĩra ĩyo." 
Luke19:5 Rĩrĩa Jesũ aakinyire rungu rwa mũtĩ ũcio, akĩrora igũrũ akĩĩra Zakayo atĩrĩ, “Zakayo, harũrũka na ihenya, nĩ ũndũ ũũmũũthĩ no mũhaka thiĩ gwaku mũciĩ.”" 
Luke19:6 Naake Zakayo agĩkĩharũrũka na ihenya, akĩnyiita Jesũ ũgeni akeneete." 
Luke19:7 Nao andũ oothe arĩa moonire ũhoro ũcio, makĩng'oong'oora makĩĩranaga atĩrĩ, “Mũndũ ũyũ aathiĩ gũceera mũciĩ wa mũndũ mwĩhia!”" 
Luke19:8 Naake akĩrũũgama na igũrũ akĩĩra Mwathani atĩrĩ, “Mwathani, nĩngũhe athĩĩni nuthu ya indo ciakwa, na kũngĩkorwo nĩkũrĩ mũndũ ndanatuunya kĩndũ, nĩngũmũrĩha maita mana.”" 
Luke19:9 Naake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ũũmũũthĩ ũhonokio nĩũũkĩĩte mũciĩ ũyũ, nĩ ũndũ o naake mũndũ ũyũ nĩ wa rũciaro rwa Aburahamu." 
Luke19:10 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ, Mũrũ wa Mũndũ ookire gũcaria na kũhonokia andũ arĩa moorĩĩte.”" 
Luke19:11 Na rĩĩrĩ, o andũ magĩthikagĩrĩria ũhoro ũcio, Jesũ akĩmeera ngerekano. Hĩndĩ ĩyo maarĩ hakuhĩ Jerusalemu, na andũ meeciiragia atĩ Ũthamaki wa Ngai warĩ hakuhĩ gũkinya." 
Luke19:12 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio akiuga atĩrĩ, “Hĩndĩ ĩmwe mũndũ warĩ mũnene nĩathiire bũrũri wa kũraaya agatuuo mũthamaki, na arĩĩkia gwĩkwo ũguo acooke mũciĩ." 
Luke19:13 Atanathiĩ nĩetire ndungata ciake ikũmi, akĩnengera o ndungata mina ĩmwe agĩciĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Cionjorithagiei nginya rĩrĩa ngaacooka.’" 
Luke19:14 No andũ a bũrũri wake matiamwendeete, na kwoguo magĩtũma andũ thuutha wake makoige atĩrĩ, ‘Tũtikwenda mũndũ ũyũ atuĩke mũthamaki witũ.’" 
Luke19:15 “Mũndũ ũcio nĩathiire agĩtuuo mũthamaki na agĩcooka. Na rĩĩrĩ, akinya nĩatũmanire agĩathana eetĩrwo ndungata icio aanengereete mbeeca nĩ geetha amenye kĩrĩa o ndungata yathũkũmĩĩte." 
Luke19:16 Nayo ndungata ya mbere ĩgĩũka harĩ we ĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Mũnene, mina yaku ĩrĩa waneire nĩĩnyoneire ingĩ ikũmi.’" 
Luke19:17 Naake akĩmĩĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Nĩwĩkĩĩte wega mũno, wee ndungata ĩno njega! Tondũ nĩũkoreetwo wĩ mwĩhokeku na tũindo tũniini, ũgũcooka gwatha matũũra ikũmi.’" 
Luke19:18 Nayo ndungata ya keerĩ ĩgĩũka ĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Mũnene, yakwa ĩrĩa wanengerire nĩĩnyoneire ingĩ ithaano.’" 
Luke19:19 Naake akĩmĩĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Ũgũcooka gwatha matũũra mataano.’" 
Luke19:20 “Nayo ndungata ĩngĩ ĩgĩũka ĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Mũnene, ĩno mina yaku; ndamĩohire na gĩtambaya ngĩmĩhitha." 
Luke19:21 Nĩndagwĩtigĩrire nĩ ũndũ wee wĩ mũndũ mũhahanyi. Woyaga kĩrĩa gĩtarĩ gĩaku, na ũkagetha kĩrĩa ũtaahandire.’" 
Luke19:22 Naake mũnene ũcio akĩĩra ndungata ĩyo atĩrĩ, ‘Wee ndungata ĩno njũru! Ngũgũtuĩra na ciugo ciaku! Nĩwoĩ atĩ ndĩ mũndũ mũhahanyi, na atĩ njoyaga indo itarĩ ciakwa, na ngagetha kĩrĩa itaahandire." 
Luke19:23 Wakĩregire kũiga mina yakwa bengi nĩkĩ nĩguo hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ngooka igaakorwo na maciaro?’ 
Luke19:24 “Mũnene ũcio agĩcooka akĩĩra andũ arĩa maarĩ hau atĩrĩ, ‘Oyai mina ĩyo e na yo mũnengere ũrĩa wĩ na ikũmi.’" 
Luke19:25 Nao andũ acio makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Mũnene, githĩ ndarĩ na ikũmi!’" 
Luke19:26 Naake akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, ‘Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ, mũndũ o wothe wĩ na indo, nĩakoongererwo ingĩ nyingĩ, no ũrĩa ũtarĩ, o na kĩrĩa kĩniini e nakĩo nĩagaatuunywo." 
Luke19:27 Nao andũ acio thũ ciakwa matarenda nduĩke mũthamaki wao-rĩ, mareeheei haaha mbere yakwa mũmoorage!’ ”" 
Luke19:28 Naake Jesũ arĩĩkia kuuga ũhoro ũcio, agĩthiĩ na mbere kwambata eerekeire Jerusalemu." 
Luke19:29 Rĩrĩa aakinyire kĩrĩmainĩ kĩa mĩtamaiyũ, o hakuhĩ na matũũra ma Bethifage na Bethania, agĩtũma arutwo eerĩ akĩmeera atĩrĩ," 
Luke19:30 “Thiĩi gĩcagiinĩ kĩĩrĩa kĩ mwena ũũrĩa ũngĩ; mũgĩtoonya nĩmũkuona njaũ ya ndigiri ĩtarĩ yakuua mũndũ, yoheetwo. Mĩohoreei mũmĩreehe haaha." 
Luke19:31 Mũngĩũrio nĩ mũndũ mũramĩohora nĩkĩ, mwĩreei atĩrĩ, ‘Mwathani e na bata nayo. ’ ”" 
Luke19:32 Nao arutwo magĩgĩthiĩ, magĩkora maũndũ moothe matariĩ o ta ũrĩa Jesũ aameerĩĩte." 
Luke19:33 Na rĩĩrĩ, rĩrĩa maamĩohoraga, eene yo makĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Mũramĩohora nĩkĩ?”" 
Luke19:34 Nao makĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Mwathani e na bata nayo.”" 
Luke19:35 Magĩkĩmĩtwara kũrĩ Jesũ. Magĩcooka makĩmĩigĩrĩra nguo ciao, makĩhaicia Jesũ igũrũ wayo." 
Luke19:36 Naake agĩgĩthiĩ na njĩra ahaicĩĩte njaũ ĩyo, nao andũ makaaraga nguo ciao njĩrainĩ." 
Luke19:37 Rĩrĩa aakuhĩrĩirie itũũra rĩa Jerusalemu, agĩikũrũka na barabara ĩrĩa yoimĩĩte kĩrĩmainĩ kĩa mĩtamaiyũ, arutwo aake oothe makĩambĩrĩria kũgaatha Ngai makĩmũgoocaga, na mũgambo mũnene nĩ ũndũ wa ciama iria ciothe maarĩĩkĩĩtie kuona, makiugaga atĩrĩ," 
Luke19:38 “Kũraathimwo nĩ mũthamaki ũrĩa ũgũũka na rĩĩtwa rĩa Mwathani! Thaayũ ũrogĩa igũrũ matuinĩ, naake Ngai arokumagio!”" 
Luke19:39 Nao Afarisai amwe arĩa maarĩ ho makĩĩra Jesũ atĩrĩ, “Mũrutani, ĩra arutwo aaku makire.”" 
Luke19:40 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ, aya mangĩkira mahiga mo meene no kwambĩrĩria mangĩambĩrĩria kuugĩrĩria.”" 
Luke19:41 Na rĩĩrĩ, rĩrĩa Jesũ aakuhĩrĩirie itũũra akĩrĩona, akĩrĩra nĩ ũndũ warĩo," 
Luke19:42 akiuga atĩrĩ, “Naarĩ korwo ũũmũũthĩ nĩũũĩ maũndũ marĩa mareehage thaayũ! No rĩu nĩũhithĩĩtwo, ndũngĩmoona!" 
Luke19:43 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, matukũ nĩmagooka rĩrĩa thũ ciaku igaakũrigiicĩria na ihumbu cia tĩĩri, cienje mĩtaro mĩena yothe ikũhingĩrĩrie." 
Luke19:44 Ĩgaakũniina o biũ wee mwene o hamwe na ciana ciaku; gũtirĩ ihiga igaatiga rĩ igũrũ wa rĩrĩa rĩngĩ, tondũ ndũigana kũmenya ihinda rĩrĩa Ngai ookĩĩte gũkũhonokia!”" 
Luke19:45 Naake Jesũ agĩcooka agĩtoonya Hekaarũ akĩambĩrĩria kũingata andũ arĩa meendagĩria kuo," 
Luke19:46 akĩmeeraga atĩrĩ, “Ngai oigĩĩte Maandĩkoinĩ atĩrĩ, ‘Hekaarũ yakwa nĩ ya kũhooyagĩrwo! No inyuĩ mũmĩtuĩte kũndũ gwa kwĩhithwo nĩ atuunyani!’ ”" 
Luke19:47 Na rĩĩrĩ, o mũthenya Jesũ nĩarutanaga kũu Hekaarũinĩ. Nao athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene na arutani a Watho na atongoria a andũ nĩmeendaga kũmũũraga," 
Luke19:48 no matingĩahotire, nĩ ũndũ andũ oothe maakoragwo mamũthikĩrĩirie, matekwenda kũhĩtũkwo nĩ kiugo o na kĩmwe gĩake." 
Luke20:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, mũthenya ũmwe rĩrĩa Jesũ aarutaga andũ Hekaarũinĩ, akĩhunjagia Ũhoro ũrĩa Mwega, athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene na arutani a Watho, na athuuri magĩũka" 
Luke20:2 makĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Tatwĩre wĩkaga maũndũ maya na ũhoti ũrĩkũ, na nũũ wakũheire ũhoti ũcio?”" 
Luke20:3 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “O na niĩ nĩngũmũũria kĩũria; Tanjĩĩraai atĩrĩ," 
Luke20:4 Johana-rĩ, aarutĩĩte ũhoti wa kũbatithania kũrĩ Ngai kana kũrĩ andũ?”" 
Luke20:5 Nao magĩciira me hamwe makĩĩrana atĩrĩ, “Wona twoiga, ‘Woimĩĩte kwĩ Ngai,’ egũtũũria atĩrĩ, ‘Mwakĩregire gwĩtĩkia Johana nĩkĩ?’" 
Luke20:6 Na twoiga, ‘Woimĩĩte kũrĩ andũ,’ andũ oothe nĩmegũtũhũũra na mahiga nĩ ũndũ oothe meetĩkĩĩtie atĩ Johana aarĩ mũnabii.”" 
Luke20:7 Kwoguo makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Tũtiũĩ kũrĩa woimĩĩte.”" 
Luke20:8 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “O na niĩ ndigũkĩmwĩra njĩkaga maũndũ maya na ũhoti ũrĩkũ.”" 
Luke20:9 Jesũ agĩcooka akĩhe andũ ngerekano ĩno “Mũndũ ũmwe nĩahandire mĩthabibũ mũgũndainĩ wake, agĩcooka akĩũkomborithia, agĩthiĩ bũrũri ũngĩ kwa ihinda iraaya." 
Luke20:10 Na rĩĩrĩ, hĩndĩ ya kũgetha thabibũ yakinya-rĩ, agĩtũma ngombo yake ĩthiĩ kũrĩ arĩmi arĩa maũkomboreete ĩgĩĩre igai rĩake rĩa magetha. Rĩrĩa ngombo ĩyo yathiire, akombori acio makĩmĩhũũra, magĩcooka makĩmĩingata mooko matheri." 
Luke20:11 Mwene mũgũnda agĩcooka agĩtũma ngombo ĩngĩ; nayo makĩmĩhũũra, na makĩmĩruma, magĩcooka makĩmĩingata mooko matheri." 
Luke20:12 Ningĩ agĩcooka agĩtũma ngombo ĩngĩ ya gatatũ; nao makĩmĩtiihangia na makĩmĩingata. 
Luke20:13 Naake mwene mũgũnda agĩkĩĩyũria atĩrĩ, ‘Rĩu ngwĩka atĩa? Ngũtũma mũũriũ wakwa ũrĩa nyendeete; ti itherũ nĩmekũmũhe gĩtĩĩo!’" 
Luke20:14 Rĩrĩa andũ acio maakomborithĩĩtio mũgũnda maamuonire makĩĩrana atĩrĩ, ‘Ũyũ nĩ we ũkaagaya mũgũnda ũyũ, rekeei tũmũũrage nĩguo igai rĩake rĩtuĩke riitũ.’" 
Luke20:15 Magĩkĩmũruta nja ya mũgũnda, makĩmũũraga.” Jesũ agĩkĩũria atĩrĩ, “Mwene mũgũnda ũcio-rĩ, ageeka akombori acio atĩa?" 
Luke20:16 Agooka amoorage, acooke akomborithie andũ angĩ mũgũnda ũcio.” Rĩrĩa andũ maiguire ũguo, makiuga atĩrĩ, “Kũroaga gũtuĩka ũguo!”" 
Luke20:17 Naake Jesũ akĩmarora akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Ũhoro ũyũ wandĩkĩĩtwo atĩ, ‘Ihiga rĩrĩa aaki maaregire nĩrĩo rĩgĩĩte bata gũkĩra marĩa mangĩ moothe mũthingiinĩ, nĩkuuga atĩa?’" 
Luke20:18 Mũndũ o wothe ũgũagĩra ihiga rĩu nĩoinangagwo nĩrĩo, na rĩngĩgũĩra mũndũ, nĩrĩmũhehenjaga.”" 
Luke20:19 Nao arutani a Watho hamwe na athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene makĩgeria kũnyiita Jesũ o hĩndĩ ĩyo tondũ nĩmaamenyire atĩ aaheanire ngerekano ĩyo, nĩ ũndũ wao no magĩĩtigĩra nĩ ũndũ wa andũ." 
Luke20:20 Kwoguo magĩcaria mweke, magĩtũma andũ a gũthigaana ũrĩa eekaga metuĩte andũ athingu, nĩ geetha mamenye ũrĩa oigaga nĩguo mahote kũmũnengerana kũrĩ anene, o na kũrĩ barũũthi." 
Luke20:21 Nao athigaani acio magĩkĩĩra Jesũ atĩrĩ, “Mũrutani, nĩtũũĩ atĩ wee uugaga na ũkarutana ũrĩa kwagĩrĩire ũtegũthuutũkania andũ; nĩ ma wee ũrutanaga o ũhoro wa Ngai." 
Luke20:22 Tagĩtwĩre atĩrĩ, Watho witũ nĩwĩtĩkĩrĩĩtie tũrutagĩre mũthamaki wa Roma igooti kana aaca?”" 
Luke20:23 Naake Jesũ aamenya wara wao akĩmeera atĩrĩ," 
Luke20:24 “Tanyoniai mbeeca ĩmwe. Mbica ĩno ĩ ho na rĩĩtwa rĩĩrĩ rĩ ho nĩ cia ũ?” Nao magĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Nĩ cia mũthamaki wa Roma.”" 
Luke20:25 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Rutagĩraai mũthamaki wa Roma kĩrĩa gĩ gĩake, na Ngai kĩrĩa gĩ gĩake.”" 
Luke20:26 Nao magĩkĩremwo nĩkũnyiita Jesũ na mĩario ĩrĩa aaragia mbere ya mũingĩ, magĩkira magegeetio nĩ ũrĩa aamacookeirie." 
Luke20:27 Na rĩĩrĩ, andũ amwe a Asadukai, arĩa moigaga atĩ andũ arĩa akuũ matikaariũka, magĩũka kũrĩ Jesũ," 
Luke20:28 makĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Mũrutani, Musa aatwandĩkĩire atĩ: ‘Mũndũ angĩhikania acooke akue atige mũtumia atarĩ ciana, mũrũ wa nyina na mũndũ ũcio, no mũhaka ahikie mũtumia ũcio nĩ geetha acookerie mũrũ wa nyina mbeũ.’" 
Luke20:29 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, nĩkwarĩ na aariũ mũgwanja a nyina ũmwe; ũrĩa mũkũrũ akĩhikania, agĩcooka agĩkua atarĩ ciana." 
Luke20:30 Naake wa keerĩ akĩhikia mũtumia ũcio, agĩcooka o naake agĩkua atarĩ ciana." 
Luke20:31 O naake wa gatatũ o taguo, kinya oothe mũgwanja makĩmũhikia nao magĩkua oothe matarĩ ciana." 
Luke20:32 Thuutha ũcio, o naake mũtumia ũcio agĩkua." 
Luke20:33 Rĩu-rĩ, rĩrĩa arĩa akuũ makaariũka-rĩ, mũtumia ũcio agagĩtuĩka wa ũ, tondũ oothe mũgwanja nĩmaamũhikĩĩtie?”" 
Luke20:34 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Andũ a gũũkũ thĩ nĩ o mahikanagia na makahika," 
Luke20:35 no rĩĩrĩ, andũ arĩa magaatuuo aagĩrĩru a kũriũka, matũũre muoyo hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ĩgooka, matikaahikanagia kana mahikage." 
Luke20:36 Andũ acio matigaakuaga tondũ magaakoragwo mahaana ta araika. Andũ acio magaakorwo marĩ ciana cia Ngai tondũ nĩmagaakorwo mariũkĩĩte kuuma kũrĩ gĩkuũ. 
Luke20:37 O naake Musa nĩonanirie ũhoro wa kũriũka kwa akuũ; harĩa harĩ ũhoro wa kĩhinga gĩkĩhĩa eetire Mwathani, ‘Ngai wa Aburahamu, Isaaka, na Jakubu.’" 
Luke20:38 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio, ti Ngai wa arĩa akuũ, nĩ Ngai wa arĩa me muoyo, nĩ ũndũ andũ oothe arĩa marĩ muoyo matũũragio nĩ we.”" 
Luke20:39 Nao arutani amwe a Watho makiuga atĩrĩ, “Mũrutani, nĩwacookia wega!”" 
Luke20:40 Moigire ũguo nĩ ũndũ Asadukai acio matiacookire kũmũũria kĩũria kĩngĩ. 
Luke20:41 Naake Jesũ agĩcooka akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Kwĩragwo atĩ Mesia nĩ Mũrũ wa Daudi nĩ ũndũ wa kĩĩ?" 
Luke20:42 Daudi we mwene nĩoigĩĩte ibukuinĩ rĩa Thaburi atĩrĩ, ‘Mwathani nĩerire Mwathani wakwa atĩrĩ, Ikara thĩ mwena wakwa wa ũrĩo," 
Luke20:43 nginya rĩrĩa ngaatũma ũrangĩrĩrie thũ ciaku.’ 
Luke20:44 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, tondũ Daudi aakĩmwĩtire, ‘Mwathani-rĩ,’ Mesia angĩgĩkorwo arĩ Mũrũ wa Daudi atĩa?”" 
Luke20:45 Naake Jesũ akĩĩra arutwo aake atĩrĩ, andũ oothe makĩiguaga," 
Luke20:46 “Mwĩmenyagĩrĩreei arutani a Watho arĩa meendeete gũthiĩ meekĩrĩĩte nguo ndaaya, kũgeithio na gĩtĩĩo ndũũnyũinĩ, gũikarĩra itĩ cia mbere thunagogiinĩ, na kũheeo handũ ha gĩtĩĩo marugainĩ." 
Luke20:47 Andũ o acio no o matoonyagĩrĩra atumia a ndigwa makaiya indo ciao, o makĩhooyaga mahooya maraaya na ũhinga. Ihera rĩa andũ acio rĩgaakorwo rĩ rĩũru mũno!”" 
Luke21:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, Jesũ nĩacũũthĩrĩirie gũkĩhothwo akĩona itonga igĩĩkĩra mũhothi wacio harĩa haahothagĩrwo." 
Luke21:2 Agĩcooka akĩona mũtumia mũthĩĩni warĩ wa ndigwa akĩhotha tũthendi twĩrĩ. 
Luke21:3 Akiuga atĩrĩ, “Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ mũtumia ũyũ mũthĩĩni wa ndigwa, nĩahotha mbeeca nyingĩ gũkĩra arĩa angĩ oothe." 
Luke21:4 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ, arĩa angĩ oothe mahotha matigari ma ũtonga wao, no mũtumia ũyũ o na e mũthĩĩni, aheana mũthiithũ wake wothe.”" 
Luke21:5 Na rĩĩrĩ, arutwo amwe nĩkwaria maaragia ũhoro wa Hekaarũ, makiugaga ũrĩa yonekaga ĩ thaka nĩ ũrĩa yagemeetio na mahiga ma goro, na iheeo iria andũ maarutĩire Ngai. Naake Jesũ akiuga atĩrĩ," 
Luke21:6 “Nĩmũkuona mĩako ĩno yoth,; hĩndĩ nĩgaakinya rĩrĩa haaha hatagaatigwo ihiga igũrũ wa rĩrĩa rĩngĩ; moothe nĩmakaamomorwo.”" 
Luke21:7 Nao makĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Mũrutani, maũndũ macio mageekĩka rĩ? Ningĩ kĩmenyithia gĩa kuonania atĩ me hakuhĩ gwĩkĩka gĩgaakorwo kĩrĩ kĩĩ?”" 
Luke21:8 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Mwĩmenyagĩrĩreei mũtikaanahĩtithio; nĩ ũndũ andũ aingĩ nĩmagooka makiugaga atĩ maraaria handũinĩ haakwa makoiga atĩrĩ, ‘Nĩ niĩ Kristũ!’ Na ‘Ihinda nĩikinyu!’ Mũtikaanamarũmĩrĩre." 
Luke21:9 Matikaanetigĩre rĩrĩa mũkaigua ũhoro wa mbaara, na ngũĩ, nĩ ũndũ maũndũ macio no mũhaka makaamba kũhinga, no ũguo ti kuuga atĩ ithirĩro rĩ hakuhĩ.”" 
Luke21:10 Agĩthiĩ na mbere akiuga atĩrĩ, “Mabũrũri nĩmagookanĩrĩra na moothamaki mookanĩrĩre." 
Luke21:11 Kũndũ kũingĩ nĩgũkaagĩa na ithingithia nene, ng'aragu, matũhũũhũ kũndũ guothe na nĩgũgaakorwo na maũndũ ma kũmakania na ma kũgegania kuuma igũrũ." 
Luke21:12 No rĩĩrĩ, mbere ya maũndũ macio moothe kuoneka nĩmũkaanyiitwo mũnyariirwo; nĩmũgaathitangwo mũciirithĩrio thunagogiinĩ na mũikio njeera na nĩmũgaatwarwo na hinya mbere ya athamaki na aathani nĩ ũndũ wakwa." 
Luke21:13 Ũcio ũgaakorwo arĩ mweke wanyu wa kũhunjia Ũhoro ũrĩa Mwega. 
Luke21:14 Mũtikaaneetange mũgĩĩciiria o mbere ũrĩa mũgaacookia mũgĩciirithio," 
Luke21:15 nĩ ũndũ, nĩngaamũhe mĩario na ũũgĩ ũrĩa ũtakaahota kũũmĩrĩrio kana gũkarario nĩ mũndũ o na ũmwe wa thũ cianyu." 
Luke21:16 Nĩmũkaanengeranwo o na nĩ aciari aanyu, o na nĩ arĩa mũciaranĩirwo nao, o na nĩ andũ a mbarĩ cianyu, o na nĩ araata aanyu na amwe aanyu nĩmakooragwo." 
Luke21:17 Andũ oothe nĩmakaamũmena nĩ ũndũ wa rĩĩtwa rĩakwa," 
Luke21:18 no gũtirĩ rũcuĩrĩ o na rũmwe rwanyu rwa mũtwe rũkoora. 
Luke21:19 Kũũmĩrĩria kwanyu nĩkuo gũgaatũma mũhonokie mĩoyo yanyu. 
Luke21:20 “Na rĩĩrĩ, rĩrĩa mũkoona Jerusalemu ĩthiũrũrũkĩirio nĩ thigari, hĩndĩ ĩyo mũkaamenya atĩ ihinda rĩayo rĩa kwanangwo rĩ hakuhĩ." 
Luke21:21 Hĩndĩ ĩyo arĩa magaakorwo Judea nĩmakoorĩra irĩmainĩ, na arĩa magaakorwo thĩinĩ wa itũũra moimagare, nao arĩa magaakorwo nja yarĩo matikaanatoonye thĩinĩ wa rĩo." 
Luke21:21 Hĩndĩ ĩyo arĩa magaakorwo Judea nĩmakoorĩra irĩmainĩ, na arĩa magaakorwo thĩinĩ wa itũũra moimagare, nao arĩa magaakorwo nja yarĩo matikaanatoonye thĩinĩ wa rĩo." 
Luke21:22 Nĩ ũndũ matukũ macio nĩ mo magaakorwo me ma kũherithanio nĩ geetha maũndũ moothe marĩa maandĩkĩĩtwo mahinge. 
Luke21:23 Kaĩ atumia arĩa magaakorwo na nda na arĩa magaakorwo makĩongithia hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩmagaakorwo na thĩĩna-ĩ! Nĩ ũndũ gũũkũ thĩ ĩno nĩgũkaagĩa na kĩeha kĩnene, na maraakara ma Ngai nĩmagaakinyĩra andũ aya." 
Luke21:24 Andũ amwe nĩmakooragwo na hiũ, nao arĩa angĩ matahwo matwarwo mabũrũriinĩ moothe; andũ arĩa mateetĩkĩĩtie makaarangĩrĩria Jerusalemu kinya rĩrĩa matukũ maao makaahinga." 
Luke21:25 “Nĩgũkaagĩa na imenyithia riũainĩ, mweriinĩ, na njatainĩ. Nakuo gũũkũ thĩ andũ a mabũrũri moothe nĩmagaathĩĩnĩka, metigĩre mũrurumo wa iria na makũmbĩ ma maaĩ." 
Luke21:26 Nao andũ nĩmakaaringĩka nĩ ũndũ wa gwĩtigĩra, meetereire kuona ũrĩa thĩ yothe ĩkũhaana, nĩ ũndũ moonene moothe ma igũrũ nĩmakeenyenyio." 
Luke21:27 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Mũrũ wa Mũndũ nĩakooneka agĩũka e thĩinĩ wa itu e na hinya na riiri mũingĩ. 
Luke21:28 Rĩrĩa maũndũ macio makaambĩrĩria gwĩkĩka, mũkaambararia mĩtwe yanyu mũrorie maitho na igũrũ, nĩ ũndũ ũhonokio wanyu nĩũgaakorwo ũkuhĩrĩirie.”" 
Luke21:29 Ningĩ Jesũ agĩcooka akĩmeera ngerekano ĩno atĩrĩ, “Tamwĩciiriei ũhoro wa mũtĩ wa mũkũyũ na mĩtĩ ĩrĩa ĩngĩ yothe." 
Luke21:30 Rĩrĩa muona ĩkĩruta mathangũ nĩmũmenyaga atĩ ihinda rĩa ũrugarĩ rĩ hakuhĩ. 
Luke21:31 Ũguo noguo hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũkoona maũndũ macio magĩĩkĩka, mũkaamenya atĩ Ũthamaki wa Ngai wĩ hakuhĩ." 
Luke21:32 “Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma, rũciaro rũũrũ rũtigũthira maũndũ macio moothe matahingĩĩte." 
Luke21:33 Igũrũ na thĩ nĩigaathira, no ciugo ciakwa itigaathira." 
Luke21:34 “Mwĩmenyagĩrĩreei ngoro cianyu itikaanakorwo itahĩĩtwo nĩ ndĩa, ũrĩĩu, na ũhoro wa gwĩtanga nĩ ũndũ wa muoyo ũyũ, naguo mũthenya ũcio ũmũkorerere narua" 
Luke21:35 ta mũtego, nĩ ũndũ ũgooka kũrĩ andũ oothe arĩa maikaraga thĩ yothe." 
Luke21:36 Koragwoi mwĩhaarĩirie hingo ciothe mũkĩhooyaga atĩ mũgĩe na hinya wa kweherera maũndũ macio moothe mageekĩka, na mũkaarũũgama mbere ya Mũrũ wa Mũndũ.”" 
Luke21:37 O mũthenya Jesũ nĩahunjagia Hekaarũinĩ, naguo hwaĩinĩ agathiĩ kũraara kĩrĩmainĩ kĩa Mĩtamaiyũ." 
Luke21:38 Na rĩĩrĩ, o mũthenya, rũũciinĩ tene, andũ oothe nĩmaathiaga Hekaarũinĩ kũmũthikĩrĩria." 
Luke22:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, Thigũkũ ya mĩgate ĩtarĩ mĩĩkĩre ndaawa ya kũimbia, nĩ yo ĩĩtagwo Bathaka, nĩyakuhĩrĩirie." 
Luke22:2 Nao athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene na arutani a Watho nĩmaatuĩragia ũrĩa mangĩũragithia Jesũ na hitho, nĩ ũndũ nĩmeetigagĩra mũingĩ." 
Luke22:3 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Caitaani agĩtoonya thĩinĩ wa Judasi ũrĩa wetagwo Mũisikariota, ũrĩa warĩ ũmwe wa arutwo arĩa ikũmi na eerĩ a Jesũ." 
Luke22:4 Kwoguo Judasi agĩgĩthiĩ akĩrĩĩkanĩra na athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene na anene a arangĩri a Hekaarũ ũrĩa angĩakunyanĩire Jesũ kũrĩ o. 
Luke22:5 Nao magĩgĩkena na makĩiguithanĩria atĩ nĩmekũmũrĩha mbeeca. 
Luke22:6 Judasi nĩetĩkĩrire, na akĩambĩrĩria gũcaria mweke wa gũkunyanĩra Jesũ kũrĩ o rĩrĩa hatarĩ andũ." 
Luke22:7 Naguo mũthenya wa mĩgate ĩtarĩ mĩĩkĩre ndaawa ya kũimbia, na noguo mũthenya ũrĩa tũtũrũme twa kũrĩĩo Bathaka tũthĩnjagwo, ũgĩkinya." 
Luke22:8 Naake Jesũ agĩtũma Petero na Johana, akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Thiĩi mũkahaarĩrie Bathaka tũrĩe.”" 
Luke22:9 Nao makĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Ũkwenda tũkamĩhaarĩrie kũ?”" 
Luke22:10 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Mwatoonya itũũrainĩ nĩmũgũtũngwo nĩ mũndũ ũkuuĩĩte mũtũngi wa maaĩ; mũrũmĩrĩreei kinya nyũmba ĩrĩa arĩtoonya." 
Luke22:11 Mwatoonya thĩinĩ ĩraai mwene nyũmba ĩyo atĩrĩ, ‘Mũrutani egũkũũria atĩrĩ, ĩ ha nyũmba ya ageni ĩrĩa ngũrĩĩra Bathaka na arutwo aakwa?’" 
Luke22:12 Naake mũndũ ũcio nĩekũmuonia nyũmba nene ya igũrũ, ĩ na indo ciothe haarĩrĩriai Bathaka kuo.”" 
Luke22:13 Nao magĩgĩthiĩ, magĩkora o ta ũrĩa Jesũ aameerĩĩte, magĩkĩhaarĩria Bathaka." 
Luke22:14 Narĩo ihinda rĩakinya, Jesũ agĩikara thĩ kũrĩa hamwe na atũmwo aake." 
Luke22:15 Akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Nĩndĩrirĩirie mũno kũrĩanĩra na inyuĩ irio ici cia Bathaka itanathĩĩnio!" 
Luke22:16 Nĩ ũndũ ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ ndigaacooka gũcirĩa kinya rĩrĩa igaakorwo ciagĩrĩĩte biũ Ũthamakiinĩ wa Ngai.” 
Luke22:17 Jesũ agĩcooka akĩoya gĩkombe, na arĩĩkia gũcookeria Ngai ngaatho, akiuga atĩrĩ, “Oyai gĩkombe gĩĩkĩ mũnyuanĩre." 
Luke22:18 Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ, kuuma rĩu ndigaacooka kũnyua ndibei ĩno kinya rĩrĩa Ũthamaki wa Ngai ũgooka.”" 
Luke22:19 Ningĩ akĩoya mũgate, na arĩĩkia gũcookeria Ngai ngaatho akĩwenyũra, akĩmahe akiugaga atĩrĩ, [“Ũyũ nĩ mwĩrĩ wakwa ũrĩa ũheanĩĩtwo nĩ ũndũ wanyu. Ĩkagaai ũũ nĩ geetha mũndirikanage.”" 
Luke22:20 Ningĩ no taguo aamaneire gĩkombe marĩĩkia kũrĩa akiugaga atĩrĩ, “Gĩkombe gĩĩkĩ nĩ kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩerũ gĩthondekeetwo na thakame yakwa, ĩrĩa ĩgũitwo nĩ ũndũ wanyu.]" 
Luke22:21 “No rĩĩrĩ, mũndũ ũrĩa ũkũngunyanĩra e hamwe na niĩ meethainĩ ĩno!" 
Luke22:22 Mũrũ wa Mũndũ nĩegũkua o ta ũrĩa Ngai atuĩte, no mũndũ ũcio ũkũmũkunyanĩra kaĩ e thĩĩnainĩ-ĩ!”" 
Luke22:23 Nao arutwo makĩambĩrĩria kũũrania o eene nũũ gatagatĩinĩ kaao ũngĩekire ũguo. 
Luke22:24 Na rĩĩrĩ, nĩhaagĩire ngarari gatagatĩinĩ ka arutwo makĩũrania nũũ ũngĩatuirwo mũnene wao." 
Luke22:25 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Athamaki a andũ arĩa mateetĩkĩĩtie nĩmakoragwo na wathani igũrũ rĩao, na aathani acio nĩmeĩĩtaga, ‘Araata a andũ.’" 
Luke22:26 No ũguo tiguo inyuĩ mũhaana; rekeei ũrĩa mũnene gatagatĩinĩ kaanyu atuĩke ta arĩ we mũnyiinyi, na ũrĩa ũratongoria atuĩke wa kũmũtungatĩra." 
Luke22:27 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, mũndũ ũrĩa ũikaraga meethainĩ areeherwo irio, na ũrĩa ũreehage irio icio, nĩ ũrĩkũ mũnene? Na githĩ ti ũrĩa ũikaraga meethainĩ areeherwo irio? No niĩ-rĩ, ndũũranagia na inyuĩ haana ta arĩ niĩ ndĩmũtungatagĩra." 
Luke22:28 “Inyuĩ nĩmũkoreetwo hamwe na niĩ magerioinĩ maakwa; 
Luke22:29 Kwoguo, o ta ũrĩa Awa aaheire wathani, o na niĩ nĩndamũhe wathani," 
Luke22:30 nĩ geetha mũkaarĩa na mũnyue meethainĩ yakwa Ũthamakiinĩ wakwa, na mũgaikarĩra itĩ cia Ũthamaki, mwathe mĩhĩrĩga ĩrĩa ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ ya Isiraeli.”" 
Luke22:31 Naake Jesũ akiuga atĩrĩ, “Simoni, Simoni! Tathikĩrĩria! Caitaani nĩahoeete rũũtha mũneanwo inyuothe kũrĩ we nĩguo amũcunge o ta ũrĩa ngano icungagwo nĩ mũrĩmi." 
Luke22:32 No wee nĩngũhoeire wĩtĩkio waku ndũgaathire, na warĩĩkia kũnjookerera, ũũmagĩrĩrie aariũ a Thooguo.”" 
Luke22:33 No Petero akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Mwathani, niĩ nĩndĩharĩirie gũthiĩ nawe njeera o na gũkuanĩra nawe!”" 
Luke22:34 Naake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ngũkwĩra na ma atĩ, ũtukũ wa ũũmũũthĩ ngũkũ ndĩkũga ũtangaanĩĩte gatatũ atĩ ndũnjũũĩ.”" 
Luke22:35 Ningĩ Jesũ akĩũria arutwo aake atĩrĩ, “Rĩrĩa ndamũtũmire mũtarĩ na tũbeeti, kana mondo, kana iraatũ-rĩ, he kĩndũ mwagire?” Nao magĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Aaca.”" 
Luke22:36 Jesũ agĩcooka akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Rĩu-rĩ, ũrĩa wĩ na kabeeti kana mondo nĩakuue, na mũndũ ũrĩa ũtarĩ na rũhiũ nĩendie nguo yake arũgũre." 
Luke22:37 Nĩ ũndũ ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ, ũhoro ũrĩa wandĩkĩĩtwo atĩ, ‘Nĩatuĩrĩirwo ũndũ ũmwe na andũ arĩa eehia,’ no mũhaka ũhinge harĩ niĩ, nĩ gũkorwo maũndũ marĩa maandĩkĩĩtwo igũrũ rĩakwa nĩ hĩndĩ marahinga.”" 
Luke22:38 Nao arutwo makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Mwathani, tarora; haaha he na hiũ igĩrĩ!” Naake akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Nĩ njiganu!”" 
Luke22:39 Naake Jesũ akiuma itũũrainĩ rĩu, agĩthiĩ kĩrĩmainĩ kĩa Mĩtamaiyũ o ta ũrĩa aamenyereete, nao arutwo aake makĩmũrũmĩrĩra." 
Luke22:40 Akinya ho akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Hooyai nĩguo mũtikagũe magerioinĩ.”" 
Luke22:41 Agĩcooka akĩmeeherera agĩthiĩ o ta itĩĩna rĩa harĩa mũndũ angĩikia ihiga, agĩturia ndu akĩhooya" 
Luke22:42 atĩrĩ, “Awa, angĩkorwo nĩũkwenda, njehereria gĩkombe gĩĩkĩ kĩa mĩnyamaaro, no ti ũrĩa niĩ mwene ngwenda; wendi waku ũroekĩka” [" 
Luke22:43 Na o hĩndĩ ĩyo mũraika akĩmuumĩrĩra kuuma igũrũ, akĩmũũmĩrĩria." 
Luke22:44 Naake Jesũ akĩhooya mũno makĩria e na ruwo rũnene. Thithino yake yataataga thĩ ĩhaana ta mataata manene ma thakame.] 
Luke22:45 Rĩrĩa Jesũ aarĩĩkirie kũhooya, akĩrũũgama na igũrũ, agĩcooka harĩa aatigĩĩte arutwo aake, agĩkora makomeete nĩ ũrĩa moorĩĩtwo nĩ hinya nĩ ũndũ wa kĩeha." 
Luke22:46 Agĩkĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Mũkomeete nĩkĩ? Ũkĩraai mũhooe nĩguo mũtikagũe magerioinĩ.”" 
Luke22:47 Na rĩĩrĩ, o Jesũ akĩaragia hagĩũka gĩkundi kĩa andũ gĩtongoreetio nĩ Judasi, ũmwe wa arutwo arĩa ikũmi na eerĩ, naake agĩgĩkuhĩrĩria Jesũ nĩguo amũmumunye." 
Luke22:48 No Jesũ akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Judasi, ũgũkunyanĩra Mũrũ wa Mũndũ na ũndũ wa kũmũmumunya?”" 
Luke22:49 Rĩrĩa arutwo arĩa maarĩ na Jesũ moonire ũrĩa kwerekeire gwĩkĩka makĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Mwathani, tũmatemenge na hiũ?”" 
Luke22:50 Naake ũmwe wao agĩtema ngombo ya Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai Ũrĩa Mũnene, akĩmĩtinia gũtũ kwa ũrĩo." 
Luke22:51 No Jesũ akiuga atĩrĩ, “Tigĩraai hau!” Agĩcooka akĩhuutia gũtũ kwa ngombo ĩyo, agĩkũhonia." 
Luke22:52 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ akĩũria athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene na arangĩri a Hekaarũ na athuuri arĩa mookĩĩte kũmũnyiita atĩrĩ, “Kaĩ ndĩ mũici tondũ mwoka na hiũ na njũgũma kũũnyiita?" 
Luke22:53 Ndĩratũũraga na inyuĩ na mũtirĩ mwageria kũũnyiita. No rĩĩrĩ, nĩ ihinda rĩanyu, o hĩndĩ ĩno hinya wa nduma ũrathana.”" 
Luke22:54 Nao magĩkĩnyiita Jesũ makĩmũtwara kwa Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai Ũrĩa Mũnene, naake Petero akĩmũrũmĩrĩra arĩ o haraaya." 
Luke22:55 Na rĩĩrĩ, rĩrĩa maakirie mwaki nja gatagatĩ magĩikara thĩ hamwe, Petero agĩikara hamwe nao." 
Luke22:56 Nayo ndungata ĩmwe ya mũirĩĩtu ikĩmuona aikarĩĩte hau mwakiinĩ ĩkĩmũkũũrĩra maitho ĩkiuga atĩrĩ, “O naake mũndũ ũyũ oima hamwe na Jesũ!”" 
Luke22:57 Naake Petero agĩkaana akiuga atĩrĩ, “Mũtumia ũyũ, mũndũ ũcio o na ndimũũĩ!”" 
Luke22:58 Ihinda iniini rĩathira mũndũ ũngĩ akĩona Petero akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “O nawe wĩ ũmwe wao!” Naake Petero agĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Mũndũ mũrũme ũyũ, niĩ ndirĩ ũmwe wao!”" 
Luke22:59 Thuutha wa ithaa rĩmwe, mũndũ ũngĩ akiuga agwatĩirie atĩrĩ, “Ti itherũ mũndũ ũyũ oima naake; nĩ ũndũ o naake nĩ Mũũgalili!”" 
Luke22:60 No Petero akiuga atĩrĩ, “Mũndũ mũrũme ũyũ, niĩ ndiũĩ ũrĩa ũroiga!” Na rĩĩrĩ, ihinda o rĩu aaragia, ngũkũ ĩgĩkũga." 
Luke22:61 Naake Mwathani akĩhũgũka, akĩrora Petero, naake Petero akĩririkana ciugo iria eerĩĩtwo nĩ Mwathani atĩrĩ, “Ũtukũ wa ũũmũũthĩ ngũkũ ĩtaanakũga nĩũrĩngaana gatatũ.”" 
Luke22:62 Naake Petero akiuma nja akĩrĩra e na ruwo rũingĩ. 
Luke22:63 Nao andũ arĩa maarangĩrĩĩte Jesũ makĩmũnyũrũria na makĩmũhũũra. 
Luke22:64 Magĩcooka makĩmuoha maitho na gĩtambaya makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ragũra uuge nũũ wakũgũtha!”" 
Luke22:65 Magĩcooka makĩaria ciugo ingĩ nyingĩ cia kũmũruma. 
Luke22:66 Kwarooka gũkĩa, atongoria a thunagogi na athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene na arutani a Watho magĩcemania, naake Jesũ akĩreehwo mbere yao." 
Luke22:67 Makĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Tatwĩre kana wee nĩ we Mesia?” Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Ingĩmwĩra, mũtingĩĩtĩkia," 
Luke22:68 na ingĩmũũria mũtingĩcookia. 
Luke22:69 Kuuma rĩu Mũrũ wa Mũndũ arĩkoragwo aikarĩĩte mwena wa ũrĩo wa Ngai Mwene Hinya Wothe.” 
Luke22:70 Nao oothe makĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Wee ũkĩrĩ Mũrũ wa Ngai?” Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Nĩ inyuĩ mwoiga atĩ nĩ niĩ we.”" 
Luke22:71 Magĩkĩũrania atĩrĩ, “Nĩ ũira ũrĩkũ ũngĩ tũgũkĩenda? Nĩtweiguĩra kuuma kanua gaake!”" 
Luke23:1 O hĩndĩ ĩyo acio oothe arĩa moonganĩĩte magĩũkĩra, magĩtwara Jesũ kwĩ Pilato." 
Luke23:2 Magĩkĩambĩrĩria kũmũthitanga makiuga atĩrĩ, “Tũranyiitire mũndũ ũyũ akĩhĩtithia andũ a bũrũri witũ akĩmeeraga atĩ matikaarutagĩre mũthamaki wa Roma mbeeca cia igooti, na akoiga atĩ nĩ we Mesia, na nĩ mũthamaki.”" 
Luke23:3 Naake Pilato agĩkĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Nĩ we mũthamaki wa Ayahudi?” Naake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Nĩ we woiga ũguo.”" 
Luke23:4 Naake Pilato akĩĩra athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene na mũingĩ atĩrĩ, “Niĩ ndirona ũndũ o na ũmwe mũũru ũrĩa mũndũ ũyũ eekĩĩte.”" 
Luke23:5 No o makĩĩrutanĩria magwatĩirie makiuga atĩrĩ, “Nĩatũmĩĩte andũ oothe, kuuma Galili nginya Judea guothe o hamwe na gũũkũ, mookanĩrĩre nĩ ũndũ wa ũrutani wake.”" 
Luke23:5 No o makĩĩrutanĩria magwatĩirie makiuga atĩrĩ, “Nĩatũmĩĩte andũ oothe, kuuma Galili nginya Judea guothe o hamwe na gũũkũ, mookanĩrĩre nĩ ũndũ wa ũrutani wake.”" 
Luke23:6 Rĩrĩa Pilato aiguire ũguo akĩũria atĩrĩ, “Mũndũ ũyũ nĩ Mũũgalili?”" 
Luke23:7 Arĩĩkia kũmenya atĩ Jesũ oimĩĩte bũrũri ũrĩa Herode aathanaga, akiuga atwarwo Jerusalemu kũrĩa Herode aarĩ hĩndĩ ĩyo." 
Luke23:8 Rĩrĩa Herode oonire Jesũ, nĩakenire mũno tondũ nĩaiguĩte ũhoro wake, na nĩatũire eriragĩria kũmuona, arĩ na mwĩhoko wa kuona akĩringa ciama." 
Luke23:9 Herode agĩkĩũria Jesũ ciũria nyingĩ, no we ndamũcookeirie." 
Luke23:10 Nao athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene na arutani a Watho makĩrũũgama makĩmũthitanga na hinya mũno. 
Luke23:11 Naake Herode na thigari ciake makĩmũmenereria, na makĩmũnyũrũria; magĩcooka makĩmũhumba nguo yarĩ njega, makĩmũcookia kwĩ Pilato." 
Luke23:12 Mũthenya o ro ũcio Herode na Pilato makĩgĩa ndũgũ nĩ ũndũ maatũire marĩ thũ. 
Luke23:13 Naake Pilato agĩĩta athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene na aathani na mũingĩ," 
Luke23:14 akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Mũndeheire mũndũ ũyũ mwanjĩĩra atĩ nĩarahĩtithagia andũ. Rĩu nĩndamũciirithia mwĩ ho, na ndinoona mahĩtia o na mamwe ma macio mũramũthitangĩra." 
Luke23:15 O naake Herode ndanoona mahĩtia maake, tondũ nĩamũcookia kũrĩ ithuĩ. Mũndũ ũyũ ndarĩ ũndũ eekĩĩte wa gũtũma ooragwo." 
Luke23:16 Kwoguo ngũmũhũũrithia iboko, njooke ndĩmũrekererie.” [" 
Luke23:17 O hĩndĩ ya Thigũkũ ya Bathaka Pilato nĩamoohoragĩra muohwo ũmwe.] 
Luke23:18 No rĩĩrĩ, mũingĩ ũkĩanĩrĩra wĩ wothe ũkiuga atĩrĩ, “Mũndũ ũcio nĩoragwo! Tuohorere Baraba!”" 
Luke23:19 (Baraba ooheetwo nĩ ũndũ wa ngũĩ aarutithĩĩtie itũũrainĩ, o na kũũragana.)" 
Luke23:20 Naake Pilato agĩkĩarĩria mũingĩ o rĩngĩ, tondũ nĩendaga kũrekereria Jesũ." 
Luke23:21 No mũingĩ ũkĩanĩrĩra ũkiuga atĩrĩ, “Mwambe! Mwambe!”" 
Luke23:22 Ningĩ Pilato akĩwarĩria riita rĩa gatatũ akĩũria atĩrĩ, “Nĩ ũũru ũrĩkũ mũndũ ũyũ eekĩĩte? Niĩ ndirĩ ũndũ o na ũmwe mũũru ndĩrona eekĩĩte wa gũtũma ooragwo! Kwoguo ngũmũhũũrithia iboko njooke ndĩmũrekererie.”" 
Luke23:23 No mũingĩ ũgĩthiĩ na mbere kwanĩrĩra mũno makĩria atĩ Jesũ aambwo na mũthiainĩ kwanĩrĩra kwaguo gũkĩhootana. 
Luke23:24 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Pilato agĩtuĩra Jesũ kũringana na wendi waguo. 
Luke23:25 Agĩkĩwohorera mũndũ ũrĩa wendaga, ũrĩa woheetwo nĩ ũndũ wa kũruta ngũĩ itũũrainĩ, na kũũragana, agĩcooka akĩneana Jesũ eekwo o ta ũrĩa wendaga." 
Luke23:26 Na rĩĩrĩ, rĩrĩa thigari ciamuumagaragia nĩciacemanirie na mũndũ woimaga na mũgũndainĩ wetagwo Simoni woimĩĩte itũũrainĩ rĩa Kurene. Nacio ikĩmũnyiita, ikĩmũigĩrĩra mũtharaba akuue arũmĩrĩre Jesũ." 
Luke23:27 Nĩarũmĩrĩirwo nĩ andũ aingĩ mũno. Amwe aao maarĩ atumia maagirĩkaga na makarĩra maanĩrĩire nĩ ũndũ wake. 
Luke23:28 Naake Jesũ akĩĩhũgũra na kũrĩ o akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Atumia aya a Jerusalemu, tigaai kũndĩrĩra, no rĩraai nĩ ũndũ wanyu na ciana cianyu." 
Luke23:29 Nĩ ũndũ ihinda nĩrĩrooka rĩrĩa andũ mariuga atĩrĩ, ‘Kaĩ atumia arĩa thaata, arĩa matarĩ maaciara, o arĩa nyondo ciao itarĩ ciongwo nĩaraathime-ĩ!’" 
Luke23:30 Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩguo andũ makeera irĩma atĩrĩ, ‘Tũgũĩreei!’ Na meere ithũngũri atĩrĩ, ‘Tũhitheei!’" 
Luke23:31 Nĩ ũndũ angĩkorwo maũndũ ta maya mareekwo mĩtĩ ĩ mĩruru-rĩ, yoma gũgaagĩĩkwo atĩa?”" 
Luke23:32 Na rĩĩrĩ, andũ eerĩ maarĩ aici nĩmaatwarirwo makooraganĩrio hamwe na Jesũ." 
Luke23:33 Rĩrĩa thigari icio ciakinyire handũ heetagwo, “Ihĩndĩ rĩa Mũtwe,” ikĩmwamba ho hamwe na aici eerĩ, ũmwe mwena wake wa ũrĩo, na ũrĩa ũngĩ mwena wa ũmotho." 
Luke23:34 Naake Jesũ akiuga atĩrĩ, “Awa moohere tondũ matiũĩ ũrĩa mareeka.” Thigari icio igĩcooka igĩcuukĩra nguo ciake mĩtĩ, igĩcigayana." 
Luke23:35 Nao andũ makĩrũũgama ho makĩĩrorera. Nao atongoria a Ayahudi makĩnyũrũria Jesũ makiugaga atĩrĩ, “Nĩarahonokagia andũ arĩa angĩ; nĩakĩĩhonokie angĩkorwo nĩ we Mesia ũrĩa mũthuure wa Ngai!”" 
Luke23:36 O nacio thigari nĩciamũnyũrũririe; ciathiire harĩ we kũmũhe thiki," 
Luke23:37 ikĩmwĩraga atĩrĩ, “Angĩkorwo nĩwe mũthamaki wa Ayahudi-rĩ, wĩhonokie!”" 
Luke23:38 Na rĩĩrĩ, hau igũrũ wa mũtharaba ũrĩa Jesũ aambĩĩtwo nĩhaandĩkirwo ũndũ ũrĩa aathitangĩirwo atĩrĩ, “Ũyũ nĩ we Mũthamaki wa Ayahudi.”" 
Luke23:39 Naake ũmwe wa aici acio maambanĩirio naake akĩmũruma atĩrĩ, “Na githĩ ti we Mesia? Kĩĩhonokie na ũtũhonokie!”" 
Luke23:40 No ũcio ũngĩ akĩmũkũũma akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Kaĩ ũtetigĩrĩĩte Ngai? Ũtuĩrĩirwo ũndũ ũmwe na ũrĩa atuĩrĩirwo." 
Luke23:41 Ithuĩ-rĩ, tũtuĩrĩirwo ũrĩa kwagĩrĩire tondũ tũtuĩrĩirwo kũringana na ciĩko ciitũ, no mũndũ ũyũ ndarĩ na ũndũ mũũru eekĩĩte.”" 
Luke23:42 Mũici ũcio agĩcooka akĩĩra Jesũ, atĩrĩ, “Jesũ ndirikana wakinya Ũthamakiinĩ waku.”" 
Luke23:43 Naake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ngũkwĩrĩra na ma atĩ, ũũmũũthĩ ũrĩkorwo na niĩ Ikenero.”" 
Luke23:44 Na rĩĩrĩ, thaa thita ũtheri wa riũa ũkĩhumbĩrwo, naguo bũrũri wothe ũkĩgĩa nduma kinya thaa kenda," 
Luke23:45 nakĩo gĩtambaya kĩa Hekaarũ gĩgĩatũkana maita meerĩ. 
Luke23:46 Naake Jesũ akĩgũũthũka na mũgambo mũnene akiuga atĩrĩ, “Awa! Roho wakwa ndaũiga mookoinĩ maaku!” Na arĩĩkia kuuga ũguo, agĩtuĩkana." 
Luke23:47 Naake mũnene wa thigari igana oona ũrĩa gwekĩka, akĩgooca Ngai akiuga atĩrĩ, “Ti itheru mũndũ ũyũ araarĩ mũthingu!”" 
Luke23:48 Rĩrĩa andũ oothe arĩa moonganĩĩte hau kwĩrorera moonire ũrĩa gwekĩka, makĩinũka methikĩire nĩ ũndũ wa kĩeha." 
Luke23:49 Nao andũ oothe arĩa maamũũĩ, o hamwe na atumia arĩa maamũrũmĩrĩire kuuma Galili, makĩrũũgama o haraaya merorere maũndũ macio." 
Luke23:50 Na rĩĩrĩ, thĩinĩ wa itũũra rĩa Arimathea, bũrũriinĩ wa Judea, nĩkwarĩ mũndũ ũmwe wetagwo Josefu. Mũndũ ũcio aarĩ mwega na mũthingu, na aarĩ wa gĩkundi kĩa Ayahudi kĩrĩa gĩathanaga." 
Luke23:50 Na rĩĩrĩ, thĩinĩ wa itũũra rĩa Arimathea, bũrũriinĩ wa Judea, nĩkwarĩ mũndũ ũmwe wetagwo Josefu. Mũndũ ũcio aarĩ mwega na mũthingu, na aarĩ wa gĩkundi kĩa Ayahudi kĩrĩa gĩathanaga." 
Luke23:51 We ndaiguithanĩirie nao ũhoroinĩ wa gũtuĩra Jesũ, o na gĩĩko kĩao gĩa kũmwamba. We nĩatũũraga eetereire Ũthamaki wa Ngai." 
Luke23:52 Naake agĩgĩthiĩ kũrĩ Pilato akĩũria aheeo mwĩrĩ wa Jesũ. 
Luke23:53 Agĩkĩruta mwĩrĩ ũcio kuuma mũtharaba igũrũ, akĩwoha na cuka, agĩthiĩ akĩũiga thĩinĩ wa mbĩĩrĩra yenjeetwo rwaroinĩ rwa ihiga, nayo mbĩĩrĩra ĩyo ndĩakoreetwo ĩigĩĩtwo mwĩrĩ ũngĩ o na ũmwe." 
Luke23:54 Kwarĩ mũthenya wa Jumaa, naguo mũthenya wa Thabatũ warĩ hakuhĩ kwambĩrĩria." 
Luke23:55 Nao atumia arĩa moimĩĩte na Jesũ Galili makĩrũmĩrĩra Josefu, magĩkĩona mbĩĩrĩra na ũrĩa mwĩrĩ wa Jesũ waigirwo ho." 
Luke23:56 Magĩcooka makĩinũka magĩthiĩ magĩthondeka indo nungi wega na maguta manungi wega ma kũhaka mwĩrĩ. Mũthenya wa Thabatũ magĩkĩhuurũka, kũringana na Watho." 
Luke24:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, mũthenya wa Kiumia rũũciinĩ tene mũno, atumia acio magĩthiĩ mbĩĩrĩrainĩ makuuĩĩte indo iria nungi wega iria maathondekeete." 
Luke24:2 Nao magĩkora ihiga rĩrĩa rĩahingĩĩte mbĩĩrĩra rĩgaragarĩĩtio rĩgathengio. 
Luke24:3 Rĩrĩa maatoonyire thĩinĩ, matiakorire mwĩrĩ wa Mwathani Jesũ." 
Luke24:4 Na rĩĩrĩ, marũũgamĩĩte hau magegeete nĩ ũndũ wa ũhoro ũcio, makiumĩrĩrwo nĩ arũme eerĩ, meekĩrĩĩte nguo ciakengaga mũno, makĩrũũgama hakuhĩ nao." 
Luke24:5 Nao atumia acio magĩĩtigĩra mũno, makĩinamĩrĩra makĩhitha moothiũ maao. Nao arũme acio makĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Nĩ kĩĩ kĩratũma mũcarie mũndũ wĩ muoyo gatagatĩinĩ ka arĩa akuũ?" 
Luke24:6 Ndarĩ haaha nĩariũkĩĩte. Taririkanaai ũrĩa aamwĩrire rĩrĩa aarĩ Galili atĩ: 
Luke24:7 ‘Mũrũ wa Mũndũ no mũhaka anengeranwo kũrĩ andũ eehia, aambwo, na mũthenya wa gatatũ nĩakaariũka.’ ”" 
Luke24:8 Hĩndĩ ĩyo atumia acio makĩririkana ciugo ciake," 
Luke24:9 makiuma hau mbĩĩrĩrainĩ, magĩthiĩ makĩĩra arutwo arĩa ikũmi na ũmwe na andũ arĩa angĩ oothe maũndũ macio moothe." 
Luke24:10 Atumia acio maarĩ: Mariamu Mũmagidali, Joana, Mariamu nyina wa Jakubu; o hamwe na atumia angĩ arĩa maarĩ nao; acio nĩ o meerire atũmwo ũhoro ũcio." 
Luke24:11 No rĩĩrĩ, atũmwo matiigana kũmeetĩkia; maiguaga ũrĩa moigaga ta arĩ o ng'ano. [" 
Luke24:12 No Petero agĩũkĩra agĩteng'era mbĩĩrĩrainĩ, akĩinamĩrĩra akĩona cuka ũrĩa woheete Jesũ, no gũtiarĩ kĩndũ kĩngĩ. Agĩgĩcooka mũciĩ agegeete nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa gwekĩkĩĩte.]" 
Luke24:13 Na rĩĩrĩ, mũthenya o ro ũcio, arutwo eerĩ a Jesũ maarĩ njĩrainĩ magĩthiĩ itũũra rĩa Emau, ta kiromita ikũmi na ĩmwe kuuma Jerusalemu." 
Luke24:14 Nao maathiaga makĩaragia ũhoro wa maũndũ marĩa meekĩkĩĩte. 
Luke24:15 O magĩthiaga makĩaragia na magĩteeretaga, Jesũ agĩũka agĩtwarana nao;" 
Luke24:16 nĩmaamuonire, no matiamũmenyire." 
Luke24:17 Naake Jesũ akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Nĩ ũhoro ũrĩkũ mũrathiĩ mũkĩaragia?” Nao arutwo acio makĩrũũgama me na kĩeha mũno," 
Luke24:18 ũmwe wao wetagwo Kileopa akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Wee kaĩ arĩ o we wiki mũgeni itũũrainĩ rĩa Jerusalemu ũtooĩ maũndũ marĩa meekĩkĩĩte kuo matukũinĩ maya?”" 
Luke24:19 Naake akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Maũndũ marĩkũ?” Nao makĩmũcookeria makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Maũndũ marĩa meekĩkĩĩte kũrĩ Jesũ wa Nazarethi. Mũndũ ũcio araarĩ mũnabii, ũronagwo nĩ Ngai o hamwe na andũ oothe e na hinya maũndũinĩ moothe marĩa aroigaga na areekaga." 
Luke24:20 Athĩnjĩri Ngai aitũ arĩa anene na aathani maramũnengeranire atuĩrwo kũũragwo, na maramwambithia." 
Luke24:21 Ithuĩ-rĩ, tũrehokeete atĩ ũcio nĩ we ũgũkũũra andũ a Isiraeli. Hamwe na macio moothe-rĩ, ũyũ nĩ mũthenya wa gatatũ kuuma rĩrĩa maũndũ macio meekĩkire." 
Luke24:22 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, atumia amwe a gĩkundi giitũ nĩmatũmakirie tondũ nĩmekũrookeete mbĩĩrĩrainĩ," 
Luke24:23 no matinoona mwĩrĩ wake. Mookire matwĩra atĩ nĩmoimĩrĩirwo nĩ araika mameera atĩ e muoyo. 
Luke24:24 Andũ amwe arĩa tuuma nao nĩmaathiire hau mbĩĩrĩrainĩ, mamĩkora o ta ũguo atumia acio mekuugĩĩte, no matiinamuona.”" 
Luke24:25 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Inyuĩ andũ aya mwagĩĩte ũmenyo mũtahiũhaga gwĩtĩkia maũndũ moothe marĩa maaririo nĩ anabii!" 
Luke24:26 Githĩ gũtiragĩrĩire Mesia aherithio ũguo acooke athiĩ harĩa he na riiri wake?” 
Luke24:27 Jesũ agĩcooka akĩmaiguithia ũhoro ũrĩa warĩĩtio ũmũkoniĩ mabukuinĩ moothe, aambĩrĩirie na mabuku marĩa maandĩkirwo nĩ Musa kinya marĩa maandĩkirwo nĩ anabii oothe." 
Luke24:28 Na rĩĩrĩ, maakinya hakuhĩ kũrĩa maathiaga, Jesũ agĩĩtua ta aathiaga na kũu mbere," 
Luke24:29 no o makĩmũthaitha makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ikara na ithuĩ, nĩkũratuka na nduma nĩrooka.” Kwoguo agĩthiĩ gũikara nao." 
Luke24:30 Na rĩĩrĩ, rĩrĩa aikarire thĩ kũrĩa irio hamwe nao, akĩoya mũgate, agĩcookeria Ngai ngaatho, agĩcooka akĩwenyũra akĩmahe." 
Luke24:31 Hĩndĩ o ĩyo maitho maao makĩhingũrwo, makĩmũmenya, no we agĩthiĩ makĩaga kũmuona rĩngĩ." 
Luke24:32 Nao andũ acio makĩĩrana atĩrĩ, “Githĩ ngoro ciitũ itikũhĩahĩyaga rĩrĩa egũtwaragĩria twĩ njĩrainĩ na rĩrĩa egũtũtaaragĩria Maandĩko?”" 
Luke24:33 Magĩũkĩra o hĩndĩ ĩyo magĩcooka Jerusalemu, magĩkora arutwo arĩa ikũmi na ũmwe hamwe na arĩa angĩ maarĩ nao moonganĩĩte" 
Luke24:34 makiugaga atĩrĩ, “Ti itherũ Mwathani nĩariũkĩĩte! Nĩeyonanĩĩtie kũrĩ Simoni!”" 
Luke24:35 Nao andũ acio eerĩ makĩheana ũrĩa gwekĩkĩĩte njĩrainĩ, na ũrĩa mamenyire Mwathani rĩrĩa enyũrire mũgate." 
Luke24:36 O hĩndĩ ĩyo maateeretaga ũhoro ũcio, Jesũ we mwene agĩũka akĩrũũgama gatagatĩinĩ kaao akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Thaayũ ũrogĩa na inyuĩ.”" 
Luke24:37 Nao makĩmaka mũno, tondũ meeciiragia atĩ nĩ ngoma moonaga." 
Luke24:38 Naake akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Mwamaka nĩkĩ? Nĩ kĩĩ gĩtũmĩĩte mũgĩe na nganja icio mwĩ nacio?" 
Luke24:39 Taroraai mooko maakwa na magũrũ muone atĩ nĩ niĩ. Huutiai mwĩtĩkie nĩ ũndũ ngoma ndĩrĩ mwĩrĩ na mahĩndĩ ta ũrĩa mũrona ndĩ nacio.” 
Luke24:40 [Na rĩĩrĩ, arĩĩkia kuuga ũguo akĩmoonia mooko maake na magũrũ.]" 
Luke24:41 No o matiigana kũmwĩtĩkia nĩ ũrĩa maakeneete na makagega. Naake agĩkĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Mwĩ na kĩndũ gĩa kũrĩa gũũkũ?”" 
Luke24:42 Nao makĩmũnengera gĩcunjĩ gĩa thamaki gĩ kĩruge," 
Luke24:43 naake agĩkĩrĩa makĩonaga. 
Luke24:44 Agĩcooka akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Maũndũ maya nĩmo ndĩramũheaga ũhoro wamo rĩrĩa ndĩratũũranagia na inyuĩ: maũndũ moothe mangoniĩ marĩa maandĩkĩĩtwo Wathoinĩ wa Musa, na Maandĩkoinĩ ma anabii, na thĩinĩ wa Thaburi no mũhaka mangĩrahingire.”" 
Luke24:45 O hĩndĩ ĩyo akĩhingũra meciiria maao nĩguo mamenye Maandĩko. 
Luke24:46 Agĩkĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Ũhoro ũrĩa wandĩkĩĩtwo nĩ ũyũ; Mesia no mũhaka aherithio na no mũhaka ariũke kuuma kũrĩ gĩkuũ mũthenya wa gatatũ." 
Luke24:47 Ningĩ no mũhaka ũhoro wa kwĩrira na kuoherwo meehia ũhunjĩrio andũ a ndũũrĩrĩ thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩake, wambĩrĩirie Jerusalemu." 
Luke24:48 Inyuĩ mũrĩ aira a maũndũ macio. 
Luke24:49 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, nĩngũmũtũmĩra kĩrĩa Awa eeranĩire. No rĩĩrĩ, no mũhaka mweterere o gũũkũ itũũrainĩ kinya rĩrĩa hinya wa Ngai ũgooka kũrĩ inyuĩ kuuma igũrũ.”" 
Luke24:50 Agĩcooka akĩmatongoria kuuma kũu itũũrainĩ, akĩmatwara Bethania akĩoya mooko maake na igũrũ, akĩmaraathima." 
Luke24:51 Na rĩĩrĩ, o akĩmaraathimaga akĩoywo akĩambatio igũrũ." 
Luke24:52 Nao makĩmũthaathaiya; magĩcooka Jerusalemu makeneete mũno," 
Luke24:53 magaikaraga Hekaarũinĩ mahinda moothe makĩgoocaga Ngai. 
John1:1 Kĩambĩrĩriainĩ Kiugo aarĩ o kuo, na aatũire harĩ Ngai, naake aarĩ o Ngai." 
John1:2 Kuuma o kĩambĩrĩriainĩ ũcio Kiugo harĩ Ngai. 
John1:3 Indo ciothe ciombirwo nĩ Ngai agereire harĩ we, na gũtirĩ o na kĩmwe kĩombirwo we atarĩ ho." 
John1:4 Thĩinĩ wake nĩkwarĩ muoyo, naguo muoyo ũcio nĩguo warĩ ũtheri wa andũ." 
John1:5 Naguo ũtheri nĩwaraga ndumainĩ, nayo nduma ndĩrĩ yaũhoota." 
John1:6 Na rĩĩrĩ, nĩgwokire mũndũ watũmĩĩtwo nĩ Ngai wetagwo Johana." 
John1:7 We ookire nĩ ũndũ wa ũira, nĩ geetha arute ũira igũrũ rĩa ũtheri nĩguo andũ oothe meetĩkie." 
John1:8 We ti we warĩ ũtheri, no ookire nĩ geetha arute ũira igũrũ rĩa ũtheri ũcio." 
John1:9 Ũtheri ũrĩa wa ma ũrĩa ũũkaga thĩ kũmũrĩkĩra andũ oothe. 
John1:10 We ũcio Kiugo aarĩ gũũkũ thĩ, na Ngai oombire thĩ na ũndũ wake, no andũ a thĩ matiigana kũmũmenya." 
John1:11 Ookire gwake mwene, nao andũ aake mwene makĩrega kũmwamũkĩra." 
John1:12 No arĩa oothe maamwamũkĩrire na makĩmwĩtĩkia, nĩamahotithirie gũtuĩka ciana cia Ngai." 
John1:13 Ciana icio itiaciarirwo na njĩra ya ndũire kana igĩciarwo nĩkwenda kwa mwĩrĩ, kana kwenda kwa mũndũ, no nĩkwenda kwa Ngai." 
John1:14 We Kiugo agĩgĩtuĩka mũndũ na agĩikarania na ithuĩ, aiyũirwo nĩ wega wa Ngai na ũhoro wa ma; na ithuĩ tũkĩona riiri wake, riiri wa Mũũriũ wa mũũmwe oimĩĩte kũrĩ Ithe." 
John1:15 Johana agĩkĩruta ũira igũrũ rĩake, akĩanĩrĩra akiuga atĩrĩ, “Ũyũ nĩ we ndaaragia ũhoro wake rĩrĩa ndoigire atĩrĩ, ‘Ũrĩa ũgũũka thuutha wakwa nĩ mũnene kũrĩ niĩ, tondũ aarĩ kuo mbere yakwa.’ ”" 
John1:16 Na rĩĩrĩ, kuuma wegainĩ wake mũingĩ nĩtũraathimĩĩtwo na iraathimo nyingĩ mũno." 
John1:17 Amu Watho wokire na Musa, no wega wa Ngai na ũhoro wa ma ciokire na Jesũ Kristũ." 
John1:18 Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũrĩ wona Ngai rĩ kana rĩ, no Mũũriũ wake wa mũũmwe, ũrĩa ũikaire hamwe na Ithe na no Ngai, ũcio nĩatũmĩĩte amenyeke." 
John1:19 Ũyũ nĩguo ũira wa Johana rĩrĩa Ayahudi maamũtũmĩire athĩnjĩri Ngai na Alawii kuuma Jerusalemu makamũũrie atĩrĩ, “Wee nĩ we ũ?”" 
John1:20 Naake akĩmoimbũrĩra atekũhitha akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Niĩ ti niĩ Mesia.”" 
John1:21 Nao makĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Wee-rĩ, ũkĩrĩ ũ? Nĩ we Elija?” Naake Johana akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Aaca ti niĩ.” “Ũkĩrĩ Mũnabii? ” Agĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Aaca.”" 
John1:22 Magĩkĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Ũkĩrĩ ũ? Twĩre nĩguo tũgĩe na ũndũ wa gũcookeria arĩa matũtũmire. Ũkuuga atĩa ũhoro waku mwene?”" 
John1:23 Naake Johana akĩmacookeria na ciugo iria mũnabii Isaia aaririe atĩ: “ ‘Niĩ ndĩ o mũgambo wa mũndũ ũranĩrĩra werũinĩ akoiga: Rũngariai njĩra ya Mwathani!’ ” 
John1:24 Nao acio maatũmĩĩtwo nĩ Afarisai 
John1:25 makĩũria Johana atĩrĩ, “Angĩkorwo ti we Mesia kana Elija kana mũnabii-rĩ, ũkĩbatithanagia nĩkĩ?”" 
John1:26 Naake Johana akĩmacookeria akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Niĩ mbatithanagia na maaĩ. No gatagatĩinĩ kaanyu nĩharĩ mũndũ mũtooĩ." 
John1:27 Ũcio nĩ we ũgũũka thuutha wakwa na nĩ mũnene kũrĩ niĩ, na o na ndiagĩrĩirwo nĩkũmuohora iraatũ ciake.”" 
John1:28 Acio maatũmĩĩtwo maaragĩa maũndũ maya na Johana itũũrainĩ rĩa Bethania, mwena wa irathĩro wa Rũũĩ rwa Jorodani o kũu Johana aabatithanagĩria." 
John1:29 Na rĩĩrĩ, mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ Johana akĩona Jesũ agĩũka na kũrĩ we. Naake akiuga atĩrĩ, “Oneei Gatũrũme ka Ngai karĩa gatũmaga andũ a thĩ mooherwo meehia maao!" 
John1:30 Ũyũ nĩ we ndamwĩrire ũhoro wake rĩrĩa ndoigire atĩrĩ, ‘He mũndũ ũgũũka thuutha wakwa, na nĩ mũnene kũrĩ niĩ, tondũ aarĩ kuo o na itarĩ mũciare.’" 
John1:31 Niĩ mwene ndiamũũĩ, no ndookire ngĩbatithanagia na maaĩ nĩ geetha ndĩmũmenyithanie kũrĩ andũ a Isiraeli.”" 
John1:32 Johana agĩkĩheana ũhoro akiuga atĩrĩ, “Nĩnyonire Roho agĩikũrũka kuuma na igũrũ ahaana ta ndutuura, aikara igũrũ rĩake." 
John1:33 O na hĩndĩ ĩyo ndinamũmenya, ĩndĩ Ngai ũrĩa wandũmĩĩte ngabatithanie na maaĩ nĩanjĩĩrĩĩte atĩrĩ, ‘Ũrĩa ũgaikũrũkĩrwo nĩ Roho na aikare igũrũ rĩake, ũcio nĩwe ũbatithanagia na Roho Mũtheru.’" 
John1:34 Rĩu nĩnyonire, na ndĩraruta ũira atĩ ũyũ nĩ we Mũrũ wa Ngai.”" 
John1:35 Na rĩĩrĩ, mũthenya ũrĩa warũmĩrĩire Johana aarũũgamĩĩte handũ o hau na arutwo aake eerĩ," 
John1:36 akĩona Jesũ akĩhĩtũka. Naake Johana akiuga atĩrĩĩrĩ, “Oneei Gatũrũme ka Ngai!”" 
John1:37 Nao arutwo acio aake eerĩ maigua ũguo magĩthiĩ makĩrũmĩrĩra Jesũ. 
John1:38 Naake Jesũ akĩĩhũgũra akĩmoona mamũrũmĩrĩire akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Nĩ kĩĩ mũracaria?” Nao makĩmũcookeria makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Rabii (ũguo nĩkuuga Mũrutani), ũikaraga kũ?”" 
John1:39 Jesũ akĩmacookeria akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Ũkaai nĩmũkuona.” Nao magĩthiĩ naake makĩona kũrĩa aikaraga, magĩikara naake mũthenya ũcio. Hĩndĩ ĩyo kwarĩ ta thaa ikũmi cia mũthenya." 
John1:40 Na rĩĩrĩ, ũmwe wa arutwo acio maiguire ũrĩa Johana oigire aarĩ Anderea mũrũ wa nyina na Simoni Petero." 
John1:41 Naake akĩamba gũthiĩ kũrĩ mũrũ wa nyina Simoni akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Nĩtuoneete Mesia.” (Na ũguo nĩkuuga “Kristũ.”)" 
John1:42 Agĩgĩtwara Simoni kwĩ Jesũ. Naake Jesũ akĩmũrora akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Wee nĩ we wĩtagwo Simoni mũrũ wa Johana? Ũgũcooka gwĩtwo Kefa.” (Rĩĩtwa rĩu rĩgĩtaũrwo no ũndũ ũmwe na Petero, na nĩkuuga “Ihiga.”)" 
John1:43 Na rĩĩrĩ, mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ Jesũ agĩtua atĩ nĩegũthiĩ Galili. Nakuo kũu agĩkora Filipu akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Nũmĩrĩra!”" 
John1:44 (Kwao kwarĩ Bethisaida, itũũra rĩrĩa Anderea na Petero maikaraga.)" 
John1:45 Naake Filipu agĩkora Nathanaeli akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Mũndũ ũrĩa Musa aandĩkire ũhoro wake thĩinĩ wa Ibuku rĩa Watho na ũrĩa anabii maandĩkire ũhoro wake nĩtũmuoneete. Eetagwo Jesũ Mũrũ wa Josefu, wa kuuma Nazarethi.”" 
John1:46 Naake Nathanaeli akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Gwĩ kĩndũ kĩega kĩngiuma Nazarethi?” Filipu akĩmũcookeria akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ũka ũkoone.”" 
John1:47 Rĩrĩa Jesũ oonire Nathanaeli agĩũka na kũrĩ we akĩaria ũhoro wake akiuga atĩrĩ, “Oneei Mũisiraeli kũna; ndarĩ ũhinga!”" 
John1:48 Naake Nathanaeli akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Ũnjũũĩ atĩa?” Jesũ akĩmũcookeria akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Nĩngũkuoneete o na rĩrĩa uuma rungu rwa mũkũyũ Filipu atanagwĩta.”" 
John1:49 Naake Nathanaeli akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Mũrutani, wee nĩ we Mũrũ wa Ngai! Na nĩ we Mũthamaki wa Isiraeli!”" 
John1:50 Jesũ akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Wetĩkia tondũ nĩndakwĩra nĩngũkuoneete rĩrĩa ũgũikarĩĩte rungu rwa mũkũyũ? Ngũkwĩra atĩ nĩũkuona maũndũ maingĩ manene kũrĩ macio!”" 
John1:51 Agĩcooka akĩmeera marĩ oothe atĩrĩ, “Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ: nĩmũkoona igũrũ rĩhingũkĩĩte nao araika magaikũrũkaga na makaambataga me igũrũ rĩa Mũrũ wa Mũndũ.”" 
John2:1 Na thuutha wa mĩthenya ĩĩrĩ gũgĩkorwo kwĩ na ũhiki itũũrainĩ rĩa Kana bũrũriinĩ wa Galili, na nyina wa Jesũ aarĩ kuo."
