John16:3 Makaamwĩka maũndũ macio moothe nĩ tondũ niĩ matiigana kũũmenya, o na kana makĩmenya Awa." 
John16:4 No ndamwĩra maũndũ macio, nĩguo rĩrĩa ihinda rĩgaakinya rĩa kũmwĩka maũndũ macio, mũkaaririkana atĩ nĩndamwĩrĩĩte ũguo. “Ndiamwĩrire maũndũ macio kuuma o kĩambĩrĩriainĩ, tondũ ndĩraikaraga hamwe na inyuĩ." 
John16:5 No rĩu nĩngũthiĩ kũrĩ ũrĩa wandũmire, na gũtirĩ o na ũmwe wanyu ũranjũũria ndĩrathiĩ kũ." 
John16:6 Tondũ rĩu nĩndamwĩra maũndũ macio, ngoro cianyu nĩciyũrĩĩtwo nĩ kĩeha." 
John16:7 Ĩndĩ ndĩramwĩra ũhoro wa ma atĩ nĩkwagĩrĩire thiĩ, amu ingĩaga gũthiĩ mũtingĩreeherwo Mũteithia. No ndathiĩ nĩngaamũtũma kũrĩ inyuĩ." 
John16:8 Naake rĩrĩa agooka nĩakoonia andũ a thĩ ũrĩa mahĩtĩĩtie ũhoroinĩ wa meehia, ũthingu, o na ũhoroinĩ wa ciira." 
John16:9 Nĩmahĩtĩĩtie ũhoroinĩ wa meehia tondũ matinjĩtĩkĩĩtie; 
John16:10 nĩmahĩtĩĩtie ũhoroinĩ wa ũthingu tondũ ngũthiĩ kũrĩ Awa na mũtigũcooka kũnyona; 
John16:11 ningĩ nĩmahĩtĩĩtie ũhoroinĩ wa ciira tondũ mũnene wa gũũkũ thĩ nĩarĩĩkĩĩtie gũtuĩrwo. 
John16:12 “Ndĩ na maũndũ mangĩ maingĩ ma kũmwĩra no mũtingĩhota kũmoomĩrĩria rĩu. 
John16:13 No rĩrĩa Roho ũrĩa ũguũranagĩria ũhoro wa ma wa Ngai agooka nĩakaamũtongoria maũndũinĩ moothe ma ũũma. We ndakaaragia na ũhoti wake we mwene, no akaaragia ũhoro wa maũndũ marĩa aiguĩte, na nĩakaamwĩra ũhoro wa maũndũ marĩa magooka." 
John16:14 Nĩakangoocithia nĩ ũndũ akaamũkinyagĩria o ũhoro ũrĩa arutĩĩte kuuma kũrĩ niĩ. 
John16:15 Kĩrĩa gĩothe Awa e nakĩo nĩ gĩakwa; nĩkĩo ndamwĩra atĩ Roho akaamũkinyagĩria o ũhoro ũrĩa arutĩĩte kuuma kũrĩ niĩ. 
John16:16 “Thuutha wa ihinda iniini mũticooka kũnyona, no thuutha wa ihinda iniini nĩmũrĩnyona.”" 
John16:17 Nao amwe a arutwo aake makĩũrania atĩrĩ, “Ũguo nĩkuuga atĩa? Aratwĩra atĩ, ‘Thuutha wa ihinda iniini tũticooka kũmuona, na thuutha wa ihinda iniini nĩtũrĩmuona;’ ningĩ akoiga atĩ, ‘Nĩ tondũ ngũthiĩ kũrĩ Awa.’" 
John16:18 Akiuga, ‘Ihinda iniini’ arenda kuuga atĩa? Ithuĩ tũtiramenya ũrĩa arenda kuuga!”" 
John16:19 Naake Jesũ amenya atĩ nĩmeendaga kũmũũria akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Ndamwĩra atĩ, ‘Thuutha wa ihinda iniini mũtigũcooka kũnyona, na thuutha wa ihinda iniini, nĩmũrĩnyona.’ Ũguo nĩguo mũrorania nĩkuuga atĩa?" 
John16:20 Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ: inyuĩ nĩmũkaarĩra na mũgirĩke, no andũ a thĩ nĩgũkena magaakena; nĩmũkaagĩa na kĩeha, no kĩeha kĩu kĩanyu gĩgacooka gĩtuĩke gĩkeno." 
John16:21 Rĩrĩa mũtumia akinyĩrĩirwo nĩkũigua ruwo rwa gũciara nĩagĩaga na kĩeha, tondũ ihinda rĩake rĩa ruwo nĩrĩkinyu, no aagĩa mwana agakena na ndacookaga kũririkana ruwo rwake, tondũ mũndũ nĩaciarwo gũũkũ thĩ." 
John16:22 Kwoguo inyuĩ rĩu mwĩ na kĩeha, no nĩngaamuona rĩngĩ, na hĩndĩ ĩyo ngoro cianyu nĩikaiyũrwo nĩ gĩkeno, gĩkeno kĩrĩa gĩtarĩ mũndũ ũngĩmũtuunya." 
John16:23 “Rĩrĩa mũthenya ũcio ũgaakinya mũtirĩ ũndũ mũkanjũũria. Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ Awa nĩakaamũhingĩria ũndũ o wothe ũrĩa mũkaahooya thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩakwa. 
John16:24 Nginyagia rĩu mũtirĩ mwahooya ũndũ thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩakwa; hooyai na nĩmũkũheeo nĩguo gĩkeno kĩanyu gĩkinyanĩre. 
John16:25 “Ndamwĩra maũndũ macio moothe na thimo. No ihinda nĩrĩgaakinya rĩrĩa itagaacooka kũmũhe ũhoro ũcio rĩngĩ na thimo, no ngaamũheaga, ũhoro wa Awa o wega itekuunĩrĩra." 
John16:26 Mũthenya ũcio wakinya, mũkaamũhooya thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩakwa. No niĩ ndiramwĩra atĩ nĩngaamũhoera kũrĩ Awa," 
John16:27 amu Awa we mwene nĩamwendeete tondũ na inyuĩ nĩmũnyendeete, o na mũgeetĩkia atĩ ndoimire kwĩ Awa." 
John16:28 Ndoimire kũrĩ Awa ngĩũka thĩ na rĩu nĩnguuma thĩ njooke kũrĩ Awa.” 
John16:29 Nao arutwo aake makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Hĩ! Nĩwatũhe ũhoro ũtekuunĩrĩra na ũtekwaria na thimo." 
John16:30 Rĩu nĩtwamenya atĩ wee nĩũũĩ maũndũ moothe; na ndũbatarĩĩtio kũũrio kĩũria nĩ mũndũ. Ũndũ ũcio nĩwatũma twĩtĩkie atĩ woimire kwĩ Ngai.” 
John16:31 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Rĩu nĩmwetĩkia?" 
John16:32 Ihinda nĩrĩrooka, o na rĩu nĩrĩkinyu, rĩrĩa inyuothe mũrĩhuruunjwo, o mũndũ athiĩ gwake mũciĩ mũndige ndĩ nyiiki. No ndirĩ nyiiki nĩ ũndũ Awa arĩ hamwe na niĩ." 
John16:33 Ndamwĩra maũndũ macio moothe nĩ geetha mũgĩe na thaayũ nĩ ũndũ wa kũnyiitana na niĩ. Andũ a thĩ nĩmarĩtũma mũnyamaare, ĩndĩ ũmĩrĩriai! Niĩ nĩndooreetie thĩ!”" 
John17:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, Jesũ arĩĩkia kuuga ũguo agĩtiira maitho akĩrora na igũrũ akiuga atĩrĩ, “Awa, ihinda nĩikinyu. Goocithia Mũũrũguo, nĩ geetha o naake akũgoocithie," 
John17:2 amu nĩwamũheire ũhoti igũrũ rĩa andũ oothe, nĩguo ahe acio oothe wamũheire muoyo wa tene na tene." 
John17:3 Naguo muoyo wa tene na tene nĩmakũmenye wee Ngai ũrĩa wa ma, o na mamenye Jesũ Kristũ ũrĩa watũmire." 
John17:4 Nĩngũgoocithĩĩtie gũũkũ thĩ; nĩndĩkĩĩtie wĩra ũrĩa waheire ndute. 
John17:5 Awa! Ngoocithia rĩu o maithoinĩ maaku; ngoocithia na ũgooci ũrĩa ndaarĩ naguo hamwe nawe thĩ ĩtaanoombwo. 
John17:6 “Nĩndũmĩĩte ũmenyeke nĩ andũ arĩa waheire gũũkũ thĩ. Maarĩ aaku, nawe ũkĩĩhe o, nao nĩmaathĩkĩire ciugo ciaku." 
John17:7 Rĩu nĩmamenyeete atĩ maũndũ moothe marĩa waheire moimaga kũrĩ we. 
John17:8 Nĩ gũkorwo nĩndĩmaheete ũhoro ũrĩa waheire, nao makawamũkĩra magakĩmenya na ma atĩ niĩ ndoimire kũrĩ we, o na mageetĩkia atĩ nĩ we wandũmire." 
John17:9 “Acio nĩ o ndĩrahoera. Ndikũhoera andũ a thĩ, tiga o arĩa ũheete, tondũ nĩ aaku." 
John17:10 Kĩrĩa gĩothe ndĩ nakĩo nĩ gĩaku, na kĩrĩa gĩothe wĩ nakĩo nĩ gĩakwa; na nĩcionanĩĩtie riiri wakwa." 
John17:11 Rĩu niĩ nĩngũũka kũrĩ we; ndigũcooka gũkorwo ndĩ gũũkũ thĩ, no aya ũheete marĩkoragwo gũũkũ thĩ. Awa Mũtheru! Mamenyagĩrĩre na hinya wa rĩĩtwa rĩaku o rĩĩtwa rĩu ũheete, nĩguo matuĩke ũmwe o ta ũrĩa niĩ nawe tũrĩ ũmwe." 
John17:12 Rĩrĩa ndĩrakoragwo nao nĩndĩramamenyagĩrĩra na hinya wa rĩĩtwa rĩaku, o rĩu ũheete. Nĩndĩramagitagĩra na gũtirĩ o na ũmwe wao ũroorire tiga o mwana ũrĩa wa kũũra, nĩ geetha Maandĩko mahinge." 
John17:13 “Rĩu nĩndĩrooka kũrĩ we. Ndĩroiga maũndũ macio moothe ndĩ gũũkũ thĩ nĩ geetha magĩe na gĩkeno gĩakwa kĩrĩ gĩkinyanĩru ngoroinĩ ciao. 
John17:14 Nĩndĩmaheete ũhoro waku, nao andũ a thĩ makamathũũra, tondũ o ti a gũũkũ thĩ, o ta ũrĩa o na niĩ itarĩ wa gũũkũ thĩ." 
John17:15 Ndirakũhooya atĩ ũmarute gũũkũ thĩ, no ũrĩa ndĩrakũhooya nĩ atĩ ũmamenyagĩrĩre kuuma kũrĩ Ũrĩa Mũũru." 
John17:16 Amu o ta ũrĩa o na niĩ itarĩ wa gũũkũ thĩ, noguo o nao matarĩ a gũũkũ thĩ." 
John17:17 Matherie na ũndũ wa ũhoro ũrĩa wa ma; tondũ ũhoro waku nĩ wa ma. 
John17:18 O ta ũrĩa wee wandũmire gũũkũ thĩ, noguo o na niĩ ndĩmatũmĩĩte gũũkũ thĩ." 
John17:19 Nĩndĩthereetie nĩ ũndũ wao, nĩ geetha o nao matherio na ũndũ wa ũhoro ũrĩa wa ma." 
John17:20 “Ningĩ ti aya oiki ndĩrahoera; ndĩrahoera o na arĩa marĩnjĩtĩkagia nĩ ũndũ wa ciugo cia andũ aya. 
John17:21 Ndĩrakũhooya atĩ oothe matuĩke ũmwe. Awa! Marokoragwo thĩinĩ witũ, o ta ũrĩa wee ũrĩ thĩinĩ wakwa na niĩ thĩinĩ waku. Marotuĩka ũmwe nĩ geetha andũ a thĩ meetĩkie atĩ wee nĩ we wandũmire." 
John17:22 Nĩndĩmaheete riiri ũrĩa wee ũheete nĩ geetha matuĩke ũmwe, o ta ũrĩa niĩ nawe tũrĩ ũmwe:" 
John17:23 Niĩ thĩinĩ wao, nawe thĩinĩ wakwa, nĩ geetha matuĩke ũmwe kũna, nĩguo andũ a thĩ mamenye atĩ nĩ we wandũmire, nao andũ aya mamenye atĩ nĩũmeendeete, o ta ũrĩa ũnyendeete." 
John17:24 “Awa! Nĩngwenda aya ũheete o nao magĩikarage harĩa niĩ ndĩ nĩ geetha moonage riiri wakwa ũrĩa ũheete, tondũ nĩwanyendeete o na mbere ya thĩ kũũmbwo." 
John17:25 Awa Mũthingu! Andũ a thĩ matikũũĩ, no niĩ nĩngũũĩ, o na andũ aya nĩmooĩ atĩ nĩ we wandũmire." 
John17:26 Nĩndatũmire makũmenye! Na no ngũthiĩ na mbere gwĩka ũguo, nĩ geetha wendani ũrĩa ũnyendeete naguo ũkoragwo thĩinĩ wao, na niĩ ngoragwo thĩinĩ wao.”" 
John18:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, Jesũ arĩĩkia kũhooya, akiumagara arĩ na arutwo aake magĩthiĩ makĩringa mũrĩmo ũũrĩa ũngĩ wa mũkuru wa karũũĩ ga Kidironi. Nakuo kũu nĩkwarĩ na mũgũnda, naake Jesũ na arutwo aake magĩtoonya kuo." 
John18:2 Na rĩĩrĩ, Judasi, ũrĩa wamũkunyanĩire, nĩoĩ harĩa Jesũ aamenyereete gũcemanagia kuo na arutwo aake maita maingĩ." 
John18:3 Kwoguo Judasi agĩgĩthiĩ kuo arĩ na thigari na arangĩri a Hekaarũ, matũmĩĩtwo nĩ athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene hamwe na Afarisai. Maathiire makuuĩĩte indo cia mbaara na magakuua mataawa na imũrĩ." 
John18:4 Tondũ Jesũ nĩamenyaga maũndũ moothe marĩa aakirie kuona, agĩkiumĩra akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Nũũ mũracaria?”" 
John18:5 Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Nĩ Jesũ wa Nazarethi.” Naake agĩkĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Nĩ niĩ we.” Naake Judasi, ũrĩa wamũkunyanĩire, aarũũgamĩĩte o hau me na andũ acio." 
John18:6 Na rĩĩrĩ, rĩrĩa Jesũ aameerire atĩrĩ, “Nĩ niĩ we,” magĩcooka na thuutha makĩgũa thĩ." 
John18:7 Naake Jesũ akĩmooria o rĩngĩ atĩrĩ, “Nũũ mũracaria?” Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Nĩ Jesũ wa Nazarethi.”" 
John18:8 Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Nĩndamwĩra atĩ nĩ niĩ we. Kwoguo angĩkorwo nĩ niĩ mũracaria-rĩ, rekeei aya angĩ mathiĩ.”" 
John18:9 (Oigire ũguo nĩ geetha ũrĩa oigĩĩte mbere ĩyo ũhinge, rĩrĩa oigire atĩ, “Awa, nditeete mũndũ o na ũmwe wa arĩa waheire.”)" 
John18:10 Na rĩĩrĩ, Simoni Petero aarĩ na rũhiũ rwa njora; naake agĩkĩrũcomora, agĩtinia ngombo ya Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai Ũrĩa Mũnene gũtũ kwa ũrĩo. Ngombo ĩyo yetagwo Maliku." 
John18:11 Jesũ akĩĩra Petero atĩrĩ, “Cookia rũhiũ njorainĩ! Gĩkombe kĩa mathĩĩna kĩrĩa Awa aheete-rĩ, no njage gũkĩnyua?”" 
John18:12 Nacio thigari icio i hamwe na mũtongoria wacio o na arangĩri a Ayahudi ikĩnyiita Jesũ, ikĩmuoha." 
John18:13 Ikĩamba kũmũtwara kwĩ Anasi, mũthoniwe wa Kaiafa, ũrĩa warĩ Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai Mũnene mwaka ũcio." 
John18:14 Na rĩĩrĩ, Kaiafa nĩ we wataarĩĩte Ayahudi atĩ nĩkwagĩrĩire mũndũ ũmwe akuĩre andũ oothe." 
John18:15 Naake Simoni Petero na mũrutwo ũngĩ makiuma Jesũ thuutha. Tondũ mũrutwo ũcio ũngĩ nĩoĩkaine nĩ Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai ũcio Mũnene, agĩkĩngĩrania na Jesũ kinya kũu nja ya nyũmba ya mũthĩnjĩri Ngai ũcio mũnene." 
John18:16 Ĩndĩ Petero agĩtigwo kĩhingoinĩ. Naake mũrutwo ũcio woĩkaine nĩ Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai Ũrĩa Mũnene agĩcooka nja, akĩaria na mũirĩĩtu ũrĩa waikaragia kĩhingo, agĩtoonyia Petero thĩinĩ." 
John18:17 Naake mũirĩĩtu ũcio waikaragia kĩhingo akĩũria Petero atĩrĩ, “Githĩ o nawe ndũrĩ ũmwe wa arutwo a mũndũ ũũrĩa?” Petero agĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Aaca niĩ ndirĩ ũmwe wao.”" 
John18:18 Na rĩĩrĩ, tondũ nĩkwarĩ na heho arangĩri o na ndungata nĩciakĩĩtie mwaki wa makara igootagĩra hau nja irũngiĩ. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Petero o naake agĩthiĩ akĩrũũgama hamwe nao oote mwaki." 
John18:19 Naake Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai ũcio Mũnene agĩkĩũria Jesũ ũhoro wa arutwo aake o na wa maũndũ marĩa aarutanaga. 
John18:20 Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Niĩ ndũũraga njaragia ndĩ mbere ya andũ itekwĩhitha; moorutani maakwa moothe ndĩmarutanagĩra thunagogiinĩ na thĩinĩ wa Hekaarũ kũrĩa Ayahudi oothe macemanagia. Niĩ ndirĩ ndaarĩria andũ hithoinĩ." 
John18:21 Ũgũkĩnjũũria nĩkĩ? Ũria andũ arĩa manjiguire; moorie ũrĩa ndameerire nĩ o mooĩ ũrĩa ndoigire.” 
John18:22 Na rĩrĩa Jesũ oigire ũguo, mũrangĩri ũmwe wa arĩa maarĩ hau akĩmũgũtha rũhĩ akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Ũguo nĩguo ũgũcookeria Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai Ũrĩa Mũnene?”" 
John18:23 Naake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Angĩkorwo nĩndoiga ũndũ mũũru, ĩra andũ na uuge ũndũ ũcio nĩ ũrĩkũ. No angĩkorwo ũguo ndoiga nĩguo kũrĩ-rĩ, wakĩngũthĩra kĩ?”" 
John18:24 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Anasi akĩneana Jesũ arĩ o muohe atwarwo gwa Kaiafa Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai Ũrĩa Mũnene. 
John18:25 Na rĩĩrĩ, Petero arũũgamĩĩte o hau agĩota mwaki andũ arĩa maarĩ ho makĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Githĩ o nawe ndũrĩ ũmwe wa arutwo a mũndũ ũũrĩa?” Petero agĩkaana akiuga atĩrĩ, “Niĩ ndirĩ ũmwe wao.”" 
John18:26 Ningĩ ngombo ĩmwe ya Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai ũcio Mũnene, yatarainie na mũndũ ũrĩa Petero aatinĩĩtie gũtũ, ĩkĩũria Petero atĩrĩ, “Na githĩ wee ndikuonire naake mũgũndainĩ?”" 
John18:27 Petero agĩkaana o rĩngĩ, na o hĩndĩ ĩyo ngũkũ ĩgĩkũga." 
John18:28 Na rũũciinĩ tene, makĩruta Jesũ gwa Kaiafa makĩmũtwara mũciĩ kwa Pilato. Anene a Ayahudi matiaingĩrire kwa Pilato matikaae kũnyiitwo nĩ thaahu mataanarĩa Bathaka." 
John18:29 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Pilato agĩkiuma nja akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Mũndũ ũyũ mũramũthitangĩra maũndũ marĩkũ?”" 
John18:30 Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Korwo gũtirĩ ũndũ mũũru eekĩĩte tũtingĩamũreehe kũrĩ we.”" 
John18:31 Naake Pilato agĩkĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Kĩmuoei mũkamũciirithie arĩ inyuĩ kũringana na Watho wanyu.” Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Ithuĩ tũtiĩtĩkĩrĩĩtio kũũraga mũndũ.”" 
John18:32 (Gwekĩkire ũguo nĩ geetha ũrĩa Jesũ oigĩĩte ũhinge rĩrĩa aarĩĩtie ũhoro wa gĩkuũ kĩrĩa agaakua.) 
John18:33 Pilato agĩgĩcooka nyũmba thĩinĩ agĩĩta Jesũ akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Atĩ wee nĩ we Mũthamaki wa Ayahudi?”" 
John18:34 Naake Jesũ akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Ũkũũria ũguo nĩ tondũ nĩguo andũ makwĩrĩĩte ũhoro wakwa kana nĩ tondũ nĩguo wee ũũĩ?”" 
John18:35 Pilato akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ũgwĩciiria niĩ ndĩ Mũyahudi? Nĩ andũ aanyu, hamwe na athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene makũreehire kũrĩ niĩ. Wĩkĩĩte atĩa?”" 
John18:36 Naake Jesũ agĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Ũthamaki wakwa ti wa gũũkũ thĩ; korwo nĩ wa gũũkũ thĩ, arũmĩrĩri aakwa mangĩrĩ kũndũĩrĩra ndikaneanwo kũrĩ anene a Ayahudi. Ĩndĩ ũthamaki wakwa ti wa gũũkũ thĩ!”" 
John18:37 Pilato agĩkĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Kwoguo wee ũkĩrĩ mũthamaki?” Naake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Wee nĩ we woiga atĩ ndĩ mũthamaki. Niĩ ndaciarirwo na ngĩũka gũũkũ thĩ nĩ ũndũ wa gĩtũmi kĩmwe tu, heanage ũhoro wa ma. Mũndũ o wothe wa ũhoro wa ma nĩathikagĩrĩria.”" 
John18:38 Pilato akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Ũhoro wa ma ũkĩrĩ ũrĩkũ?” Hĩndĩ ĩyo Pilato akiuma nja akĩĩra Ayahudi atĩrĩ, “Niĩ ndirona ũũru ũrĩa mũndũ ũyũ eekĩĩte." 
John18:39 Tondũ kũringana na mũtugo wanyu nĩ atĩ hĩndĩ ya Bathaka ngamuohorera mũndũ ũmwe-rĩ, rĩu nĩmũkwenda ndĩmuohorere mũthamaki wa Ayahudi?”" 
John18:40 No o magĩitĩka kwanĩrĩra makiugaga atĩrĩ, “Aaca! Tũtikwenda ũcio! Tũkwenda Baraba!” (Baraba aarĩ mũtuunyani.)" 
John19:1 Gwakinya hau, Pilato agĩathana Jesũ ooywo ahũũrwo na kĩboko." 
John19:2 Nacio thigari igĩthondeka thũmbĩ ya mĩigua ikĩmwĩkĩra mũtwe; igĩcooka ikĩmwĩkĩra nguo ya babũ," 
John19:3 ikĩambĩrĩria gũũka harĩ we ikamwĩraga atĩrĩ, “Ũrĩ mwega Mũthamaki wa Ayahudi!” Igacooka ikamũgũtha na hĩ." 
John19:4 Naake Pilato akiuma nja rĩngĩ akĩĩra Ayahudi atĩrĩ, “Taoneei! Nĩngũmũreehe haaha nja nĩguo mũmenye atĩ niĩ ndirona ũũru o na ũmwe eekĩĩte.”" 
John19:5 Jesũ agĩkiuma nja eekĩrĩĩte thũmbĩ ya mĩigua na nguo ya babũ. Naake oima nja Pilato akĩĩra Ayahudi atĩrĩ, “Oneei! Mũndũ nĩ we ũyũ!”" 
John19:6 Na rĩrĩa athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene o na arangĩri a Hekaarũ maamuonire makĩanĩrĩra makiugaga atĩrĩ, “Mwambe! Mwambe!” Naake Pilato akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Muoei mũkamwambe arĩ inyuĩ amu niĩ ndirona ngero ĩrĩa agereete.”" 
John19:7 Nao andũ magĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Ithuĩ twĩ na Watho witũ ũrĩa uugaga atĩ aagĩrĩirwo nĩgũkua nĩ tondũ etuĩĩte Mũrũ wa Ngai.”" 
John19:8 Rĩrĩa Pilato aiguire ũrĩa moiga agĩĩtigĩra mũno makĩria. 
John19:9 Agĩgĩcooka na thĩinĩ rĩngĩ akĩũria Jesũ atĩrĩ, “Kwanyu nĩ kũ?” No Jesũ agĩkira na ndamũcookerie." 
John19:10 Naake Pilato akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Ndũkwenda kũnjarĩria? Nĩũũĩ atĩ ndĩ na ũhoti wa gũkuohora kana gũkwamba?”" 
John19:11 Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Wee ndũngĩrĩ na ũhoti wa kũnjĩka ũndũ korwo ndũheetwo ũhoti ũcio nĩ Ngai. Kwoguo mũndũ ũrĩa ũndeehire kũrĩ we nĩ we wĩ na wĩhia ũrĩa mũnene makĩria.”" 
John19:12 Rĩrĩa Pilato aiguire ũguo, akĩgeria gũcaria ũrĩa angĩohora Jesũ. No andũ makĩanĩrĩra makiuga atĩrĩ, “Wohora mũndũ ũcio, wee ndũrĩ mũraata wa mũthamaki wa Roma! Amu mũndũ o wothe wĩtuaga mũthamaki nĩ thũ ya mũthamaki wa Roma!”" 
John19:13 Rĩrĩa Pilato aiguire ciugo icio akĩruta Jesũ nja, agĩikarĩra gĩtĩ gĩa gũtuanĩra handũ heetagwo “Ihiga Rĩare” (na Kĩhibirania heetagwo “Gabatha”)." 
John19:14 Hĩndĩ ĩyo kwarĩ ta thaa thita mũthenya ũrĩa wa kwĩhaarĩria nĩ ũndũ wa Bathaka. Pilato agĩkĩĩra andũ atĩrĩ, “Ũyũ mũthamaki wanyu!”" 
John19:15 Nao andũ makĩanĩrĩra magĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Mũũrage! Mũũrage! Mwambe!” Naake Pilato akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Nyambe mũthamaki wanyu?” Nao athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Ithuĩ tũtirĩ mũthamaki ũngĩ tiga o mũthamaki wa Roma!”" 
John19:16 Pilato agĩkĩneana Jesũ kũrĩ o athiĩ akaambwo. Nao andũ acio makĩnyiita Jesũ," 
John19:17 makĩmũtwara ekuuĩire mũtharaba, magĩthiĩ handũ heetagwo “Handũ ha Ihĩndĩ rĩa Mũtwe” (na Kĩhibirania heetagwo “Gologotha”)." 
John19:18 Makĩamba Jesũ ho, na makĩamba andũ angĩ eerĩ hamwe naake, ũmwe mwena ũyũ, na ũrĩa ũngĩ mwena ũrĩa ũngĩ, Jesũ e gatagatĩ kaao eerĩ." 
John19:19 Naake Pilato akĩandĩkithia kĩmenyithia kĩoigaga atĩrĩ, “Jesũ wa Nazarethi, Mũthamaki wa Ayahudi,” agĩgĩcuurithia hau mũtharabainĩ wake." 
John19:20 Naho hau Jesũ aambĩirwo haarĩ hakuhĩ na itũũra, kwoguo andũ aingĩ nĩmaathoomire kĩmenyithia kĩu. Kĩmenyithia kĩu kĩandĩkĩĩtwo na Kĩhibirania, Kĩlatini, na Kĩngiriki." 
John19:21 Nao athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene makĩĩra Pilato atĩrĩ, “Tiga kwandĩka ‘Mũthamaki wa Ayahudi,’ kaba wandĩke atĩrĩ, ‘Mũndũ ũyũ oigire atĩrĩ, nĩ niĩ Mũthamaki wa Ayahudi.’ ”" 
John19:22 Naake Pilato akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Ũguo ndaandĩka nĩndaandĩka.”" 
John19:23 Nacio thigari ciarĩĩkia kwamba Jesũ ikĩgayania nguo ciake maita mana, o mũũthigari akĩnengerwo gĩcunjĩ gĩake. Igĩcooka ikĩoya nguo yake ya igũrũ ĩtaarĩ rũtumo o na rũmwe." 
John19:24 Thigari icio ikĩĩrana atĩrĩ, “Rekeei tũtige kũmĩtinangia; tũmĩcuukĩre mĩtĩ tuone nũũ ũgũthiĩ nayo.” Ũndũ ũcio wekĩkire nĩ geetha Maandĩko mahinge harĩa haandĩkĩĩtwo atĩ: “Nĩmaagayanire nguo ciakwa, nayo nguo yakwa ya igũrũ makĩmĩcuukĩra mĩtĩ.” Na ũguo noguo thigari ciekire." 
John19:25 Naho hau hakuhĩ na Mũtharaba nĩharũũgamĩĩte nyina, mwarĩ wa nyina na nyina wa Jesũ, Mariamu mũtumia wa Kileopa, na Mariamu Mũmagidali." 
John19:26 Naake Jesũ oona nyina na mũrutwo ũrĩa eendeete marũngiĩ ho akĩĩra nyina atĩrĩ, “Mũtumia, ũcio nĩ we mũũrũguo.”" 
John19:27 Agĩcooka akĩĩra mũrutwo ũcio atĩrĩ, “Ũcio nĩ we maitũguo.” Kuuma mũthenya ũcio mũrutwo ũcio akĩmuoya agĩthiĩ gũikaraga gwake mũciĩ." 
John19:28 Thuutha wa ũguo, Jesũ aamenya atĩ maũndũ moothe nĩmahingĩĩte, nĩ geetha ũrĩa kwandĩkĩĩtwo kũhinge, agĩkiuga atĩrĩ, “Nĩnyootiĩ.”" 
John19:29 Na rĩĩrĩ, hau hakuhĩ nĩhaarĩ mbakũri yarĩ na ndibei ngagatu; thibonji ĩgĩtobokio ndibeiinĩ ĩyo, ĩgĩcooka ĩgĩtheecererwo kamũtĩinĩ ka hithobu ĩkĩhutithio Jesũ kanua." 
John19:30 Jesũ arĩĩkia gũkunda akiuga atĩrĩ, “Maũndũ moothe nĩmahinga!” Agĩcooka akĩinamia mũtwe, agĩtuĩkana." 
John19:31 Thuutha ũcio anene a Ayahudi magĩthiĩ makĩhooya Pilato rũũtha rwa kuunanga magũrũ ma andũ acio maambĩĩtwo, o na rwa gũcuurũria mĩĩrĩ ĩyo kuuma mĩtharaba igũrũ. Mooririe meetĩkĩrio gwĩka ũguo tondũ mũthenya ũcio warĩ wa kwĩhaarĩria kwa Ayahudi nĩguo marookere Thabatũ. Matiendaga mĩĩrĩ ĩyo ya andũ acio ĩkorwo ĩ mĩtĩ igũrũ mũthenya wa Thabatũ, makĩria nĩ tondũ Thabatũ ĩyo yokaga hĩndĩ ĩyo yarĩ nene." 
John19:32 Kwoguo thigari igĩgĩthiĩ ikiunanga magũrũ ma andũ arĩa maambanĩirio na Jesũ. 
John19:33 No rĩrĩa ciakinyire harĩ Jesũ igĩkora nĩarĩĩkĩĩtie gũkua, kwoguo itiamuunangire magũrũ." 
John19:34 Ĩndĩ mũũthigari ũmwe agĩikia itimũ agĩtheeca Jesũ mbaruinĩ, naho hau aatheecirwo hakiuma maaĩ na thakame." 
John19:35 (Mũndũ ũrĩa wonire ũndũ ũcio ũgĩĩkĩka nĩ we ũraheana ũira wake, ũira wake nĩ wa ma, na nĩoĩ atĩ araaria ũhoro wa ma nĩ geetha o na inyuĩ mwĩtĩkie.)" 
John19:36 Ũndũ ũyũ wonekire nĩ geetha Maandĩko mahingio marĩa moigĩĩte atĩrĩ, “Gũtirĩ ihĩndĩ o na rĩmwe rĩake rĩkoinangwo.”" 
John19:37 O na no harĩ Maandĩko mangĩ moigĩĩte atĩrĩ, “Andũ nĩmagaacũũthĩrĩria mũndũ ũrĩa maatheecire.”" 
John19:38 Thuutha ũcio Josefu wa kuuma itũũra rĩa Arimathea, akĩhooya Pilato rũũtha rwa gũkuua mwĩrĩ wa Jesũ. (Josefu aarĩ mũrutwo wa Jesũ, no aamũrũmagĩrĩra na hitho nĩ ũndũ wa gwĩtigĩra anene a Ayahudi.) Pilato agĩkĩmwĩtĩkĩria akaũkuue, naake Josefu agĩthiĩ agĩkuua mwĩrĩ wa Jesũ." 
John19:39 Naake Nikodemo, ũrĩa wokĩĩte kwĩ Jesũ rĩmwe ũtukũ, agĩthiĩ hamwe na Josefu akuuĩĩte mũtukanio wa maguta ma manemane na thubiri ta kiro mĩrongo ĩtatũ." 
John19:40 Nao andũ acio eerĩ makĩoya mwĩrĩ wa Jesũ makĩwoha na cuka wa gataani o hamwe na mũtukanio ũcio wa maguta kũringana na mũtugo wa Ayahudi wa gũthikana. 
John19:41 Na rĩĩrĩ, hau Jesũ aambĩirwo nĩhaarĩ na mũgũnda warĩ na mbĩĩrĩra, nayo ndĩakoreetwo ĩthikĩĩtwo mũndũ o na ũmwe." 
John19:42 Nao makĩiga mwĩrĩ wa Jesũ mbĩĩrĩrainĩ ĩyo, tondũ yarĩ hakuhĩ na ningĩ kwarĩ mũthenya wa Ayahudi wa kwĩhaarĩria nĩ ũndũ wa Thabatũ." 
John20:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, mũthenya wa Kiumia rũũciinĩ tene, kũrĩ o na nduma, Mariamu Mũmagidali agĩthiĩ mbĩĩrĩrainĩ, akĩona ihiga rĩrĩa rĩaigĩĩtwo mũromoinĩ rĩthengeetio." 
John20:2 Agĩteng'era kũrĩ Simoni Petero, o na kũrĩ mũrutwo ũrĩa Jesũ eendeete, akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Nĩmathengeetie Mwathani mbĩĩrĩrainĩ, na tũtiũĩ kũrĩa mamũigĩĩte!”" 
John20:3 Naake Petero na mũrutwo ũcio ũngĩ magĩthiĩ mbĩĩrĩrainĩ mateng'ereete," 
John20:4 no mũrutwo ũcio ũngĩ agĩkĩria Petero ihenya, agĩkinya mbĩĩrĩrainĩ mbere." 
John20:5 Akinya akĩinamĩrĩra, agĩcũũthĩrĩria thĩinĩ akĩona nguo iria cioheete mwĩrĩ wa Jesũ, no ndatoonyire." 
John20:6 Naake Simoni Petero ũrĩa warĩ thuutha akinya, akĩingĩra mbĩĩrĩra thĩinĩ o rĩmwe. Akĩona cuka wa gataani wĩ hau thĩ," 
John20:7 naguo taama ũrĩa woheete Jesũ mũtwe, warĩ o hau hakuhĩ na cuka ũcio. Taama ũcio ndwarĩ hamwe na cuka ũcio wa gataani, no wakũnjĩĩtwo ũkaigwo handũ wĩ wiki." 
John20:8 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũrutwo ũcio ũngĩ ũrĩa wakinyĩĩte mbĩĩrĩrainĩ mbere ya Petero, o naake agĩtoonya thĩinĩ, akĩona na agĩĩtĩkia." 
John20:9 (Kinya hĩndĩ ĩyo matiakoreetwo mataũkĩirwo nĩ maandĩko atĩ no mũhaka ariũke oime kũrĩ arĩa akuũ.) 
John20:10 Arutwo acio magĩcooka makĩinũka kwao. 
John20:11 Na rĩĩrĩ, Mariamu arũũgamĩĩte hau mbĩĩrĩrainĩ akĩrĩraga, nĩainamĩrĩire agĩcũũthĩrĩria mbĩĩrĩra thĩinĩ." 
John20:12 Naake akĩona araika eerĩ me na nguo njerũ maikarĩĩte harĩa mwĩrĩ wa Jesũ warĩ, ũmwe agaikara mũtweinĩ na ũrĩa ũngĩ magũrũinĩ." 
John20:13 Nao makĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Mũtumia, nĩ kĩĩ kĩrakũrĩria?” Naake agĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Nĩ tondũ nĩmeehereetie Mwathani wakwa, na ndiũĩ kũrĩa mamũigĩĩte!”" 
John20:14 Mariamu arĩĩkia kuuga ũguo akĩĩhũgũra na thuutha akĩona Jesũ arũũgamĩĩte hau, no we ndamenyaga atĩ nĩ Jesũ." 
John20:15 Naake Jesũ akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Mũtumia, nĩ kĩĩ kĩrakũrĩria? Nũũ ũracaria?” Mariamu agĩciiria atĩ mũndũ ũcio nĩ mũrĩmi wa mũgũnda ũcio agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Mũthuuri ũyũ, ũngĩkorwo nĩ we ũramweheririe, njĩĩra harĩa ũramũigire thiĩ ngamũkuue.”" 
John20:16 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ akĩmwĩta, “Mariamu!” Naake Mariamu akĩĩhũgũra na kũrĩ we, agĩcookia na Kĩhibirania atĩrĩ, “Raboni!” (Na ũguo nĩkuuga, “Mũrutani”)." 
John20:17 Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Tiga kũũnyiita, amu ndirĩ ndĩrambata kũrĩ Awa. Ĩndĩ thiĩ kũrĩ aariũ a Awa ũmeere atĩ nĩndĩrambata kũrĩ Awa na no we Ithe wanyu, na kũrĩ Ngai wakwa, na no we Ngai wanyu.”" 
John20:18 Naake Mariamu Mũmagidali agĩthiĩ akĩĩra arutwo a Jesũ atĩ nĩoneete Mwathani, na akĩmeera maũndũ moothe marĩa eerĩĩtwo nĩ we." 
John20:19 Na mũthenya o ro ũcio wa kiumia hwaĩinĩ, arutwo a Jesũ maikarĩĩte mehingĩire nyũmba tondũ nĩmeetigagĩra anene a Ayahudi. Na rĩĩrĩ, hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ agĩũka akĩrũũgama gatagatĩ kaao akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Thaayũ ũrogĩa na inyuĩ.”" 
John20:20 Arĩĩkia kuuga ũguo akĩmoonia mooko maake o na mbaru ciake. Nao makĩiyũrwo nĩ gĩkeno nĩ ũndũ wa kuona Mwathani. 
John20:21 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera o rĩngĩ atĩrĩ, “Thaayũ ũrogĩa na inyuĩ. O ta ũrĩa Awa aandũmire, noguo o na niĩ ndamũtũma.”" 
John20:22 Hĩndĩ ĩyo akĩmahuuhĩrĩria mĩhũũmũ yake akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Amũkĩraai Roho Mũtheru." 
John20:23 Arĩa oothe mũrĩohagĩra meehia maao nĩmarĩohagĩrwo, na arĩa oothe mũtarĩohagĩra meehia maao matirĩohagĩrwo.”" 
John20:24 Na rĩĩrĩ, Toma ũmwe, wa arutwo arĩa ikũmi na eerĩ, (ũrĩa wetagwo wa Mahatha), ndaarĩ nao hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ ookire." 
John20:25 Arutwo acio angĩ magĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Nĩtuoneete Mwathani!” Naake Toma akiuga atĩrĩ, “Itangĩona irema cia mĩcumaarĩ iria i mookoinĩ maake, na njikie kĩara gĩakwa iremainĩ icio cia mĩcumaarĩ, o na njikie guoko mbaruinĩ ciake, ndingĩĩtĩkia.”" 
John20:26 Na rĩĩrĩ, thuutha wa mĩthenya ĩnaana arutwo maikarĩĩte hamwe nyũmba thĩinĩ rĩngĩ, na Toma aarĩ hamwe nao. Mĩrango yarĩ mĩhinge, no Jesũ akĩmoimĩrĩra akĩrũũgama gatagatĩ kaao, akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Thaayũ ũrogĩa na inyuĩ.”" 
John20:27 Agĩcooka akĩĩra Toma atĩrĩ, “Rora mooko maakwa, na ũikie kĩara gĩaku iremainĩ ici, o na ũtambũrũkie guoko ũgũikie mbaruinĩ ciakwa, nĩ geetha ũthirwo nĩ nganja icio ciaku, wĩtĩkie!”" 
John20:28 Naake Toma akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Mwathani wakwa na Ngai wakwa!”" 
John20:29 Jesũ akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Wetĩkia tondũ nĩwanyona? Kũraathimwo nĩ arĩa meetĩkagia o na matooneete!”" 
John20:30 Nĩkũrĩ ciama ingĩ nyingĩ Jesũ aaringire arutwo aake makĩyonagĩra itaandĩkĩĩtwo thĩinĩ wa ibuku rĩĩrĩ. 
John20:31 Ici irĩ ho ciandĩkĩĩtwo nĩ geetha mwĩtĩkie atĩ Jesũ nĩ we Mesia, Mũrũ wa Ngai, na nĩ ũndũ wa kũmwĩtĩkia mũgĩe na muoyo." 
John21:1 Thuutha ũcio, Jesũ nĩoimĩrĩire arutwo aake rĩngĩ iriainĩ rĩa Tiberia. Aamoimĩrĩire ta ũũ:" 
John21:2 Hĩndĩ ĩmwe Simoni Petero, Toma (ũrĩa wetagwo wa Mahatha), marĩ na Nathanaeli (ũrĩa wa kuuma Kana ya Galili), aariũ a Zebedi hamwe na arutwo angĩ eerĩ a Jesũ maikarĩĩte hamwe." 
John21:3 Simoni Petero akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Niĩ nĩndathiĩ gũtega thamaki.” Nao acio angĩ makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “O na ithuĩ nĩtũgũthiĩ hamwe nawe.” Magĩkiumagara makĩingĩra gatarũ magĩthiĩ, ĩndĩ ũtukũ ũcio wothe matiigana kũgwatia o na kĩ." 
John21:4 Rũũciinĩ riũa rĩkĩratha, Jesũ akĩrũũgama hũgũrũrũinĩ cia iria, no arutwo aake matiamũmenyaga." 
John21:5 Naake akĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Aanake, mũrĩ mũragwatia kĩndũ?” Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Aaca.”" 
John21:6 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Ikiai ngara mwena wa ũrĩo wa gatarũ na nĩmũkũgwatia.” Magĩgĩikia ngara ciao, nao makĩremwo nĩgũciguucia nĩ ũndũ nĩciagwatĩĩtie thamaki nyingĩ." 
John21:7 Na hĩndĩ ĩyo mũrutwo ũrĩa wendeetwo nĩ Jesũ akĩĩra Petero atĩrĩ, “Nĩ Mwathani!” Rĩrĩa Simoni Petero aiguire atĩ “Nĩ Mwathani”, agĩkĩĩra nguo yake ya igũrũ amu nĩarutĩĩte nguo ciake, akĩrũũga maaĩinĩ." 
John21:8 Nao arutwo acio angĩ makiumĩra na gatarũ maguucĩĩtie rũgara rũiyũrĩĩte thamaki. Hau maarĩ hatiarĩ haraaya tondũ haarĩ ta mita igana rĩmwe kuuma rũteereinĩ. 
John21:9 Maakinya rũteereinĩ magĩkora mwaki wa makara wakĩĩtio ũigĩrĩirwo thamaki na mũgate. 
John21:10 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Reeheei thamaki imwe cia iria mwagwatia.”" 
John21:11 Simoni Petero akĩingĩra gatarũ akĩguucia rũgara akĩruumĩria rũiyũrĩĩte thamaki nene, ta igana rĩa mĩrongo ĩtaano na ithatũ; o na akorwo ciarĩ nyingĩ ũguo, rũgara rũtiatuĩkire." 
John21:12 Jesũ agĩkĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Ũkaai mwĩgagũre.” Na gũtirĩ mũrutwo womĩrĩirie kũmũũria, “Wee nĩ we ũ?” Amu nĩmaamenyire atĩ nĩ Mwathani." 
John21:13 Jesũ agĩgĩũka, akĩoya mũgate akĩmahe, agĩcooka agĩĩka o taguo na thamaki." 
John21:14 Rĩu nĩrĩo riita rĩa gatatũ rĩa Jesũ kuumĩrĩra arutwo aake, arĩĩkia kũriũka kuuma kũrĩ arĩa akuũ." 
John21:15 Marĩĩkia kwĩgagũra, Jesũ akĩũria Simoni Petero atĩrĩ, “Simoni mũrũ wa Johana, nĩũnyendeete gũkĩra aya angĩ?” Naake akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Ĩĩ Mwathani, wee nĩũũĩ atĩ nĩngwendeete.” Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Heaga tũgondu twakwa gĩa kũrĩa.”" 
John21:16 Agĩcooka akĩmũũria rĩa keerĩ atĩrĩ, “Simoni mũrũ wa Johana, nĩũnyendeete?” Naake Simoni akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Ĩĩ Mwathani, wee nĩũũĩ atĩ nĩngwendeete.” Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Rĩithagia ng'ondu ciakwa.”" 
John21:17 Agĩcooka akĩmũũria rĩa gatatũ atĩrĩ, “Simoni, mũrũ wa Johana, nĩũnyendeete?” Petero akĩigua kĩeha nĩ tondũ wa kũũrio rĩa gatatũ “Nĩũnyendeete?” Kwoguo agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Mwathani, wee nĩũũĩ maũndũ moothe; nĩũũĩ atĩ niĩ nĩngwendeete!” Jesũ agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Heaga ng'ondu ciakwa gĩa kũrĩa." 
John21:18 Ngũkwĩra na ma atĩ, rĩrĩa warĩ mwĩthĩ nĩwehaaragĩria ũgathiĩ o kũrĩa ũngĩendire, no rĩrĩa ũgaakũra ũgaatambũrũkia mooko maaku, mũndũ ũngĩ akuohe, agũtware kũrĩa ũtarenda gũthiĩ.”" 
John21:19 (Jesũ akiuga ũguo oonanagia ũrĩa Petero agaakua agoocithie Ngai.) Jesũ agĩcooka akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Nũmĩrĩra!”" 
John21:20 Na rĩĩrĩ, Petero akĩĩhũgũra akĩona mũrutwo ũrĩa Jesũ eendeete amarũmĩrĩire. Mũrutwo ũcio no we ũrĩa wetiiranĩĩtie gĩthũriinĩ kĩa Jesũ rĩrĩa maarĩaga irio akĩmũũria, “Mwathani, nũũ ũgũgũkunyanĩra?”" 
John21:21 Rĩrĩa Petero oonire mũrutwo ũcio akĩũria Jesũ atĩrĩ, “Mwathani, ĩ naake mũndũ ũyũ ũhoro wake nĩ atĩa?”" 
John21:22 Naake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Ingĩenda aikare nginya rĩrĩa ngooka-rĩ, ũcio ũkĩrĩ ũhoro waku? Wee nũmĩrĩra!”" 
John21:23 Tondũ ũcio ũhoro ũgĩkĩhunja gatagatĩinĩ ka arũmĩrĩri a Jesũ atĩ mũrutwo ũcio ndagaakua. Ĩndĩ Jesũ we mwene ndeerĩĩte mũrutwo ũcio ndagaakua; oigĩĩte atĩrĩ, “Ingĩenda aikare nginya rĩrĩa ngooka-rĩ, ũcio ũkĩrĩ ũhoro waku?”" 
John21:24 Mũrutwo ũcio nĩ we ũheanĩĩte ũhoro wa maũndũ maya, na no we wamaandĩkĩre; na ithuĩ nĩtũũĩ atĩ ũrĩa oigire nĩ ũhoro wa ma." 
John21:25 Nĩkũrĩ maũndũ mangĩ maingĩ Jesũ eekire. Korwo no maandĩkwo moothe ũmwe ũmwe ngwĩciiria atĩ o na thĩ yo nyene ndĩngĩiganĩra mbuku iria ingĩandĩkwo. 
Acts1:1 Kũrĩ mũgaathe Theofilo: Thĩinĩ wa ibuku rĩakwa rĩa mbere nĩndaandĩkire maũndũ moothe marĩa Jesũ eekire na marĩa aarutanire kuuma rĩrĩa aambĩrĩirie wĩra wake 
Acts1:2 nginya mũthenya ũrĩa aatwarirwo igũrũ. Ataanatwarwo igũrũ nĩamaheire mawatho ahotithĩĩtio nĩ Roho Mũtheru. 
Acts1:3 Na rĩĩrĩ, thuutha wa gũkua gwake, Jesũ nĩonanirie na njĩra nyingĩ atĩ aarĩ muoyo. Nĩoimĩrĩire atũmwo maita maingĩ itĩĩnainĩ rĩa matukũ mĩrongo ĩna, na akaaragia nao ũhoro wa Ũthamaki wa Ngai." 
Acts1:4 Rĩrĩa aikaranagia nao, nĩamaathiire akĩmeera atĩrĩ: “Mũtikoime Jerusalemu, no mweterere kĩheeo kĩrĩa ndamwĩrire ũhoro wakĩo, kĩheeo kĩrĩa Awa aamwĩrĩire." 
Acts1:5 Amu Johana aabatithanagia na maaĩ, no inyuĩ nĩmũrĩbatithio na Roho Mũtheru matukũ maingĩ matanathira.”" 
Acts1:6 Rĩrĩa atũmwo maacemanĩĩtie hamwe makĩũria Jesũ atĩrĩ, “Mwathani, rĩu nĩ hĩndĩ ũgũcookeria Aisiraeli Ũthamaki wao?”" 
Acts1:7 Naake akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Ti ũhoro wanyu kũmenya mahinda kana ciathĩ iria Ithe witũ atuĩte na ũhoti wake we mwene." 
Acts1:8 No nĩmũrĩiyũrwo nĩ hinya rĩrĩa Roho Mũtheru arĩũka kũrĩ inyuĩ, na inyuĩ mũtuĩke aira aakwa Jerusalemu, Judea guothe, Samaria o na thĩ yothe.”" 
Acts1:8 No nĩmũrĩiyũrwo nĩ hinya rĩrĩa Roho Mũtheru arĩũka kũrĩ inyuĩ, na inyuĩ mũtuĩke aira aakwa Jerusalemu, Judea guothe, Samaria o na thĩ yothe.”" 
Acts1:9 Naake arĩĩkia kũmeera ũguo, akĩoywo na igũrũ mamũcũũthĩrĩirie, akĩhithwo nĩ itu, makĩaga gũcooka kũmuona." 
Acts1:10 Na rĩĩrĩ, maroreete mũno na igũrũ mamwĩroreire agĩthiĩ, arũme eerĩ makĩrũũgama harĩ o mehumbĩĩte nguo njerũ cua" 
Acts1:11 makĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Andũ aya a Galili, mũikarĩĩte mũrũũgamĩĩte mũcũũthĩrĩirie na igũrũ nĩkĩ? Jesũ ũcio weherio kuuma harĩ inyuĩ atwarwo igũrũ, nĩagacooka rĩngĩ o ta ũguo mwamuona agĩthiĩ igũrũ.”" 
Acts1:12 Thuutha ũcio atũmwo magĩcooka Jerusalemu moimĩĩte kĩrĩmainĩ kĩa mĩtamaiyũ. Kĩrĩma kĩu gĩ gũkuhĩ na Jerusalemu o ta handũ ha kiromita ĩmwe. 
Acts1:13 Na rĩĩrĩ, matoonya itũũrainĩ magĩthiĩ nyũmba ya igũrũ kũrĩa maikaraga, nao nĩ o: Petero, Johana, Jakubu, Anderea, Filipu, Toma, Baritholomayo, Mathayo, Jakubu mũrũ wa Alufayo, Simeoni Mũzelote na Judasi mũrũ wa Jakubu." 
Acts1:14 Nao andũ acio oothe magaathaathayagia Ngai marĩ na ngoro ĩmwe, me hamwe na atumia amwe, na Mariamu nyina wa Jesũ, o hamwe na aariũ a nyina." 
Acts1:15 Na rĩĩrĩ, matukũinĩ macio Petero akĩrũũgama gatagatĩ ka arĩa meetĩkĩĩtie, nao maarĩ gĩkundi kĩa andũ ta igana rĩa mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ moonganĩĩte, akĩmeera atĩrĩ," 
Acts1:16 “Araata aakwa thĩinĩ wa Mwathani, no mũhaka Maandĩko mangĩahingirio marĩa Roho Mũtheru aaririe o mbere na kanua ka Daudi akiuga ũhoro wa Judasi, ũrĩa watongoririe arĩa maanyiitire Jesũ." 
Acts1:17 Amu Judasi aarĩ ũmwe witũ na nĩaheetwo wĩra hamwe na ithuĩ.” 
Acts1:18 (Atĩrĩĩrĩ, mbeeca iria Judasi oonire thuutha wa gwĩka gĩĩko kĩu kĩũru, agũrire gĩthaka nacio, naake akĩgũa kuo na mũnduru agĩtũrĩka nda mara moothe magĩitĩka thĩ." 
Acts1:19 Ũhoro ũcio ũkĩmenyeka nĩ arĩa oothe maatũũraga Jerusalemu, nao magĩĩta gĩthaka kĩu Akelidama kũringana na rũthiomi rwao, ũguo nĩkuuga, “Gĩthaka gĩa Thakame.”)" 
Acts1:20 “Tondũ thĩinĩ wa ibuku rĩa Thaburi kwandĩkĩĩtwo atĩrĩ: ‘Mũciĩ wake ũrotiganĩrio; gũtikaanagĩe mũndũ ũgũtũũra kuo.’ Ningĩ nĩkwandĩkĩĩtwo atĩrĩ: ‘Mũndũ ũngĩ nĩoe wĩra wake.’ 
Acts1:21 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio, no mũhaka mũndũ ũngĩ atuĩke mũira hamwe na ithuĩ wa kwĩra andũ atĩ Mwathani Jesũ nĩariũkire kuuma kũrĩ akuũ. Mũndũ ũcio aagĩrĩirwo nĩ gũkorwo arĩ ũmwe wa andũ arĩa maatũire hamwe na ithuĩ ihinda rĩrĩa rĩothe Jesũ aatũũraga na ithuĩ, kuuma rĩrĩa Johana aabatithanagia nginya rĩrĩa Jesũ eeheririo kuuma kũrĩ ithuĩ agĩtwarwo igũrũ.”" 
Acts1:22  
Acts1:23 Nao makĩrũũgamia andũ eerĩ: Josefu, ũrĩa wetagwo Barasaba (na ageetwo na rĩĩtwa rĩngĩ Jusito), na Mathia." 
Acts1:24 Makĩhooya makiuga atĩrĩ, “Mwathani wee ũũĩ ngoro cia andũ oothe, tuonie nĩ ũrĩkũ wa aya eerĩ ũthuurĩĩte" 
Acts1:25 wa kũruta wĩra na gũtuĩka mũtũmwo handũ ha Judasi ũrĩa wathiire handũ harĩa haarĩ haake.” 
Acts1:26 Nao maikia kura, Mathia agĩthuurwo. Naake agĩtuĩka ũmwe wa atũmwo acio angĩ ikũmi na ũmwe." 
Acts2:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, mũthenya wa Penitekosito wakinya, arĩa oothe meetĩkĩĩtie magĩkorwo marĩ handũ hamwe." 
Acts2:2 O rĩmwe mũrurumo mũnene ũkiuma igũrũ, ũhaana ta wa rũhuuho rũnene, ũkĩiyũra nyũmba yothe kũu maikarĩĩte." 
Acts2:3 Nao makĩona kĩndũ kĩahaanaga ta nĩnĩmbĩ cia mwaki iria ciahaanaga nĩmĩ, nacio nĩmĩ icio igĩikara igũrũ rĩa mũndũ o mũndũ." 
Acts2:4 Nao oothe makĩiyũrwo nĩ Roho Mũtheru, makĩambĩrĩria kwaria thiomi ingĩ kũringana na ũrĩa Roho aamahotithagia kwaria." 
Acts2:5 Na rĩĩrĩ, kũu Jerusalemu nĩgwatũũraga Ayahudi, andũ maatĩĩĩte Ngai a kuuma kũndũ guothe thĩinĩ wa thĩ." 
Acts2:6 Nao rĩrĩa maiguire inegene aingĩ aao magĩũka, nao makĩgegeara tondũ o mũndũ nĩaiguire andũ arĩa meetĩkĩĩtie makĩaria na rũthiomi rwa kũrĩa o mũndũ aaciarĩirwo." 
Acts2:7 Magĩkĩgega mũno na makĩmaka makĩũrania atĩrĩ, “Githĩ andũ aya oothe maraaria ti a Galili?" 
Acts2:8 Kũhotekeete atĩa atĩ tũramaigua o mũndũ na mwarĩrie wa kũrĩa twaciarĩirwo? 
Acts2:9 Ithuĩ tuumĩĩte mabũrũriinĩ ma Parithia, Midiani na Elamu, o na mabũrũriinĩ ma Mesopotamia, Judea, Kapadokia, Ponito, Asia," 
Acts2:9 Ithuĩ tuumĩĩte mabũrũriinĩ ma Parithia, Midiani na Elamu, o na mabũrũriinĩ ma Mesopotamia, Judea, Kapadokia, Ponito, Asia," 
Acts2:10 Ferugia, Pamufulia, Misiri, na mĩena ya Libia kũrĩa kũhakaine na Kurene. Ningĩ amwe aitũ moimĩĩte Roma," 
Acts2:11 arĩa Ayahudi na arĩa magarũrũkĩĩte makahĩmbĩria Ũyahudi. Andũ angĩ aitũ moimĩĩte Kirete, na bũrũri wa Arabu, na ithuothe nĩtũraigua makĩaria ũhoro wa mawĩra manene ma Ngai o mũndũ witũ akeiguĩra na rũthiomi rwa kwao!”" 
Acts2:12 Nao oothe makĩgega makĩrigwo nĩ ũhoro ũcio, makĩũrania atĩrĩ, “Ũũ nĩkuuga atĩa?”" 
Acts2:13 No angĩ makĩnyũrũria andũ arĩa meetĩkĩĩtie makiuga atĩrĩ, “Aya nĩkũrĩĩo marĩĩtwo nĩ njoohi.”" 
Acts2:14 No Petero akĩrũũgama hamwe na atũmwo arĩa ikũmi na ũmwe, akĩaria na mũgambo mũnene akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Andũ aya a Judea na inyuothe mũtũũraga Jerusalemu, thikĩrĩriai mũigue ũrĩa ngũmwĩra." 
Acts2:14 No Petero akĩrũũgama hamwe na atũmwo arĩa ikũmi na ũmwe, akĩaria na mũgambo mũnene akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Andũ aya a Judea na inyuothe mũtũũraga Jerusalemu, thikĩrĩriai mũigue ũrĩa ngũmwĩra." 
Acts2:15 Amu andũ aya ti arĩĩu ta ũguo mũgwĩciiria, amu rĩu no thaa ithatũ cia rũũciinĩ." 
Acts2:16 Ũyũ nĩ Ũhoro ũrĩa waririo nĩ mũnabii Joeli akiuga atĩrĩ: 
Acts2:17 ‘Ngai ekuuga atĩrĩ: matukũinĩ ma kũrigĩrĩria nĩngaitĩrĩria andũ oothe Roho wakwa nao aariũ na aarĩ aanyu nĩmakaarathaga moohoro; aanake aanyu nĩmakoonaga cioneki, na athuuri arĩa akũrũ marootage irooto." 
Acts2:18 Ĩĩ, matukũinĩ macio nĩngaitĩrĩria ndungata ciakwa cia arũme na cia andũ a nja Roho wakwa, nao nĩmakaarathaga moohoro." 
Acts2:19 Nĩngoonania maũndũ ma kũgegania kũũrĩa igũrũ na ciama thĩ, nĩgũgaakorwo na thakame, mwaki, na ndoogo ndumanu;" 
Acts2:20 narĩo riũa nĩrĩkaagarũrwo rĩtuĩke nduma, naguo mweri ũtuĩke ta thakame mbere ya mũthenya ũcio mũnene wa Mwathani, na wĩ riiri gũkinya." 
Acts2:21 Nĩgũgaatuĩka atĩ mũndũ o wothe, ũgaakaĩra Mwathani nĩakaahonokio.’" 
Acts2:22 “Andũ a Isiraeli! Taiguai ciugo ici, Jesũ wa Nazarethi aarĩ mũndũ, naguo ũnene wake ũrĩa warĩ wa ũngai wonanirio wega kũrĩ inyuĩ na njĩra ya ciĩko cia magegania na ciama iria Ngai aaringaga agereire harĩ we. Inyuĩ nĩmũũĩ wega ũhoro ũcio, tondũ wekirwo gatagatĩinĩ kaanyu." 
Acts2:23 Jesũ ũcio waneanirwo kũringana na ũrĩa Ngai aatuĩte na akamenya mbere, nĩ we mworagithirie, mũkĩmũũraga mũhũthĩrĩĩte andũ aaganu arĩa maamwambire." 
Acts2:24 No Ngai nĩamũriũkirie akĩmuohora kuuma hinyainĩ wa gĩkuũ, tondũ gũtingĩahotekire oohwo nĩkĩo." 
Acts2:25 Amu Daudi ekuuga ũhoro wake atĩrĩ: ‘Nĩndoonaga Mwathani mbere yakwa hĩndĩ ciothe; aakoragwo mwena wakwa wa ũrĩo nĩ geetha ndikeenyenyio. 
Acts2:26 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ngĩcanjamũka na ngĩina ndĩ na gĩkeno; naguo mwĩrĩ wakwa ũkĩhuurũka wĩ na kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro. 
Acts2:27 Nĩ gũkorwo wee Ngai ndũgaatiganĩria muoyo wakwa kwa arĩa akuũ; ndũkaareka ndungata yaku ĩrĩa ĩhokekeete ĩbuthĩre mbĩĩrĩrainĩ. 
Acts2:28 Wee nĩũnyonereirie njĩra cia muoyo; na nĩũgaatũma njiyũrwo nĩ gĩkeno nĩ ũndũ wa kuona ũthiũ waku.’ 
Acts2:29 “Andũ aitũ, ngũmwĩra nyũmĩrĩirie ũhoro wa guuka witũ Mũthamaki Daudi. Atĩrĩĩrĩ, Daudi nĩakuire na agĩthikwo, na mbĩĩrĩra yake ĩrĩ gũũkũ gwitũ o na nginya ũũmũũthĩ ũyũ." 
Acts2:30 Daudi aarĩ mũnabii, na nĩamenyeete atĩ Ngai nĩehĩtĩĩte na mwĩhĩtwa atĩ nĩakaanenehia ũmwe wa rũciaro rwake atuĩke mũthamaki o ta ũrĩa we mwene aatariĩ." 
Acts2:31 Tondũ nĩamenyeete ũhoro ũcio o mbere-rĩ, nĩaririe ũhoro wa kũriũka kwa Mesia akiuga atĩrĩ: ‘Ndaatigirwo kwa arĩa akuũ, o na mwĩrĩ wake ndũigana kũbutha.’" 
Acts2:32 Ngai nĩariũkirie Jesũ ũcio na ithuothe tũrĩ aira a ũhoro ũcio. 
Acts2:33 Tondũ nĩatũgĩrĩĩtio agaikara guokoinĩ kwa ũrĩo kwa Ngai, na akaamũkĩra Roho Mũtheru kuuma kũrĩ Ngai Ithe ta ũrĩa eeranĩire, nĩatũitĩrĩirie Roho ũcio ũrĩa rĩu mũrona na mũkaigua." 
Acts2:34 Amu Daudi we mwene ndaambatire igũrũ; we nĩkuuga oigire atĩrĩ: ‘Mwathani Ngai nĩerire Mwathani wakwa atĩrĩ: Ikara mwena wakwa wa ũrĩo 
Acts2:35 o nginya ngaatua thũ ciaku gaturwa ga kũigĩrĩra magũrũ maaku.’ 
Acts2:36 “Tondũ wa ũguo kĩmenyeei na ma inyuĩ andũ oothe a Isiraeli atĩ Jesũ ũcio mwambire mũtĩinĩ, nĩ we Ngai atuĩte Mwathani na Mesia!”" 
Acts2:37 Nao andũ acio maigua ũguo magĩtheecwo ngoro makĩũria Petero na atũmwo acio angĩ atĩrĩ, “Aariũ a Ithe witũ tũgũgĩĩka atĩa?”" 
Acts2:38 Naake Petero akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ, “Mwĩrireei, mũcooke mũbatithio mũndũ o mũndũ thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩa Jesũ Kristũ nĩguo mũrekerwo meehia maanyu, na nĩmũkwamũkĩra kĩheeo kĩa Roho Mũtheru." 
Acts2:39 Amu kĩĩranĩro kĩu nĩ inyuĩ mwerĩirwo na ciana cianyu o hamwe na arĩa me kũraaya, arĩa oothe Mwathani Ngai witũ eetaga kũrĩ we.”" 
Acts2:40 Petero agĩkĩmaarĩria na ciugo icio na ingĩ nyingĩ, akĩmathaitha akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Mwĩhonokiei muume kũrĩ iherithia rĩrĩa rĩrooka kũrĩ rũciaro rũũrũ rwaganu!”" 
Acts2:41 Nao arĩa meetĩkirie ũhoro wake makĩbatithio, na mũthenya ũcio makĩongerereka andũ ta ngiri ithatũ (3,000)." 
Acts2:42 Nao magĩikara marũmĩĩtie ũrutani wa atũmwo, magakoragwo thĩinĩ wa ngwatanĩro ciao, na makagwatanagĩra nao rĩrĩa mekwenyũra mũgate o na rĩrĩa mekũhooya." 
Acts2:43 Namo maũndũ maingĩ ma magegania o na ciama ikĩringwo nĩ atũmwo, nao andũ oothe makĩiyũrwo nĩ guoya." 
Acts2:44 Nao arĩa oothe meetĩkĩĩtie maikaraga hamwe makagwatanagĩra indo ciao ciothe hamwe. 
Acts2:45 Nao nĩmeendagia ithaka na indo ciao, makagayana oothe o mũndũ kũringana na mabata maake." 
Acts2:46 O mũthenya nĩmaathiaga Hekaarũinĩ hamwe, na makenyũra mĩgate mĩciĩinĩ yao, makarĩanagĩra makeneete na me na ngoro theru," 
Acts2:47 makĩgoocaga Ngai, na makeendagwo nĩ andũ oothe. Naake Mwathani nĩongagĩrĩra thiritũinĩ yao o mũthenya arĩa maahonokagio." 
Acts3:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, mũthenya ũmwe Petero na Johana nĩmaathiire Hekaarũinĩ hĩndĩ ya mahooya ma thaa kenda cia mũthenya." 
Acts3:2 Naho hau mũromoinĩ wa Hekaarũ, ũrĩa wĩtagwo Mũromo Mũthaka, nĩhaarĩ mũndũ watũire e kĩonje kuuma rĩrĩa aaciarirwo. Naake nĩakuuagwo mũthenya o mũthenya akaigwo ho nĩ geetha ahooe ũteithio kuuma kũrĩ arĩa matoonyaga Hekaarũ." 
Acts3:3 Rĩrĩa mũndũ ũcio oonire Petero na Johana magĩtoonya Hekaarũ, akĩmooria mamũhe kĩndũ." 
Acts3:4 Naake Petero na Johana makĩmũkũũrĩra maitho, Petero akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ta tũrore!”" 
Acts3:5 Naake akĩmarora erĩgĩrĩire atĩ nĩekũheeo kĩndũ nĩ o. 
Acts3:6 No Petero akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Niĩ ndirĩ na mbeeca, no nĩngũkũhe kĩrĩa ndĩ nakĩo. Atĩrĩĩrĩ, thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩa Jesũ wa Nazarethi wĩtware!”" 
Acts3:7 Petero akĩnyiita mũndũ ũcio guoko kwa ũrĩo, akĩmũũkĩria na igũrũ. Ihinda o rĩu makinya maake na thũng'wa ciake ikĩgĩa na hinya;" 
Acts3:8 akĩrũũga na igũrũ akĩĩrũũgamia we mwene na akĩambĩrĩria gwĩtwara. Agĩgĩtoonya Hekaarũ hamwe nao etwarĩĩte na magũrũ akĩrũũgarũũgaga, na akĩgoocaga Ngai." 
Acts3:9 Nao andũ oothe maamuona agĩĩtwara akĩgoocaga Ngai," 
Acts3:10 na maamenya atĩ nĩ we waikaraga Mũromoinĩ Mũthaka wa Hekaarũ eetereire ũteithio, makĩmaka na makĩgega nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa eekĩĩtwo." 
Acts3:11 Na rĩĩrĩ, mũndũ ũcio o egiritanĩĩtie na Petero na Johana hau gĩthakuinĩ, kĩrĩa gĩetagwo gĩa Solomoni, andũ magĩteng'era kũrĩ o magegeete." 
Acts3:12 Rĩrĩa Petero oonire andũ acio akĩmaarĩria akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Andũ aya Isiraeli, mũgegeetio nĩ ũndũ ũyũ nĩkĩ? Mũratũrora ũguo ta arĩ hinya witũ kana ũthingu witũ watũma mũndũ ũyũ etware nĩkĩ?" 
Acts3:13 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, Ngai wa Aburahamu, Isaaka na Jakubu, o we Ngai wa maithe maitũ-rĩ, nĩagoocithia Jesũ ndungata yake, ũrĩa inyuĩ mwaneanire na mũkĩmũkaana mbere ya Pilato rĩrĩa Pilato atuĩte atĩ nĩekũmũrekia." 
Acts3:14 Inyuĩ mwakaanire ũrĩa mũthingu na mũtheru, mũkĩũria muohorerwo mũũragani." 
Acts3:15 Mũkĩũraga mũheani wa muoyo, ũrĩa Ngai aacookire akĩriũkia kuuma kũrĩ akuũ, na ithuĩ tũrĩ aira a ũhoro ũcio." 
Acts3:16 Tondũ wa gwĩtĩkia, rĩĩtwa rĩu rĩa Jesũ nĩrĩo rĩatũma mũndũ ũyũ mũrona na mũũĩ agĩe na hinya. Naguo wĩtĩkio ũcio uumanĩĩte na Jesũ nĩguo wahe mũndũ ũyũ hinya wa mwĩrĩ mũkĩonaga." 
Acts3:17 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ, andũ aitũ, nĩnjũũĩ atĩ inyuĩ na aathani aanyu mwekire ũguo nĩ ũndũ wa kũrigwo." 
Acts3:18 No Ngai nĩahingirie ũrĩa oigĩĩte mbere na tũnua twa anabii oothe, atĩ no mũhaka Mesia anyariirwo." 
Acts3:19 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mwĩrireei, mũcookerere Ngai nĩ geetha meehia maanyu meeherio." 
Acts3:20 Thuutha wa ũguo mũcooke mũgĩe na mahinda ma gwĩkĩrwo hinya wĩtĩkioinĩ wanyu uumĩĩte kwĩ Mwathani, na amũtũmĩre Jesũ o we Mesia ũrĩa aamwĩrĩire." 
Acts3:21 Naake no mũhaka aikarage kũu igũrũ, o nginya hĩndĩ ĩkinye, rĩrĩa maũndũ marĩa moothe Ngai aanoiga na tũnua twa anabii aake atheru makaahingio." 
Acts3:22 Nĩ gũkorwo Musa oigire atĩrĩ, ‘Mwathani Ngai wanyu nĩakaamũtũmĩra mũnabii, o ta ũrĩa niĩ aandũmire. Mũnabii ũcio agaakorwo arĩ ũmwe wa andũ aanyu, na nĩmũkaamwathĩkĩra maũndũinĩ moothe marĩa akaamwĩra." 
Acts3:23 Na nĩgũgaatuĩka atĩrĩ, mũndũ o wothe ũtakaigua mũnabii ũcio nĩakaaniinwo, eeherio kũrĩ andũ.’" 
Acts3:24 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, anabii oothe arĩa maaheanire ũhoro, kuuma o Samũeli na arĩa angĩ mookire thuutha wake nĩmaarathire ũhoro wa matukũ maya." 
Acts3:25 Inyuĩ-rĩ, mũrĩ aariũ a anabii na mũrĩ a kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩrĩa Ngai eerĩire maithe maanyu, rĩrĩa eerire Aburahamu atĩrĩ, ‘Nĩngaaraathima andũ oothe a thĩ hũthĩrĩĩte mũndũ wa rũciaro rwaku.’" 
Acts3:26 Ngai nĩariũkirie ndungata yake, akĩmĩtũma kũrĩ inyuĩ mbere, nĩ geetha ĩmũraathime, na ĩtũme inyuothe mũgarũrũke mũtigane na waganu wanyu.”" 
Acts4:1 Na rĩrĩa Petero na Johana maaragĩria andũ acio, athĩnjĩri Ngai, na mũnene wa arangĩri a Hekaarũ, na Asadukai makĩmakora." 
Acts4:2 Nao makĩraakara mũno maigua atũmwo acio makĩruta andũ makiugaga atĩ Jesũ nĩariũkĩĩte, naguo ũndũ ũcio ũgakĩonania atĩ arĩa akuũ o nao nĩmakaariũka." 
Acts4:3 Magĩkĩmanyiita, makĩmahingĩra korokoroinĩ atĩ nĩguo meeterere gũkĩe tondũ kwarĩ hwaĩinĩ." 
Acts4:4 No rĩĩrĩ, andũ aingĩ arĩa maiguĩte ũhoro magĩĩtĩkia; nao arũme makĩongerereka makĩhinga ta ngiri ithaano (5,000)." 
Acts4:5 Na rĩĩrĩ, kwarooka gũkĩa, atongoria aao na athuuri a kĩama, na arutani a Watho makĩũngana kũu Jerusalemu." 
Acts4:6 Hamwe nao nĩhaarĩ na Anasi Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai Ũrĩa Mũnene, Kaiafa, Johana, Alekisanda, na andũ oothe a mũhĩrĩga wa Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai Ũrĩa Mũnene." 
Acts4:7 Makĩreehe Petero na Johana mbere yao, makĩmooria atĩrĩ, “Mũrahonanirie na hinya ũrĩkũ kana na rĩĩtwa rĩa ũ?”" 
Acts4:8 Naake Petero aiyũrĩĩtwo nĩ Roho Mũtheru akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Atongoria aya a andũ na athuuri a kĩama," 
Acts4:9 ũũmũũthĩ tũraciirithio tondũ wa ũndũ ũcio mwega tũreekire wa kũhonia kĩonje, tũgakĩũrio mũndũ ũcio arahonirio atĩa." 
Acts4:10 Inyuĩ o na andũ oothe a Isiraeli ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ, mũndũ ũyũ arũũgamĩĩte haaha mbere yanyu e mũhonu nĩ ũndũ wa rĩĩtwa rĩa Jesũ Kristũ wa Nazarethi, ũrĩa inyuĩ mwambire, naake Ngai akĩmũriũkia kuuma kũrĩ arĩa akuũ." 
Acts4:11 Ũcio nĩ we ihiga rĩrĩa inyuĩ aaki mwaregire na nĩ we ũtuĩkĩĩte ihiga rĩrĩa rĩ bata gũkĩra marĩa mangĩ moothe mũthingiinĩ o ta ũrĩa maandĩko moigĩĩte. 
Acts4:12 Na rĩĩrĩ, ũhonokio ndũngĩoneka na ũndũ wa mũndũ ũngĩ, amu gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩ waheanirwo ũngĩhota gũtũhonokia.”" 
Acts4:13 Nao athuuri a kĩama makĩgega mũno moona ũũmĩrĩru wa Petero na Johana. Ningĩ maamenya atĩ maarĩ andũ o ro ũguo na matiarĩ athoomu. Magĩkĩmenya atĩ nĩmaatũũranĩĩtie na Jesũ. 
Acts4:14 No moona mũndũ ũcio wahoneetio arũngiĩ hakuhĩ na Petero na Johana, makĩaga ũndũ mangiuga." 
Acts4:15 Kwoguo makĩĩrwo moime kĩamainĩ, nao athuuri magĩcookania ndundu makĩũrania o eene atĩrĩ," 
Acts4:16 “Andũ aya tũkũmeeka atĩa? Andũ oothe a Jerusalemu nĩmooĩ atĩ kĩama kĩnene nĩkĩringĩĩtwo nĩ o, na tũtingĩhota gũkaana." 
Acts4:17 No nĩ geetha ũhoro ũyũ ndũgaatambe makĩria gatagatĩinĩ ka andũ-rĩ, rekeei tũmakaanie matigaacooke o rĩ o rĩ kwarĩria mũndũ o na ũmwe ũhoro wa rĩĩtwa rĩu rĩa Jesũ.”" 
Acts4:18 Magĩkĩmeeta kĩamainĩ makĩmeera matigaacooke kwaria kana kũrutana ũndũ na rĩĩtwa rĩa Jesũ. 
Acts4:19 No Petero na Johana magĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Nĩ inyuĩ mũgũtua kana nĩ wega maithoinĩ ma Ngai kũmwathĩkĩra inyuĩ gũkĩra gwathĩkĩra Ngai," 
Acts4:20 amu ithuĩ no mũhaka tũthiĩ na mbere kwaria ũhoro ũrĩa tuoneete na tũiguĩte.” 
Acts4:21 Thuutha wa kũmakaania na hinya, athuuri acio makĩĩra Petero na Johana mathiĩ, amu nĩmaagire njĩra ya kũmaherithia nayo nĩ ũndũ wa gwĩtigĩra andũ, nĩ ũndũ andũ oothe nĩmaagoocaga Ngai nĩ ũndũ wa ũndũ ũcio wekĩĩtwo." 
Acts4:22 Mũndũ ũcio wahonirio na njĩra ya kĩama aarĩ na makĩria ma mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna. 
Acts4:23 Rĩrĩa Petero na Johana maarekereirio, magĩthiĩ kũrĩ andũ arĩa meetĩkĩĩtie makĩmamenyithia ũrĩa athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene na athuuri a kĩama maameerĩĩte." 
Acts4:24 Nao andũ acio meetĩkĩĩtie maigua ũhoro ũcio, makĩhooya Ngai me na ngoro ĩmwe makiuga atĩrĩ, “Mwathani mũnene, wee nĩ we wombire igũrũ na thĩ, na iria o na indo ciothe iria irĩ kuo!" 
Acts4:25 Nĩwe waheire ithe witũ Daudi ciugo cia kwaria. Aarĩ ndungata yaku na aathĩĩtwo nĩ Roho Mũtheru nĩoigire atĩrĩ, ‘Nĩkĩ gĩatũmire andũ a Ndũũrĩrĩ mang'ũrĩke mũno; Nĩkĩ gĩatũmire andũ meeciirie maũndũ ma tũhũ?" 
Acts4:26 Athamaki a gũũkũ thĩ nĩmehotoreete na aathani magacemania, maregane na Mwathani na mahũũrane na Mesia wake.’" 
Acts4:27 Amu ti itherũ Herode na Ponitio Pilato, hamwe na andũ a Ndũũrĩrĩ, o na andũ nĩmoonganire itũũrainĩ rĩĩrĩ mahũũrane na Jesũ ndungata yaku ĩrĩa theru, o ĩrĩa wee waitĩrĩirie maguta." 
Acts4:28 Meekire ũguo nĩ geetha mahingie maũndũ marĩa moothe watanyĩĩte gwĩka na hinya waku kuuma o kĩambĩrĩria. 
Acts4:29 Rĩu Mwathani rora wone ũrĩa maratũmakia, ũtũhotithie ithuĩ ndungata ciaku kwaragia ũhoro waku twĩ na ũũmĩrĩru." 
Acts4:30 Tambũrũkia guoko gwaku ũhonanie, wonanie maũndũ ma kũgegania na ũringe ciama na hinya wa rĩĩtwa rĩa ndungata yaku theru Jesũ.”" 
Acts4:31 Na rĩĩrĩ, marĩĩkia kũhooya, hau maagomanĩĩte hakĩgĩa gĩthingithia, nao andũ oothe makĩiyũrwo nĩ Roho Mũtheru, makĩaria ũhoro wa Ngai moomĩrĩirie mũno." 
Acts4:32 Hĩndĩ ĩyo arĩa meetĩkĩĩtie maarĩ na ngoro ĩmwe na muorooto o ũmwe, na gũtirĩ mũndũ woigaga atĩ kĩndũ gĩake o na kĩrĩkũ nĩ gĩake we mwene. Maahũthĩraga indo ciao ciothe hamwe." 
Acts4:33 Nao atũmwo magakĩheanaga ũira wa kũriũka kwa Mwathani Jesũ me na hinya mũingĩ, naake Ngai akamoongagĩrĩra iraathimo nyingĩ oothe." 
Acts4:34 Gũtirĩ mũndũ warĩ mũthĩĩni gatagatĩinĩ kaao, tondũ arĩa maarĩ na mĩgũnda na nyũmba nĩmaaciendagia, na kĩrĩa kĩonekaga" 
Acts4:35 gĩgatwarwo harĩ atũmwo; o mũndũ aagayagĩrwo kũringana na mabata maake. 
Acts4:36 Naake mũndũ wetagwo Josefu, ũrĩa atũmwo maatuĩte Baranaba (ũguo nĩkuuga, “Mwana wa kũũmanĩrĩria”), Mũlawii waciarĩirwo itũũra rĩa Kuporo," 
Acts4:37 akĩendia mũgũnda wake, akĩoya mbeeca iria woimire agĩcinengera atũmwo." 
Acts5:1 No rĩĩrĩ, mũthuuri ũmwe wetagwo Anania, me na mũtumia wake Safira nĩmeendirie gĩcunjĩ kĩa mũgũnda wao." 
Acts5:2 Thuutha wa kũrĩĩkanĩra na mũtumia wake, Anania agĩĩtigĩria mbeeca imwe, nacio icio ingĩ agĩtwara harĩ atũmwo." 
Acts5:3 Naake Petero akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Anania, nĩkĩ gĩtũmĩĩte ũiyũrwo nĩ Caitaani ngoroinĩ agatũma ũheenie Roho Mũtheru ũgetigĩria mbeeca imwe cia iria ũrendirie gĩthaka?" 
Acts5:4 Rĩrĩa ũtarakĩendeetie-rĩ, githĩ gĩtiraarĩ o gĩaku? Thuutha wa gũkĩendia-rĩ, githĩ mbeeca icio itiraarĩ o ciaku wĩke ũrĩa ũkwenda nacio? Rĩu-rĩ, nĩkĩ gĩtũmĩĩte wĩciirie gwĩka ũndũ ta ũyũ? Ngũkwĩra atĩrĩ, ti andũ ũheeneetie nĩ Ngai!”" 
Acts5:5 Naake Anania aigua ciugo icio, akĩgũa thĩ agĩkua. Nao arĩa oothe maiguire ũhoro ũcio makĩmaka mũno." 
Acts5:6 Nao aanake magĩũka, makĩmuoha na cuka, makĩmũkuua magĩthiĩ makĩmũthika." 
Acts5:7 Na thuutha wa mathaa ta matatũ mũtumia wake agĩtoonya atekũmenya ũrĩa gwekĩkĩĩte. 
Acts5:8 Naake Petero akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Tanjĩĩra kana mbeeca ici nocio mũrendirie gĩthaka?” Naake agĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Ĩĩ nocio.”" 
Acts5:9 No Petero akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Nĩkĩ gĩtũmĩĩte mũrĩĩkanĩre wee na mũthuuriguo mũgerie Roho wa Mwathani? Atĩrĩĩrĩ, arĩa megũthiĩte gũthika mũthuuriguo rĩu marĩ mũrangoinĩ, nao nĩmegũkuumia nja o nawe!”" 
Acts5:10 Ihinda o rĩu akĩgũa thĩ magũrũinĩ ma Petero agĩkua. Nao aanake magĩtoonya magĩkora akuĩte, makĩmũkuua magĩthiĩ makĩmũthika kũrigania na mũthuuriwe." 
Acts5:11 Rĩrĩa kanitha wothe o na andũ arĩa angĩ maiguire maũndũ macio makĩnyiitwo nĩ guoya mũnene mũno. 
Acts5:12 Na rĩĩrĩ, moorirũ manene na ciama nyingĩ nĩciaringagĩrwo andũ nĩ atũmwo. Nao arĩa meetĩkĩĩtie nĩmaacemanagia hamwe gĩthakuinĩ kĩrĩa gĩetagwo gĩa Solomoni." 
Acts5:13 Nao andũ oothe arĩa mataarĩ a gĩkundi kĩao nĩmaamaheete gĩtĩĩo mũno, o na matingĩetĩkĩrire gũtukana nao." 
Acts5:14 Na rĩĩrĩ, andũ aingĩ, arũme o na andũ a nja arĩa meetĩkagia Mwathani nĩmoongererekaga." 
Acts5:15 Ciĩko irĩa atũmwo meekaga nĩciatũmaga o na andũ makuue arĩa maarĩ arũaru, makamaiga njĩrainĩ makomeete marĩrĩinĩ na mĩgekainĩ, atĩ nĩ geetha amwe mahuutio nĩ kĩĩruru kĩa Petero akĩhĩtũka." 
Acts5:16 O na andũ aingĩ nĩmookaga kuuma matũũra moothe marĩa maarĩ hakuhĩ na Jerusalemu, makareehe arĩa arũaru na arĩa maathĩĩnagio nĩ ngoma na oothe makahonio." 
Acts5:17 Na rĩĩrĩ, mũthĩnjĩri Ngai Ũrĩa Mũnene na andũ a thiritũ yake, nĩ o Asadukai, nĩmaiguire ũiru nĩ ũndũ wa atũmwo, magĩkĩmookĩrĩra." 
Acts5:18 Makĩnyiita atũmwo makĩmaikia njeera ya mũingĩ. 
Acts5:19 No mũraika wa Mwathani akĩhingũra mĩrango ya njeera ũtukũ akĩmaruta kuo akĩmeera atĩrĩ," 
Acts5:20 “Thiĩi mũrũũgame thĩinĩ wa Hekaarũ mwarĩrie andũ mũmahe ũhoro wothe wa muoyo ũyũ mwerũ.” 
Acts5:21 Nao magĩgĩathĩka, na kwarooka gũkĩa magĩtoonya Hekaarũinĩ makĩambĩrĩria kũrutana. Naake Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai Ũrĩa Mũnene agĩũka hamwe na arĩa angĩ maakoragwo naake, magĩĩta kĩama o na athuuri oothe a Isiraeli, magĩtũmana njeera kũrĩa atũmwo maahingĩirwo, makiuga maareehwo." 
Acts5:22 No thigari ciathiĩ itiigana kũmakora kũu njeera. Igĩgĩcookia ũhoro ikiuga atĩrĩ," 
Acts5:23 “Twakora njeera ĩrĩ hinge o wega, na arangĩri marũngiĩ mĩrangoinĩ, no twahingũra-rĩ, tũtinakora mũndũ o na ũmwe!”" 
Acts5:24 Naake mũnene wa arangĩri a Hekaarũ na athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene maigua ũhoro ũcio magĩĩtigĩra mũno, makĩrigwo nĩ ũrĩa gũgũtuĩka." 
Acts5:25 Hĩndĩ ĩyo gũgĩũka mũndũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Andũ arĩa mũraikirie njeera marũngiĩ Hekaarũ thĩinĩ makĩrutana!”" 
Acts5:26 Naake mũnene wa Hekaarũ hamwe na thigari magĩthiĩ makĩreehe atũmwo mategũtũmĩra hinya, amu nĩmeetigagĩra matikahũũrwo na mahiga nĩ andũ." 
Acts5:27 Marĩĩkia kũmareehe, makĩmarũũgamia mbere ya kĩama, naake Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai Ũrĩa Mũnene akĩmooria atĩrĩ," 
Acts5:28 “Githĩ tũtiamũkaanirie na hinya atĩ mũtikaanarutane thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩu, na rĩu nĩmũiyũrĩĩtie ũrutani wanyu Jerusalemu guothe? Kaĩ mũkwenda tũcookererwo nĩ thakame ya mũndũ ũcio?”" 
Acts5:29 Naake Petero na atũmwo acio angĩ magĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Ithuĩ no mũhaka twathĩkĩre Ngai gũkĩra gwathĩkĩra andũ." 
Acts5:30 Ngai wa maithe maitũ nĩariũkirie Jesũ ũrĩa mwambire mũtharaba igũrũ mũkĩmũũraga. 
Acts5:31 Naake Ngai nĩamũtũũgĩririe agĩikara mwena wake wa ũrĩo, arĩ mũtongoria na mũhonokia wa gũtũma andũ a Isiraeli merire, mooherwo meehia maao." 
Acts5:32 Ithuĩ na ithuĩ tũrĩ aira a ũhoro ũcio, o naake Roho Mũtheru ũrĩa Ngai aheete arĩa mamwathĩkagĩra nĩ mũira.”" 
Acts5:33 Nao maigua ũhoro ũcio makĩng'ũrĩka mũno, makĩenda kũũraga atũmwo." 
Acts5:34 No Mũfarisai ũmwe wa kĩama wetagwo Gamalieli, warĩ mũrutani wa Watho, mũndũ waheetwo gĩtĩĩo nĩ andũ oothe akĩrũũgama agĩathana atĩ atũmwo moimio nja haniini." 
Acts5:35 Naake akĩĩra kĩama atĩrĩ, “Andũ aya a Isiraeli menyereraai ũrĩa mũgwĩka na andũ aya." 
Acts5:36 Nĩmũkũmenya atĩ matukũ mathiru, Theuda nĩarũũgamĩĩte na akeyonanagia ta aarĩ mũndũ wa bata, na andũ ta magana mana makĩmũrũmĩrĩra. Aacookire akĩũragwo, nao arĩa oothe maamũrũmĩrĩire makĩhurunjũka, naguo ũhoro ũcio wake ũgĩtuĩka wa tũhũ." 
Acts5:37 Thuutha ũcio Judasi ũrĩa Mũgalili akĩyumĩria matukũinĩ ma kwĩyandĩkithia, na akĩguucĩrĩria andũ aingĩ, no rĩrĩa aakuire arĩa oothe maamũrũmĩrĩire makĩhurunjũka." 
Acts5:38 O na rĩu niĩ ngũmwĩra atĩ, mweherere andũ aya mũtigane nao, amu angĩkorwo mũbango ũyũ kana ũhoro ũyũ nĩ wa andũ nĩũgũthira." 
Acts5:39 No angĩkorwo nĩ wa Ngai, inyuĩ mũtihota gũtooria andũ aya. Mwahota gũkorwo nĩ Ngai mũrarũwa naake!” Kĩama gĩkĩigua mataaro ma Gamalieli." 
Acts5:40 Gĩgĩĩta atũmwo gĩkĩmahũũra, na gĩkĩmakaania matigaacooke kwaria thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩa Jesũ, gĩgĩcooka gĩkĩmarekereria." 
Acts5:41 Nao atũmwo makiuma hau kĩamainĩ makeneete mũno tondũ Ngai nĩoneete maagĩrĩire kũherithio na njĩra ya thoni nĩ tondũ wa rĩĩtwa rĩu. 
Acts5:42 Nao magĩthiĩ na mbere o mũthenya kũrutana na kũhunjia Hekaarũinĩ o na mĩciĩinĩ mategũtigithĩria, makiugaga atĩ Jesũ nĩ we Mesia." 
Acts6:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, matukũinĩ macio rĩrĩa arutwo maathiire makĩongerekaga, Ayahudi amwe arĩa maaragia Kĩngiriki makĩambĩrĩria kũng'ong'oorera Ahibirania atĩ atumia aao a ndigwa matiagayagĩrwo indo wega." 
Acts6:2 Nao atũmwo arĩa ikũmi na eerĩ magĩĩta andũ arĩa angĩ meetĩkĩĩtie makĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Ti wega tũtiganĩrie wĩra wa kũhunjia ũhoro wa Ngai nĩguo tũgayanagie indo." 
Acts6:3 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio aariũ na aarĩ a Ithe witũ thĩinĩ wa Mwathani, thuuraai gatagatĩinĩ kaanyu andũ mũgwanja, arĩa me na ngumo njega na maiyũrĩĩtwo nĩ Roho Mũtheru na ũũgĩ, tũmahe wĩra ũcio." 
Acts6:4 Ithuĩ-rĩ, tũhũthagĩre mahinda maitũ moothe kũhooya na kũheana ũhoro wa Ngai.”" 
Acts6:5 Ũndũ ũcio ũgĩgĩkenia andũ oothe, nao magĩthuura Sitefano, mũndũ waiyũrĩĩtwo nĩ wĩtĩkio na Roho Mũtheru, Filipu, Porokoro, Nikanori, Timoni, Paramena, na Nikola, mũrũũrĩrĩ woimĩĩte Anitiokia akagarũrũka agatuĩka Mũyahudi." 
Acts6:6 Magĩkĩmareehe mbere ya atũmwo, nao atũmwo makĩmahoera na makĩmaigĩrĩra mooko." 
Acts6:7 Naguo ũhoro wa Ngai ũgĩthiĩ na mbere gũtamba nao arutwo makĩingĩha mũno kũu Jerusalemu, o na athĩnjĩri Ngai gĩkundi kĩnene magĩĩtĩkia." 
Acts6:8 Naake Sitefano aiyũrĩĩtwo nĩ wega na hinya wa Ngai agĩĩka maũndũ ma kũgegania na akĩringa ciama gatagatĩinĩ ka andũ. 
Acts6:9 Nao andũ amwe a gĩkundi kĩa thunagogi ĩrĩa yetagwo ya arĩa oohore, a kuuma Kurene na Alekisandaria, na arĩa moimĩĩte Kilikia na Asia magĩũkĩrĩra Sitefano makĩambĩrĩria kũmũkararia." 
Acts6:10 No Roho akĩhe Sitefano ũũgĩ mũingĩ ũguo atĩ akĩaria matingĩahotire kũmwĩtiiria. 
Acts6:11 Nao makĩheenereria andũ na hitho moige atĩrĩ, “Nĩtũiguĩte Sitefano akĩruma Musa o na akĩruma Ngai!”" 
Acts6:12 Magĩgĩtũma ookĩrĩrwo nĩ andũ, athuuri a kĩama na arutani a Watho. Nao makĩnyiita Sitefano makĩmũtwara mbere ya kĩama." 
Acts6:13 Magĩcooka makĩreehe aira a maheeni arĩa moigire atĩrĩ, “Mũndũ ũyũ ndatigaga kũmenereria Hekaarũ ĩno theru o na Watho wa Musa." 
Acts6:14 Tondũ nĩtũiguĩte akiuga atĩ Jesũ ũcio wa Nazarethi nĩagaatharia Hekaarũ ĩno, na agarũre mĩtugo ĩrĩa twaheirwo nĩ Musa!”" 
Acts6:15 Na rĩĩrĩ, arĩa oothe maarĩ ho kĩamainĩ makĩmũkũũrĩra maitho, nao makĩona ũthiũ wa Sitefano ũhaana ta wa mũraika." 
Acts7:1 Naake Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai Ũrĩa Mũnene akĩũria Sitefano atĩrĩ, “Ũguo nĩguo kũhaana?”" 
Acts7:2 Naake Sitefano akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Aariũ a Ithe wĩtũ na aabaaba tathikĩrĩriai! Ngai mwene riiri nĩoimĩrĩire ithe witũ Aburahamu, rĩrĩa aarĩ bũrũriinĩ wa Mesopotamia. Ataanathiĩ gũtũũra bũrũri wa Harani" 
Acts7:3 akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Thaama uume bũrũri wanyu ũtige andũ aanyu ũthiĩ bũrũri ũrĩa ngaakuonia.’" 
Acts7:4 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Aburahamu akiuma bũrũri wa Akalidei, agĩthiĩ gũtũũra Harani. Rĩrĩa ithe aakuire, Ngai akĩmũruta kũu akĩmũreehe gũũkũ bũrũri ũyũ mũtũũraga." 
Acts7:5 Na rĩĩrĩ, Ngai ndamũheire bũrũri ũcio o na ikinya rĩmwe ũtuĩke igai rĩake, no nĩamwĩrĩire bũrũri ũcio atĩ nĩũgaatuĩka wake hamwe na ciana ciake, o na gwatuĩka Aburahamu ndaarĩ na mwana." 
Acts7:6 Ngai eerire Aburahamu atĩ: ‘Njiarwa ciaku igaatũũra bũrũri mũgeni irĩ ng'eni kũrĩa igaatuo ngombo na cione mathĩĩna mĩaka magana mana (400). 
Acts7:7 Na niĩ nĩngaatuĩra rũũrĩrĩ rũu igaatungatagĩra na ndarĩĩkia gũciruta rũũrĩrĩinĩ rũu, nĩigaathaathayagia irĩ bũrũriinĩ ũyũ.’" 
Acts7:8 Ngai agĩgĩtũma irua rĩtuĩke rũũri rwa kĩrĩĩkanĩro. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Aburahamu akĩruithia Isaaka arĩ wa mĩthenya ĩnaana thuutha wa gũciarwo. Naake Isaaka akĩruithia mũũrũwe Jakubu, naake Jakubu akĩruithia aariũ aake ikũmi na eerĩ, na acio nĩ o maithe maitũ." 
Acts7:9 “Na rĩĩrĩ, aariũ a Jakubu makĩiguĩra mũrũ wa ithe wao Josefu ũiru makĩmwendia bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri." 
Acts7:10 No Ngai aarĩ hamwe naake, agĩkĩmũhonokia kuuma mathĩĩnainĩ moothe. Agĩkĩmũhe ũũgĩ agĩtũma eendwo nĩ mũthamaki wa Misiri, ũrĩa wamũtuire mũnene bũrũriinĩ ũcio o na akĩmũhe wĩra wa kũroraga Misiri guothe o hamwe na mũciĩ wake wothe." 
Acts7:11 Thuutha ũcio gũkĩgĩa ng'aragu bũrũri wothe wa Misiri o na Kanaani, o na mathĩĩna maingĩ mũno. Namo maithe maitũ makĩaga irio." 
Acts7:12 No rĩrĩa Jakubu aiguire atĩ Misiri kwarĩ na irio, agĩtũma aariũ aake riita rĩa mbere, nĩ o maithe maitũ." 
Acts7:13 Nao mathiĩ riita rĩa keerĩ, Josefu akĩĩmenyithania na aariũ a ithe na andũ a Josefu makĩmenyeka nĩ mũthamaki wa Misiri." 
Acts7:14 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Josefu agĩtũmanĩra ithe Jakubu athiĩ Misiri na andũ aake oothe, nao maarĩ ta andũ mĩrongo mũgwanja na ataano." 
Acts7:15 Naake Jakubu na aariũ aake magĩgĩthiĩ Misiri kũrĩa oothe maakuĩrĩire. 
Acts7:16 Na rĩĩrĩ, mĩĩrĩ yao ĩgĩkuuo ĩgĩtwarwo Shekemu, ĩgĩthikwo mbĩĩrĩrainĩ ĩrĩa Aburahamu aagũrĩĩte kuuma kũrĩ ciana cia Hamori kũu Shekemu." 
Acts7:17 “Na rĩrĩa ihinda rĩakuhĩrĩirie rĩa Ngai kũhingia kĩĩranĩro kĩrĩa eerĩire Aburahamu, andũ aitũ magĩkorwo moongererekeete mũno kũu bũrũri wa Misiri." 
Acts7:18 Na gũgĩkorwo kũgĩĩte na mũthamaki ũngĩ, ũrĩa ũtaamenyeete Josefu." 
Acts7:19 Mũthamaki ũcio nĩahinyĩrĩirie andũ aitũ mũno, na agĩatha maithe maitũ marute twana tuothe nĩguo tũũragwo." 
Acts7:20 Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩguo Musa aaciarirwo, naake aarĩ mũthaka mũno. Agĩkĩrererwo mũciĩ gwa ithe mĩeri ĩtatũ." 
Acts7:21 Na rĩrĩa aateirwo kuuma mũciĩ, mwarĩ wa mũthamaki akĩmuoya akĩmũrera ta mwana wake." 
Acts7:22 Musa agĩkĩrerwo na ũũgĩ wothe wa andũ a Misiri, naake agĩtuĩka mũndũ wĩ na ũhoti rĩrĩa ekwaria o na agĩĩka maũndũ." 
Acts7:23 “Na hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aakinyirie mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna, akĩigua e na wendo wa gũthiĩ kũrora ũrĩa andũ a rũũrĩrĩ rwake rwa Isiraeli maikaraga." 
Acts7:24 Naake oona ũmwe wao agĩĩkwo ũũru nĩ Mũmisiri agĩthiĩ kũmũũrĩria akĩmũteithĩrĩria, akĩringa Mũmisiri ũcio akĩmũũraga." 
Acts7:25 (Musa eeciiragia atĩ andũ aao nĩmekũmenya atĩ Ngai nĩakaamũhũthĩra amarute ũkomboinĩ no o matiamenyire.) 
Acts7:26 Na mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ agĩkora Aisiraeli eerĩ magĩtetania, akĩgeria kũmaiguithania akĩmeera atĩrĩ, ‘Andũ aitũ, mũranegenania nĩkĩ na mũrĩ amwe?’" 
Acts7:27 Naake mũndũ ũrĩa wekĩĩte ũcio ũngĩ ũũru agĩikania Musa akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, ‘Nũũ ũgũtuĩte mũnene witũ na mũtũtuĩri?" 
Acts7:28 Anga nĩũkwenda kũnjũraga ta ũrĩa ũrooragire Mũmisiri ira?’ 
Acts7:29 Rĩrĩa Musa aiguire ũguo, akĩũra akiuma Misiri agĩthiĩ gũtũũra e mũgeni bũrũri wa Midiani. E kũu akĩgĩa na aariũ eerĩ." 
Acts7:30 “Na rĩĩrĩ, mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna yathira, Musa arĩ werũinĩ wa kĩrĩma gĩa Sinai, akiumĩrĩrwo nĩ mũraika arĩ rũrĩrĩmbĩinĩ rwa mwaki ũrĩa wakanaga kĩhingainĩ." 
Acts7:31 Na rĩrĩa Musa oonire ũguo akĩgega, na rĩrĩa aakuhagĩrĩria nĩguo oone wega akĩigua mũgambo wa Mwathani ũkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ," 
Acts7:32 ‘Nĩ niĩ Ngai wa maithe maanyu, o we Ngai wa Aburahamu, na Isaaka na Jakubu.’ Naake Musa akĩambĩrĩria kũinaina o na agĩĩtigĩra kũrora." 
Acts7:33 Naake Mwathani akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, ‘Ruta iraatũ amu hau ũrũngiĩ nĩ handũ hatheru." 
Acts7:34 Hatirĩ nganja nĩnyoneete ũrĩa andũ aakwa marathĩĩnio kũu Misiri na nĩnjiguĩte kĩrĩro kĩao. Nĩnjũkĩĩte thĩ nĩguo ndĩmahonokie; rĩu ũka nĩngũgũtũma Misiri.’ 
Acts7:35 “Na rĩĩrĩ, Musa o ũrĩa andũ maaregire makĩũria atĩrĩ, ‘Nũũ ũgũtuĩte mũnene witũ na mũtũtuĩri?’ Ũcio nĩwe Ngai aatũmire arĩ mũtongoria na mũkũũri wao ahotithĩĩtio nĩ mũraika ũrĩa wamuumĩrĩire kĩhingainĩ gĩkĩhĩa." 
Acts7:36 Akĩmatongoria akĩmaruta kuo thuutha wa kũringa ciama na gwĩka maũndũ ma magegania kũu Misiri na Iriainĩ Ituune, o na werũinĩ ihinda rĩa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna." 
Acts7:37 Musa ũcio nowe werire andũ a Isiraeli atĩrĩ, ‘Ngai nĩakaamũtũmĩra mũnabii kuuma kũrĩ andũ aanyu, o ta ũrĩa niĩ aandũmire.’" 
Acts7:38 Ningĩ Musa ũcio nowe warĩ na andũ a Isiraeli kũu werũinĩ rĩrĩa aarĩirio nĩ mũraika kĩrĩmainĩ gĩa Sinai e hamwe na maithe maitũ, na akĩamũkĩra ciugo irĩ muoyo nĩguo atũhe." 
Acts7:39 “Ũcio nowe maithe maitũ maaregire gwathĩkĩra; makĩmũthinĩkania na makĩĩrirĩria gũcooka Misiri. 
Acts7:40 Nao magĩkĩĩra Harũni atĩrĩ, ‘Tũthondekere ngai cia gũtũtongoria, amu Musa ũcio watũrutire Misiri tũtiũĩ ũrĩa ooneete.’" 
Acts7:41 Namo matukũinĩ macio magĩthondeka mũhianano wa ndeegwa, makĩũrutĩra magongoona, na magĩkũngũĩra wĩra wa mooko maao." 
Acts7:42 Naake Ngai akĩmatiganĩria, akĩmarekereria mathaathayagie ciũmbe cia igũrũ, o ta ũrĩa kwandĩkĩĩtwo thĩinĩ wa Ibuku rĩa anabii atĩrĩ: ‘Andũ aya a Isiraeli! Hiihi nĩ niĩ mwathĩnjagĩra na mũkarutĩra magongoona werũinĩ mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna?" 
Acts7:43 Nĩkuoya muoire hema ya Moloku na mũhianano wa Refani njata ĩrĩa mũtuĩte Ngai yanyu, mĩhianano ĩrĩa mwethondekeire mũmĩthaathayagie. Na kwoguo nĩngaamũthaamia ndĩmũtware kũraaya mbere ya Babiloni.’" 
Acts7:44 “Maithe maitũ maarĩ na Hema ya kuonania atĩ Ngai aarĩ hamwe nao werũinĩ. Nayo yakĩĩtwo o ta ũrĩa Ngai eerĩĩte Musa, kũringana na mũcoro ũrĩa Musa ooneetio." 
Acts7:45 Na thuutha ũcio, maithe maitũ arĩa maatigĩirwo hema ĩyo nĩ maithe maao nĩmaamĩkuuaga rĩrĩa maarĩ na Joshua magĩtuunyana bũrũri kuuma kũrĩ ndũũrĩrĩ iria ciaingatirwo nĩ Ngai. Nayo ĩgĩgĩikara kũu kinya hĩndĩ ya Daudi." 
Acts7:46 Naake Daudi agĩkĩonwo arĩ mwagĩrĩru nĩ Ngai, naake agĩkĩmũhooya amwĩtĩkĩrie aakĩre Ngai wa Jakubu ũikaro." 
Acts7:47 No nĩ Solomoni wamwakĩire nyũmba. 
Acts7:48 “No rĩĩrĩ, Ngai ũcio wĩ igũrũ mũno-rĩ, ndatũũraga nyũmba ciakĩĩtwo na mooko ma andũ o ta ũrĩa mũnabii oigĩĩte ũũ:" 
Acts7:49 Mwathani ekuuga atĩrĩ, ‘Igũrũ nĩkuo gĩtĩ gĩakwa kĩa ũnene, nayo thĩ nĩ gaturwa ga kũigĩrĩra magũrũ maakwa. Nĩ nyũmba ĩrĩkũ ũngĩkĩnjakĩra? He ha handũ harĩa ingĩkĩhuurũka?" 
Acts7:50 Anga ti niĩ ndathondekire indo ici ciothe?’ 
Acts7:51 “Andũ aya aremi! Inyuĩ ngoro cianyu iteetĩkĩĩtie. O inyuĩ mũtaiguaga ũhoro wa Ngai! Ũguo noguo maithe maanyu meekire: o na inyuĩ noguo mũtũũraga mũreganĩĩte na Roho Mũtheru. 
Acts7:52 Kũrĩ mũnabii maithe maanyu mataanyariirire? Mooragire o na arĩa maamenyithanĩĩtie o mbere gũũka kwa ũrĩa mũthingu, ũrĩa rĩu o na inyuĩ mũkunyanĩire na mũkamũũraga." 
Acts7:53 Nĩ inyuĩ mwanengerirwo Watho nĩ araika na mũkĩaga kũwathĩkĩra!” 
Acts7:54 Nao athuuri a Kĩama maigua maũndũ macio makĩng'ũrĩka mũno na makĩharagania magego nĩ ũndũ wake. 
Acts7:55 No Sitefano aiyũrĩĩtwo nĩ Roho Mũtheru, akĩrora igũrũ akĩona riiri wa Ngai, na akĩona Jesũ Kristũ arũngiĩ mwena wa ũrĩo wa Ngai." 
Acts7:56 Naake akiuga atĩrĩ, “Oneei! Nĩndĩrona igũrũ rĩhingũkĩĩte, na Mũrũ wa Mũndũ aikaire mwena wa ũrĩo wa Ngai!”" 
Acts7:57 Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ makĩanĩrĩra na mũgambo mũnene mahingĩĩte matũ maao makĩmũguthũkĩra oothe me hamwe," 
Acts7:58 makĩmuumia nja ya itũũra, makĩmũhũũra na mahiga. Nao aira makĩiga nguo ciao magũrũinĩ ma mwanake wetagwo Saũlũ." 
Acts7:59 Nao rĩrĩa maamũhũũraga na mahiga, Sitefano akĩhooya akiuga atĩrĩ, “Mwathani Jesũ amũkĩra roho wakwa!”" 
Acts7:60 Agĩcooka agĩturia ndu, akĩanĩrĩra na mũgambo mũnene akiuga atĩrĩ, “Mwathani ndũkaamoorie rĩĩhia rĩĩrĩ!” Naake arĩĩkia kuuga ũguo agĩtuĩkana." 
Acts8:1 Naake Saũlũ agĩgĩĩtĩkĩra atĩ kũũragwo gwa Sitefano nĩkwagĩrĩire. Na mũthenya ũcio kanitha ũkĩambĩrĩria kũnyariirwo mũno kũu Jerusalemu. Nao andũ oothe arĩa meetĩkĩĩtie, tiga atũmwo, makĩhurunjũka makĩũrĩra mabũrũri ma Judea na Samaria." 
Acts8:1 Naake Saũlũ agĩgĩĩtĩkĩra atĩ kũũragwo gwa Sitefano nĩkwagĩrĩire. Na mũthenya ũcio kanitha ũkĩambĩrĩria kũnyariirwo mũno kũu Jerusalemu. Nao andũ oothe arĩa meetĩkĩĩtie, tiga atũmwo, makĩhurunjũka makĩũrĩra mabũrũri ma Judea na Samaria." 
Acts8:2 Nao andũ amwe ahooi Ngai magĩthika Sitefano na makĩmũrĩrĩra mũno. 
Acts8:3 Naake Saũlũ agĩũkĩrĩra kanitha, agathiaga nyũmba o nyũmba akĩrutũrũraga arĩa oothe meetĩkĩĩtie, arũme na andũ a nja akĩmaikagia njeera." 
Acts8:4 Na rĩĩrĩ, andũ arĩa meetĩkĩĩtie maahurunjũkĩire kũndũ na kũndũ, magĩthiĩ makĩhunjagia Ũhoro ũrĩa Mwega." 
Acts8:5 Naake Filipu agĩthiĩ itũũrainĩ rĩnene rĩa Samaria akĩhunjĩria andũ a kuo ũhoro wa Mesia. 
Acts8:6 Nao andũ aingĩ marĩ na ngoro ĩmwe nĩmaathikagĩrĩria Filipu, maigua ũrĩa aaragia, na moona ciama iria aaringaga." 
Acts8:7 Amu ngoma nĩcioimaga arĩa maarĩ nacio cianĩrĩire na mũgambo mũnene, na andũ aingĩ arĩa maarĩ cionje na ithua nĩmaahonagio." 
Acts8:8 Gũgĩkĩgĩa na gĩkeno kĩnene mũno itũũrainĩ rĩu. 
Acts8:9 Na rĩĩrĩ, itũũrainĩ rĩu nĩkwarĩ mũndũ wetagwo Simoni watũire aragũraga, akamakagia andũ mũno kũu Samaria agĩĩtuaga mũndũ mũnene mũno." 
Acts8:10 Nao andũ oothe anyiinyi na anene nĩmaamũthikagĩrĩria makoigaga atĩrĩ, “Mũndũ ũyũ nĩ we hinya wa Ngai ũrĩa wĩtagwo ‘Hinya mũnene.’ ”" 
Acts8:11 Maamũthikagĩrĩria wega nĩ gũkorwo nĩamamakĩĩtie na ũragũri wake ihinda iraaya. 
Acts8:12 Nao arĩa oothe meetĩkirie Ũhoro ũrĩa Mwega wa Ũthamaki wa Ngai na wa Jesũ Kristũ, ũrĩa maahunjĩirio nĩ Filipu makĩbatithio, arũme o hamwe na andũ a nja." 
Acts8:13 Simoni o naake agĩĩtĩkia na akĩbatithio akĩrũmĩrĩra Filipu. Naake oona ciama na maũndũ ma magegania magĩĩkwo akĩmaka mũno. 
Acts8:14 Rĩrĩa atũmwo arĩa maarĩ Jerusalemu maiguire atĩ andũ a Samaria nĩmaamũkĩrĩĩte ũhoro wa Ngai, makĩmatũmĩra Petero na Johana." 
Acts8:15 Nao maakinya, makĩhoera andũ acio nĩ geetha maheeo Roho Mũtheru," 
Acts8:16 amu Roho Mũtheru ndakoreetwo aikũrũkĩire o na ũmwe wao tiga o kũbatithio maabatithĩĩtio thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩa Mwathani Jesũ. 
Acts8:17 Nao Petero na Johana magĩkĩmaigĩrĩra mooko, makĩiyũrwo nĩ Roho Mũtheru." 
Acts8:18 Naake Simoni oona atĩ mũndũ aiyũragwo nĩ Roho aigĩrĩrwo mooko nĩ atũmwo akĩĩrĩra atũmwo mbeeca," 
Acts8:19 akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “O na niĩ heei hinya ũcio nĩ geetha ndaigĩrĩra mũndũ mooko akaiyũrwo nĩ Roho Mũtheru.”" 
Acts8:20 No Petero akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Mbeeca ciaku irothiranĩria nawe. Ũgwĩciiria wahota kũgũra kĩheeo kĩa Ngai na mbeeca!" 
Acts8:21 Wee ndũrĩ na handũ kana igai wĩrainĩ ũyũ witũ, amu ngoro yaku ndĩrũngĩrĩirie maithoinĩ ma Ngai." 
Acts8:22 Wĩrire nĩ ũndũ wa waganu ũcio waku, na ũhooe Mwathani akuohere nĩ ũndũ wa gwĩciiria meciiria ta macio." 
Acts8:23 Amu nguona wee wĩ na marũrũ maingĩ ma ũiru na ũkoohwo nĩ meehia.” 
Acts8:24 Naake Simoni akiuga atĩrĩ, “hoera Mwathani nĩ geetha ndigakorwo nĩ ũndũ o na ũmwe wa macio wagweta.”" 
Acts8:25 Nao marĩĩkia kuumbũra na kũheana ũhoro wa Mwathani, Petero na Johana magĩcooka Jerusalemu, na magĩthiĩ makĩhunjagia Ũhoro ũrĩa Mwega icagiinĩ nyingĩ cia kũu Samaria." 
Acts8:26 No rĩĩrĩ, Filipu akĩĩrwo nĩ mũraika wa Mwathani atĩrĩ, “Ũkĩra ũthiĩ na mwena wa na kĩanda ũkinye njĩrainĩ ĩrĩa yumĩĩte Jerusalemu ĩgathiĩ Gaza.” (Njĩra ĩyo ndĩgeragwo matukũinĩ maya.)" 
Acts8:27 Naake Filipu agĩũkĩra agĩthiĩ. Na rĩĩrĩ, mũndũ woimĩĩte Ethiopia warĩ mũhakũre, warutaga wĩra wa kũmenyerera mbeeca cia kwini wa Ethiopia wetagwo Kandake, nĩkũinũka ainũkaga oimĩĩte Jerusalemu kũhooya." 
Acts8:28 Naake aathiaga agĩthoomaga ibuku rĩa mũnabii Isaia aikarĩĩte thĩ ngaariinĩ yake ĩrĩa yaguucĩĩtio nĩ mbarathi. 
Acts8:29 Naake Filipu akĩĩrwo nĩ Roho atĩrĩ, “Thiĩ ũtwarane na ngaari ĩĩrĩa ya mbarathi.”" 
Acts8:30 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Filipu akĩhiũha, agĩkinya harĩ mũndũ ũcio. Naake aigua agĩthooma ibuku rĩa mũnabii Isaia akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Nĩũrataũkĩrwo nĩ ũhoro ũcio ũrathooma?”" 
Acts8:31 Naake mũndũ ũcio akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Ingĩtaũkĩrwo atĩa tiga mũndũ andaarĩirie?” Agĩgĩthaitha Filipu atoonye ngaariinĩ maikaranie." 
Acts8:32 Nako gacunjĩ ka maandĩko karĩa mũndũ ũcio aathoomaga nĩ gaaka: “O ta ũrĩa ng'ondu itwaragwo gũthĩnjwo, o na ta ũrĩa gatũrũme gakiraga ki mbere ya mũndũ ũrĩa ũrakeenja guoya, noguo o naake ataatumũrire kanua gaake." 
Acts8:33 Nĩaconorirwo, na ndaigana gũtuĩrwo na kĩhooto. Nũũ ũngĩheana ũhoro wa rũciaro rwake? Amu muoyo wake nĩwehereetio gũũkũ thĩ.”" 
Acts8:34 Mũndũ ũcio warĩ mũhakũre akĩĩra Filipu atĩrĩ, “Ndagũthaitha tanjĩĩra mũnabii ũcio aaragia ũhoro wa ũ? Nĩ ũhoro wake we mwene kana nĩ wa mũndũ ũngĩ?”" 
Acts8:35 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Filipu akĩambĩrĩria kwaria akĩhe mũndũ ũcio Ũhoro ũrĩa Mwega wa Jesũ, aambĩrĩirie na gacunjĩ o kau ka maandĩko." 
Acts8:36 O magĩthiaga na njĩra, magĩkinya handũ haarĩ maaĩ, naake mũndũ ũcio akiuga atĩrĩ, “One, haaha he maaĩ. Kũrĩ na ũndũ wa kũgiria mbatithio?” [" 
Acts8:37 Naake Filipu akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Ũngĩĩtĩkia na ngoro yaku yothe, no ũbatithio.” Naake agĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Nĩnjĩtĩkĩĩtie atĩ Jesũ Kristũ nĩ Mũrũ wa Ngai.”]" 
Acts8:38 Naake agĩathana atĩ ngaari ĩrũũgamio. Nao eerĩ Filipu na mũndũ ũcio magĩtoonya maaĩinĩ, naake Filipu akĩmũbatithia." 
Acts8:39 Na rĩĩrĩ, moima maaĩinĩ, Filipu akĩeherio nĩ Roho wa Mwathani, mũndũ ũcio akĩaga gũcooka kũmuona. Naake agĩthiĩ na mbere na rũgendo aiyũrĩĩtwo nĩ gĩkeno." 
Acts8:40 Na rĩĩrĩ, Filipu aacookire kuonwo itũũrainĩ rĩa Azoto, naake aahĩtũkaga akĩhunjagia Ũhoro ũrĩa Mwega matũũrainĩ moothe o nginya agĩkinya Kaisarea." 
Acts9:1 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Saũlũ agĩkorwo arĩ na ũũru mũingĩ na akoigaga atĩ arutwo oothe a Mwathani mooragwo. Agĩgĩthiĩ kũrĩ Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai Ũrĩa Mũnene," 
Acts9:2 akĩũria aheeo marũa ma gũthiĩ namo thunagogiinĩ iria ciarĩ Damasiki, nĩ geetha arĩa oothe angĩona a Njĩra ya Mwathani amanyiite, amoohe amatware Jerusalemu." 
Acts9:3 Na rĩĩrĩ, akuhĩrĩria Damasiki ũtheri ũkiuma igũrũ o rĩmwe, ũkĩmwarĩra kuuma mĩena yothe." 
Acts9:4 Naake akĩgũa thĩ, akĩigua mũgambo ũkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Saũlũ, Saũlũ! Ũnyariiraga nĩkĩ?”" 
Acts9:5 Naake Saũlũ akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Wee nĩ we ũ, Mwathani?” Naguo mũgambo ũcio ũgĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Nĩ niĩ Jesũ ũrĩa ũnyariiraga." 
Acts9:6 Atĩrĩĩrĩ, ũkĩra ũtoonye itũũra, na nĩũkwĩrwo ũrĩa wagĩrĩirwo nĩũgwĩka.”" 
Acts9:7 Nao andũ arĩa maarĩ naake makĩrũũgama makirĩĩte ki, tondũ nĩmaiguire mũgambo no mationire ũrĩa waragia." 
Acts9:8 Naake Saũlũ agĩũkĩra akĩrũũgama na ahingũra maitho ndahotire kuona kĩndũ. Agĩkĩnyiitwo guoko nĩ arĩa maarĩ naake, makĩmũtoonyia Damasiki." 
Acts9:9 Naake agĩikara mĩthenya ĩtatũ atekuona na atekũrĩa kana akanyua. 
Acts9:10 Na rĩĩrĩ, kũu Damasiki nĩkwarĩ mũrutwo wetagwo Anania. Mwathani akĩmwarĩria na njĩra ya kĩoneki akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Anania!” Naake akiuga atĩrĩ, “Ĩ niĩ ũyũ haaha, Mwathani.”" 
Acts9:11 Naake Mwathani akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Ũkĩra, ũthiĩ njĩrainĩ ĩrĩa ĩĩtagwo ‘Nũngarũ’ ũtoonye nyũmba ya Judasi, ũũrie mũndũ wa kuuma Tariso wĩtagwo Saũlũ. Nĩkũhooya arahooya," 
Acts9:12 na nĩoneete thĩinĩ wa kĩoneki mũndũ ũgwĩtwo Anania agĩtoonya nyũmba akamũigĩrĩra mooko nĩ geetha ahote gũcooka kuona.” 
Acts9:13 No Anania agĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Mwathani, nĩnjiguĩte ũhoro wa mũndũ ũcio kuuma kũrĩ andũ aingĩ na maũndũ moothe mooru marĩa eekĩĩte andũ aaku thĩinĩ wa Jerusalemu." 
Acts9:14 Rĩu aheetwo ũhoti nĩ athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene ooke gũũkũ anyiite arĩa oothe magũthaathayagia.” 
Acts9:15 No Mwathani akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Wee thiĩ, amu mũndũ ũcio nĩ we thuurĩĩte andungate, atũme rĩĩtwa rĩakwa rĩmenyeke kũrĩ andũ a Ndũũrĩrĩ na athamaki na andũ a Isiraeli." 
Acts9:16 Nĩngũmuonia atĩ no mũhaka athĩĩnio nĩ ũndũ wakwa.” 
Acts9:17 Naake Anania agĩgĩthiĩ agĩtoonya nyũmba akĩigĩrĩra Saũlũ mooko akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Saũlũ mũrũ wa Awa, Mwathani Jesũ ũrĩa ũrakuumĩrĩire ũrĩ njĩrainĩ ũgĩũka nĩ we wandũma. Andũma nĩ geetha ũcooke kuona na ũiyũrwo nĩ Roho Mũtheru.”" 
Acts9:18 Na ihinda o rĩu tũnyamũ tũhaana ngaracũ tũkiuma maitho maake tũkĩgũa thĩ, naake akĩhota kuona rĩngĩ. Naake agĩgĩũkĩra akĩbatithio," 
Acts9:19 na akĩrĩa irio akĩgĩa na hinya. Naake Saũlũ agĩikarania na andũ arĩa meetĩkĩĩtie kũu Damasiki matukũ gakundi. 
Acts9:20 Hĩndĩ o ĩyo agĩthiĩ thunagogiinĩ akĩhunjagia ũhoro wa Jesũ akiugaga atĩ Jesũ nĩ Mũrũ wa Ngai. 
Acts9:21 Nao arĩa oothe maamũiguire makĩgega, makĩũrania atĩrĩ, “Githĩ mũndũ ũyũ ti ũrĩa ũrooragaga arĩa mathaathayagia mũndũ ũcio ti Jesũ kũũrĩa Jerusalemu? Na githĩ ndookĩĩte gũũkũ no ũndũ wa gĩtũmi o kĩu gĩa kũnyiita andũ acio amatware kũrĩ athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene?”" 
Acts9:22 No Saũlũ agĩkĩrĩrĩria o kũgĩa na hinya na akĩrigithia Ayahudi arĩa maatũũraga kũu Damasiki na kũmoonia na ma atĩ Jesũ nĩ we Mesia. 
Acts9:23 Thuutha wa matukũ maingĩ kũhĩtũka, Ayahudi magĩcookania ndundu ya ũrĩa mekũũraga Saũlũ," 
Acts9:24 no Saũlũ akĩmenyithio. Ayahudi maikaraga marangĩire kĩhingo mũthenya na ũtukũ nĩguo mamũũrage. 
Acts9:25 No arutwo aake makĩmuoya ũtukũ ũmwe, makĩmwagararĩria rũthingo igũrũ makĩmũharũrũkia aikĩĩtio gĩkabũinĩ." 
Acts9:26 Na rĩĩrĩ, rĩrĩa Saũlũ aathiire Jerusalemu nĩageririe gũtuĩka ũmwe wa arutwo, no oothe nĩmaamwĩtigagĩra tondũ matietĩkagia atĩ nĩatuĩkĩĩte mũrutwo." 
Acts9:27 No Baranaba akĩoya Saũlũ akĩmũtwara kũrĩ atũmwo, akĩmeera ũrĩa Saũlũ arĩ njĩrainĩ oonire Mwathani ũrĩa wamuumĩrĩire, na ũrĩa ahunjĩĩtie thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩa Mwathani e na ũũmĩrĩru kũu Damasiki." 
Acts9:28 Kwoguo Saũlũ agĩikarania na atũmwo, na agĩthiĩ kũu Jerusalemu guothe, akĩhunjagia thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩa Mwathani oomĩrĩirie mũno." 
Acts9:29 Ningĩ nĩaragia na agakararania na Ayahudi arĩa maaragia Kĩngiriki, nao nĩmaageragia ũrĩa mangĩmũũraga." 
Acts9:30 Rĩrĩa andũ arĩa meetĩkĩĩtie maamenyire ũguo, makĩmũtwara Kaisarea magĩcooka makĩmwĩra athiĩ Tariso." 
Acts9:31 Nao andũ a kanitha kũu guothe Judea, Galili, na Samaria magĩikara na thaayũ. Nĩmoomagĩrĩrio nĩ Roho Mũtheru, magathiaga na njĩra ya gũtĩĩa Mwathani o makĩingĩhaga." 
Acts9:31 Nao andũ a kanitha kũu guothe Judea, Galili, na Samaria magĩikara na thaayũ. Nĩmoomagĩrĩrio nĩ Roho Mũtheru, magathiaga na njĩra ya gũtĩĩa Mwathani o makĩingĩhaga." 
Acts9:32 Na rĩrĩa Petero aaceerangaga kũndũ na kũndũ, agĩkinya kũrĩ andũ a Ngai arĩa maatũũraga Luda." 
Acts9:33 Nakuo kũu agĩkora mũndũ wetagwo Aenea, warũarĩĩte mũrimũ wa gũkua ciĩga na watũire atoimaga ũrĩrĩ mĩaka ĩnaana." 
Acts9:34 Petero akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Aenea, Jesũ Kristũ nĩegũkũhonia. Ũkĩra ware ũrĩrĩ waku.” Ihinda o rĩu agĩũkĩra." 
Acts9:35 Nao andũ oothe arĩa maatũũraga Luda na Sharoni mamuona, magĩĩtĩkia Mwathani." 
Acts9:36 Nakuo itũũrainĩ rĩa Jopa nĩkwarĩ mũtumia mwĩtĩkia wetagwo Tabitha. (Rĩĩtwa rĩu na Kĩngiriki nĩ Dorokasi, na nĩ ta kuuga thwariga.) Nĩarutaga mawĩra meega na agateithia athĩĩni." 
Acts9:37 Na matukũinĩ macio mũtumia ũcio akĩrũara agĩkua. Na marĩĩkia kũmũthambia, makĩmũiga nyũmba ngoroba ya igũrũ." 
Acts9:38 Tondũ Luda kwarĩ gũkuhĩ na Jopa, andũ arĩa meetĩkĩĩtie marĩĩkia kũigua atĩ Petero aarĩ kũu Luda, magĩtũma athuuri eerĩ makamũthaithe mamwĩre atĩrĩ, “Ĩtĩkĩra gũũka gũũkũ gwitũ na ndũgaikare.”" 
Acts9:39 Naake Petero agĩũkĩra agĩtwarana nao. Akinya, makĩmũtwara nyũmba ĩyo ngoroba ya igũrũ. Nao atumia a ndigwa oothe makĩrũũgama harĩ we makĩrĩraga, makĩmuonagia nguo iria Dorokasi atumaga rĩrĩa aarĩ muoyo." 
Acts9:40 No Petero akĩmeera moime nja oothe, agĩturia ndu akĩhooya; agĩcooka akĩhũgũkĩra kĩimba akiuga atĩrĩ, “Tabitha, ũkĩra!” Naake akĩhingũria maitho, na oona Petero agĩĩtiira." 
Acts9:41 Naake Petero akĩmũnyiita guoko, akĩmũrũũgamia. Agĩcooka agĩĩta andũ arĩa meetĩkĩĩtie na atumia a ndigwa, akĩmũneana kũrĩo e muoyo." 
Acts9:42 Naguo ũndũ ũcio ũkĩmenyeka Jopa guothe, nao andũ aingĩ magĩĩtĩkia Mwathani." 
Acts9:43 Naake Petero agĩikara kũu Jopa matukũ maingĩ kwa mũndũ wetagwo Simoni warĩ mũtanduki wa njũũa. 
Acts10:1 Na rĩĩrĩ, kũu Kaisarea nĩkwarĩ mũthuuri ũmwe wetagwo Korinelio, Mũroma mũnene wa thigari igana cia mbũtũ ĩrĩa yetagwo “Mbũtũ ya Mataliani.”" 
Acts10:2 Aarĩ mũndũ mũthingu na hamwe na andũ a mũciĩ wake maarĩ ahooi Ngai. Naake nĩahothagĩra andũ na ũtaana, na nĩathaathayagia Ngai hingo ciothe." 
Acts10:3 Mũthenya ũmwe ta thaa kenda cia mũthenya, mũndũ ũcio akĩona mũraika wa Ngai wega thĩinĩ wa kĩoneki agĩũka na kũrĩ we akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Korinelio!”" 
Acts10:4 Naake Korinelio akĩmũrora amakĩĩte akĩmũũria atĩrĩ, “Nĩ kĩĩ Mwathani?” Mũraika akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ, “Mahooya maaku na kũheana gwaku nĩciamũkĩrĩĩtwo nĩ Ngai." 
Acts10:5 Rĩu tũma athuuri Jopa mageete Simoni ũrĩa wĩtagwo Petero," 
Acts10:6 ũrĩa ũnyiitĩĩtwo ũgeni gwa Simoni ũrĩa mũtanduki wa njũũa, na aakĩĩte rũteereinĩ rwa iria.”" 
Acts10:7 Rĩrĩa mũraika ũcio wamwaragĩria aathiire, Korinelio agĩĩta ndungata ciake igĩrĩ na mũthigari mũthingu ũmwe wa arĩa maamũtungatagĩra," 
Acts10:8 na aamataarĩria ũhoro wothe akĩmatũma Jopa. 
Acts10:9 Na rĩĩrĩ, mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ, ta thaa thita cia mũthenya, o andũ acio marĩ rũgendoinĩ marĩ hakuhĩ gũkinya Jopa, Petero agĩthiĩ nyũmba igũrũ kũhooya." 
Acts10:10 Naake akĩigua ahũtiĩ akĩenda kũrĩa. Rĩrĩa maahaaragĩria irio, akĩona kĩoneki." 
Acts10:11 Agĩkĩona igũrũ rĩhingũkĩĩte, na kĩndũ kĩhaana ta gĩtaama kĩnene gĩgĩikũrũka kĩnyiitĩĩtwo mĩena ĩna gĩkĩharũrũkio kinya thĩ." 
Acts10:12 Thĩinĩ wakĩo nĩkwarĩ mĩthemba yothe ya nyamũ cia magũrũ mana, nyamũ iria itambaga thĩ ta nyoka, o na nyoni." 
Acts10:13 Naguo mũgambo ũgĩũka ũkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Petero arahũka ũthĩnje ũrĩe.”" 
Acts10:14 Naake Petero agĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Aaca Mwathani! Niĩ ndirĩ ndarĩa kĩndũ kĩrĩ mũgiro kana kĩrĩ na thaahu.”" 
Acts10:15 Ningĩ mũgambo ũgĩũka rĩa keerĩ ũkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Kĩrĩa Ngai athereetie ndwagĩrĩirwo nĩkuuga atĩ kĩrĩ na mũgiro.”" 
Acts10:16 Ũndũ ũcio wekĩkire maita matatũ, nakĩo kĩndũ kĩu gĩgĩcookio igũrũ o rĩmwe." 
Acts10:17 Na rĩĩrĩ, o Petero agegeyarĩĩte arigĩĩtwo nĩ ũrĩa kĩoneki kĩu ooneete kĩendaga kũmũmenyithia, athuuri arĩa maatũmĩĩtwo nĩ Korinelio magĩkorwo maarũngiĩ thoome, thuutha wa kũũrĩrĩria mũciĩ gwa Simoni." 
Acts10:18 Nao magĩgĩĩtana nĩguo moorie kana Simoni ũrĩa wetagwo Petero anyiitĩĩtwo ũgeni kuo. 
Acts10:19 Na rĩrĩa Petero eeciiragia ũhoro wa kĩoneki kĩu; Roho akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Tathikĩrĩria! Harĩ na andũ atatũ maragũcaria." 
Acts10:20 Ũkĩra, ũikũrũke ũthiĩ nao na ihenya, nĩ ũndũ nĩ niĩ ndĩmatũmĩĩte.”" 
Acts10:21 Naake Petero agĩikũrũka kuuma ngoroba, agĩthiĩ harĩ andũ acio akĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Nĩ niĩ ũrĩa mũracaria. Mũũkĩĩte nĩkĩ?”" 
Acts10:22 Nao makiuga atĩrĩ, “Atĩrĩĩrĩ, Korinelio ũrĩa mũnene wa thigari igana, mũndũ mũthingu na ũtĩĩĩte Ngai na ũheetwo gĩtĩĩo nĩ rũũrĩrĩ ruothe rwa Ayahudi, areerirwo nĩ mũraika mũtheru agũtũmanĩre ũthiĩ gwake mũciĩ, agathikĩrĩrie ũrĩa ũkuuga.”" 
Acts10:23 Naake akĩmeera matoonye nyũmba, akĩmanyiita ũgeni. Naguo mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ akiumagara hamwe nao, na andũ amwe arĩa meetĩkĩĩtie a kuuma Jopa magĩthiĩ hamwe naake." 
Acts10:24 Mũthenya wa keerĩ magĩkinya Kaisarea, kũrĩa Korinelio aameetereire. Naake nĩetĩĩte andũ a nyũmba yake na arĩa maarĩ ũraata mũno naake." 
Acts10:25 Na rĩĩrĩ, rĩrĩa Petero aatoonyaga, Korinelio akĩmũtũnga akĩĩgũithia magũrũinĩ maake akĩmũthaathaiya." 
Acts10:26 No Petero akĩmũrũũgamia akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ, “Rũũgama, o na niĩ ndĩ o mũndũ ta we.”" 
Acts10:27 Agĩgĩtoonya o makĩaragia naake, agĩkora andũ aingĩ moonganĩĩte." 
Acts10:28 Agĩkĩmeera atĩrĩ, “Inyuĩ nĩmũũĩ wega atĩ Ayahudi matiĩtĩkĩrĩĩtio nĩ Watho gũtukana o na kana gũceera kwa Mũrũũrĩrĩ o na ũrĩkũ. No Ngai nĩanyoneetie atĩ ndiagĩrĩirwo nĩkuuga atĩ mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ e na mũgiro kana e na thaahu." 
Acts10:29 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio, ndatũmanĩrwo nĩndĩrookire; ndinarega. Ngũkĩũria atĩrĩ, ũrandũmanĩire nĩkĩ?”" 
Acts10:30 Naake Korinelio agĩcookia atĩrĩ, “Mĩthenya ĩna mĩthiru, mathaa o ta maya, ndĩ nyũmba ngĩhooya mahooya ma thaa kenda cia mũthenya, mũndũ warĩ na nguo ciahenagia nĩarũũgamire mbere yakwa," 
Acts10:31 akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ: ‘Korinelio! Mahooya maaku nĩmaiguitwo, na Ngai nĩaririkanĩĩte kũheana gwaku."
